--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.OI_fran_acc_prev_month_combine_view3
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `OI_fran_acc_prev_month_combine_view3` AS select `invoice_payment_view`.`id` AS `id`,sum(`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount`) AS `total_sale`,`invoice_payment_view`.`branch` AS `branch`,`invoice_payment_view`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name`,group_concat(`invoice_payment_view`.`invoice_id` separator ',') AS `invoice_ids`,group_concat(`invoice_payment_view`.`code_fullname` separator ',') AS `fullname`,date_format(`invoice_payment_view`.`date`,'%b %y') AS `month`,cast(sum(((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * `invoice_payment_view`.`royalty`) / 100)) as decimal(10,2)) AS `royalty`,`invoice_payment_view`.`zoom` AS `zoom`,cast(sum((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * `invoice_payment_view`.`royalty`) / 100))) as decimal(10,2)) AS `payable` from `invoice_payment_view` where ((`invoice_payment_view`.`date` >= (case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-10','-01') when (month(curdate()) = 2) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-11','-01') when (month(curdate()) = 3) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-01') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 3),'-01') end)) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`date` <= (case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-10','-01') when (month(curdate()) = 2) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-11','-01') when (month(curdate()) = 3) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-01') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 3),'-31') end)) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'Points') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`branch_type` = 'OI_Franchisee') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`category` in ('Offline Right Brain Development','Right Brain Education')) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`invoice_park` = '0') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`clear` = '1') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`park` = '0')) group by `invoice_payment_view`.`branch`;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.OM_fran_acc_prev_month_combine_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `OM_fran_acc_prev_month_combine_view` AS select `on`.`id` AS `id`,`off`.`id` AS `offline_id`,`on`.`invoice_ids` AS `invoice_ids`,`on`.`total_sale` AS `total_sale`,`on`.`branch` AS `branch`,`on`.`branch_name` AS `branch_name`,`on`.`month` AS `month`,(case when ((`on`.`royalty` + `off`.`offline_royalty`) is not null) then (`on`.`royalty` + `off`.`offline_royalty`) else `on`.`royalty` end) AS `royalty`,(case when ((`on`.`gst` + `off`.`gst`) is not null) then (`on`.`gst` + `off`.`gst`) else `on`.`gst` end) AS `gst`,`on`.`zoom` AS `zoom`,(case when ((`on`.`payable` + `off`.`payable`) is not null) then (`on`.`payable` + `off`.`payable`) else `on`.`payable` end) AS `payable` from (`OM_fran_acc_prev_month_view_online` `on` left join `OM_fran_acc_prev_month_view_offline` `off` on((`on`.`branch` = `off`.`branch`))) union select `on`.`id` AS `id`,`off`.`id` AS `offline_id`,`off`.`invoice_ids` AS `invoice_ids`,`off`.`total_sale` AS `total_sale`,`off`.`branch` AS `branch`,`off`.`branch_name` AS `branch_name`,`off`.`month` AS `month`,(case when ((`on`.`royalty` + `off`.`offline_royalty`) is not null) then (`on`.`royalty` + `off`.`offline_royalty`) else `off`.`offline_royalty` end) AS `royalty`,(case when ((`on`.`gst` + `off`.`gst`) is not null) then (`on`.`gst` + `off`.`gst`) else `off`.`gst` end) AS `gst`,`on`.`zoom` AS `zoom`,(case when ((`on`.`payable` + `off`.`payable`) is not null) then (`on`.`payable` + `off`.`payable`) else `off`.`payable` end) AS `payable` from (`OM_fran_acc_prev_month_view_offline` `off` left join `OM_fran_acc_prev_month_view_online` `on` on((`on`.`branch` = `off`.`branch`)));

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.OM_fran_acc_prev_month_view3_offline

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.action_request
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `action_request` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `action` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Action (0-None / 1-SMS / 2-Email / 3-Notification / 4-Followup)',
  `body_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Sms Body Id / Email Body Id / Notif Body Id',
  `no_of_days` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Number of days (-100 - +100)',
  `time` time NOT NULL,
  `request_type` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Request Type (1-Invoice / 2-Payment / 3-Reminder / 4-Expiry / 5-Terms / 6-Birthday / 7-Employee welcome / 8-Sessions / 9-Inquiry / 10-Follow up / 11-Irregular / 12-Admission / 13-Employment / 14-Upgrade / 15-Extend / 16-Downgrade / 17-Invoice delete/18-Payment link,19-Payment cheque,20-Payment Bal Link, 21- Pre followup , 22 - Missed followup ,23 - On followup, 24 - MemberAppLink, 25 - UsernamePassMemberApp, 26 - Free Trial,27 - Update Notice Board[Session], 28 - Call Teacher[Session], 29 - Confirm Date(Session), 30 - Send MOU(session),31 - Receive MOU(Session), 32 - TrainingMaterial(Session),33 - ConfirmAssignment(Session),34 - SessionReminder(Session),35 - ShareTeacherDetails(Session),36 - BatchSchedule(Session)), 37 - DropoutEmailRedFlag, 55 - Offline Payment, 64 - New batch created, 65 - New batch created and invoice made',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `body_id` (`body_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `request_type` (`request_type`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=5667 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.active_inactive_member_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `active_inactive_member_view` AS select `m`.`id` AS `id`,`b`.`id` AS `bid`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name`,`b`.`type` AS `branch_type`,sum((case when (`m`.`status` = '0') then '0' when (`m`.`status` = '1') then '1' else '0' end)) AS `active`,sum((case when (`m`.`status` = '0') then '1' when (`m`.`status` = '1') then '0' else '0' end)) AS `inactive`,sum((case when (`m`.`status` = '0') then '0' when (`m`.`status` = '1') then '0' else '1' end)) AS `ex_member`,count(`m`.`id`) AS `total` from (`member` `m` join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `m`.`bid`))) where (`m`.`park` = 0) group by `b`.`id`;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.active_member_log
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `active_member_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `fullname` varchar(250) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `branch` varchar(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `status` varchar(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=87238 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.active_members_age_range
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `active_members_age_range` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `start_date` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `end_date` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `type` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `branch` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `venue` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `venue_id` int NOT NULL,
  `online` int NOT NULL,
  `offline` int NOT NULL,
  `dob` int NOT NULL,
  `years` float(10,1) NOT NULL,
  `months` int NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uniq_contact_start_end` (`contact_id`,`start_date`,`end_date`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=30747 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.active_members_total_count_range

CREATE TABLE `active_members_total_count_range` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `start_date` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `end_date` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `type` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,

  `venue` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `venue_id` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `online` int NOT NULL,
  `offline` int NOT NULL,
  `total` int NOT NULL,

  `new_offline` int NOT NULL,
  `due_online` int NOT NULL,
  `due_offline` int NOT NULL,
  `renewal_online` int NOT NULL,
  `renewal_offline` int NOT NULL,

  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `start_date` (`start_date`,`end_date`,`branch`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=3535 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.active_offline_member_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `active_offline_member_view` AS select `m`.`id` AS `id`,`b`.`id` AS `bid`,`m`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`ba`.`offline` AS `offline`,`ba`.`id` AS `batch_id`,`b`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name`,`b`.`type` AS `branch_type`,sum(`m`.`status`) AS `total_active`,`m`.`park` AS `park` from ((((`member` `m` left join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `m`.`bid`))) left join `invoice` `i` on((`m`.`contact_id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) left join `invoice_item` `ii` on(((`i`.`id` = `ii`.`invoice_id`) and (`ii`.`sessions` <> 0)))) left join `batch` `ba` on((`ii`.`batch_id` = `ba`.`id`))) where ((`m`.`park` = 0) and (`ba`.`offline` = '1') and (`m`.`status` = '1') and (`i`.`id` = (select max(`invoice`.`id`) from `invoice` where ((`invoice`.`contact_id` = `m`.`contact_id`) and (`invoice`.`park` = '0')))) and (`b`.`type` in ('COCO','Franchisee','OM_Franchisee','OI_Franchisee'))) group by `b`.`id`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.active_online_member_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `active_online_member_view` AS select `m`.`id` AS `id`,`b`.`id` AS `bid`,`m`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`ba`.`offline` AS `offline`,`ba`.`id` AS `batch_id`,`b`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name`,`b`.`type` AS `branch_type`,sum(`m`.`status`) AS `total_active`,`m`.`park` AS `park` from ((((`member` `m` left join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `m`.`bid`))) left join `invoice` `i` on((`m`.`contact_id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) left join `invoice_item` `ii` on(((`i`.`id` = `ii`.`invoice_id`) and (`ii`.`sessions` <> 0)))) left join `batch` `ba` on((`ii`.`batch_id` = `ba`.`id`))) where ((`m`.`park` = 0) and (`ba`.`offline` = '0') and (`m`.`status` = '1') and (`i`.`id` = (select max(`invoice`.`id`) from `invoice` where ((`invoice`.`contact_id` = `m`.`contact_id`) and (`invoice`.`park` = '0')))) and (`b`.`type` in ('COCO','Franchisee','OM_Franchisee','OI_Franchisee'))) group by `b`.`id`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.active_teachers_fast_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `active_teachers_fast_view` AS select distinct `e`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`e`.`interviewer` AS `interviewer` from (((`employee` `e` join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) join `employee_bid` `eb` on((`eb`.`employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `eb`.`bid`))) where ((`e`.`position_id` in (61,47,48,19,18,40,17,67)) and (`e`.`park` = 0) and (`c`.`park` = 0) and (`b`.`type` = 'COCO'));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.active_teachers_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `active_teachers_view` AS select `e`.`id` AS `id`,`e`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`e`.`status` AS `status`,`e`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,concat(`e`.`country_code`,' ',`e`.`mobile`) AS `contact`,`e`.`position` AS `position`,`e`.`email` AS `email`,`e`.`interviewer` AS `interviewer`,group_concat(distinct `b`.`type` separator ',') AS `branch_type`,group_concat(distinct `b`.`branch` separator ',') AS `branches`,group_concat(distinct `vbv`.`venue` separator ',') AS `venue_name`,group_concat(distinct `bt`.`venue_id` separator ',') AS `venue_id`,`e`.`park` AS `park` from ((((`emp_cont_view` `e` left join `branch` `b` on((`e`.`bid` = `b`.`id`))) left join `batch_employee` `be` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `be`.`contact_id`))) left join `batch` `bt` on((`be`.`batch_id` = `bt`.`id`))) left join `venue_branch_view` `vbv` on((`e`.`bid` = `vbv`.`bid`))) where ((`e`.`position_id` in (61,47,48,19,18,40,17,67)) and (`e`.`park` = 0) and (`e`.`cont_park` = 0)) group by `e`.`contact_id` order by `venue_name` desc;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.aga_khan_inq_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `aga_khan_inq_view` AS select `reinquiry_log`.`id` AS `id`,`reinquiry_log`.`date` AS `date`,`reinquiry_log`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`reinquiry_log`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`reinquiry_log`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,`reinquiry_log`.`park` AS `park`,`reinquiry_log`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`reinquiry_log`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`reinquiry_log`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`reinquiry_log`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`c`.`id` AS `contact_id`,`i`.`id` AS `inquiry_id`,`i`.`c_employee_id` AS `counsellor_id`,concat(`c2`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `c_full_name`,`lfv`.`old_comment` AS `latest_comment` from (((((`reinquiry_log` left join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`mobile` = `reinquiry_log`.`mobile`))) left join `inquiry` `i` on((`i`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`e`.`id` = `i`.`c_employee_id`))) left join `contact` `c2` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `c2`.`id`))) left join `latest_followup_table` `lfv` on((`lfv`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) where ((`reinquiry_log`.`source` = 6) and (`reinquiry_log`.`heard_from` = 73) and (`reinquiry_log`.`park` = 0) and (`c`.`park` = 0) and (`i`.`park` = 0)) order by `reinquiry_log`.`id` desc;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.applicant_interview_video
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `applicant_interview_video` AS select `ta`.`id` AS `id`,`zr`.`id` AS `zoom_id`,`zr`.`meeting_id` AS `meeting_id`,`zr`.`topic` AS `topic`,`ta`.`assistant` AS `assistant`,`ta`.`converted` AS `converted`,(case when ((`zr`.`drive_file_id` is null) or (`zr`.`drive_file_id` = '')) then `zr`.`s3_key` else `zr`.`drive_file_id` end) AS `drive_file_id`,`ta`.`interviewer_emp_name` AS `interviewer_emp_name`,`ta`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,`zr`.`DATE` AS `date` from ((`teacher_applicant_session_log` `tas` join (select `zr`.`id` AS `id`,`zr`.`meeting_id` AS `meeting_id`,`zr`.`topic` AS `topic`,`zr`.`drive_file_id` AS `drive_file_id`,`zr`.`s3_key` AS `s3_key`,`zr`.`date` AS `DATE`,`zr`.`park` AS `park` from `zoom_recording` `zr` where `zr`.`id` in (select max(`zoom_recording`.`id`) from `zoom_recording` where (`zoom_recording`.`park` = 0) group by `zoom_recording`.`meeting_id`)) `zr` on((`zr`.`meeting_id` = `tas`.`meeting_id`))) left join `teacher_applicant_view` `ta` on((`tas`.`applicant_id` = `ta`.`id`))) where (`tas`.`park` = '0') order by `ta`.`id` desc;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.asset_master_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `asset_master_view` AS select `am`.`id` AS `id`,`am`.`asset_title` AS `asset_title`,`am`.`asset_file_name` AS `asset_file_name`,count(`na`.`file`) AS `allocations`,`am`.`park` AS `park`,`am`.`asset_description` AS `asset_description`,`am`.`preview` AS `preview`,`am`.`type` AS `type` from (`asset_master2` `am` left join `asset` `na` on((`am`.`asset_file_name` = `na`.`file`))) where (`am`.`park` = 0) group by `am`.`asset_file_name` order by `am`.`id`;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.asset_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `asset_view` AS select `asset`.`id` AS `id`,`asset`.`age_group` AS `age_group`,`asset`.`age_group_value` AS `age_group_value`,`asset`.`class` AS `class`,cast(substr(`asset`.`class`,1,(locate('-',`asset`.`class`) - 1)) as signed) AS `class_f_value`,`asset`.`title` AS `title`,`asset`.`description` AS `description`,`asset`.`type` AS `type`,`asset`.`file` AS `file`,`asset`.`park` AS `park`,`asset`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`asset`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`asset`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`asset`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by` from `asset` order by `asset`.`id`;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.assets
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `assets` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `barcode` varchar(225) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `file_url` varchar(500) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `bill_upload` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-no\r\n1-yes',
  `asset_type` int NOT NULL,
  `asset_kit_status` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-none 1-is it kit 2-Assign to kit	',
  `asset_kit_name` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `max_items` int NOT NULL,
  `parent_id` int NOT NULL,
  `asset_category` int NOT NULL,
  `brand` varchar(500) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `vendor` varchar(220) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `purchase_date` date NOT NULL,
  `warranty_period` int NOT NULL,
  `maintenance_cycle` int NOT NULL,
  `description` varchar(202) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `assigned_to` int NOT NULL,
  `assigned_date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `venues` varchar(110) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `status` int NOT NULL COMMENT '1-available\r\n2-assigned',
  `is_scraped` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-no\r\n1-yes',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL,
  `undertaking_file_url` varchar(500) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `undertaking_uploaded` int NOT NULL,
  `venue_required` int NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=529 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.assets_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `assets_view` AS select `a`.`id` AS `id`,`a`.`barcode` AS `barcode`,`a`.`file_url` AS `file_url`,`a`.`bill_upload` AS `bill_upload`,`a`.`undertaking_file_url` AS `undertaking_file_url`,`a`.`undertaking_uploaded` AS `undertaking_uploaded`,`a`.`venues` AS `venues`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue_name`,`a`.`asset_type` AS `asset_type`,`aim`.`asset_type` AS `asset_type_name`,`aim`.`venue_required` AS `venue_required`,`a`.`asset_category` AS `asset_category`,`a`.`brand` AS `brand`,`a`.`vendor` AS `vendor`,`aic`.`type` AS `asset_category_name`,`a`.`purchase_date` AS `purchase_date`,`a`.`warranty_period` AS `warranty_period`,`a`.`maintenance_cycle` AS `maintenance_cycle`,`a`.`description` AS `description`,`a`.`assigned_to` AS `assigned_to`,`a`.`asset_kit_name` AS `asset_kit_name`,`a`.`max_items` AS `max_items`,`a`.`asset_kit_status` AS `asset_kit_status`,`a`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`kit`.`asset_kit_name` AS `assigned_kit_name`,`a`.`assigned_date` AS `assigned_date`,`a`.`status` AS `status`,`a`.`is_scraped` AS `is_scraped`,`emp`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `contact_name`,`a`.`park` AS `park` from ((((((`assets` `a` left join `employee` `emp` on((`emp`.`id` = `a`.`assigned_to`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`v`.`id` = `a`.`venues`))) left join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `emp`.`contact_id`))) left join `asset_inventory_master` `aim` on((`aim`.`id` = `a`.`asset_type`))) left join `asset_inventory_cat` `aic` on((`aic`.`id` = `a`.`asset_category`))) left join `assets` `kit` on((`kit`.`id` = `a`.`parent_id`))) order by `a`.`id` desc;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.assignment
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `assignment` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `assignment` varchar(1000) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `session_master_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `total_score` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `schedule_days` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `schedule_time` time NOT NULL,
  `complete_days` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `complete_time` time NOT NULL,
  `bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_3` (`park`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_4` (`park`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `assignment_id` (`assignment_id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `module_id` (`module_id`),
  KEY `tutor_contact_id` (`tutor_contact_id`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `assign_on` (`assign_on`),
  KEY `submission` (`submission`),
  KEY `submitted_on` (`submitted_on`),
  KEY `assignment_id_2` (`assignment_id`),
  KEY `contact_id_2` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `module_id_2` (`module_id`),
  KEY `tutor_contact_id_2` (`tutor_contact_id`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `assign_on_2` (`assign_on`),
  KEY `submission_2` (`submission`),
  KEY `submitted_on_2` (`submitted_on`),
  KEY `assignment_id_3` (`assignment_id`),
  KEY `contact_id_3` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `module_id_3` (`module_id`),
  KEY `tutor_contact_id_3` (`tutor_contact_id`),
  KEY `park_3` (`park`),
  KEY `assign_on_3` (`assign_on`),
  KEY `submission_3` (`submission`),
  KEY `submitted_on_3` (`submitted_on`),
  KEY `assignment_id_4` (`assignment_id`),
  KEY `contact_id_4` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `module_id_4` (`module_id`),
  KEY `tutor_contact_id_4` (`tutor_contact_id`),
  KEY `park_4` (`park`),
  KEY `assign_on_4` (`assign_on`),
  KEY `submission_4` (`submission`),
  KEY `submitted_on_4` (`submitted_on`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.assignment_log_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `assignment_log_view` AS select distinct `a`.`id` AS `assignment_id`,`a`.`name` AS `name`,`a`.`assignment` AS `assignment`,`a`.`session_master_id` AS `session_master_id`,`a`.`total_score` AS `total_score`,`a`.`schedule_days` AS `schedule_days`,`a`.`schedule_time` AS `schedule_time`,`a`.`complete_days` AS `complete_days`,`a`.`complete_time` AS `complete_time`,`m`.`bid` AS `bid`,`al`.`id` AS `id`,`al`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`al`.`assign_on` AS `assign_on`,`al`.`submission` AS `submission`,`al`.`url` AS `url`,`al`.`submitted_on` AS `submitted_on`,`al`.`tutor_comment` AS `tutor_comment`,`al`.`score` AS `score`,`al`.`tutor_contact_id` AS `tutor_contact_id`,(case when (`al`.`assign_on` > now()) then 'Upcoming' when (`al`.`submitted_on` = '0000-00-00 00:00:00') then 'Pending' when (`al`.`submitted_on` <> '0000-00-00 00:00:00') then 'Submitted' when (`al`.`submission` < now()) then 'Missed' else 'Completed' end) AS `status`,`al`.`park` AS `park`,`m`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,`m`.`fname` AS `fname`,`m`.`mname` AS `mname`,`m`.`lname` AS `lname`,`m`.`code_name` AS `code_name`,`m`.`code` AS `code`,`m`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`m`.`email` AS `email`,`m`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`m`.`category` AS `category`,`m`.`module_id` AS `module_id`,`m`.`module` AS `module`,`m`.`batch` AS `batch`,`m`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,concat(`al`.`score`,'/',`a`.`total_score`) AS `final_score` from ((`assignment` `a` join `assignment_log` `al` on((`a`.`id` = `al`.`assignment_id`))) join `invoice_invoiceitem_module_view` `m` on(((`al`.`module_id` = `m`.`module_id`) and (`al`.`contact_id` = `m`.`contact_id`)))) where (0 <> 1);

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.associate_branch_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `associate_branch_view` AS select `emp_cont_view`.`emp_id` AS `emp_id`,`emp_cont_view`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,`emp_cont_view`.`position` AS `position`,`emp_cont_view`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,group_concat(`branch`.`branch` separator ',') AS `branches` from (`emp_cont_view` left join `branch` on((`branch`.`id` = `emp_cont_view`.`bid`))) where ((`emp_cont_view`.`position_id` in (42,47)) or ((`emp_cont_view`.`associate` = 1) and (`emp_cont_view`.`park` = 0))) group by `emp_cont_view`.`emp_id`;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.att_cont_latest_invoice_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `att_cont_latest_invoice_view` AS select `a`.`id` AS `id`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`mname` AS `mname`,`c`.`image` AS `image`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,concat(`a`.`code`,' - ',`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `code_name`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`c`.`gender` AS `gender`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`a`.`date` AS `date`,date_format(`a`.`in_time`,'%h:%i %p') AS `in_time_string`,if((`a`.`out_time` = '00:00:00'),'',convert(date_format(`a`.`out_time`,'%h:%i %p') using utf8mb3)) AS `out_time_string`,concat(convert(date_format(`a`.`in_time`,'%h:%i %p') using utf8mb3),(case when (`a`.`out_time` <> '00:00:00') then convert(date_format(`a`.`out_time`,'%h:%i %p') using utf8mb3) else '' end)) AS `time`,date_format(`a`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `date_string`,`a`.`in_time` AS `in_time`,`a`.`out_time` AS `out_time`,concat(`a`.`date`,' ',`a`.`in_time`) AS `datetime`,`a`.`sessions_completed` AS `sessions_completed`,`a`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`a`.`type` AS `type`,`a`.`status` AS `status`,`a`.`code` AS `code`,`a`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`a`.`batch` AS `attended_batch`,(case when (`a`.`negative` = 0) then 'Present' when (`a`.`negative` = 1) then 'Absent' when (`a`.`negative` = 2) then 'Expired' when (`a`.`negative` = 3) then 'Invalid' else '' end) AS `negative_value`,`a`.`negative` AS `negative`,`a`.`session` AS `session`,`a`.`user_id` AS `user_id`,`a`.`park` AS `park`,`a`.`bid` AS `bid`,`a`.`source` AS `source`,`a`.`row_color` AS `row_color`,`a`.`makeup` AS `makeup`,`a`.`pay_sal` AS `pay_sal`,`a`.`invalid` AS `invalid`,`a`.`class_no` AS `class_no`,`a`.`comment` AS `comment`,`inv_ii`.`item_id` AS `item_id`,if(((`b`.`batch` is null) or (`b`.`batch` = '')),'-',`b`.`batch`) AS `batch`,'-' AS `title`,'-' AS `module`,'' AS `module_id`,'' AS `category`,(case when (`cn`.`id` is not null) then concat(`cn`.`fname`,`cn`.`lname`) else '-' end) AS `counsellor_name`,(case when (`cn`.`id` is not null) then `cn`.`email` else '' end) AS `counsellor_email` from ((((((`attendance` `a` left join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `a`.`contact_id`))) left join `batch` `b` on((`a`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `member` `m` on((`m`.`contact_id` = `a`.`contact_id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`e`.`id` = `m`.`c_employee_id`))) left join `contact` `cn` on((`cn`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) left join (select `inv`.`id` AS `id`,`inv`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`inv`.`date` AS `date`,`inv`.`code` AS `code`,`inv`.`bid` AS `bid`,`ii`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`ii`.`id` AS `item_id` from (`invoice` `inv` left join `invoice_item` `ii` on(((`inv`.`id` = `ii`.`invoice_id`) and (`ii`.`sessions` <> 0)))) where ((`inv`.`date` = (select max(`mi`.`date`) from (`invoice` `mi` join `invoice_item` `mii` on(((`mii`.`invoice_id` = `mi`.`id`) and (`mii`.`start_date` <= curdate())))) where ((`mi`.`park` = 0) and (`mi`.`contact_id` = `inv`.`contact_id`)))) and (`inv`.`park` = 0)) group by `inv`.`contact_id`) `inv_ii` on((`inv_ii`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) where (`a`.`date` >= `inv_ii`.`start_date`) order by `a`.`id` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.attendance
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `attendance` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `in_time` time NOT NULL,
  `out_time` time NOT NULL,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `code` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `batch_id` int NOT NULL,
  `venue_id` int NOT NULL,
  `session_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Session ID for which attendance is being punched.',
  `item_id` bigint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `new_batch_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'New BatchId Assigned when rescheduled',
  `negative` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'absent(0-No ,1- Yes, 2 - Expired 3- Invalid)',
  `session` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'session consumed',
  `sessions_completed` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `user_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Punching user ID',
  `type` varchar(2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'E - Employee / M - Member / B - Batch',
  `status` int NOT NULL COMMENT ' 0 - Pending / 1 - Completed / 2 - Cancelled / 3 - Shifted',
  `cancel_status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `cancel_date` date NOT NULL,
  `comment` varchar(1000) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `attendance_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `class_no` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `batch` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `source` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-Android,1-Web,2-Bio,3-Other,4- batch attendance, 5 - Zoom attendance, 6 - Interactive Attendance, 7 - App Batch Attendance, 8 - Support',
  `final_source` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `row_color` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - white, 1 - blue, 2 - orange, 3 - red',
  `invalid` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `pay_sal` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `makeup` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `code` (`code`),
  KEY `batch_id` (`batch_id`),
  KEY `new_batch_id` (`new_batch_id`),
  KEY `user_id` (`user_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `session_id` (`session_id`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `idx_attendance_month` (`type`,`status`,`invalid`,`date`,`contact_id`,`batch_id`),
  KEY `idx_attendance_session_id` (`session_id`),
  KEY `idx_attendance_item_id` (`item_id`),
  KEY `idx_attendance_ledger_posting` (`park`,`type`,`status`,`date`,`session_id`,`item_id`,`contact_id`,`batch_id`),
  KEY `idx_attendance_session_resolver` (`park`,`type`,`date`,`batch_id`,`in_time`,`contact_id`,`item_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=1342857 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.attendance_cam_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `attendance_cam_view` AS select `a`.`id` AS `id`,`a`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`a`.`date` AS `date`,`a`.`status` AS `status`,`a`.`type` AS `type`,`a`.`class_no` AS `class_no`,`a`.`park` AS `park`,`cr`.`file_id` AS `drive_file_id` from (`attendance` `a` left join (select `pf_central`.`cam_recording`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`pf_central`.`cam_recording`.`file_id` AS `file_id`,`pf_central`.`cam_recording`.`date` AS `date` from `pf_central`.`cam_recording` where ((`pf_central`.`cam_recording`.`park` = 0) and (`pf_central`.`cam_recording`.`file_id` is not null)) group by `pf_central`.`cam_recording`.`date`,`pf_central`.`cam_recording`.`batch_id` order by `pf_central`.`cam_recording`.`id` desc) `cr` on(((`cr`.`batch_id` = `a`.`batch_id`) and (`a`.`date` = `cr`.`date`)))) group by `cr`.`batch_id`;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.attendance_cont_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `attendance_cont_view` AS select `a`.`id` AS `id`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`mname` AS `mname`,`c`.`image` AS `image`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,concat(`a`.`code`,' - ',`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `code_name`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`c`.`gender` AS `gender`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`a`.`date` AS `date`,date_format(`a`.`date`,'%d-%m-%Y') AS `formatted_date`,date_format(`a`.`in_time`,'%h:%i %p') AS `in_time_string`,if((`a`.`out_time` = '00:00:00'),'',convert(date_format(`a`.`out_time`,'%h:%i %p') using utf8mb3)) AS `out_time_string`,concat(convert(date_format(`a`.`in_time`,'%h:%i %p') using utf8mb3),(case when (`a`.`out_time` <> '00:00:00') then convert(date_format(`a`.`out_time`,'%h:%i %p') using utf8mb3) else '' end)) AS `time`,date_format(`a`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `date_string`,`a`.`in_time` AS `in_time`,`a`.`out_time` AS `out_time`,concat(`a`.`date`,' ',`a`.`in_time`) AS `datetime`,`a`.`sessions_completed` AS `sessions_completed`,`a`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`a`.`type` AS `type`,`a`.`status` AS `status`,`a`.`cancel_status` AS `cancel_status`,`a`.`code` AS `code`,`a`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`a`.`batch` AS `attended_batch`,`a`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`v`.`venue` AS `recorded_venue`,`a`.`negative` AS `negative`,`a`.`session` AS `session`,`a`.`user_id` AS `user_id`,`a`.`park` AS `park`,`a`.`bid` AS `bid`,`br`.`branch` AS `branch`,`br`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`bt`.`day_code` AS `day_code`,`bt`.`start_time` AS `batch_start_time`,`bt`.`end_time` AS `batch_end_time`,`a`.`source` AS `source`,`a`.`row_color` AS `row_color`,`a`.`makeup` AS `makeup`,`a`.`pay_sal` AS `pay_sal`,`a`.`invalid` AS `invalid`,`a`.`comment` AS `comment`,`a`.`class_no` AS `class_no`,`a`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,if(((`b`.`batch` is null) or (`b`.`batch` = '')),'-',`b`.`batch`) AS `batch`,'-' AS `title`,'-' AS `module`,'' AS `module_id`,'' AS `category`,(case when (`cn`.`id` is not null) then concat(`cn`.`fname`,`cn`.`lname`) else '-' end) AS `counsellor_name`,(case when (`cn`.`id` is not null) then `cn`.`email` else '' end) AS `counsellor_email` from ((((((((`attendance` `a` left join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `a`.`contact_id`))) left join `batch` `b` on((`a`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `member` `m` on((`m`.`contact_id` = `a`.`contact_id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`e`.`id` = `m`.`c_employee_id`))) left join `contact` `cn` on((`cn`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) left join `branch` `br` on((`a`.`bid` = `br`.`id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`a`.`venue_id` = `v`.`id`))) left join `batch_time` `bt` on((`bt`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) order by `a`.`id` desc;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.attendance_cont_view2
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `attendance_cont_view2` AS select distinct `a`.`id` AS `id`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`mname` AS `mname`,`c`.`image` AS `image`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,concat(`a`.`code`,' - ',`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `code_name`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`c`.`gender` AS `gender`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`a`.`date` AS `date`,date_format(`a`.`in_time`,'%h:%i %p') AS `in_time_string`,if((`a`.`out_time` = '00:00:00'),'',convert(date_format(`a`.`out_time`,'%h:%i %p') using utf8mb3)) AS `out_time_string`,concat(convert(date_format(`a`.`in_time`,'%h:%i %p') using utf8mb3),(case when (`a`.`out_time` <> '00:00:00') then convert(date_format(`a`.`out_time`,'%h:%i %p') using utf8mb3) else '' end)) AS `time`,date_format(`a`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `date_string`,`a`.`in_time` AS `in_time`,`a`.`out_time` AS `out_time`,concat(`a`.`date`,' ',`a`.`in_time`) AS `datetime`,`a`.`sessions_completed` AS `sessions_completed`,`a`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`a`.`type` AS `type`,`a`.`status` AS `status`,`a`.`code` AS `code`,`a`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`a`.`negative` AS `negative`,`a`.`session` AS `session`,`a`.`user_id` AS `user_id`,`a`.`park` AS `park`,`a`.`bid` AS `bid`,`a`.`source` AS `source`,`a`.`row_color` AS `row_color`,`a`.`makeup` AS `makeup`,`a`.`pay_sal` AS `pay_sal`,`a`.`invalid` AS `invalid`,`a`.`comment` AS `comment`,`be`.`contact_id` AS `t_contact_id`,if(((`b`.`batch` is null) or (`b`.`batch` = '')),'-',`b`.`batch`) AS `batch`,'-' AS `title`,'-' AS `module`,'' AS `module_id`,'' AS `category`,(case when (`cn`.`id` is not null) then concat(`cn`.`fname`,`cn`.`lname`) else '-' end) AS `counsellor_name`,(case when (`cn`.`id` is not null) then `cn`.`email` else '' end) AS `counsellor_email`,`cecv`.`counsellor_name` AS `new_counsellor_name`,`cecv`.`counsellor_email` AS `new_counsellor_email`,(case when ((select concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`,' ',`contact`.`mname`) from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `ii`.`sc_contact_id`)) is null) then `cecv`.`counsellor_name` else (select concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`,' ',`contact`.`mname`) from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `ii`.`sc_contact_id`)) end) AS `senior_counsellor_name`,(case when ((select `contact`.`email` from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `ii`.`sc_contact_id`)) is null) then `cecv`.`counsellor_email` else (select `contact`.`email` from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `ii`.`sc_contact_id`)) end) AS `senior_counsellor_mail`,(case when ((select concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`,' ',`contact`.`mname`) from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `tc`.`c_contact_id`)) is null) then `cecv`.`counsellor_name` else (select concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`,' ',`contact`.`mname`) from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `tc`.`c_contact_id`)) end) AS `new_senior_counsellor_name`,(case when ((select `contact`.`email` from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `tc`.`c_contact_id`)) is null) then `cecv`.`counsellor_email` else (select `contact`.`email` from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `tc`.`c_contact_id`)) end) AS `new_senior_counsellor_email` from ((((((((((`attendance` `a` left join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `a`.`contact_id`))) left join `batch` `b` on((`a`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `member` `m` on((`m`.`contact_id` = `a`.`contact_id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`e`.`id` = `m`.`c_employee_id`))) left join `contact` `cn` on((`cn`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) left join `invoice` `i` on((`i`.`contact_id` = `a`.`contact_id`))) join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`i`.`id` = `ii`.`invoice_id`))) join (select `e`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `counsellor_name`,`c`.`email` AS `counsellor_email` from (`contact` `c` join `employee` `e` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`)))) `cecv` on((`cecv`.`id` = `i`.`employee_id`))) left join `batch_employee` `be` on((`a`.`batch_id` = `be`.`batch_id`))) left join `teacher_counsellor` `tc` on((`be`.`contact_id` = `tc`.`t_contact_id`))) where (`i`.`date` = (select max(`invoice`.`date`) AS `date` from `invoice` where (`invoice`.`contact_id` = `m`.`contact_id`))) order by `a`.`id` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.attendance_salary_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `attendance_salary_view` AS select `a`.`id` AS `id`,`a`.`date` AS `date`,`a`.`in_time` AS `in_time`,`a`.`out_time` AS `out_time`,`a`.`code` AS `code`,`a`.`session_id` AS `session_id`,`a`.`new_batch_id` AS `new_batch_id`,`a`.`negative` AS `negative`,`a`.`session` AS `session`,`a`.`user_id` AS `user_id`,`a`.`type` AS `type`,`a`.`status` AS `status`,`a`.`comment` AS `comment`,`a`.`park` AS `park`,`a`.`bid` AS `bid`,`branch`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`a`.`makeup` AS `makeup`,`a`.`source` AS `source`,`a`.`row_color` AS `row_color`,`a`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`a`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`a`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`a`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`b`.`offline` AS `offline`,`v`.`zone` AS `zone`,`v`.`id` AS `venue_id`,`b`.`rate_multiplier` AS `rate_multiplier`,((`b`.`rate_multiplier` * `a`.`pay_sal`) * (case when (`employee`.`salary_type` = 3) then `employee`.`salary` else 1 end)) AS `payable_amount`,`a`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`a`.`pay_sal` AS `pay_sal`,`c`.`id` AS `student_cn_id`,`batch_employee`.`contact_id` AS `emp_cn_id`,`employee`.`salary` AS `salary`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `student_name`,`c`.`mobile` AS `student_mobile`,`c`.`email` AS `student_email`,concat(`cn`.`fname`,' ',`cn`.`lname`) AS `employee_name`,`cn`.`mobile` AS `employee_mobile`,`cn`.`email` AS `employee_email`,`invoice`.`date` AS `invoice_date`,`payment`.`date` AS `payment_date` from ((((((((((`attendance` `a` join `contact` `c` on(((`a`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`) and (`a`.`park` = 0) and (`a`.`type` = 'M')))) join `batch_employee` on((`batch_employee`.`batch_id` = `a`.`batch_id`))) join `contact` `cn` on((`batch_employee`.`contact_id` = `cn`.`id`))) join `employee` on((`employee`.`contact_id` = `batch_employee`.`contact_id`))) left join `batch` `b` on((`batch_employee`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`b`.`venue_id` = `v`.`id`))) left join `invoice` on(((`invoice`.`contact_id` = `a`.`contact_id`) and (`invoice`.`balance` = 0) and (`invoice`.`park` = 0)))) left join `invoice_item` on(((`invoice`.`id` = `invoice_item`.`invoice_id`) and (`invoice_item`.`batch_id` = `a`.`batch_id`)))) left join `payment` on(((`invoice`.`id` = `payment`.`invoice_id`) and (`payment`.`park` = 0)))) left join `branch` on((`a`.`bid` = `branch`.`id`))) where (`invoice`.`id` in (select max(`invoice`.`id`) from `invoice` where ((`invoice`.`park` = 0) and (`invoice`.`balance` = 0)) group by `invoice`.`contact_id`) and (`invoice`.`id` is not null)) group by `a`.`date`,`a`.`contact_id` order by `a`.`batch_id` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.attendance_settings
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `attendance_settings` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `punch_dif` time NOT NULL DEFAULT '00:05:00' COMMENT 'Difference in minutes between punch',
  `bio_srno` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `bio_type` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Type (0-Both / 1-CheckIn / 2-CheckOut)',
  `model` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Model Code-Type (0 - X990 / 1 - F18 / 2 - U990)',
  `bio_extension` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '7' COMMENT 'extension in days after expiry  or balance reminder',
  `revert` varchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'For Revert if mem present and emp absent',
  `deduct` varchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Deduct if mem abst n emp prsnt',
  `get_all_batch` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag(0 - Show respective batches / 1- Show All Batches)',
  `skip_session` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0 - Dont / 1 - Do) Check for session while att',
  `deduct_session_absentee` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '0-not deduct session when absent 1 - deduct',
  `irregular` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `irregular_sms_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'no of times SMS to be sent to member for being irregular (0 - infinite / >= 1 - Specific time)',
  `irregular_email_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'no of times EMAIL to be sent to member for being irregular (0 - infinite / >= 1 - Specific time)',
  `punch_negative` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0 - Dont / 1 - Do) Punch negative attendance for batch or session based system only',
  `back_date_att` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0 - Off, 1 - Admin Only, 2 - All) Only used for batch attendance',
  `back_dated_days` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0 - For infinite Days / >0 For that particular no of days)',
  `back_dated_time` time NOT NULL DEFAULT '23:00:00' COMMENT 'Time to allow till the attendance should be punched.',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `mark_absent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT 'Flag (0 - Off, 1 - Admin Only, 2 - All) Only used for batch attendance',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=206 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.attendance_zoom_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `attendance_zoom_view` AS select `a`.`id` AS `id`,`a`.`batch` AS `batch`,`b`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`a`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`a`.`date` AS `date`,`a`.`status` AS `status`,`a`.`type` AS `type`,`a`.`class_no` AS `class_no`,`a`.`park` AS `park`,(case when (((`zr`.`drive_file_id` is null) or (`zr`.`drive_file_id` = '')) and ((`cr`.`file_id` is null) or (`cr`.`file_id` = ''))) then `zr`.`s3_key` when ((`zr`.`drive_file_id` is null) or (`zr`.`drive_file_id` = '')) then `cr`.`file_id` else `zr`.`drive_file_id` end) AS `drive_file_id` from ((((`attendance` `a` left join `session_log` `sl` on(((`a`.`batch_id` = `sl`.`batch_id`) and (`sl`.`park` = 0) and (`a`.`date` = `sl`.`date`)))) left join (select `zoom_recording`.`meeting_id` AS `meeting_id`,`zoom_recording`.`drive_file_id` AS `drive_file_id`,`zoom_recording`.`s3_key` AS `s3_key` from `zoom_recording` where (`zoom_recording`.`park` = 0) group by `zoom_recording`.`meeting_id` order by `zoom_recording`.`meeting_id` desc) `zr` on((`zr`.`meeting_id` = `sl`.`meeting_id`))) left join (select `pf_central`.`cam_recording`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`pf_central`.`cam_recording`.`file_id` AS `file_id`,`pf_central`.`cam_recording`.`date` AS `date` from `pf_central`.`cam_recording` where ((`pf_central`.`cam_recording`.`park` = 0) and (`pf_central`.`cam_recording`.`file_id` is not null)) group by `pf_central`.`cam_recording`.`date`,`pf_central`.`cam_recording`.`batch_id` order by `pf_central`.`cam_recording`.`id` desc) `cr` on(((`cr`.`batch_id` = `a`.`batch_id`) and (`a`.`date` = `cr`.`date`)))) left join `batch` `b` on(((`b`.`id` = `a`.`batch_id`) and (`b`.`start_date` = `a`.`date`) and (`a`.`type` not in ('M','AT')))));

  KEY `idx_b2b_invoices_customer` (`customer_id`),
  KEY `idx_b2b_invoices_sequence` (`sequence_id`),
  KEY `idx_b2b_invoices_customer_contact` (`customer_contact_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_b2b_invoices_sequence` FOREIGN KEY (`sequence_id`) REFERENCES `b2b_invoice_sequences` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=14 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.batch
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `batch` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `batch` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'name of batch',
  `display_name` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `category_id` int NOT NULL,
  `start_date` date NOT NULL,
  `end_date` date NOT NULL,
  `training_assign` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `assistant_teacher_cid` int NOT NULL,
  `backup_asso_cid` int NOT NULL,
  `demo_class` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag for demo batch: 0 -no, 1- yes,',
  `level_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Level ID of batch to track Product',
  `completed_sessions` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Completed Sessions for the batch',
  `comment` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `inactive` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `limit` int NOT NULL,
  `rate_multiplier` float(5,1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1.0',
  `fixed_amt` int DEFAULT '0',
  `parent_id` int NOT NULL,
  `type` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0-Internal, 1 - External, 2 - Both)',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `ref_batch_id` int NOT NULL,
  `offline` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `venue_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `cr_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `hide` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `private` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `infant` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `international` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `on_web` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '(0-Show, 1-Don''t Show)',
  `on_web_zoom` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '(0-Create, 1-Don''t Create)',
  `on_web_link` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '(0-Create, 1-Don''t Create)',
  `whatsapp_link` longtext NOT NULL,
  `avg_age` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `min_age` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `max_age` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `enrolled` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `waiting_list` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `category_id` (`category_id`),
  KEY `level_id` (`level_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `parent_id` (`parent_id`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `idx_batch_filter` (`id`,`parent_id`,`inactive`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=12631 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.batch_asset_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `batch_asset_view` AS select `ba`.`id` AS `id`,`l`.`level` AS `level`,`ba`.`level_id` AS `level_id`,`ba`.`class_no` AS `class_no`,`ba`.`url` AS `url`,`ba`.`position` AS `position`,`ba`.`park` AS `park`,`ba`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`ba`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`ba`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`ba`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by` from (`batch_asset` `ba` join `level` `l` on((`ba`.`level_id` = `l`.`id`))) where (0 <> 1);

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.batch_attendance_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `batch_attendance_view` AS select (case when (`a`.`status` = '2') then 'Cancelled' when (`a`.`status` = '3') then 'Rescheduled' when (`a`.`status` = '1') then 'Completed' else 'Pending' end) AS `status_str`,`a`.`id` AS `id`,`a`.`date` AS `date`,`a`.`in_time` AS `in_time`,`a`.`out_time` AS `out_time`,`a`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`a`.`code` AS `code`,`a`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`a`.`session_id` AS `session_id`,`a`.`new_batch_id` AS `new_batch_id`,`a`.`negative` AS `negative`,`a`.`session` AS `session`,`a`.`user_id` AS `user_id`,`a`.`type` AS `type`,`a`.`status` AS `status`,`a`.`cancel_status` AS `cancel_status`,`a`.`comment` AS `comment`,`a`.`park` AS `park`,`b`.`bid` AS `bid`,`br`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`a`.`source` AS `source`,`a`.`row_color` AS `row_color`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`b`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`b`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`b`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,`b`.`level_id` AS `level_id`,`b`.`completed_sessions` AS `completed_sessions`,`b`.`park` AS `batch_park`,`b`.`inactive` AS `inactive`,`b`.`limit` AS `limit`,`b`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`b`.`type` AS `batch_type`,(case when (`br`.`managed_by_tr` = 1) then 'YES' else 'NO' end) AS `managed_by_tr` from ((`attendance` `a` join `batch` `b` on((`a`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `branch` `br` on((`br`.`id` = `b`.`bid`))) where ((`a`.`type` = 'B') and (`a`.`park` = 0));

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.batch_employee_time_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `batch_employee_time_view` AS select distinct `b`.`id` AS `id`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`b`.`display_name` AS `display_name`,`b`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`b`.`level_id` AS `level_id`,(case when (`l`.`level` is null) then '-' else `l`.`level` end) AS `level`,`l`.`graduates` AS `graduates`,`l`.`graduates_class_no` AS `graduates_class_no`,`b`.`demo_class` AS `demo_class`,`cat`.`category` AS `category`,`cat`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,`e`.`ecode` AS `code`,`b`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`b`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`b`.`training_assign` AS `training_assign`,`b`.`assistant_teacher_cid` AS `assistant_teacher_cid`,`b`.`backup_asso_cid` AS `backup_asso_cid`,date_format(`b`.`start_date`,'%d %b %y') AS `start_date_string`,`b`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,date_format(`b`.`end_date`,'%d %b %y') AS `end_date_string`,`b`.`inactive` AS `inactive`,`b`.`type` AS `type`,`b`.`hide` AS `hide`,`b`.`completed_sessions` AS `completed_sessions`,`b`.`park` AS `park`,`b`.`bid` AS `bid`,`bt`.`start_time` AS `start_time`,`bt`.`end_time` AS `end_time`,`e`.`assignment_check` AS `assignment_check`,`e`.`cash_collector` AS `cash_collector`,`e`.`assignment_no` AS `assignment_no`,cast('0000-00-00' as char charset utf8mb3) AS `date`,`b`.`limit` AS `limit`,(case when (`bt`.`day_code` = '0') then 'Sun' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '1') then 'Mon' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '2') then 'Tue' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '3') then 'Wed' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '4') then 'Thu' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '5') then 'Fri' else 'Sat' end) AS `day`,(case when (`bt`.`day_code` = '0') then 'Sunday' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '1') then 'Monday' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '2') then 'Tuesday' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '3') then 'Wednesday' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '4') then 'Thursday' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '5') then 'Friday' else 'Saturday' end) AS `batch_day`,`bt`.`day_code` AS `day_code`,`be`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`be`.`assistant_teacher` AS `assistant_teacher`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`c`.`park` AS `cont_park`,'0' AS `module_id`,'' AS `module`,'' AS `title`,'0' AS `session_id`,`b`.`avg_age` AS `avg_age`,`b`.`min_age` AS `min_age`,`b`.`max_age` AS `max_age`,`b`.`waiting_list` AS `waiting_list`,`b`.`enrolled` AS `enrolled`,(`b`.`limit` - `b`.`enrolled`) AS `seats_left`,`b`.`offline` AS `offline`,`b`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`b`.`cr_id` AS `cr_id`,`cr`.`number` AS `cr_number`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,`v`.`city` AS `city`,`v`.`timezone_id` AS `timezone_id`,`b`.`private` AS `private`,`b`.`international` AS `international`,`b`.`infant` AS `infant`,`b`.`on_web` AS `on_web`,`b`.`on_web_zoom` AS `on_web_zoom`,`b`.`on_web_link` AS `on_web_link`,`b`.`rate_multiplier` AS `rate_multiplier`,`b`.`fixed_amt` AS `fixed_amt`,`b`.`whatsapp_link` AS `whatsapp_link`,`branch`.`branch` AS `branch`,`branch`.`branch_code` AS `branch_code`,`branch`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`zu`.`email_id` AS `zoom_email_id`,`zu`.`zoom_id` AS `zoom_id`,`e`.`id` AS `employee_id`,concat(`c1`.`fname`,' ',`c1`.`lname`,' ') AS `associate_fullname`,concat(`u`.`fname`,' ',`u`.`lname`) AS `created_by`,`b`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from (((((((((((((`batch_time` `bt` join `batch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `bt`.`batch_id`))) join `batch_employee` `be` on((`b`.`id` = `be`.`batch_id`))) join `category` `cat` on((`b`.`category_id` = `cat`.`id`))) join `branch` on((`branch`.`id` = `b`.`bid`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`be`.`contact_id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) left join `contact` `c` on((`be`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join `level` `l` on((`b`.`level_id` = `l`.`id`))) left join `employee_bid` `eb` on(((`eb`.`employee_id` = `e`.`id`) and (`eb`.`bid` = `b`.`bid`)))) left join `zoom_user` `zu` on((`zu`.`id` = `eb`.`zoom_user_id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`v`.`id` = `b`.`venue_id`))) left join `class_room` `cr` on((`cr`.`id` = `b`.`cr_id`))) left join `contact` `c1` on((`c1`.`id` = `b`.`assistant_teacher_cid`))) left join `pf_central`.`user` `u` on((`u`.`id` = `b`.`created_by`))) order by `b`.`id` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.batch_employee_time_view_dum

CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `batch_employee_time_view_dum` AS select distinct `b`.`id` AS `id`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`b`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`b`.`level_id` AS `level_id`,(case when (`l`.`level` is null) then '-' else `l`.`level` end) AS `level`,`cat`.`category` AS `category`,`e`.`ecode` AS `code`,`b`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`b`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,date_format(`b`.`start_date`,'%d %b %y') AS `start_date_string`,`b`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,date_format(`b`.`end_date`,'%d %b %y') AS `end_date_string`,`b`.`inactive` AS `inactive`,`b`.`type` AS `type`,`b`.`completed_sessions` AS `completed_sessions`,`b`.`park` AS `park`,`b`.`bid` AS `bid`,`bt`.`start_time` AS `start_time`,`bt`.`end_time` AS `end_time`,'0000-00-00' AS `date`,`b`.`limit` AS `limit`,(case when (`bt`.`day_code` = '0') then 'Sun' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '1') then 'Mon' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '2') then 'Tue' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '3') then 'Wed' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '4') then 'Thu' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '5') then 'Fri' else 'Sat' end) AS `day`,(case when (`bt`.`day_code` = '0') then 'Sunday' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '1') then 'Monday' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '2') then 'Tuesday' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '3') then 'Wednesday' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '4') then 'Thursday' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '5') then 'Friday' else 'Saturday' end) AS `batch_day`,`bt`.`day_code` AS `day_code`,`be`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`be`.`assistant_teacher` AS `assistant_teacher`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`c`.`park` AS `cont_park`,'0' AS `module_id`,'' AS `module`,'' AS `title`,'0' AS `session_id`,`b`.`avg_age` AS `avg_age`,`b`.`min_age` AS `min_age`,`b`.`max_age` AS `max_age`,`b`.`waiting_list` AS `waiting_list`,`b`.`enrolled` AS `enrolled`,(`b`.`limit` - `b`.`enrolled`) AS `seats_left`,`b`.`offline` AS `offline`,`b`.`private` AS `private`,`b`.`infant` AS `infant`,`b`.`registration` AS `registration`,`b`.`rate_multiplier` AS `rate_multiplier`,`b`.`fixed_amt` AS `fixed_amt`,`branch`.`branch` AS `branch`,`branch`.`branch_code` AS `branch_code`,`branch`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`zu`.`email_id` AS `zoom_email_id`,`zu`.`zoom_id` AS `zoom_id`,`e`.`id` AS `employee_id` from (((((((((`batch_time_dum` `bt` join `batch_dum` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `bt`.`batch_id`))) join `batch_employee_dum` `be` on((`b`.`id` = `be`.`batch_id`))) join `category` `cat` on((`b`.`category_id` = `cat`.`id`))) join `branch` on((`branch`.`id` = `b`.`bid`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`be`.`contact_id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) left join `contact` `c` on((`be`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join `level` `l` on((`b`.`level_id` = `l`.`id`))) left join `employee_bid` `eb` on(((`eb`.`employee_id` = `e`.`id`) and (`eb`.`bid` = `b`.`bid`)))) left join `zoom_user` `zu` on((`zu`.`id` = `eb`.`zoom_user_id`))) order by `b`.`id` desc;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.batch_finder_time_view_v2

CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `batch_finder_time_view_v2` AS select `b`.`id` AS `id`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`cat`.`category` AS `category`,`b`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`b`.`completed_sessions` AS `completed_sessions`,concat((floor((`b`.`completed_sessions` / 10)) * 10),'-',((floor((`b`.`completed_sessions` / 10)) * 10) + 9)) AS `completed_sessions_range`,`b`.`offline` AS `offline`,min(`inv`.`created_at`) AS `Enroll_start_date`,(to_days(curdate()) - to_days(`inv`.`created_at`)) AS `days`,`b`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,`b`.`park` AS `park`,`b`.`bid` AS `bid`,`b`.`limit` AS `limit`,`b`.`enrolled` AS `enrolled`,(`b`.`limit` - `b`.`enrolled`) AS `seats_left`,`branch`.`branch` AS `branch`,`branch`.`branch_code` AS `branch_code`,`branch`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`v`.`display_name` AS `venue_name`,`b`.`min_age` AS `min_age`,`b`.`max_age` AS `max_age`,round(((`b`.`min_age` + `b`.`max_age`) / 2),2) AS `avg_age`,group_concat(distinct (case when (`bt`.`day_code` = '0') then 'Sun' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '1') then 'Mon' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '2') then 'Tue' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '3') then 'Wed' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '4') then 'Thu' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '5') then 'Fri' else 'Sat' end) separator ', ') AS `batch_days`,concat(date_format(`bt`.`start_time`,'%h:%i %p'),' - ',date_format(`bt`.`end_time`,'%h:%i %p')) AS `batch_time` from (((((((((((`batch_time` `bt` join `batch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `bt`.`batch_id`))) join `batch_employee` `be` on((`b`.`id` = `be`.`batch_id`))) join `category` `cat` on((`b`.`category_id` = `cat`.`id`))) join `branch` on((`branch`.`id` = `b`.`bid`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`be`.`contact_id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) left join `contact` `c` on((`be`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join `level` `l` on((`b`.`level_id` = `l`.`id`))) left join `employee_bid` `eb` on(((`eb`.`employee_id` = `e`.`id`) and (`eb`.`bid` = `b`.`bid`)))) left join `zoom_user` `zu` on((`zu`.`id` = `eb`.`zoom_user_id`))) left join `invoice_item` `inv` on((`b`.`id` = `inv`.`batch_id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`b`.`venue_id` = `v`.`id`))) where ((`b`.`park` = '0') and (`b`.`demo_class` = '0') and (`b`.`training_assign` = '0') and (`inv`.`park` = '0')) group by `b`.`id` order by `b`.`id` desc;

week(`batch_next_month_view2_1`.`1st_actual_next_date`,0))) + 5) AS `6th_next_class_number` from `batch_next_month_view2_1` where ((not((`batch_next_month_view2_1`.`batch` like '%Training%'))) and (not((`batch_next_month_view2_1`.`batch` like '%Demo%'))) and (not((`batch_next_month_view2_1`.`batch` like '%preschedule%'))) and (not((`batch_next_month_view2_1`.`batch` like '%reschedule%'))) and (not((`batch_next_month_view2_1`.`branch` like '%Testing%'))));

CREATE TABLE `batch_next_month_view_table` (

  `bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `branch` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `level` varchar(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `1st_next_date` date NOT NULL,
  `1st_next_class_number` bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `2nd_next_date` varchar(29) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `2nd_next_class_number` bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `3rd_next_date` varchar(29) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `3rd_next_class_number` bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `4th_next_date` varchar(29) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `4th_next_class_number` bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `5th_next_date` varchar(29) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `5th_next_class_number` bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `6th_next_date` varchar(29) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `6th_next_class_number` bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `7th_next_date` date NOT NULL,
  `7th_next_class_number` bigint NOT NULL,
  `8th_next_date` date NOT NULL,
  `8th_next_class_number` bigint NOT NULL,
  `9th_next_date` date NOT NULL,
  `9th_next_class_number` bigint NOT NULL,
  `10th_next_date` date NOT NULL,
  `10th_next_class_number` bigint NOT NULL,
  `11th_next_date` date NOT NULL,
  `11th_next_class_number` bigint NOT NULL,
  `12th_next_date` date NOT NULL,
  `12th_next_class_number` bigint NOT NULL,
  `13th_next_date` date NOT NULL,
  `13th_next_class_number` bigint NOT NULL,
  `14th_next_date` date NOT NULL,
  `14th_next_class_number` bigint NOT NULL,
  `15th_next_date` date NOT NULL,
  `15th_next_class_number` bigint NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `batch_next_month_view_test` AS select `batch_view`.`id` AS `id`,`batch_view`.`batch` AS `batch`,`batch_view`.`completed_sessions` AS `current_class_number`,`batch_view`.`day_code` AS `day_code`,`batch_view`.`bid` AS `bid`,`batch_view`.`park` AS `park`,(select `venue_branch_view`.`venue` from `venue_branch_view` where ((`venue_branch_view`.`bid` = `batch_view`.`bid`) and (not((`venue_branch_view`.`branch_name` like '%Testing%')))) group by `venue_branch_view`.`bid`) AS `venue`,(select `branch`.`branch` from `branch` where ((`branch`.`id` = `batch_view`.`bid`) and (not((`branch`.`branch` like '%Testing%'))))) AS `branch`,`batch_view`.`level` AS `level`,(case when ((weekday(curdate()) + 1) >= `batch_view`.`day_code`) then ((curdate() + interval (6 - weekday(curdate())) day) + interval `batch_view`.`day_code` day) else ((curdate() + interval (0 - weekday(curdate())) day) + interval (`batch_view`.`day_code` - 1) day) end) AS `1st_next_date`,(`batch_view`.`completed_sessions` + 1) AS `1st_next_class_number`,((case when ((weekday(curdate()) + 1) >= `batch_view`.`day_code`) then ((curdate() + interval (6 - weekday(curdate())) day) + interval `batch_view`.`day_code` day) else ((curdate() + interval (0 - weekday(curdate())) day) + interval (`batch_view`.`day_code` - 1) day) end) + interval 7 day) AS `2nd_next_date`,(`batch_view`.`completed_sessions` + 2) AS `2nd_next_class_number`,((case when ((weekday(curdate()) + 1) >= `batch_view`.`day_code`) then ((curdate() + interval (6 - weekday(curdate())) day) + interval `batch_view`.`day_code` day) else ((curdate() + interval (0 - weekday(curdate())) day) + interval (`batch_view`.`day_code` - 1) day) end) + interval (7 * 2) day) AS `3rd_next_date`,(`batch_view`.`completed_sessions` + 3) AS `3rd_next_class_number`,((case when ((weekday(curdate()) + 1) >= `batch_view`.`day_code`) then ((curdate() + interval (6 - weekday(curdate())) day) + interval `batch_view`.`day_code` day) else ((curdate() + interval (0 - weekday(curdate())) day) + interval (`batch_view`.`day_code` - 1) day) end) + interval (7 * 3) day) AS `4th_next_date`,(`batch_view`.`completed_sessions` + 4) AS `4th_next_class_number`,((case when ((weekday(curdate()) + 1) >= `batch_view`.`day_code`) then ((curdate() + interval (6 - weekday(curdate())) day) + interval `batch_view`.`day_code` day) else ((curdate() + interval (0 - weekday(curdate())) day) + interval (`batch_view`.`day_code` - 1) day) end) + interval (7 * 6) day) AS `7th_next_date`,(`batch_view`.`completed_sessions` + 7) AS `7th_next_class_number`,((case when ((weekday(curdate()) + 1) >= `batch_view`.`day_code`) then ((curdate() + interval (6 - weekday(curdate())) day) + interval `batch_view`.`day_code` day) else ((curdate() + interval (0 - weekday(curdate())) day) + interval (`batch_view`.`day_code` - 1) day) end) + interval (7 * 7) day) AS `8th_next_date`,(`batch_view`.`completed_sessions` + 8) AS `8th_next_class_number`,((case when ((weekday(curdate()) + 1) >= `batch_view`.`day_code`) then ((curdate() + interval (6 - BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.batch_product_log
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `batch_product_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `batch_id` int NOT NULL,
  `product_id` int NOT NULL,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `class` int NOT NULL,
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `batch_id` (`batch_id`),
  KEY `product_id` (`product_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `batch_id_2` (`batch_id`),
  KEY `product_id_2` (`product_id`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `batch_id_3` (`batch_id`),
  KEY `product_id_3` (`product_id`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `batch_id_4` (`batch_id`),
  KEY `product_id_4` (`product_id`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=54697 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.batch_product_log_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `batch_product_log_view` AS select `bpl`.`id` AS `id`,`bpl`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`bpl`.`product_id` AS `product_id`,`bpl`.`date` AS `date`,`bpl`.`class` AS `class`,`bpl`.`bid` AS `bid`,`p`.`from_class` AS `from_class`,`p`.`to_class` AS `to_class`,`p`.`level_id` AS `product_level`,`p`.`description` AS `description`,`p`.`barcode` AS `barcode`,`p`.`status` AS `status`,`p`.`bid` AS `product_bid`,`p`.`park` AS `product_park`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`b`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`b`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`b`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,`b`.`inactive` AS `inactive`,`b`.`limit` AS `limit`,`b`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`b`.`type` AS `type`,`b`.`level_id` AS `level_id`,`b`.`park` AS `batch_park`,`b`.`bid` AS `batch_bid` from ((`batch_product_log` `bpl` join `product` `p` on((`bpl`.`product_id` = `p`.`id`))) join `batch` `b` on((`bpl`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`)));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.batch_recording_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `batch_recording_view` AS select `cr`.`id` AS `id`,concat('TRATOM - ',`cr`.`pi_id`) AS `tratom_id`,`cr`.`pi_id` AS `pi_id`,`b`.`park` AS `batch_park`,`cr`.`park` AS `park`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `teacher_name`,(case when (`b`.`display_name` = '') then `b`.`batch` else `b`.`display_name` end) AS `batch`,`b`.`batch` AS `actual_batch_name`,date_format(`a`.`created_at`,'%d %b %y %h:%i %p') AS `attendace_date`,`cr`.`date` AS `recording_date`,`cr`.`filename` AS `filename`,(case when ((`cr`.`s3_key` is not null) and (`cr`.`s3_key` <> '')) then `cr`.`s3_key` else `cr`.`file_id` end) AS `file_id`,`cr`.`storage_type` AS `storage_type`,`cr`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,(case when ((`br`.`ratings` is null) or (`br`.`ratings` = '')) then 'Rating : Pending' else 'Rating : Done' end) AS `survey_rating_status`,(case when ((`br`.`feedback` is null) or (`br`.`feedback` = '')) then 'Review : Pending' else 'Review : Done' end) AS `survey_review_status`,concat((case when ((`br`.`ratings` is null) or (`br`.`ratings` = '')) then 'Rating : Pending' else concat('Rating : ',`br`.`pointers`) end),' - \n',convert((case when ((`br`.`feedback` is null) or (`br`.`feedback` = '')) then 'Review : Pending' else 'Review : Done' end) using utf8mb3)) AS `survey_status`,concat(date_format(`cr`.`created_at`,'%d %b %y %h:%i %p'),' / ',date_format(`cr`.`updated_at`,'%d %b %y %h:%i %p')) AS `start`,timediff(`cr`.`updated_at`,`cr`.`created_at`) AS `duration`,(case when ((`cr`.`recording` = 0) and (`cr`.`merge` = 0) and (`cr`.`upload` = 0)) then 'Recording' when ((`cr`.`recording` = 1) and (`cr`.`merge` = 0) and (`cr`.`upload` = 0)) then 'Merging' when ((`cr`.`recording` = 1) and (`cr`.`merge` = 1) and (`cr`.`upload` = 0)) then 'Uploading' when ((`cr`.`recording` = 1) and (`cr`.`merge` = 1) and (`cr`.`upload` = 1)) then 'Done' end) AS `status` from (((((`pf_central`.`cam_recording` `cr` join `batch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `cr`.`batch_id`))) left join `batch_employee` `be` on((`b`.`id` = `be`.`batch_id`))) join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `be`.`contact_id`))) left join `batch_review` `br` on((`br`.`cr_id` = `cr`.`id`))) left join `attendance` `a` on(((`cr`.`date` = `a`.`date`) and (`cr`.`batch_id` = `a`.`batch_id`)))) where (((`cr`.`file_id` <> '') or ((`cr`.`s3_key` is not null) and (`cr`.`s3_key` <> ''))) and (`cr`.`recording` = 1) and (`cr`.`merge` = 1) and (`cr`.`upload` = 1) and (`a`.`type` = 'E')) order by `cr`.`id` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.batch_review
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `batch_review` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `batch_id` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `cr_id` varchar(225) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'camera recording id',
  `teacher_tshirt` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `associate_tshirt` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '3-Don''t know camera not on her,1-wear T-Shirt , 2- No',
  `total_students` json NOT NULL,
  `feedback` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `ratings` longtext NOT NULL,
  `pointers` varchar(225) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `out_of` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `modified_by` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=747 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.batch_settings
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `batch_settings` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `batch` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Flag (0-No / 1-Yes)',
  `sessions` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Flag (0-No / 1-Yes)',
  `transfer` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Flag (0-No / 1-Yes)',
  `check_emp_dup` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT 'Flag (1 - Check for duplicate Emp, 0 - Dont Check)',
  `show_class_material_before` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 states for same day, else put in integer to prepone',
  `show_class_video_before` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 states for same day, else put in integer to prepone',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `create_by` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=6 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

AS `trainee_fname`,`tc`.`lname` AS `trainee_lname`,`tc`.`email` AS `trainee_email`,`tc`.`country_code` AS `trainee_country_code`,`tc`.`mobile` AS `trainee_mobile`,`tc`.`country_code_2` AS `trainee_country_code_2`,`tc`.`mobile2` AS `trainee_mobile2`,`bts`.`date` AS `date`,`bts`.`status` AS `status`,`ta`.`converted` AS `converted`,'Class Viewing' AS `type`,`btv`.`id` AS `batch_id`,`btv`.`batch` AS `batch`,`btv`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`btv`.`level_id` AS `level_id`,`btv`.`level` AS `level`,`btv`.`category` AS `category`,`btv`.`code` AS `code`,`btv`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`btv`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`btv`.`start_date_string` AS `start_date_string`,`btv`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,`btv`.`end_date_string` AS `end_date_string`,`btv`.`inactive` AS `inactive`,`btv`.`completed_sessions` AS `completed_sessions`,`btv`.`park` AS `park`,`btv`.`bid` AS `bid`,time_format(`btv`.`start_time`,'%h:%i %p') AS `batch_time`,`btv`.`start_time` AS `start_time`,`btv`.`end_time` AS `end_time`,`btv`.`limit` AS `limit`,`btv`.`day` AS `day`,`btv`.`day_code` AS `day_code`,`btv`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`btv`.`assistant_teacher` AS `assistant_teacher`,`btv`.`fname` AS `fname`,`btv`.`lname` AS `lname`,`btv`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,`btv`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`btv`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`tc`.`country_code_2` AS `country_code_2`,`tc`.`mobile2` AS `mobile2`,`btv`.`cont_park` AS `cont_park`,`btv`.`module_id` AS `module_id`,`btv`.`module` AS `module`,`btv`.`title` AS `title`,`btv`.`session_id` AS `session_id`,`btv`.`avg_age` AS `avg_age`,`btv`.`min_age` AS `min_age`,`btv`.`max_age` AS `max_age`,`btv`.`waiting_list` AS `waiting_list`,`btv`.`enrolled` AS `enrolled`,`btv`.`offline` AS `offline`,`btv`.`private` AS `private`,`btv`.`on_web` AS `on_web`,`btv`.`rate_multiplier` AS `rate_multiplier`,`btv`.`fixed_amt` AS `fixed_amt`,`btv`.`branch` AS `branch`,`btv`.`branch_code` AS `branch_code`,`btv`.`branch_type` AS `branch_type`,`btv`.`zoom_email_id` AS `zoom_email_id`,`btv`.`zoom_id` AS `zoom_id`,`btv`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id` from (((`batch_trainee_schedule` `bts` join `batch_trainee_view` `btv` on(((`bts`.`batch_id` = `btv`.`id`) and (((weekday(`bts`.`date`) + 1) % 7) = `btv`.`day_code`)))) join `contact` `tc` on(((`bts`.`contact_id` = `tc`.`id`) and (`tc`.`park` = 0)))) join `teacher_applicant` `ta` on(((`ta`.`contact_id` = `bts`.`contact_id`) and (`ta`.`park` = 0)))) where ((`bts`.`park` = 0) and (`btv`.`cont_park` = 0));

`end_date_string`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`inactive` AS `inactive`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`type` AS `type`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`completed_sessions` AS `completed_sessions`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`park` AS `park`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`bid` AS `bid`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`start_time` AS `start_time`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`end_time` AS `end_time`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`date` AS `date`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`limit` AS `limit`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`day` AS `day`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`day_code` AS `day_code`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`assistant_teacher` AS `assistant_teacher`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`fname` AS AS `avg_age`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`min_age` AS `min_age`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`max_age` AS `max_age`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`waiting_list` AS `waiting_list`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`enrolled` AS `enrolled`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`offline` AS `offline`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`private` AS `private`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`on_web` AS `on_web`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`training_assign` AS `training_assign`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`rate_multiplier` AS `rate_multiplier`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`fixed_amt` AS `fixed_amt`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`branch` AS `branch`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`branch_code` AS `branch_code`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`branch_type` AS `branch_type`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`zoom_email_id` AS `zoom_email_id`,`batch_employee_time_view`.`zoom_id` AS
