(`batch_employee_time_view`.`training_assign` = 0) and (`batch_employee_time_view`.`on_web` = 0) and (`batch_employee_time_view`.`cont_park` = 0) and (`batch_employee_time_view`.`day_code` <> 0) and (`batch_employee_time_view`.`demo_class` = 0) and (`batch_employee_time_view`.`end_date` > curdate()) and (((`batch_employee_time_view`.`parent_id` = 0) and (`batch_employee_time_view`.`enrolled` <> 0)) or (`batch_employee_time_view`.`parent_id` <> 0)));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.batch_trainer_senior_counsellor_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `batch_trainer_senior_counsellor_view` AS select `betv`.`id` AS `id`,`betv`.`batch` AS `batch_name`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `trainer_name`,(case when (`tc`.`c_name` is not null) then `tc`.`c_name` else 'Not Assigned yet' end) AS `senior_counsellor`,`betv`.`park` AS `park` from ((((`batch_employee_time_view` `betv` left join `employee` `e` on((`e`.`id` = `betv`.`employee_id`))) left join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) left join `teacher_counsellor` `tc` on((`tc`.`t_contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join `branch` `b` on((`betv`.`bid` = `b`.`id`))) where ((`betv`.`park` = 0) and (`e`.`park` = 0) and (`c`.`park` = 0) and (`tc`.`park` = 0) and (not((`betv`.`batch` like '%Training%'))) and (not((`betv`.`batch` like '%Dummy%')))) order by `b`.`branch`;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.batch_training_class_request_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `batch_training_class_request_view` AS select `btcr`.`id` AS `id`,`btcr`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`l`.`level` AS `batch_level`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch_name`,`btcr`.`requested_class_no` AS `requested_class_no`,`btcr`.`current_class_no` AS `current_class_no`,`btcr`.`need_approval` AS `need_approval`,`btcr`.`support_id` AS `support_id`,`btcr`.`requested_by` AS `requested_by`,concat(`u`.`fname`,' ',`u`.`lname`) AS `requested_by_name`,`btcr`.`when_requested` AS `when_requested`,date_format(`btcr`.`when_requested`,'%M %e, %Y %l:%i %p') AS `when_requested_string`,`btcr`.`when_approved` AS `when_approved`,date_format(`btcr`.`when_approved`,'%M %e, %Y %l:%i %p') AS `when_approved_string`,`btcr`.`approved_by` AS `approved_by`,concat(`u2`.`fname`,' ',`u2`.`lname`) AS `approved_by_name`,`btcr`.`park` AS `park`,`btcr`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from ((((`batch_training_class_request` `btcr` join `batch` `b` on((`btcr`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `level` `l` on((`l`.`id` = `b`.`level_id`))) left join `pf_central`.`user` `u` on((`btcr`.`requested_by` = `u`.`id`))) left join `pf_central`.`user` `u2` on((`btcr`.`approved_by` = `u2`.`id`))) order by `btcr`.`modified_at` desc;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.batch_transfer_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `batch_transfer_view` AS select `bt`.`id` AS `id`,`bt`.`item_id` AS `item_id`,`bt`.`from_id` AS `from_id`,`bt`.`to_id` AS `to_id`,`bt`.`bid` AS `bid`,`bt`.`park` AS `park`,`fb`.`batch` AS `from_batch`,`tb`.`batch` AS `to_batch`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname` from (((((`batch_transfer` `bt` join `batch` `fb` on((`bt`.`from_id` = `fb`.`id`))) join `batch` `tb` on((`bt`.`to_id` = `tb`.`id`))) join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`ii`.`id` = `bt`.`item_id`))) join `invoice` `i` on((`i`.`id` = `ii`.`invoice_id`))) join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) where (0 <> 1);


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.batch_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `batch_view` AS select `b`.`id` AS `id`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`b`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`e`.`ecode` AS `code`,`cat`.`category` AS `category`,`cat`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,`b`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,date_format(`b`.`start_date`,'%d %b %y') AS `start_date_string`,`b`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,(to_days(now()) - to_days(`b`.`end_date`)) AS `last_date_days`,date_format(`b`.`end_date`,'%d %b %y') AS `end_date_string`,`bt`.`start_time` AS `start_time`,`bt`.`end_time` AS `end_time`,`b`.`completed_sessions` AS `completed_sessions`,group_concat(distinct (case when (`bt`.`day_code` = '0') then 'Sun' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '1') then 'Mon' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '2') then 'Tue' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '3') then 'Wed' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '4') then 'Thu' when (`bt`.`day_code` = '5') then 'Fri' else 'Sat' end) separator ', ') AS `days`,`bt`.`day_code` AS `day_code`,`be`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,group_concat(distinct `c`.`fname` separator ', ') AS `employee`,`c`.`email` AS `employee_mail`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`b`.`inactive` AS `inactive`,`b`.`type` AS `type`,`b`.`enrolled` AS `enrolled`,`b`.`limit` AS `limit`,`b`.`min_age` AS `min_age`,`b`.`max_age` AS `max_age`,`b`.`on_web` AS `on_web`,`b`.`training_assign` AS `training_assign`,`b`.`demo_class` AS `demo_class`,`b`.`assistant_teacher_cid` AS `assistant_teacher_cid`,`b`.`park` AS `park`,`b`.`bid` AS `bid`,`br`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`b`.`hide` AS `hide`,`b`.`international` AS `international`,`b`.`offline` AS `offline`,`l`.`level` AS `level`,`b`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,`b`.`cr_id` AS `cr_id`,`v`.`feedback_link` AS `venue_feedback_link` from ((((((((`contact` `c` join `batch_time` `bt`) join `batch` `b`) join `batch_employee` `be`) join `employee` `e`) join `category` `cat`) left join `branch` `br` on((`b`.`bid` = `br`.`id`))) left join `level` `l` on((`l`.`id` = `b`.`level_id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`b`.`venue_id` = `v`.`id`))) where ((`b`.`id` = `be`.`batch_id`) and (`e`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`) and (`b`.`id` = `bt`.`batch_id`) and (`be`.`contact_id` = `e`.`contact_id`) and (`b`.`category_id` = `cat`.`id`)) group by `b`.`id`;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.biosync_log
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `biosync_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `sr_no` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT ' Device Serial Number',
  `start_datetime` datetime NOT NULL COMMENT ' Log start datetime',
  `end_datetime` datetime NOT NULL COMMENT 'Log end datetime',
  `pull_count` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'No of records synced from device',
  `delete_count` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'No of records deleted from device',
  `enable_count` int NOT NULL COMMENT ' No of records enabled from device',
  `disable_count` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'disable_count - ',
  `push_count` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'No of records added into device',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.branch
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `branch` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `branch` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'name of branch',
  `branch_name_actual` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Name of branch to be shown on invoice',
  `branch_invoice_name` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `invoice_name_id` int NOT NULL,
  `branch_code` varchar(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `logo` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'TR_logo_R_1024.jpg' COMMENT 'logo of branch to be shown on invoice.',
  `address` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `pin_code` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `invoice_address` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `invoice_pin_code` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `pan_number` varchar(30) NOT NULL,
  `phone` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `mobile` varchar(15) NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `cc_email` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `gst_no` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `unregistered` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'UNREGISTERED',
  `send_sms` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `send_email` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `double_tick_sms` int NOT NULL,
  `renewal_doubletick_account` int NOT NULL,
  `cgstTax` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `sgstTax` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `igstTax` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `is_headquaters` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0 - This branch is not an head quater / 1 - This branch is an headquarter)',
  `pincode` int NOT NULL,
  `facebook` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `instagram` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `youtube` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `website` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `twitter` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `linkedin` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `ignore_product` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `counsellors_incentives` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Counselling services provided',
  `managed_by_tr` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `mobile2` varchar(15) NOT NULL COMMENT 'For Invoice PDF',
  `timezone` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Asia/Kolkata',
  `type` set('COCO','Franchisee','TEMP','OM_Franchisee','HQ','S_TEMP','OI_Franchisee') CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'COCO',
  `accounts_model` set('V1','V2','PV1') CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'V1' COMMENT 'V1-''Money Collected by company'', V2 - ''Money collected by Franchisee'',PV1-''Partnership money collected at company''',
  `prizes_as_per_zone` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `primary_currency` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '132',
  `secondary_currency` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '132',
  `type_code` int DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'waste',
  `royalty` int NOT NULL,
  `offline_royalty` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `tds` int NOT NULL,
  `zoom` int NOT NULL,
  `time` time NOT NULL DEFAULT '00:00:00',
  `reference_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Reference ID for copied from branch',
  `offline` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `trainer_cid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `position_temp` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `is_headquaters` (`is_headquaters`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `type` (`type`),
  KEY `idx_id_type` (`id`,`type`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=210 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.branch_agreements_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `branch_agreements_view` AS select `bal`.`id` AS `id`,`bal`.`bid` AS `bid`,`bal`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`bal`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,`bal`.`status` AS `status`,`bal`.`flag` AS `flag`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name_actual` from ((`branch_agreements_log` `bal` left join `branch_agreements` `ba` on((`bal`.`branch_agreements_id` = `ba`.`id`))) left join `branch` `b` on((`ba`.`bid` = `b`.`id`))) where ((`ba`.`park` = 0) and (`b`.`park` = 0));

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.branch_details_temp

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.branch_owner_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `branch_owner_view` AS select group_concat(`b`.`id` separator ',') AS `id`,group_concat(`b`.`branch` separator ',') AS `branch_name`,group_concat(`b`.`branch_code` separator ',') AS `branch`,`bom`.`owner_name` AS `owner_name`,`bom`.`id` AS `owner_id`,group_concat(`b`.`email` separator ',') AS `email`,group_concat(`b`.`cc_email` separator ',') AS `cc_email`,group_concat(`b`.`type` separator ',') AS `branch_type`,`b`.`park` AS `park` from (`branch` `b` left join `branch_owner_master` `bom` on((`b`.`invoice_name_id` = `bom`.`id`))) where (`b`.`park` = 0) group by `b`.`invoice_name_id`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.branch_session_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `branch_session_view` AS select `invoice_invoiceitem_view`.`bid` AS `id`,sum(`invoice_invoiceitem_view`.`sessions`) AS `total_sessions`,sum(`invoice_invoiceitem_view`.`sessions_used`) AS `used_sessions`,sum((`invoice_invoiceitem_view`.`sessions` - `invoice_invoiceitem_view`.`sessions_used`)) AS `remaining_sessions`,`invoice_invoiceitem_view`.`branch` AS `branch`,`invoice_invoiceitem_view`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name_actual` from `invoice_invoiceitem_view` where ((`invoice_invoiceitem_view`.`branch_type` = 'COCO') and (`invoice_invoiceitem_view`.`category` = 'Right Brain Education') and (`invoice_invoiceitem_view`.`park` = 0)) group by `invoice_invoiceitem_view`.`bid`;

CREATE TABLE `branch_transfer` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `from_contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `to_contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `from_bid` int NOT NULL,
  `to_bid` int NOT NULL,

  `to_item_id` int NOT NULL,
  `start_date` date NOT NULL,
  `end_date` date NOT NULL,
  `from_amount` int NOT NULL,
  `to_amount` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `from_contact_id` (`from_contact_id`),
  KEY `to_contact_id` (`to_contact_id`),
  KEY `from_bid` (`from_bid`),
  KEY `to_bid` (`to_bid`),
  KEY `from_item_id` (`from_item_id`),
  KEY `to_item_id` (`to_item_id`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `from_contact_id_2` (`from_contact_id`),
  KEY `to_contact_id_2` (`to_contact_id`),
  KEY `from_bid_2` (`from_bid`),
  KEY `to_bid_2` (`to_bid`),
  KEY `from_item_id_2` (`from_item_id`),
  KEY `to_item_id_2` (`to_item_id`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `from_contact_id_3` (`from_contact_id`),
  KEY `to_contact_id_3` (`to_contact_id`),
  KEY `from_bid_3` (`from_bid`),
  KEY `to_bid_3` (`to_bid`),
  KEY `from_item_id_3` (`from_item_id`),
  KEY `to_item_id_3` (`to_item_id`),
  KEY `park_3` (`park`),
  KEY `from_contact_id_4` (`from_contact_id`),
  KEY `to_contact_id_4` (`to_contact_id`),
  KEY `from_bid_4` (`from_bid`),
  KEY `to_bid_4` (`to_bid`),
  KEY `from_item_id_4` (`from_item_id`),
  KEY `to_item_id_4` (`to_item_id`),
  KEY `park_4` (`park`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.c_eff_monthly_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `c_eff_monthly_view` AS select `e`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `c_name`,count(`i`.`id`) AS `inq_allocated`,count((case when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 1 else NULL end)) AS `inq_converted`,((count((case when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 1 else NULL end)) / count(`i`.`id`)) * 100) AS `conversion_rate`,cast(((count((case when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 1 else NULL end)) / count(`i`.`id`)) * 100) as decimal(10,0)) AS `int_conversion_rate`,(select sum(`p`.`amount`) from ((`payment` `p` left join `invoice` `i` on((`p`.`invoice_id` = `i`.`id`))) left join `employee` `em` on((`em`.`id` = `i`.`employee_id`))) where ((`p`.`balance` = 0) and ((`em`.`position_id` = 7) or (`em`.`position_id` = 9)) and (`em`.`park` = 0) and (`i`.`park` = 0) and (`em`.`id` = `em`.`id`) and (`em`.`id` = `e`.`id`))) AS `amount` from ((`employee` `e` left join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) left join `inquiry` `i` on((`i`.`c_employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) where (((`e`.`position_id` = 7) or (`e`.`position_id` = 9)) and (`i`.`park` = 0) and (`e`.`park` = 0) and (`i`.`park` = 0) and (`i`.`allocation_date` <= last_day(curdate())) and (`i`.`allocation_date` >= (last_day(now()) - interval (dayofmonth(last_day(now())) - 1) day))) group by `e`.`id` order by `inq_allocated` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.c_eff_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `c_eff_view` AS select `e`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `c_name`,count(`i`.`id`) AS `inq_allocated`,count((case when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 1 else NULL end)) AS `inq_converted`,((count((case when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 1 else NULL end)) / count(`i`.`id`)) * 100) AS `conversion_rate`,cast(((count((case when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 1 else NULL end)) / count(`i`.`id`)) * 100) as decimal(10,0)) AS `int_conversion_rate`,(select sum(`p`.`amount`) from ((`payment` `p` left join `invoice` `i` on((`p`.`invoice_id` = `i`.`id`))) left join `employee` `em` on((`em`.`id` = `i`.`employee_id`))) where ((`p`.`balance` = 0) and ((`em`.`position_id` = 7) or (`em`.`position_id` = 9) or (`e`.`position_id` = 23)) and (`em`.`park` = 0) and (`i`.`park` = 0) and (`em`.`id` = `em`.`id`) and (`em`.`id` = `e`.`id`))) AS `amount`,`e`.`auto_assign_inq` AS `auto_assign_inq` from ((`employee` `e` left join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) left join `inquiry` `i` on((`i`.`c_employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) where (((`e`.`position_id` = 7) or (`e`.`position_id` = 9) or (`e`.`position_id` = 23)) and (`i`.`park` = 0) and (`e`.`park` = 0) and (`i`.`park` = 0)) group by `e`.`id` order by `conversion_rate` desc;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.calendar_event_logs
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `calendar_event_logs` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `event_created_by` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `creators_email` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_by` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `event_id` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL,
  `summary` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `location` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `event_start` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  `event_end` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  `event_timezone` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `attendees` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `can_attendees_modify` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `demo_id` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `batch_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `batch` varchar(500) DEFAULT NULL,
  `response_code` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `response_message` text,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `prev_modify` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `recurring_event` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `is_scheduled` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `is_original` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `parent_batch_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `parent_batch_name` varchar(500) DEFAULT NULL,
  `batch_status` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  `followup_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `followup_flag` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=21638 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.calendar_event_logs_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `calendar_event_logs_view` AS select `calendar_event_logs`.`id` AS `id`,`calendar_event_logs`.`event_created_by` AS `event_created_by`,`calendar_event_logs`.`creators_email` AS `creators_email`,`calendar_event_logs`.`updated_by` AS `updated_by`,`calendar_event_logs`.`event_id` AS `event_id`,`calendar_event_logs`.`summary` AS `summary`,`calendar_event_logs`.`description` AS `description`,`calendar_event_logs`.`location` AS `location`,`calendar_event_logs`.`event_start` AS `event_start`,`calendar_event_logs`.`event_end` AS `event_end`,date_format(str_to_date(`calendar_event_logs`.`event_end`,'%M %d, %Y at %h:%i %p'),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS `formatted_event_datetime`,date_format(str_to_date(`calendar_event_logs`.`event_end`,'%M %d, %Y at %h:%i %p'),'%Y-%m-%d') AS `formatted_event_date`,date_format(str_to_date(`calendar_event_logs`.`event_end`,'%M %d, %Y at %h:%i %p'),'%H:%i:%s') AS `formatted_event_time`,date_format(str_to_date(`calendar_event_logs`.`event_end`,'%M %d, %Y at %h:%i %p'),'%h:%i %p') AS `formatted_event_formatted_time`,`calendar_event_logs`.`event_timezone` AS `event_timezone`,`calendar_event_logs`.`attendees` AS `attendees`,json_unquote(json_extract(`calendar_event_logs`.`attendees`,'$[*].email')) AS `all_emails`,(case when ((`calendar_event_logs`.`creators_email` is not null) and (`calendar_event_logs`.`creators_email` <> '')) then json_array_append(json_unquote(json_extract(`calendar_event_logs`.`attendees`,'$[*].email')),'$',`calendar_event_logs`.`creators_email`) else json_unquote(json_extract(`calendar_event_logs`.`attendees`,'$[*].email')) end) AS `concatenated_emails`,`calendar_event_logs`.`can_attendees_modify` AS `can_attendees_modify`,`calendar_event_logs`.`demo_id` AS `demo_id`,`calendar_event_logs`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`calendar_event_logs`.`response_code` AS `response_code`,`calendar_event_logs`.`response_message` AS `response_message`,`calendar_event_logs`.`park` AS `park`,cast(`calendar_event_logs`.`created_at` as date) AS `created_at_date`,`calendar_event_logs`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`calendar_event_logs`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from `calendar_event_logs`;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.carrot_log
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `carrot_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `carrot` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `type` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Fla (0 - Cr / 1 - Db)',
  `module_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `row_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `type` (`type`),
  KEY `module_id` (`module_id`),
  KEY `row_id` (`row_id`),
  KEY `contact_id_2` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `type_2` (`type`),
  KEY `module_id_2` (`module_id`),
  KEY `row_id_2` (`row_id`),
  KEY `contact_id_3` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `type_3` (`type`),
  KEY `module_id_3` (`module_id`),
  KEY `row_id_3` (`row_id`),
  KEY `contact_id_4` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `type_4` (`type`),
  KEY `module_id_4` (`module_id`),

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.cash_payment_view_coco
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `cash_payment_view_coco` AS select `payment`.`id` AS `id`,`i`.`invoice` AS `invoice_no`,`i`.`bid` AS `bid`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,concat(`c2`.`fname`,' ',`c2`.`lname`,' ',`c2`.`mname`) AS `invoice_creator`,`payment`.`amount` AS `amount`,`payment`.`pay_mode_text` AS `pay_mode`,(select `branch`.`branch` from `branch` where (`branch`.`id` = `payment`.`bid`)) AS `branch`,`payment`.`receipt_copy` AS `receipt_copy`,`payment`.`declaration_copy` AS `declaration_copy`,cast(`payment`.`date` as date) AS `date`,`payment`.`park` AS `park` from ((((`payment` left join `invoice` `i` on((`payment`.`invoice_id` = `i`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c` on((`i`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`i`.`employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c2` on((`c2`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) where ((`payment`.`balance` = 0) and (`payment`.`modified_at` > '2021-08-01') and (`payment`.`amount` > 0) and (`payment`.`park` = 0) and ((`payment`.`pay_mode_text` = 'Cash') or (`payment`.`pay_mode_text` = 'QR Code') or (`payment`.`pay_mode_text` = 'PEYGK cash') or (`payment`.`pay_mode_text` = 'PEYGK bank transfer')) and `payment`.`bid` in (select `branch`.`id` from `branch` where ((`branch`.`type` = 'COCO') and (`branch`.`park` = 0)))) order by cast(`payment`.`date` as date) desc;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.category
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `category` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `category` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `type` int DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 is for service, 1 is for product, 2 is for system categories',
  `master_category_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `referral_code_value` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Value to be discounted when availing referral code',
  `points_value` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Value of each point',
  `referral_points` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Points to be credited after first paid invoice of a referred student',
  `bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `master_category_id` (`master_category_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=466 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.co_eff_monthly_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `co_eff_monthly_view` AS select `e`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `c_name`,count(`i`.`id`) AS `inq_allocated`,count((case when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 1 else NULL end)) AS `inq_converted`,((count((case when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 1 else NULL end)) / count(`i`.`id`)) * 100) AS `conversion_rate`,cast(((count((case when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 1 else NULL end)) / count(`i`.`id`)) * 100) as decimal(10,0)) AS `int_conversion_rate`,sum(`inv`.`total`) AS `amount`,group_concat(`inv`.`id` separator ',') AS `invoices`,group_concat(`i`.`id` separator ',') AS `inquiries` from (((`employee` `e` left join `contact` `c` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join `inquiry` `i` on((`i`.`c_employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) left join `invoice` `inv` on(((`inv`.`employee_id` = `e`.`id`) and (`i`.`contact_id` = `inv`.`contact_id`) and (`inv`.`balance` = 0)))) where ((`e`.`park` = 0) and (`c`.`park` = 0) and (`i`.`park` = 0) and ((`e`.`position_id` = 7) or (`e`.`position_id` = 9) or (`e`.`position_id` = 23)) and (`i`.`allocation_date` <= last_day(curdate())) and (`i`.`allocation_date` >= (last_day(now()) - interval (dayofmonth(last_day(now())) - 1) day))) group by `e`.`id` order by `inq_allocated` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.co_eff_monthly_view_new
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `co_eff_monthly_view_new` AS select `i`.`id` AS `id`,`i`.`allocation_date` AS `allocation_date_time`,`i`.`bid` AS `bid`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`cecv`.`fullname` AS `counsellor_name`,count(`i`.`id`) AS `inq_allocated`,sum((case when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 1 else 0 end)) AS `inq_converted`,sum((case when (`i`.`converted` = 0) then 1 else 0 end)) AS `inq_remained`,((count((case when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 1 else NULL end)) / count(`i`.`id`)) * 100) AS `conversion_rate`,sum(`inv`.`total`) AS `amount`,`i`.`c_employee_id` AS `c_employee_id`,`i`.`tap` AS `tap`,`i`.`tap_count` AS `tap_count`,`i`.`park` AS `park` from ((((((((`contact` `c` join `contact_group` `cg`) join `category` `cat`) join `inquiry` `i`) join `inquiry_category` `ic`) join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `i`.`bid`))) left join (select `e`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`c`.`id` AS `contact_id`,`c`.`country_code` AS `cc`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`c`.`country_code_2` AS `cc2`,`c`.`mobile2` AS `mobile2` from (`contact` `c` join `employee` `e` on(((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`) and (`e`.`park` = 0))))) `cecv` on((`cecv`.`id` = `i`.`c_employee_id`))) left join `member` `m` on((`c`.`id` = `m`.`contact_id`))) left join `invoice` `inv` on(((`i`.`contact_id` = `inv`.`contact_id`) and (`inv`.`balance` = 0)))) where ((`cg`.`id` = `c`.`contact_group_id`) and (`c`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`) and (`i`.`id` = `ic`.`inquiry_id`) and (`ic`.`category_id` = `cat`.`id`) and (`i`.`park` = 0) and (`i`.`allocation_date` >= concat(left(curdate(),7),'-01')) and (`i`.`allocation_date` <= concat(last_day(curdate()),' ','23:59:59')) and (`b`.`type` in ('HQ','COCO'))) group by `i`.`c_employee_id`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.co_eff_prev_monthly_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `co_eff_prev_monthly_view` AS select `e`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `c_name`,count(`i`.`id`) AS `inq_allocated`,count((case when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 1 else NULL end)) AS `inq_converted`,((count((case when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 1 else NULL end)) / count(`i`.`id`)) * 100) AS `conversion_rate`,cast(((count((case when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 1 else NULL end)) / count(`i`.`id`)) * 100) as decimal(10,0)) AS `int_conversion_rate`,sum(`inv`.`total`) AS `amount`,group_concat(`inv`.`id` separator ',') AS `invoices`,group_concat(`i`.`id` separator ',') AS `inquiries` from (((`employee` `e` left join `contact` `c` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join `inquiry` `i` on((`i`.`c_employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) left join `invoice` `inv` on(((`inv`.`employee_id` = `e`.`id`) and (`i`.`contact_id` = `inv`.`contact_id`) and (`inv`.`balance` = 0)))) where ((`e`.`park` = 0) and (`c`.`park` = 0) and (`i`.`park` = 0) and ((`e`.`position_id` = 7) or (`e`.`position_id` = 9) or (`e`.`position_id` = 23)) and (`i`.`allocation_date` >= date_format((curdate() - interval 1 month),'%Y-%m-01')) and (`i`.`allocation_date` < date_format(curdate(),'%Y-%m-01'))) group by `e`.`id` order by `inq_allocated` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.coco_member_status_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `coco_member_status_view` AS select `member_contact_view`.`id` AS `id`,`member_contact_view`.`branch` AS `branch`,sum((case when (`member_contact_view`.`status` = 1) then 1 else 0 end)) AS `active`,sum((case when (`member_contact_view`.`status` = 0) then 1 else 0 end)) AS `inactive`,sum((case when (`member_contact_view`.`offline` = 1) then 1 else 0 end)) AS `offline`,sum((case when (`member_contact_view`.`offline` = 0) then 1 else 0 end)) AS `online`,`member_contact_view`.`park` AS `park` from `member_contact_view` where ((`member_contact_view`.`status` in (1,0)) and (`member_contact_view`.`park` = 0) and (`member_contact_view`.`offline` in (0,1)) and (`member_contact_view`.`branch_type` = 'COCO')) group by `member_contact_view`.`branch`,`member_contact_view`.`branch_type` order by `member_contact_view`.`branch`;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.con_eff_old_rep
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `con_eff_old_rep` AS select `e`.`id` AS `id`,`i`.`allocation_date` AS `allocation_date`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `c_name`,count(`i`.`id`) AS `inq_allocated`,count((case when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 1 else NULL end)) AS `inq_converted`,((count((case when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 1 else NULL end)) / count(`i`.`id`)) * 100) AS `conversion_rate`,cast(((count((case when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 1 else NULL end)) / count(`i`.`id`)) * 100) as decimal(10,0)) AS `int_conversion_rate`,sum(`inv`.`total`) AS `amount`,group_concat(`inv`.`id` separator ',') AS `invoices`,group_concat(`i`.`id` separator ',') AS `inquiries` from (((`employee` `e` left join `contact` `c` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join `inquiry` `i` on((`i`.`c_employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) left join `invoice` `inv` on(((`inv`.`employee_id` = `e`.`id`) and (`i`.`contact_id` = `inv`.`contact_id`) and (`inv`.`balance` = 0)))) where ((`e`.`park` = 0) and (`c`.`park` = 0) and (`i`.`park` = 0) and ((`e`.`position_id` = 7) or (`e`.`position_id` = 9) or (`e`.`position_id` = 23)) and (`i`.`allocation_date` between '#sdate' and '#edate')) group by `e`.`id` order by `inq_allocated` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.cont_invoice_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `cont_invoice_view` AS select `i`.`id` AS `id`,`i`.`invoice` AS `invoice`,`i`.`quotation` AS `quotation`,concat(`i`.`code`,' - ',`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `code_name`,`i`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`i`.`code` AS `code`,`i`.`date` AS `date`,date_format(`i`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `date_string`,date_format(`i`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `invoice_date`,`i`.`amount` AS `amount`,`i`.`tax` AS `tax`,`i`.`tax_amount` AS `tax_amount`,`i`.`total` AS `total`,`i`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`i`.`balance` AS `balance`,`i`.`bid` AS `bid`,`i`.`park` AS `park`,`i`.`dropout` AS `dropout`,(case when (`i`.`refund` = 1) then 'Initiated' when (`i`.`refund` = 2) then 'Completed' else '' end) AS `refund`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`mname` AS `mname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`c`.`dob` AS `dob`,`c`.`gender` AS `gender`,`c`.`age` AS `age`,`p`.`pay_mode_text` AS `pay_mode_text`,`p`.`amount` AS `pay_amount` from ((`contact` `c` join `invoice` `i`) left join (select `payment`.`id` AS `id`,`payment`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,`payment`.`date` AS `date`,`payment`.`amount` AS `amount`,`payment`.`calculated_amount` AS `calculated_amount`,`payment`.`actual_amount` AS `actual_amount`,`payment`.`points` AS `points`,`payment`.`reminder` AS `reminder`,`payment`.`balance` AS `balance`,`payment`.`receipt` AS `receipt`,`payment`.`pay_mode` AS `pay_mode`,`payment`.`pay_mode_text` AS `pay_mode_text`,`payment`.`pay_link` AS `pay_link`,`payment`.`payment_request_id` AS `payment_request_id`,`payment`.`comment` AS `comment`,`payment`.`order_reference_no` AS `order_reference_no`,`payment`.`txn_number` AS `txn_number`,`payment`.`clear` AS `clear`,`payment`.`vendor` AS `vendor`,`payment`.`addpay_id` AS `addpay_id`,`payment`.`addpay_title` AS `addpay_title`,`payment`.`addpay_type` AS `addpay_type`,`payment`.`addpay_percent` AS `addpay_percent`,`payment`.`addpay_amount` AS `addpay_amount`,`payment`.`park` AS `park`,`payment`.`bid` AS `bid`,`payment`.`tracking_id` AS `tracking_id`,`payment`.`bank_ref_no` AS `bank_ref_no`,`payment`.`payment_mode` AS `payment_mode`,`payment`.`card_name` AS `card_name`,`payment`.`expire_paylink_flag` AS `expire_paylink_flag`,`payment`.`date_to_expire_link` AS `date_to_expire_link`,`payment`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`payment`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`payment`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`payment`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`payment`.`error` AS `error`,`payment`.`receipt_copy` AS `receipt_copy`,`payment`.`declaration_copy` AS `declaration_copy`,`payment`.`pay_id` AS `pay_id` from `payment` where ((`payment`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'Points') and (`payment`.`park` = 0))) `p` on((`i`.`id` = `p`.`invoice_id`))) where (`i`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`) group by `i`.`id`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.contact
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `contact` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_group_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT '1-inquiry, 2-employee,4-Member 8 - Franchise Inquiry',
  `fname` varchar(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `mname` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `lname` varchar(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `parent_name` text NOT NULL,
  `nick_name` varchar(30) NOT NULL,
  `country_code` varchar(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '+91',
  `mobile` varchar(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'primary mobile',
  `country_code_2` varchar(5) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '+91',
  `mobile2` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'secondary mobile',
  `phone_no` varchar(15) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `email` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `personal_email` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `followup_calendar_id` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `blogger` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `gender` varchar(8) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `image` varchar(30) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `dob` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `marital_status` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0 - Unmarried , 1 - Married',
  `formal_title` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `father_name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `spouse_name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `age` varchar(2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `occupation` int NOT NULL COMMENT '(1-Student,0-Employee, 2-Business)',
  `gstin` varchar(30) NOT NULL,
  `company` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'member''s gstin',
  `company_add` varchar(200) NOT NULL COMMENT 'member''s company address',
  `cv` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `document_type_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'contact_document id',
  `document_number` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'id proof number',
  `document_image` varchar(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `document_type_id_2` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'contact_document id_2',
  `document_number_2` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'id proof number_2',
  `document_image_2` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `document_type_id_3` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `document_image_3` varchar(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `parent_id` int DEFAULT '0',
  `relation` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `address` varchar(300) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `pincode` varchar(6) NOT NULL,
  `city` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `state` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `country` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `dnd` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0 - Off / 1 - On)',
  `gcal_refresh_token` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `gcal_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'primary',
  `activity` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `sleep` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '7' COMMENT 'In hours',
  `stress` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `smoking` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `drinking` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `drug` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `carrot` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `freshsales_id` varchar(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `quick_comment` varchar(1000) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `qualification_data` json NOT NULL,
  `event_flag` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0- include 1- exclude',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `contact_group_id` (`contact_group_id`),
  KEY `document_type_id` (`document_type_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `parent_id` (`parent_id`),
  KEY `fname` (`fname`),
  KEY `lname` (`lname`),
  KEY `mobile` (`mobile`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `doc_type_2` (`document_type_id_2`),
  KEY `dob` (`dob`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=106484 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.contact_component_level
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `contact_component_level` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `component_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `level` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `component_id` (`component_id`),
  KEY `level` (`level`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `component_id_2` (`component_id`),
  KEY `level_2` (`level`),
  KEY `contact_id_2` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `component_id_3` (`component_id`),
  KEY `level_3` (`level`),
  KEY `contact_id_3` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `component_id_4` (`component_id`),
  KEY `level_4` (`level`),
  KEY `contact_id_4` (`contact_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.contact_contactgroup_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `contact_contactgroup_view` AS select `c`.`id` AS `id`,`c`.`id` AS `contact_id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`c`.`contact_group_id` AS `contact_group_id`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`occupation` AS `occupation`,`c`.`company` AS `company`,`c`.`company_add` AS `company_add`,`c`.`gstin` AS `gstin`,`c`.`mname` AS `mname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`c`.`country_code_2` AS `country_code_2`,`c`.`mobile2` AS `mobile2`,`c`.`phone_no` AS `phone_no`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`c`.`gender` AS `gender`,`c`.`image` AS `image`,`c`.`dob` AS `dob`,`c`.`blogger` AS `blogger`,(case when ((`c`.`dob` = '0000-00-00') or (`c`.`dob` = '1970-01-01')) then '0000-00-00' else convert(date_format(`c`.`dob`,concat(convert(date_format(now(),'%Y') using utf8mb4),'-%m-%d')) using utf8mb4) end) AS `current_dob`,date_format(`c`.`dob`,'%d %b %y') AS `dob_string`,timestampdiff(YEAR,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) AS `age`,(case when (`c`.`dob` = '0000-00-00') then '-' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 0) then 'below 0' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 1) then '0-1' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 2) then '1-2' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 3) then '2-3' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 4) then '3-4' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 5) then '4-5' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 6) then '5-6' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 7) then '6-7' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 8) then '7-8' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 9) then '8-9' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 10) then '9-10' else 'above 10' end) AS `age_group`,`c`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`c`.`relation` AS `relation`,`c`.`address` AS `address`,`c`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`c`.`city` AS `city`,`c`.`state` AS `state`,`c`.`country` AS `country`,`c`.`dnd` AS `dnd`,`c`.`bid` AS `bid`,`c`.`park` AS `park`,`cg`.`contact_group` AS `contact_group`,`c`.`activity` AS `activity`,`c`.`sleep` AS `sleep`,`c`.`stress` AS `stress`,`c`.`carrot` AS `carrot`,`c`.`drinking` AS `drinking`,`c`.`smoking` AS `smoking`,`c`.`drug` AS `drug`,`c`.`quick_comment` AS `quick_comment` from (`contact` `c` join `contact_group` `cg`) where (`cg`.`id` = `c`.`contact_group_id`);

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.contact_extra
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `contact_extra` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int DEFAULT '0',
  `type` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '(0-No, 1-Education, 2-Experience, 3-Description, 4-Social, 5-Language, 6-Software, 7-Hobby, 8-Certification, 9-Tool, 10-PrefJobType, 11-PrefLocation, 12-Topic, 13-Industry)',
  `sub_type` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `value` varchar(500) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `header` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `topic_id` int NOT NULL,
  `module_id` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `topic_id` (`topic_id`),
  KEY `module_id` (`module_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `contact_id_2` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `topic_id_2` (`topic_id`),
  KEY `module_id_2` (`module_id`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `contact_id_3` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `topic_id_3` (`topic_id`),
  KEY `module_id_3` (`module_id`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `contact_id_4` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `topic_id_4` (`topic_id`),
  KEY `module_id_4` (`module_id`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.contact_extra_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `contact_extra_view` AS select `ce`.`id` AS `id`,`c`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`c`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,`c`.`contact_group_id` AS `contact_group_id`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`occupation` AS `occupation`,`c`.`company` AS `company`,`c`.`company_add` AS `company_add`,`c`.`gstin` AS `gstin`,`c`.`mname` AS `mname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`c`.`mobile2` AS `mobile2`,`c`.`phone_no` AS `phone_no`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`c`.`gender` AS `gender`,`c`.`image` AS `image`,`c`.`dob` AS `dob`,`c`.`dob_string` AS `dob_string`,`c`.`age` AS `age`,`c`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`c`.`relation` AS `relation`,`c`.`address` AS `address`,`c`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`c`.`city` AS `city`,`c`.`dnd` AS `dnd`,`c`.`bid` AS `bid`,`c`.`contact_group` AS `contact_group`,`ce`.`type` AS `type`,`ce`.`sub_type` AS `sub_type`,`ce`.`value` AS `value`,`ce`.`header` AS `header`,`ce`.`topic_id` AS `topic_id`,`ce`.`module_id` AS `module_id`,`ce`.`park` AS `park` from (`contact_contactgroup_view` `c` left join `contact_extra` `ce` on((`c`.`id` = `ce`.`contact_id`))) order by `ce`.`type`,`ce`.`sub_type`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.contact_followup_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `contact_followup_view` AS select `f`.`id` AS `id`,`f`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`f`.`type` AS `type`,`f`.`master` AS `master`,`f`.`status` AS `status`,`f`.`franchisee_fee` AS `franchisee_fee`,`f`.`royalty` AS `royalty`,`f`.`royalty_online` AS `royalty_online`,`f`.`royalty_offline` AS `royalty_offline`,`f`.`term` AS `term`,`f`.`authorized_representatives` AS `authorized_representatives`,`f`.`agreement` AS `agreement`,`f`.`km` AS `km`,`f`.`interest` AS `interest`,`f`.`interest_string` AS `interest_string`,`f`.`lost_reason` AS `lost_reason`,`f`.`preferences` AS `preferences`,`f`.`slot` AS `slot`,`f`.`comment` AS `comment`,`f`.`area` AS `area`,`f`.`country` AS `country`,`f`.`city` AS `city`,`f`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`f`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`f2`.`comment` AS `old_comment`,`f`.`followup` AS `followup`,`i`.`source` AS `source`,`i`.`heard_from` AS `heard_from`,concat(`ce`.`fname`,' ',`ce`.`lname`) AS `employee`,cast(`f`.`followup` as date) AS `date`,date_format(`f`.`reminder`,'%d %b  %y %k:%i') AS `reminder_string`,date_format(`f`.`followup`,'%d %b  %y %k:%i') AS `followup_string`,`f`.`reminder` AS `reminder`,`f`.`master_id` AS `master_id`,`f`.`unfollow` AS `unfollow`,`f`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`f`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`f`.`park` AS `park`,`f`.`bid` AS `bid`,`f`.`right_to_refusal` AS `right_to_refusal`,`f`.`calendar_flag` AS `calendar_flag`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`ic`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`ca`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,(case when (`c`.`dob` <> '0000-00-00') then convert(date_format(`c`.`dob`,'%d %b %y') using utf8mb3) else ' - ' end) AS `dob_string`,(case when (`c`.`dob` <> '0000-00-00') then concat(floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)),'y',(timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) % 12),'m') else '0' end) AS `age`,(case when (`c`.`dob` = '0000-00-00') then '-' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 0) then 'below 0' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 1) then '0-1' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 2) then '1-2' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 3) then '2-3' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 4) then '3-4' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 5) then '4-5' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 6) then '5-6' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 7) then '6-7' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 8) then '7-8' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 9) then '8-9' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 10) then '9-10' else 'above 10' end) AS `age_group`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,(case when (`f`.`master` = 0) then 'Inquiry' when (`f`.`master` = 1) then 'Balance' when (`f`.`master` = 2) then 'Expiry' when (`f`.`master` = 3) then 'Irregular' when (`f`.`master` = 4) then 'Birthday' when (`f`.`master` = 5) then 'FreeTrial' end) AS `master_data` from (((((((`followup` `f` join `contact` `c` on(((`f`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`) and (`f`.`park` = 0)))) join `employee` `e` on((`f`.`employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) join `contact` `ce` on((`ce`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) left join `followup` `f2` on(((`f`.`parent_id` = `f2`.`id`) and (`f2`.`park` = 0)))) left join `inquiry` `i` on((`f`.`contact_id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) left join `inquiry_category` `ic` on((`ic`.`inquiry_id` = `i`.`id`))) left join `category` `ca` on((`ca`.`id` = `ic`.`category_id`))) group by `f`.`id` order by `i`.`source` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.contact_followup_view_old
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `contact_followup_view_old` AS select `f`.`id` AS `id`,`f`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`f`.`type` AS `type`,`f`.`master` AS `master`,`f`.`status` AS `status`,`f`.`interest` AS `interest`,`f`.`comment` AS `comment`,`f2`.`comment` AS `old_comment`,`f`.`followup` AS `followup`,`e`.`fullname` AS `employee`,cast(`f`.`followup` as date) AS `date`,date_format(`f`.`reminder`,'%d %b  %y %k:%i') AS `reminder_string`,date_format(`f`.`followup`,'%d %b  %y %k:%i') AS `followup_string`,`f`.`reminder` AS `reminder`,`f`.`master_id` AS `master_id`,`f`.`unfollow` AS `unfollow`,`f`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`f`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`f`.`park` AS `park`,`f`.`bid` AS `bid`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,(case when (`c`.`dob` <> '0000-00-00') then convert(date_format(`c`.`dob`,'%d %b %y') using utf8mb4) else ' - ' end) AS `dob_string`,(case when (`c`.`dob` <> '0000-00-00') then timestampdiff(YEAR,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) else '0' end) AS `age`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,(case when (`f`.`master` = 0) then 'Inquiry' when (`f`.`master` = 1) then 'Balance' when (`f`.`master` = 2) then 'Expiry' when (`f`.`master` = 3) then 'Irregular' when (`f`.`master` = 4) then 'Birthday' when (`f`.`master` = 5) then 'FreeTrial' end) AS `master_data` from (((`followup` `f` join `contact` `c` on((`f`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) join `emp_cont_view` `e` on((`f`.`employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) left join `followup` `f2` on((`f`.`parent_id` = `f2`.`id`))) group by `f`.`id`;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.contact_history
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `contact_history` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `injury_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `disease_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `injury_id` (`injury_id`),
  KEY `disease_id` (`disease_id`),
  KEY `contact_id_2` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `injury_id_2` (`injury_id`),
  KEY `disease_id_2` (`disease_id`),
  KEY `contact_id_3` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `injury_id_3` (`injury_id`),
  KEY `disease_id_3` (`disease_id`),
  KEY `contact_id_4` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `injury_id_4` (`injury_id`),
  KEY `disease_id_4` (`disease_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.contact_req_log
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `contact_req_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Student',
  `employee_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'requestor_emp_id',
  `emp_name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `park` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `employee_id` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=8995 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.contact_temp_view

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.counsellor_barchart_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `counsellor_barchart_view` AS select `inq`.`source` AS `source`,(case when (`inq`.`heard_from` = '') then 'Blank' else `inq`.`heard_from` end) AS `heard_from`,count(`inq`.`id`) AS `no_of_inquiries`,concat(`con`.`fname`,' ',`con`.`mname`,' ',`con`.`lname`) AS `counsellor_fullname`,`e`.`id` AS `emp_id`,`e`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id` from (((`employee` `e` left join `contact` `con` on((`con`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) left join `inquiry` `inq` on((`inq`.`c_employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) left join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `inq`.`bid`))) where ((`e`.`position_id` in (7,9,23,36,37)) and (`e`.`park` = 0) and (`inq`.`park` = 0) and (`b`.`type` = 'COCO')) group by `e`.`contact_id`,`inq`.`heard_from`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.counsellor_eff_prevday_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `counsellor_eff_prevday_view` AS select `e`.`id` AS `id`,`e`.`id` AS `emp_id`,`e`.`id` AS `c_employee_id`,`e`.`counselor_status` AS `counselor_status`,(curdate() - interval 1 day) AS `prev_date`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `c_name`,count(`i`.`id`) AS `inq_allocated`,count((case when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 1 else NULL end)) AS `inq_converted`,((count((case when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 1 else NULL end)) / count(`i`.`id`)) * 100) AS `conversion_rate`,cast(((count((case when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 1 else NULL end)) / count(`i`.`id`)) * 100) as decimal(10,0)) AS `int_conversion_rate`,(select sum(`p`.`amount`) from ((`payment` `p` left join `invoice` `i` on((`p`.`invoice_id` = `i`.`id`))) left join `employee` `em` on((`em`.`id` = `i`.`employee_id`))) where ((`p`.`balance` = 0) and ((`em`.`position_id` = 7) or (`em`.`position_id` = 9) or (`e`.`position_id` = 23)) and (`em`.`park` = 0) and (`i`.`park` = 0) and (`em`.`id` = `em`.`id`) and (`em`.`id` = `e`.`id`) and (`p`.`date` <= `prev_date`))) AS `amount`,`e`.`auto_assign_inq` AS `auto_assign_inq`,`e`.`auto_assign_inq` AS `auto_assign_inq_v`,0 AS `park` from ((`employee` `e` left join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) left join `inquiry` `i` on((`i`.`c_employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) where (((`e`.`position_id` = 7) or (`e`.`position_id` = 9) or (`e`.`position_id` = 23)) and (`i`.`park` = 0) and (`e`.`park` = 0) and (`i`.`park` = 0) and (`i`.`allocation_date` <= curdate())) group by `e`.`id` order by `conversion_rate` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.counsellor_incentive_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `counsellor_incentive_view` AS select `mt`.`member_name` AS `member_name`,`mt`.`from_branch_type` AS `from_branch_type`,`mt`.`to_branch_type` AS `to_branch_type`,`_`.`id` AS `id`,`_`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`_`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,`_`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,`_`.`code_fullname` AS `code_fullname`,`_`.`invoice` AS `invoice`,`_`.`amount` AS `amount`,(((`_`.`amount` + `_`.`item_disallowed_discount`) - `_`.`item_discount`) - ifnull(`p`.`amount`,0)) AS `pay_amount`,(((`_`.`amount` + `_`.`item_disallowed_discount`) - `_`.`item_discount`) - (ifnull(`p`.`amount`,0) * 0.04)) AS `incentive_amount`,`_`.`pay_date` AS `pay_date`,`_`.`pay_mode_text` AS `pay_mode_text`,`_`.`owner_name` AS `owner_name`,`_`.`sessions_consumed` AS `sessions_consumed`,`_`.`ivc_name` AS `ivc_name`,`_`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`_`.`ivc_contact_id` AS `ivc_contact_id`,`_`.`batch` AS `batch`,`_`.`branch` AS `branch`,`_`.`comment` AS `comment`,`_`.`renewed` AS `renewed`,`_`.`bid` AS `bid`,(case when (`mt`.`from_bid` is not null) then 'Transfered' else '' end) AS `tr_status`,`_`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id` from ((`invoice_payment_view` `_` left join `member_transfer_view` `mt` on(((`_`.`invoice_id` = `mt`.`invoice_id`) and (`mt`.`invoice_employee_id` in (559,368,714,372))))) left join (select `payment`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,sum(`payment`.`amount`) AS `amount` from `payment` where (`payment`.`pay_mode_text` = 'Points') group by `payment`.`invoice_id`) `p` on((`p`.`invoice_id` = `_`.`invoice_id`))) where (((`mt`.`action_date` >= '#sdate') and (`mt`.`invoice_pay_date` >= '#sdate') and (`mt`.`invoice_pay_date` <= '#edate') and (`mt`.`from_branch_type` = 'COCO') and (`mt`.`to_branch_type` <> 'COCO') and (`_`.`bid` not in (8,6,23,110,129,101,135,156,13,124,129,147,150,161,148,166))) or ((`_`.`park` = '0') and (`_`.`pay_date` >= '#sdate') and (`_`.`pay_date` <= '#edate') and (`_`.`pay_amount` > 0) and (`_`.`employee_id` in (559,368,714,372)) and (`_`.`employee_id` <> '567') and (`_`.`renewed` < '2') and ((`_`.`branch_type` = 'COCO') or (`_`.`bid` in (8,6,23,110,129,101,135,156,13,124,129,147,150,161,148,166))) and (`_`.`pay_mode` <> '13'))) group by `_`.`id`,`mt`.`invoice_id` order by `_`.`master_category_id`,`_`.`bid`;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.counsellor_inquiry_count_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `counsellor_inquiry_count_view` AS select `i`.`id` AS `id`,`e`.`id` AS `emp_id`,count(`i`.`c_employee_id`) AS `allocated`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `name`,cast(`i`.`allocation_date` as date) AS `date`,`i`.`park` AS `park` from ((`inquiry` `i` join `employee` `e` on(((`i`.`c_employee_id` = `e`.`id`) and (`e`.`park` = 0)))) join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) where ((`i`.`park` = 0) and `i`.`bid` in (select `branch`.`id` from `branch` where ((`branch`.`type` = 'COCO') or (`branch`.`type` = 'HQ')))) group by cast(`i`.`allocation_date` as date),`i`.`c_employee_id` order by `i`.`allocation_date` desc;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.counsellors_view

CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `counsellors_view` AS select `e`.`id` AS `id`,`e`.`id` AS `emp_id`,`e`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`e`.`type` AS `type`,`e`.`position_id` AS `position_id`,`ep`.`position` AS `position`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `name`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`e`.`park` AS `park` from (((((`contact` `c` join `employee` `e` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) join `contact_group` `cg` on((`cg`.`id` = `c`.`contact_group_id`))) join `pf_central`.`employee_position` `ep` on((`e`.`position_id` = `ep`.`id`))) join `employee_bid` `eb` on((`e`.`id` = `eb`.`employee_id`))) left join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `eb`.`bid`))) where ((`e`.`park` = '0') and (`e`.`status` = '1') and (`e`.`position_id` in (7,9))) group by `e`.`id` order by `e`.`id`;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.countries
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `countries` (
  `id` mediumint unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `iso3` char(3) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `numeric_code` char(3) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `iso2` char(2) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `phonecode` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `capital` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `currency` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `currency_name` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `currency_symbol` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `tld` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `native` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `region` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `region_id` mediumint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `subregion` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `subregion_id` mediumint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `nationality` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `timezones` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `translations` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `latitude` decimal(10,8) DEFAULT NULL,
  `longitude` decimal(11,8) DEFAULT NULL,
  `emoji` varchar(191) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `emojiU` varchar(191) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `flag` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `wikiDataId` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Rapid API GeoDB Cities',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `country_continent` (`region_id`),
  KEY `country_subregion` (`subregion_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `country_continent_final` FOREIGN KEY (`region_id`) REFERENCES `regions` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `country_subregion_final` FOREIGN KEY (`subregion_id`) REFERENCES `subregions` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=251 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.coupon_actualpayment_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `coupon_actualpayment_view` AS select `ci`.`coupon_invoice_id` AS `id`,`ci`.`date` AS `date`,`ci`.`coupon_buyers_id` AS `coupon_buyers_id`,`ci`.`coupon_amount_id` AS `coupon_amount_id`,`ci`.`promo_coupon_id` AS `promo_coupon_id`,`ci`.`promo_code` AS `promo_code`,`ci`.`promo_disc_amount` AS `promo_disc_amount`,`ci`.`promo_disc_type` AS `promo_disc_type`,`ci`.`redeemed` AS `redeemed`,`ci`.`bid` AS `bid`,`ci`.`amount` AS `amount`,`ci`.`balance` AS `balance`,`ci`.`coupon_amount` AS `coupon_amount`,`ci`.`clear` AS `clear`,`ci`.`pay_amount` AS `pay_amount`,(case when (`ci`.`payment_mode` <> '') then cast((case when ((`ci`.`payment_mode` = 'Credit Card') and ((`ci`.`card_name` = 'Visa') or (`ci`.`card_name` = 'MasterCard') or (`ci`.`card_name` = 'RuPay') or (`ci`.`card_name` = 'Diners'))) then ((`ci`.`pay_amount` - ((`ci`.`pay_amount` * 1.40) / 100)) - ((((`ci`.`pay_amount` * 1.40) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when ((`ci`.`payment_mode` = 'EMI') and ((`ci`.`card_name` = 'Visa') or (`ci`.`card_name` = 'MasterCard') or (`ci`.`card_name` = 'RuPay') or (`ci`.`card_name` = 'Diners'))) then ((`ci`.`pay_amount` - ((`ci`.`pay_amount` * 1.40) / 100)) - ((((`ci`.`pay_amount` * 1.40) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when ((`ci`.`payment_mode` = 'Credit Card') and ((`ci`.`card_name` = 'Corporate') or (`ci`.`card_name` = 'Commercial'))) then ((`ci`.`pay_amount` - ((`ci`.`pay_amount` * 2.60) / 100)) - ((((`ci`.`pay_amount` * 2.60) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when ((`ci`.`payment_mode` = 'Debit Card') and (`ci`.`card_name` = 'RuPay')) then ((`ci`.`pay_amount` - ((`ci`.`pay_amount` * 0.25) / 100)) - ((((`ci`.`pay_amount` * 0.25) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when (`ci`.`payment_mode` = 'Debit Card') then ((`ci`.`pay_amount` - ((`ci`.`pay_amount` * 1) / 100)) - ((((`ci`.`pay_amount` * 1) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when (`ci`.`payment_mode` = 'Unified Payments') then ((`ci`.`pay_amount` - ((`ci`.`pay_amount` * 0.25) / 100)) - ((((`ci`.`pay_amount` * 0.25) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when (`ci`.`payment_mode` = 'Net Banking') then ((`ci`.`pay_amount` - ((`ci`.`pay_amount` * 1.6) / 100)) - ((((`ci`.`pay_amount` * 1.6) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when (`ci`.`payment_mode` = 'Wallet') then ((`ci`.`pay_amount` - ((`ci`.`pay_amount` * 1.85) / 100)) - ((((`ci`.`pay_amount` * 1.85) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when (`ci`.`payment_mode` = 'Payzapp') then ((`ci`.`pay_amount` - ((`ci`.`pay_amount` * 1.90) / 100)) - ((((`ci`.`pay_amount` * 1.90) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when ((`ci`.`payment_mode` = 'International Credit Card') or (`ci`.`payment_mode` = 'International Debit Card')) then ((`ci`.`pay_amount` - ((`ci`.`pay_amount` * 3.30) / 100)) - ((((`ci`.`pay_amount` * 3.30) / 100) * 18) / 100)) else 0 end) as decimal(10,2)) else `ci`.`pay_amount` end) AS `actual_amount`,`ci`.`receipt` AS `receipt`,`ci`.`pay_date` AS `pay_date`,`ci`.`pay_mode` AS `pay_mode`,`ci`.`pay_mode_text` AS `pay_mode_text`,`ci`.`comment` AS `comment`,`ci`.`tracking_id` AS `tracking_id`,`ci`.`bank_ref_no` AS `bank_ref_no`,`ci`.`card_name` AS `card_name`,`ci`.`payment_mode` AS `payment_mode`,`ci`.`name` AS `name`,`ci`.`user_email_id` AS `user_email_id`,`ci`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`ci`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`ci`.`receiver_name` AS `receiver_name`,`ci`.`receiver_email` AS `receiver_email`,`ci`.`discount_value` AS `discount_value`,`ci`.`park` AS `park` from `coupon_invoice_view` `ci` where ((`ci`.`park` = 0) and (`ci`.`promo_code` <> '') and (`ci`.`promo_disc_amount` <> '') and (`ci`.`balance` = 0)) order by `ci`.`id` desc;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.curr_month_total_emp_att
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `curr_month_total_emp_att` AS select `ea`.`id` AS `id`,`ea`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`e`.`id` AS `emp_id`,`e`.`salary` AS `base_amount`,round((`e`.`salary` / 26),2) AS `per_day_amount`,(case when (`e`.`workshift_out_time` > 0) then concat(hour(timediff(`e`.`workshift_out_time`,`e`.`workshift_in_time`)),'.',minute(timediff(`e`.`workshift_out_time`,`e`.`workshift_in_time`))) else '0' end) AS `workshift_hours`,round(sum((case when (`e`.`workshift_out_time` > 0) then concat(hour(timediff(`e`.`workshift_out_time`,`e`.`workshift_in_time`)),'.',minute(timediff(`e`.`workshift_out_time`,`e`.`workshift_in_time`))) else '0' end)),2) AS `total_workshift_time`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`ea`.`date` AS `date`,count(`ea`.`date`) AS `count_date`,sum((case when ((`ea`.`out_time` > 0) and (`ea`.`login_details` in ('AS134307 Classicnet Broadband Network, Maharashtra, Mumbai, 19.0748, 72.8856, India','AS133315 Icontechnext, Maharashtra, Mumbai, 19.0748, 72.8856, India','AS138296 Juweriyah Networks Private Limited, Maharashtra, Mumbai, 19.0748, 72.8856, India')) and (`ea`.`logout_details` in ('AS134307 Classicnet Broadband Network, Maharashtra, Mumbai, 19.0748, 72.8856, India','AS133315 Icontechnext, Maharashtra, Mumbai, 19.0748, 72.8856, India','AS138296 Juweriyah Networks Private Limited, Maharashtra, Mumbai, 19.0748, 72.8856, India'))) then 1 else '0' end)) AS `valid_dates`,sum((case when ((`ea`.`out_time` > 0) and ((`ea`.`login_details` not in ('AS134307 Classicnet Broadband Network, Maharashtra, Mumbai, 19.0748, 72.8856, India','AS133315 Icontechnext, Maharashtra, Mumbai, 19.0748, CREATE TABLE `currency` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `country` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `currency` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `code` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `symbol` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - active, 1 - deleted',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=135 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.demo
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `demo` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `type` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - Demo , 1 - Story Telling , 2 - Paid Demo , 3 - Workshop, 4- Online Demo',
  `status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0- no_action_taken,\r\n1-done/completed,\r\n2 -cancelled',
  `demoApproval` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-pending, 1- approved, 2- Rejected',
  `otp` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `hashed_otp` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `start_date` date NOT NULL,
  `end_date` date NOT NULL,
  `include_time` int NOT NULL,
  `start_time` time NOT NULL,
  `end_time` time NOT NULL,
  `existing_batch` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `infant` int NOT NULL,
  `ad_hoc` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `batch_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `venue_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `storytelling_location` varchar(250) NOT NULL,
  `workshop_location` varchar(250) NOT NULL,
  `currency` varchar(10) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Implemented currencies for payments INR,AED',
  `amount` int NOT NULL,
  `upi_id` varchar(250) NOT NULL,
  `host_employee_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `sc_employee_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `so_employee_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `comment` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `owner_id` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `mobile_country_code` varchar(8) NOT NULL DEFAULT '+91',
  `optional_mobile_country_code` varchar(8) DEFAULT '+91',
  `mobile_number` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `optional_mobile_number` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `stop_response` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `response_limit` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `ads` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `ads_comment` text NOT NULL,
  `all_fields_filled` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'for ad details',
  `response_limit_flag` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `zone_time_str` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `zone_time_details` longtext NOT NULL,
  `doubletick_status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `mail_dropdown_template` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `send_mail_update_status` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `hybrid` int DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=3042 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.demo_analysis_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `demo_analysis_view` AS select `d`.`id` AS `id`,`d`.`name` AS `name`,`d`.`date` AS `date`,`d`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`d`.`start_time` AS `start_time`,`d`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`d`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,`d`.`bid` AS `bid`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`type` AS `type`,`d`.`owner_id` AS `owner_id`,`don`.`name` AS `owner_name`,`c3`.`id` AS `contact_id`,`i`.`id` AS `inquiry_id`,count(`dfr`.`id`) AS `demo_register`,sum((case when (`dfr`.`demo_attended` = 1) then 1 else 0 end)) AS `demo_attended_count`,sum((case when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 1 else 0 end)) AS `demo_converted_count`,concat((round((sum((case when (`dfr`.`demo_attended` = 1) then 1 else 0 end)) / count(`dfr`.`id`)),2) * 100),'%') AS `rate_of_attendance`,concat((round((sum((case when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 1 else 0 end)) / sum((case when (`dfr`.`demo_attended` = 1) then 1 else 0 end))),2) * 100),'%') AS `rate_of_conversion`,`dfr`.`demo_id` AS `demo_id`,`d`.`park` AS `park`,date_format(concat(`d`.`start_date`,' ',`d`.`start_time`),'%a, %D %M-%l:%i %p') AS `demo_date_string`,`d`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`d`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`d`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`d`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by` from ((((((((`demo` `d` join `branch` `b` on((`d`.`bid` = `b`.`id`))) join `venue` `v` on((`d`.`venue_id` = `v`.`id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`d`.`host_employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) left join `demo_form_response` `dfr` on((`dfr`.`demo_id` = `d`.`id`))) left join `demo_owner_names` `don` on((`d`.`owner_id` = `don`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c3` on((`c3`.`mobile` = `dfr`.`mobile`))) left join `inquiry` `i` on((`c3`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) left join (select `f`.`id` AS `id`,`f`.`master_id` AS `master_id` from (`followup` `f` left join `followup` `f2` on((`f`.`parent_id` = `f2`.`id`))) where (`f`.`id` in (select max(`followup`.`id`) from `followup` where (`followup`.`master` = '0') group by `followup`.`contact_id`,`followup`.`master`,`followup`.`master_id`) and (`f`.`master` = '0')) group by `f`.`id`) `f` on((`f`.`master_id` = `i`.`id`))) group by `dfr`.`demo_id` order by `rate_of_attendance` desc;

CREATE TABLE `demo_creative_image_templates` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,

  `original_filename` varchar(100) NOT NULL,

  `block_h_pct` decimal(6,2) DEFAULT NULL,

  `text_align` varchar(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'center',
  `char_spacing` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `is_bold` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `is_italic` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bg_color` varchar(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '#000000',
  `bg_opacity` decimal(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `border_color` varchar(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '#FFFFFF',
  `border_width` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `text_stroke` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `stroke_color` varchar(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '#000000',
  `stroke_width` decimal(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `date_x_pct` decimal(6,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `date_y_pct` decimal(6,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `date_w_pct` decimal(6,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `date_h_pct` decimal(6,2) DEFAULT NULL,

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.demo_events
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `demo_events` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `start_date` date NOT NULL COMMENT 'demo start date range',
  `end_date` date NOT NULL COMMENT 'demo end date range',
  `venue_ids` varchar(225) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'venue ids',
  `heard_from` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.demo_events_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `demo_events_view` AS select group_concat(`v`.`venue` separator ',') AS `venue`,`de`.`venue_ids` AS `venue_ids`,`de`.`id` AS `event_id`,concat('https://developer.tickleright.in/pf/demo_all_events.php?eventId=',`de`.`id`) AS `demo_event_link`,concat('https://tickleright.com/demoEvents/events.php?eventId=',`de`.`id`) AS `live_demo_event_link` from (`demo_events` `de` left join `venue` `v` on((0 <> find_in_set(`v`.`id`,`de`.`venue_ids`)))) where (`v`.`park` = 0) group by `v`.`id`;
