BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.demo_form_response
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `demo_form_response` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `demo_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `demo_attended` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `confirmation` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0=No Response/Msg Sent, 1=Coming, 2=Not Coming, 3=No Response',
  `on_the_way_comment` text,
  `name` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `dob` date NOT NULL,
  `country_code` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `mobile` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `pincode` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `venue` int NOT NULL,
  `heard_string` varchar(30) NOT NULL,
  `payment_ss` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `recommended_batches` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `mobile` (`mobile`),
  KEY `idx_dfr_mobile_created` (`mobile`,`created_at` DESC,`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=10083 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.demo_form_response_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `demo_form_response_view` AS select `dfr`.`id` AS `id`,`c`.`id` AS `contact_id`,`i`.`id` AS `inquiry_id`,`i`.`c_employee_id` AS `c_emp_id`,concat(`ce`.`fname`,' ',`ce`.`lname`) AS `c_emp_name`,`i`.`converted` AS `converted`,(case when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 'Converted' else '' end) AS `converted_string`,`is`.`source` AS `source`,`phf`.`heard_from` AS `heard_from`,`f`.`id` AS `followup_id`,`f`.`lost_reason` AS `lost_reason`,`d`.`demoApproval` AS `demoApproval`,`d`.`type` AS `demo_type`,`d`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`dfr`.`date` AS `date`,`dfr`.`demo_id` AS `demo_id`,`dfr`.`demo_attended` AS `demo_attended`,`dfr`.`confirmation` AS `confirmation`,`dfr`.`on_the_way_comment` AS `on_the_way_comment`,(case when (`i`.`demo_attended` = 1) then 'Attended' else '' end) AS `demo_attended_string`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`mname` AS `mname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`gender` AS `gender`,`dfr`.`name` AS `name`,`dfr`.`dob` AS `dob`,`dfr`.`recommended_batches` AS `recommended_batches`,`don`.`name` AS `demo_owner_names`,`d`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,concat(floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`dfr`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)),' ','years',' ',(timestampdiff(MONTH,`dfr`.`dob`,curdate()) % 12),' ','months') AS `age`,`dfr`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`dfr`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`dfr`.`email` AS `email`,`dfr`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`dfr`.`bid` AS `bid`,`dfr`.`heard_string` AS `heard_string`,`dfr`.`park` AS `park`,`d`.`name` AS `demo_name`,concat('https://tickleright.com/tr/',`d`.`id`,'_',`d`.`hashed_otp`) AS `demo_link`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,`v`.`address` AS `venue_address`,`d`.`start_time` AS `start_time`,date_format(concat(`d`.`start_date`,' ',`d`.`start_time`),'%a, %D %M-%l:%i %p') AS `demo_date_string`,`d`.`start_date` AS `demo_date`,(case when (`dfr`.`venue` = 1) then `v`.`venue` else '' end) AS `venue_flag`,`dfr`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`dfr`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`dfr`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`dfr`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,concat('https://tickleright.in/session/activity.php?id=',`sa_log`.`id`,'&otp=',`sa_log`.`otp`) AS `activity_link`,`sla`.`join_url` AS `zoom_join_url`,`dinv`.`id` AS `invoice_id`,(case when ((`d`.`type` = 2) and (`dinv`.`id` <> 0) and (`dinv`.`id` is not null)) then concat('https://payments.tickleright.com/demo/index.php?id=',`dinv`.`id`) else '' end) AS `pay_url`,`dinv`.`amount` AS `amount`,`dinv`.`clear` AS `clear` from (((((((((((((((`demo_form_response` `dfr` join `demo` `d` on(((`dfr`.`demo_id` = `d`.`id`) and (`d`.`park` = '0')))) join `branch` `b` on(((`b`.`id` = `d`.`bid`) and (`b`.`park` = '0')))) join `venue` `v` on(((`d`.`venue_id` = `v`.`id`) and (`v`.`park` = '0')))) left join `contact` `c` on(((`c`.`mobile` = `dfr`.`mobile`) and (`c`.`park` = '0')))) left join `inquiry` `i` on(((`c`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`) and (`i`.`park` = '0')))) left join `latest_followup_table` `f` on(((`f`.`master_id` = `i`.`id`) and (`f`.`park` = 0) and (`f`.`master` = 0) and (`f`.`unfollow` = 0)))) left join `employee` `e` on(((`e`.`id` = `i`.`c_employee_id`) and (`e`.`park` = '0')))) left join `contact` `ce` on(((`ce`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`) and (`ce`.`park` = '0')))) left join `demo_owner_names` `don` on(((`d`.`owner_id` = `don`.`id`) and (`don`.`park` = '0')))) left join `session_log` `sl` on(((`d`.`batch_id` = `sl`.`batch_id`) and (`d`.`start_date` = `sl`.`date`) and (`d`.`type` = 4) and (`sl`.`park` = 0)))) left join `session_log_attendee` `sla` on(((`c`.`id` = `sla`.`contact_id`) and (`sl`.`id` = `sla`.`session_log_id`)))) left join `session_activity_log` `sa_log` on(((`c`.`id` = `sa_log`.`contact_id`) and (`sa_log`.`batch_id` = `d`.`batch_id`) and (`d`.`start_date` = `sa_log`.`date`)))) left join `inquiry_source` `is` on((`is`.`id` = `i`.`primary_source`))) left join `heard_from` `phf` on((`phf`.`id` = `i`.`primary_heard_from`))) left join `demo_invoice_view` `dinv` on(((`dinv`.`demo_id` = `d`.`id`) and (`dfr`.`mobile` = `dinv`.`mobile`) and (`dinv`.`park` = 0)))) order by `dfr`.`id` desc;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.demo_invoice_view

CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `demo_invoice_view` AS select `di`.`id` AS `id`,`di`.`date` AS `date`,`dfr`.`demo_id` AS `demo_id`,`dfr`.`id` AS `demo_response_id`,`d`.`currency` AS `currency`,`d`.`bid` AS `demo_bid`,`d`.`response_limit` AS `response_limit`,`d`.`response_limit_flag` AS `response_limit_flag`,`di`.`amount` AS `amount`,`di`.`balance` AS `balance`,`di`.`demo_amount` AS `demo_amount`,`di`.`clear` AS `clear`,`di`.`pay_amount` AS `pay_amount`,`di`.`receipt` AS `receipt`,`di`.`pay_date` AS `pay_date`,`di`.`pay_mode` AS `pay_mode`,`di`.`pay_mode_text` AS `pay_mode_text`,`dfr`.`name` AS `name`,`dfr`.`email` AS `email`,`dfr`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`dfr`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`di`.`bid` AS `bid`,`dfr`.`bid` AS `response_bid`,`di`.`comment` AS `comment`,`di`.`order_reference_no` AS `order_reference_no`,`di`.`tracking_id` AS `tracking_id`,`di`.`bank_ref_no` AS `bank_ref_no`,`di`.`card_name` AS `card_name`,`di`.`payment_mode` AS `payment_mode`,`di`.`park` AS `park`,`di`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`di`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`di`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`di`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by` from ((`demo_invoice` `di` join `demo_form_response` `dfr` on(((`di`.`demo_response_id` = `dfr`.`id`) and (`dfr`.`park` = '0')))) left join `demo` `d` on((`dfr`.`demo_id` = `d`.`id`))) where (`di`.`park` = '0');


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.demo_link_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `demo_link_view` AS select `d`.`id` AS `id`,`d`.`type` AS `demo_type`,`d`.`otp` AS `otp`,`d`.`hashed_otp` AS `hashed_otp`,concat('https://tickleright.com/tr/',`d`.`id`,'_',`d`.`hashed_otp`) AS `demo_link`,concat('https://tickleright.com/tr/',`d`.`id`,'_',`d`.`hashed_otp`,'/venue') AS `demo_venue_link`,`d`.`name` AS `name`,`d`.`demoApproval` AS `demoApproval`,`d`.`date` AS `date`,`d`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`d`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,(case when (`d`.`end_date` < curdate()) then 'Completed' when (curdate() between `d`.`start_date` and `d`.`end_date`) then 'Current' else 'Future' end) AS `demo_status`,`d`.`start_time` AS `start_time`,time_format(`d`.`start_time`,'%h:%i %p') AS `start_time_hour`,`d`.`end_time` AS `end_time`,time_format(`d`.`end_time`,'%h:%i %p') AS `end_time_hour`,`d`.`include_time` AS `include_time`,`d`.`existing_batch` AS `existing_batch`,`d`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`d`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`d`.`amount` AS `amount`,`d`.`currency` AS `currency`,`d`.`infant` AS `infant`,`d`.`ad_hoc` AS `ad_hoc`,`d`.`upi_id` AS `upi_id`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,`d`.`storytelling_location` AS `storytelling_location`,`d`.`workshop_location` AS `workshop_location`,`v`.`demo_information` AS `demo_information`,`v`.`select_paid_demo` AS `select_paid_demo`,`v`.`paid_demo` AS `paid_demo`,`v`.`select_free_demo` AS `select_free_demo`,`v`.`free_demo` AS `free_demo`,`v`.`city` AS `city`,`v`.`display_name` AS `venue_display_name`,`v`.`address` AS `venue_address`,`v`.`short_address` AS `venue_short_address`,`v`.`addr_for_post` AS `venue_addr_for_post`,`v`.`address_link` AS `venue_address_link`,`tz`.`abbr_offset` AS `timezone_abbr_offset`,`tz`.`gmt_offset_name` AS `timezone_gmt_offset_name`,`tz`.`zone_name` AS `timezone_zone_name`,`d`.`host_employee_id` AS `host_employee_id`,`c`.`id` AS `host_contact_id`,`d`.`zone_time_str` AS `zone_time_str`,`d`.`zone_time_details` AS `zone_time_details`,`c`.`fname` AS `host_name`,`d`.`sc_employee_id` AS `sc_employee_id`,`c1`.`id` AS `sc_contact_id`,`c1`.`fname` AS `sc_host_name`,concat(`c1`.`fname`,`c1`.`lname`) AS `sc_host_fullname`,`c1`.`email` AS `sc_host_email`,`d`.`so_employee_id` AS `so_employee_id`,`c2`.`fname` AS `so_host_name`,`c2`.`id` AS `so_contact_id`,concat(`c2`.`fname`,`c2`.`lname`) AS `so_host_fullname`,`c2`.`email` AS `so_host_email`,`d`.`comment` AS `comment`,`d`.`stop_response` AS `stop_response`,count(`dfr`.`demo_id`) AS `response_count`,`d`.`response_limit_flag` AS `response_limit_flag`,`d`.`response_limit` AS `response_limit`,(case when (`d`.`response_limit_flag` = '1') then (`d`.`response_limit` - count(`dfr`.`demo_id`)) else '1' end) AS `seats_left`,`d`.`ads` AS `ads`,`d`.`ads_comment` AS `ads_comment`,`d`.`all_fields_filled` AS `all_fields_filled`,`ad`.`ad_status` AS `demo_ad_status`,`d`.`bid` AS `bid`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`type` AS `type`,`d`.`owner_id` AS `owner_id`,`don`.`name` AS `owner_name`,`co`.`id` AS `owner_contact_id`,`co`.`email` AS `owner_email`,`d`.`mobile_country_code` AS `mobile_country_code`,`d`.`mobile_number` AS `mobile_number`,`d`.`optional_mobile_country_code` AS `optional_mobile_country_code`,`d`.`optional_mobile_number` AS `optional_mobile_number`,`d`.`park` AS `park`,date_format(concat(`d`.`start_date`,' ',`d`.`start_time`),'%a, %D %M-%l:%i %p') AS `demo_date_string`,(dayofweek(`d`.`start_date`) - 1) AS `day_code`,dayname(`d`.`start_date`) AS `demo_day`,dayname(`d`.`start_date`) AS `day`,`d`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`d`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`d`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`d`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,concat(`us`.`fname`,' ',`us`.`lname`) AS `modified_by_fname`,`d`.`hybrid` AS `hybrid` from ((((((((((((((`demo` `d` join `branch` `b` on((`d`.`bid` = `b`.`id`))) join `venue` `v` on((`d`.`venue_id` = `v`.`id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`d`.`host_employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join `employee` `e1` on((`d`.`sc_employee_id` = `e1`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c1` on((`e1`.`contact_id` = `c1`.`id`))) left join `demo_owner_names` `don` on((`d`.`owner_id` = `don`.`id`))) left join `contact` `co` on((`don`.`contact_id` = `co`.`id`))) left join `employee` `e2` on((`d`.`so_employee_id` = `e2`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c2` on((`e2`.`contact_id` = `c2`.`id`))) left join `pf_central`.`user` `us` on((`d`.`modified_by` = `us`.`id`))) left join `timezones` `tz` on((`tz`.`id` = `v`.`timezone_id`))) left join `demo_form_response` `dfr` on(((`d`.`id` = `dfr`.`demo_id`) and (`dfr`.`park` = '0')))) left join `ads_details` `ad` on((`d`.`id` = `ad`.`demo_id`))) group by `d`.`id` order by `demo_ad_status` desc;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.demo_log_information

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.demo_paid_per_hour
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `demo_paid_per_hour` AS select `d`.`id` AS `id`,`d`.`name` AS `name`,`d`.`date` AS `date`,`d`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`d`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,`d`.`start_time` AS `start_time`,`d`.`end_time` AS `end_time`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,`d`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,count(`d`.`venue_id`) AS `venue_count`,`v`.`free_demo` AS `free_demo`,(count(`d`.`venue_id`) - `v`.`free_demo`) AS `paid_demo`,`v`.`paid_demo` AS `per_paid_demo`,((count(`d`.`venue_id`) - `v`.`free_demo`) * `v`.`paid_demo`) AS `paid_amount`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`d`.`park` AS `park`,`d`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`d`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`d`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`d`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by` from ((`demo` `d` join `branch` `b` on((`d`.`bid` = `b`.`id`))) join `venue` `v` on((`d`.`venue_id` = `v`.`id`))) where ((`v`.`select_paid_demo` = 1) or (`v`.`select_paid_demo` = 0)) group by `d`.`venue_id`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.demo_paid_per_venue
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `demo_paid_per_venue` AS select `d`.`id` AS `id`,`d`.`demo_id` AS `demo_id`,`d`.`name` AS `name`,`d`.`date` AS `date`,`d`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`d`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,`d`.`start_time` AS `start_time`,`d`.`end_time` AS `end_time`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,`d`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,count(`d`.`date`) AS `days_count`,`v`.`free_demo` AS `free_demo`,sum(`d`.`demo_count`) AS `demo_in_hour`,`v`.`paid_demo` AS `paid_demo`,(sum(`d`.`demo_count`) * `v`.`paid_demo`) AS `amount`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name_actual` from ((`demo_log` `d` join `branch` `b` on((`d`.`bid` = `b`.`id`))) join `venue` `v` on((`d`.`venue_id` = `v`.`id`))) where (`d`.`is_free_demo` = '0') group by `d`.`venue_id`;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.demo_response_from_1_jan_2023
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `demo_response_from_1_jan_2023` AS select `demo_form_response_view`.`contact_id` AS `ID`,`demo_form_response_view`.`name` AS `Name`,`demo_form_response_view`.`dob` AS `DOB`,`demo_form_response_view`.`age` AS `Age`,`demo_form_response_view`.`mobile` AS `Mobile`,`demo_form_response_view`.`email` AS `Email`,`demo_form_response_view`.`venue` AS `Venue`,`demo_form_response_view`.`date` AS `Response Date`,`demo_form_response_view`.`demo_attended_string` AS `Attendance`,`demo_form_response_view`.`converted_string` AS `Converted` from `demo_form_response_view` where ((`demo_form_response_view`.`date` between '2023-01-01' and '2023-08-22') and (`demo_form_response_view`.`park` = 0)) order by `demo_form_response_view`.`demo_attended` desc;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.detected_faces
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `detected_faces` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `image` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `created_time` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `user_id` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `dphash` varchar(250) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `dphash` (`dphash`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=38 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.diwali_coupon_invoice_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `diwali_coupon_invoice_view` AS select `ci`.`id` AS `id`,`ci`.`id` AS `coupon_invoice_id`,`ci`.`date` AS `date`,`ci`.`coupon_buyers_id` AS `coupon_buyers_id`,`ci`.`emp_id` AS `emp_id`,`ci`.`coupon_amount_id` AS `coupon_amount_id`,`ci`.`promo_coupon_id` AS `promo_coupon_id`,`pc`.`promo_code` AS `promo_code`,`pc`.`promo_disc_amount` AS `promo_disc_amount`,`pc`.`promo_disc_type` AS `promo_disc_type`,`pc`.`redeemed` AS `redeemed`,`ci`.`bid` AS `bid`,`iiv`.`branch` AS `branch`,`iiv`.`invoice_count` AS `invoice_count`,(case when (`iiv`.`invoice_count` > 1) then 'Renewed' when (`iiv`.`invoice_count` = 1) then 'Enrolled' end) AS `status`,`ci`.`amount` AS `amount`,`ci`.`balance` AS `balance`,`ci`.`coupon_amount` AS `coupon_amount`,`ci`.`clear` AS `clear`,`ci`.`pay_amount` AS `pay_amount`,`ci`.`receipt` AS `receipt`,`ci`.`pay_date` AS `pay_date`,`ci`.`pay_mode` AS `pay_mode`,`ci`.`pay_mode_text` AS `pay_mode_text`,`ci`.`comment` AS `comment`,`ci`.`tracking_id` AS `tracking_id`,`ci`.`bank_ref_no` AS `bank_ref_no`,`ci`.`card_name` AS `card_name`,`ci`.`payment_mode` AS `payment_mode`,`cb`.`full_name` AS `name`,`cb`.`user_email_id` AS `user_email_id`,`cb`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`cb`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`cb`.`reciever_full_name` AS `receiver_name`,`cb`.`reciever_email_id` AS `receiver_email`,`cd`.`discount_value` AS `discount_value`,`cd`.`description` AS `description`,`ci`.`park` AS `park`,`ci`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`ci`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`ci`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`ci`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by` from ((((`coupon_invoice` `ci` left join `coupon_buyers` `cb` on((`ci`.`coupon_buyers_id` = `cb`.`id`))) left join `coupon_amount_description` `cd` on((`cd`.`id` = `ci`.`coupon_amount_id`))) left join `promo_code` `pc` on((`pc`.`id` = `ci`.`promo_coupon_id`))) left join `invoice_invoiceitem_view` `iiv` on(((`iiv`.`promo_code` = `pc`.`promo_code`) and (`iiv`.`park` = 0) and (`iiv`.`item_park` = 0)))) order by `ci`.`id` desc;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.doubletick_account
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `doubletick_account` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `account_name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `account_no` varchar(15) NOT NULL,
  `api_key` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `role` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-None,1-Owner,2-Hod,3-Renewal,4-Franchisee,5-Counsellor,6-Support',
  `wb_no` varchar(15) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'WhatsApp Business Account No',
  `account_type` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-All,1-COCO,2-Franchisee,3-OM Franchisee,4-OI Franchisee',
  `active` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-No,1-Yes',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=16 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.doubletick_logs
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `doubletick_logs` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `request_body` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `response_body` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `host` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `action` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `referer` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `agent` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `headers` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `status` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=46954 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.doubletick_msg_logs
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `doubletick_msg_logs` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `status` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `status_code` int NOT NULL,
  `sender_number` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `customer_name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `customer_number` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `agent_name` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `agent_number` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `customer_id` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `message` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL,
  `messageId` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `template_name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `custom_fields` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `failed_message` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `request` text NOT NULL,
  `response` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `error` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=82682 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.dropout_expiry_all_branch_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `dropout_expiry_all_branch_view` AS select `i`.`id` AS `invoice_id`,`i`.`id` AS `id`,`i`.`invoice` AS `invoice`,`i`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`i`.`quotation` AS `quotation`,`i`.`date` AS `date`,date_format(`i`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `date_string`,`i`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,concat(`con`.`fname`,' ',`con`.`lname`,' ',`con`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,`i`.`dropout` AS `dropout`,`i`.`freeze` AS `freeze`,`con`.`fname` AS `fname`,`con`.`mname` AS `mname`,`con`.`lname` AS `lname`,`con`.`gstin` AS `gstin`,concat(`i`.`code`,' - ',`con`.`fname`,' ',`con`.`lname`,' ',`con`.`mname`) AS `code_name`,(case when (`con`.`blogger` = '1') then 'Blogger' when (`con`.`blogger` = '0') then 'VIP' else 'VIP' end) AS `member_type`,`con`.`company` AS `company`,`con`.`company_add` AS `company_add`,`m`.`code` AS `code`,`con`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`con`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,concat(`con`.`country_code`,' ',`con`.`mobile`) AS `number`,`con`.`dob` AS `dob`,`m`.`status` AS `status`,`f`.`comment` AS `comment`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`b`.`avg_age` AS `avg_age`,`b`.`min_age` AS `min_age`,`b`.`max_age` AS `max_age`,`b`.`waiting_list` AS `waiting_list`,`b`.`level_id` AS `level_id`,`b`.`enrolled` AS `enrolled`,`b`.`limit` AS `limit`,`b`.`completed_sessions` AS `completed_sessions`,`b`.`offline` AS `offline`,`b`.`private` AS `private`,`branch`.`branch` AS `branch`,`branch`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`con`.`email` AS `email`,`con`.`address` AS `address`,`con`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`con`.`city` AS `city`,`i`.`amount` AS `invoice_amount`,`i`.`tax` AS `invoice_tax`,`i`.`tax_amount` AS `tax_amount`,`i`.`total` AS `total`,`i`.`notes` AS `notes`,`i`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`i`.`balance` AS `balance`,`ii`.`id` AS `item_id`,`ii`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`ii`.`service_id` AS `service_id`,`ii`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`ii`.`currency` AS `currency`,`ii`.`referral_code` AS `referral_code`,`ii`.`redemed` AS `redemed`,`ii`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,date_format(`ii`.`start_date`,'%d %b %y') AS `start_date_string`,date_format(`ii`.`end_date`,'%d %b %y') AS `end_date_string`,`ii`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`ii`.`senior_counsellor` AS `senior_counsellor`,`ii`.`sc_contact_id` AS `sc_contact_id`,`ii`.`item_amount` AS `item_amount`,`ii`.`item_tax` AS `item_tax`,`ii`.`item_tax_amount` AS `item_tax_amount`,`ii`.`item_tax_type` AS `item_tax_type`,`ii`.`item_total` AS `item_total`,`ii`.`sessions` AS `sessions`,concat(`ii`.`sessions_used`,' / ',`ii`.`sessions`) AS `session_consumed`,`ii`.`item_discount` AS `item_discount`,`ii`.`sessions_used` AS `sessions_used`,`ii`.`change_id` AS `change_id`,`ii`.`item_change` AS `item_change`,`ii`.`extend_reason` AS `extend_reason`,`c`.`category` AS `category`,`s`.`service` AS `service`,`s`.`amount` AS `service_amount`,`s`.`module_id` AS `module_id`,`s`.`topic_id` AS `topic_id`,`s`.`session_master_id` AS `session_master_id`,'' AS `module`,'' AS `topic`,'' AS `title`,`s`.`tax` AS `service_tax`,`s`.`tax_type` AS `service_tax_type`,`s`.`duration` AS `duration`,`s`.`duration_type` AS `duration_type`,concat(`s`.`duration`,`s`.`duration_type`) AS `total_duration`,`be`.`contact_id` AS `employee_contact_id`,(select concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`,' ',`contact`.`mname`) from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `be`.`contact_id`)) AS `batch_employee_name`,`be`.`employee` AS `batch_employee`,`be`.`days` AS `batch_days`,`be`.`level` AS `level`,`ii`.`is_product` AS `is_product`,`ii`.`renew` AS `renew`,`ii`.`park` AS `item_park`,`i`.`bid` AS `bid`,`branch`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name_actual`,`i`.`park` AS `park`,`i`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`ii`.`session_settled` AS `session_settled`,`cecv`.`counsellor_name` AS `counsellor_name`,`cecv`.`counsellor_email` AS `counsellor_email`,(case when ((select concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`,' ',`contact`.`mname`) from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `ii`.`sc_contact_id`)) is null) then `cecv`.`counsellor_name` else (select concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`,' ',`contact`.`mname`) from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `ii`.`sc_contact_id`)) end) AS `senior_counsellor_name`,(case when ((select `contact`.`email` from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `ii`.`sc_contact_id`)) is null) then `cecv`.`counsellor_email` else (select `contact`.`email` from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `ii`.`sc_contact_id`)) end) AS `senior_counsellor_mail` from ((((((((((`invoice` `i` join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`i`.`id` = `ii`.`invoice_id`))) join (select `e`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `counsellor_name`,`c`.`email` AS `counsellor_email` from (`contact` `c` join `employee` `e` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`)))) `cecv` on((`cecv`.`id` = `i`.`employee_id`))) join `category` `c` on((`ii`.`category_id` = `c`.`id`))) join `service` `s` on((`ii`.`service_id` = `s`.`id`))) join `contact` `con` on((`i`.`contact_id` = `con`.`id`))) join `member` `m` on(((`m`.`code` = `i`.`code`) and (`i`.`contact_id` = `m`.`contact_id`)))) left join `batch` `b` on((`ii`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `followup` `f` on(((`f`.`contact_id` = `con`.`id`) and (`f`.`created_at` = (select max(`followup`.`created_at`) from `followup` where (`followup`.`contact_id` = `con`.`id`)))))) left join `batch_view` `be` on((`be`.`id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `branch` on((`i`.`bid` = `branch`.`id`))) where ((`ii`.`end_date` <= cast(now() as date)) and (`ii`.`end_date` >= cast((now() - interval 14 day) as date)) and (`i`.`park` = '0') and (`m`.`status` = '2') and (`ii`.`renew` = '0')) group by `f`.`contact_id` order by `i`.`id` desc;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.dropout_expiry_teacher_count
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `dropout_expiry_teacher_count` AS select `m`.`id` AS `id`,count(`m`.`id`) AS `member_drop_count`,`m`.`t_contact_id` AS `t_contact_id`,`m`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`m`.`status` AS `status`,`m`.`ex_member_date` AS `ex_member_date`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `teacher_name`,`m`.`bid` AS `bid`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`m`.`park` AS `park` from ((`member` `m` join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `m`.`t_contact_id`))) join `branch` `b` on((`m`.`bid` = `b`.`id`))) where ((`m`.`status` = 2) and (`m`.`park` = 0) and (`m`.`ex_member_date` < cast(now() as date)) and (`m`.`ex_member_date` >= cast((now() - interval 7 day) as date))) group by `m`.`t_contact_id` order by `m`.`ex_member_date` desc;

',`ii`.`sessions`) AS `session_consumed`,`ii`.`item_discount` AS `item_discount`,`ii`.`sessions_used` AS `sessions_used`,`ii`.`change_id` AS `change_id`,`ii`.`item_change` AS `session_settled`,`cecv`.`counsellor_name` AS `counsellor_name`,`cecv`.`counsellor_email` AS `counsellor_email`,(case when ((select concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`,' ',`contact`.`mname`) from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `ii`.`sc_contact_id`)) is null) then `cecv`.`counsellor_name` else (select concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`,' ',`contact`.`mname`) from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `ii`.`sc_contact_id`)) end) AS `senior_counsellor_name`,(case when ((select `contact`.`email` from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `ii`.`sc_contact_id`)) is null) then `cecv`.`counsellor_email` else (select `contact`.`email` from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `ii`.`sc_contact_id`)) end) AS `senior_counsellor_mail` from ((((((((((`invoice` `i` join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`i`.`id` = `ii`.`invoice_id`))) join (select `e`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `counsellor_name`,`c`.`email` AS `counsellor_email` from (`contact` `c` join `employee` `e` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`)))) `cecv` on((`cecv`.`id` = `i`.`employee_id`))) join `category` `c` on((`ii`.`category_id` = `c`.`id`))) join `service` `s` on((`ii`.`service_id` = `s`.`id`))) join `contact` `con` on((`i`.`contact_id` = `con`.`id`))) join `member` `m` on(((`m`.`code` = `i`.`code`) and (`i`.`contact_id` = `m`.`contact_id`)))) left join `batch` `b` on((`ii`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `followup` `f` on(((`f`.`contact_id` = `con`.`id`) and (`f`.`created_at` = (select max(`followup`.`created_at`) from `followup` where (`followup`.`contact_id` = `con`.`id`)))))) left join `batch_view` `be` on((`be`.`id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `branch` on((`i`.`bid` = `branch`.`id`))) group by `f`.`contact_id` order by `i`.`id` desc;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.dummy_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.email_body
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `email_body` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `email` longtext NOT NULL,
  `email_name` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `subject` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `body_type` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0 - system, 1 - user)',
  `msg_type_id` int NOT NULL,
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `msg_type_id` (`msg_type_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `body_type` (`body_type`),
  KEY `msg_type_id_2` (`msg_type_id`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `body_type_2` (`body_type`),
  KEY `msg_type_id_3` (`msg_type_id`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_3` (`park`),
  KEY `body_type_3` (`body_type`),
  KEY `msg_type_id_4` (`msg_type_id`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_4` (`park`),
  KEY `body_type_4` (`body_type`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=541 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.email_contact
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `email_contact` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `email_body_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'which email you want to send',
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'to whom you want to send',
  `send_email` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - Send, 1 - Stop',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'user_id / contact_id',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=5 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.email_document_log
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `email_document_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `row_id` varchar(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'table row id where email data present',
  `table_name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `folder_name` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'pdf store in server folder name',
  `file_name` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'pdf file name',
  `send_email` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'send email',
  `send_email_status` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0- not send, 1- send',
  `error` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=1443 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.email_settings
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `email_settings` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` varchar(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'sender name',
  `email` varchar(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Sender Email (Default branch)',
  `password` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `signature` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Regards (Default studio)',
  `send_immediate` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0- Dont send / 1 send) email past immediately',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=212 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.emp_att_request
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `emp_att_request` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `action_date` date NOT NULL,
  `emp_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `parent_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Parent HOD',
  `request_type` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-none, 1-leave, 2-WFH, 3-half day, 4-Late, 5-punch-in/out, 7-O.T, 8-Break',
  `no_of_days` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `start_date` date NOT NULL,
  `in_time` time NOT NULL,
  `end_date` date NOT NULL,
  `out_time` time NOT NULL,
  `status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-pending, 1-approved, 2-rejected, 3-onhold, 4- HOD delay',
  `request_comment` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `parent_comment` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00' ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=16077 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.emp_att_request_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `emp_att_request_view` AS select `ea`.`id` AS `id`,`ea`.`date` AS `date`,`ea`.`action_date` AS `action_date`,`ea`.`emp_id` AS `emp_id`,`e`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`e`.`position_id` AS `position_id`,`e`.`park` AS `emp_park`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`email` AS `requester_email`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`ea`.`parent_id` AS `parent_emp_id`,`ep`.`contact_id` AS `parent_contact_id`,`cp`.`fname` AS `parent_fname`,concat(`cp`.`fname`,' ',`cp`.`lname`) AS `parent_fullname`,`cp`.`email` AS `parent_email`,`ea`.`request_type` AS `request_type`,`ea`.`no_of_days` AS `no_of_days`,`ea`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,date_format(`ea`.`start_date`,'%D %b, %Y') AS `start_date_string`,`ea`.`in_time` AS `in_time`,date_format(`ea`.`in_time`,'%h:%i %p') AS `in_time_string`,`ea`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,date_format(`ea`.`end_date`,'%D %b, %Y') AS `end_date_string`,`ea`.`out_time` AS `out_time`,date_format(`ea`.`out_time`,'%h:%i %p') AS `out_time_string`,(case when (`ea`.`out_time` > 0) then concat(hour(timediff(`ea`.`out_time`,`ea`.`in_time`)),':',minute(timediff(`ea`.`out_time`,`ea`.`in_time`))) else '0' end) AS `total_hours`,`ea`.`status` AS `status`,`ea`.`request_comment` AS `request_comment`,`ea`.`parent_comment` AS `parent_comment`,`ea`.`bid` AS `bid`,`ea`.`park` AS `park`,`ea`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`ea`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`ea`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`ea`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from ((((`emp_att_request` `ea` join `employee` `e` on((`ea`.`emp_id` = `e`.`id`))) join `contact` `c` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) join `employee` `ep` on((`ea`.`parent_id` = `ep`.`id`))) join `contact` `cp` on((`ep`.`contact_id` = `cp`.`id`)));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.emp_attendance
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `emp_attendance` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'id of contact table',
  `date` date NOT NULL DEFAULT '1970-01-01',
  `ip_address` varchar(250) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `logout_ip_address` varchar(250) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `mac_address` varchar(250) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `login_bssid` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `logout_bssid` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `login_wifi_details` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `logout_wifi_details` text,
  `login_details` text NOT NULL,
  `logout_details` text NOT NULL,
  `in_time` datetime NOT NULL,
  `out_time` datetime NOT NULL,
  `comment` varchar(500) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Regular' COMMENT 'reasons regarding puch-in or puch-out',
  `status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '1- Punched In, 0- Punched Out',
  `regularised` int NOT NULL,
  `regularised_type_id` int NOT NULL,
  `invalid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'user_id',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'user_id',
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=64485 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.emp_attendance_log
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `emp_attendance_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `date` varchar(300) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `ip_address` int NOT NULL,
  `device_connection` varchar(350) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `time` varchar(350) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `invalid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '1 - login, 2 - logout',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=113770 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.emp_attendance_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `emp_attendance_view` AS select `ea`.`id` AS `id`,`ea`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`ea`.`login_bssid` AS `login_bssid`,`ea`.`logout_bssid` AS `logout_bssid`,`vdli`.`bssid` AS `bbssid_login`,`vdlo`.`bssid` AS `bbssid_logout`,`e`.`id` AS `emp_id`,`e`.`salary` AS `monthly_salary`,`e`.`workshift_in_time` AS `workshift_in_time`,`e`.`workshift_out_time` AS `workshift_out_time`,`er`.`request_type` AS `request_type`,`er`.`no_of_days` AS `no_of_days`,`er`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`er`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,`er`.`status` AS `request_status`,(case when (`e`.`workshift_out_time` > 0) then timediff(`e`.`workshift_out_time`,`e`.`workshift_in_time`) else '0' end) AS `workshift_time`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`ea`.`date` AS `date`,`ea`.`ip_address` AS `ip_address`,`ea`.`logout_ip_address` AS `logout_ip_address`,(case when ((`er`.`status` = '1') and (`er`.`request_type` = '5') and (`er`.`park` = '0')) then date_format(`er`.`in_time`,'%H:%i:%s') else date_format(`ea`.`in_time`,'%H:%i:%s') end) AS `in_time`,(case when ((`er`.`status` = '1') and (`er`.`request_type` = '5') and (`er`.`park` = '0')) then date_format(`er`.`out_time`,'%H:%i:%s') else date_format(`ea`.`out_time`,'%H:%i:%s') end) AS `out_time`,(case when ((case when ((`er`.`status` = '1') and (`er`.`request_type` = '5') and (`er`.`park` = '0')) then date_format(`er`.`out_time`,'%H:%i:%s') else date_format(`ea`.`out_time`,'%H:%i:%s') end) > 0) then date_format(timediff((case when ((`er`.`status` = '1') and (`er`.`request_type` = '5') and (`er`.`park` = '0')) then date_format(`er`.`out_time`,'%H:%i:%s') else date_format(`ea`.`out_time`,'%H:%i:%s') end),(case when ((`er`.`status` = '1') and (`er`.`request_type` = '5') and (`er`.`park` = '0')) then date_format(`er`.`in_time`,'%H:%i:%s') else date_format(`ea`.`in_time`,'%H:%i:%s') end)),'%H:%i:%s') else '0' end) AS `total_time`,(case when (((case when ((`er`.`status` = '1') and (`er`.`request_type` = '5') and (`er`.`park` = '0')) then date_format(`er`.`out_time`,'%H:%i:%s') else date_format(`ea`.`out_time`,'%H:%i:%s') end) > 0) and ((case when ((`er`.`status` = '1') and (`er`.`request_type` = '5') and (`er`.`park` = '0')) then = `ea`.`date`)))) left join `punch_out_detected_faces` `po` on(((`po`.`contact_id` = `ea`.`contact_id`) and (`po`.`created_date` = `ea`.`date`)))) left join `emp_att_request` `er` on(((`e`.`id` = `er`.`emp_id`) and (`ea`.`date` = `er`.`start_date`) and (`er`.`status` = '1') and (`er`.`request_type` = '5') and (`er`.`park` = '0')))) left join `venue_details` `vdli` on((`vdli`.`bssid` = `ea`.`login_bssid`))) left join `venue_details` `vdlo` on((`vdlo`.`bssid` = `ea`.`logout_bssid`))) where (`ea`.`park` = 0) order by (case when (`ea`.`out_time` > 0) then timediff(`ea`.`out_time`,`ea`.`in_time`) else '0' end) desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.emp_cont_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `emp_cont_view` AS select `e`.`id` AS `id`,`e`.`id` AS `emp_id`,`us`.`id` AS `user_id`,`e`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`e`.`type` AS `type`,`e`.`emergency_id` AS `emergency_id`,`e`.`ecode` AS `ecode`,`e`.`cash_collector` AS `cash_collector`,`e`.`department_id` AS `department_id`,`e`.`position_id` AS `position_id`,`e`.`interviewer` AS `interviewer`,`e`.`grade` AS `grade`,`e`.`auto_assign_inq` AS `auto_assign_inq`,`e`.`auto_asign_folder` AS `auto_asign_folder`,`e`.`qualifier` AS `qualifier`,`e`.`associate` AS `associate`,`ep`.`position` AS `position`,(case when (`ep`.`position` in ('Senior-Trainer','Trainer')) then 'Training Partner' when (`ep`.`position` = 'Franchisee') then 'Franchisee Partner' else `ep`.`position` end) AS `position_subheader`,`ep`.`level` AS `level`,`e`.`doj` AS `doj`,`e`.`notice_start_date` AS `notice_start_date`,`e`.`doe` AS `doe`,`e`.`on_notice` AS `on_notice`,`e`.`exit_date` AS `exit_date`,`e`.`status` AS `status`,`e`.`salary` AS `salary`,`e`.`salary_type` AS `salary_type`,`e`.`tds_type` AS `tds_type`,`e`.`tds_percent` AS `tds_percent`,`e`.`rate_multiplier` AS `rate_multiplier`,`e`.`allowance` AS `allowance`,`e`.`master_trainer_contact_id` AS `master_trainer_contact_id`,`e`.`calculate_salary` AS `calculate_salary`,`e`.`incentive_new` AS `incentive_new`,`e`.`incentive_renew` AS `incentive_renew`,`e`.`trainer_incentive` AS `trainer_incentive`,`e`.`mt_incentive` AS `mt_incentive`,`e`.`mt_incentive_type` AS `mt_incentive_type`,`e`.`rec_dir` AS `rec_dir`,`e`.`p_incentive_c` AS `p_incentive_c`,`e`.`p_incentive_sc` AS `p_incentive_sc`,`e`.`assignment_check` AS `assignment_check`,`e`.`assignment_no` AS `assignment_no`,`e`.`multipleAccounts` AS `multipleAccounts`,`e`.`teacherContactId` AS `teacherContactId`,(case when (`e`.`salary` >= 10000) then 200 else 0 end) AS `tds`,(case when (`e`.`salary` >= 10000) then 'P.T.' else '' end) AS `tds_comment`,`e`.`user_account` AS `user_account`,`e`.`is_admin` AS `is_admin`,`e`.`is_parent` AS `is_parent`,(case when (`e`.`is_admin` = 1) then 'Yes' else 'No' end) AS `has_admin_role`,`e`.`demo_owner` AS `demo_owner`,`us`.`admin` AS `admin`,`e`.`workshift_id` AS `workshift_id`,`e`.`workshift_in_time` AS `workshift_in_time`,`e`.`workshift_out_time` AS `workshift_out_time`,`e`.`week_off_code` AS `week_off_code`,`e`.`target_id` AS `target_id`,`e`.`expense_balance` AS `expense_balance`,`e`.`park` AS `park`,`e`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`c`.`id` AS `cont_id`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`mname` AS `mname`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`c`.`nick_name` AS `nick_name`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`c`.`document_type_id` AS `document_type_id`,`c`.`document_number` AS `document_number`,`c`.`document_type_id_2` AS `document_type_id_2`,`c`.`document_number_2` AS `document_number_2`,`c`.`document_image_2` AS `document_image_2`,`c`.`document_type_id_3` AS `document_type_id_3`,`c`.`document_image_3` AS `document_image_3`,`c`.`country_code_2` AS `country_code_2`,`c`.`mobile2` AS `mobile2`,`c`.`phone_no` AS `phone_no`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`c`.`personal_email` AS `personal_email`,`c`.`followup_calendar_id` AS `followup_calendar_id`,`c`.`gender` AS `gender`,`c`.`image` AS `image`,`c`.`quick_comment` AS `quick_comment`,`c`.`dob` AS `dob`,date_format(`c`.`dob`,'%d %b %y') AS `dob_string`,date_format(`e`.`doj`,'%d %b %y') AS `doj_string`,`c`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`c`.`relation` AS `relation`,`c`.`address` AS `address`,`c`.`document_image` AS `document_image`,`c`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`c`.`state` AS `state`,`c`.`city` AS `city`,`c`.`park` AS `cont_park`,`cg`.`contact_group` AS `contact_group`,`eb`.`bid` AS `bid`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`eb`.`zoom_user_id` AS `zoom_user_id`,`ed`.`department` AS `department`,`c`.`occupation` AS `occupation`,`c`.`gstin` AS `gstin`,`c`.`company` AS `company`,date_format(`e`.`modified_at`,'%d %b %y') AS `modified_at` from ((((((((`employee` `e` join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) join `contact_group` `cg` on((`cg`.`id` = `c`.`contact_group_id`))) join `pf_central`.`employee_position` `ep` on((`ep`.`id` = `e`.`position_id`))) join `employee_bid` `eb` on((`eb`.`employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) left join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `eb`.`bid`))) left join `demo_owner_names` `don` on((`don`.`contact_id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) left join `pf_central`.`employee_department` `ed` on((`ed`.`id` = `e`.`department_id`))) left join `pf_central`.`user` `us` on((`us`.`contact_id` = `e`.`contact_id`)));

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.employee
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `employee` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `emergency_id` int NOT NULL,
  `ecode` int NOT NULL,
  `department_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `position_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Employee Job Position Id from central db employee_position table',
  `interviewer` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0- not eligible, 1- eligible',
  `master_trainer_contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `grade` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `counselor_status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `auto_assign_inq` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - false, 1 - Online Form, 2 - Only Facebook And Google, 3 - Both',
  `auto_asign_folder` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `doubleTick_acct_id` int NOT NULL,
  `qualifier` int NOT NULL,
  `associate` int NOT NULL,
  `doj` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `notice_start_date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `doe` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `exit_date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `handed_over` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-yes, 1-no',
  `on_notice` int NOT NULL,
  `status` int NOT NULL COMMENT '1- active , 0- Inactive',
  `user_account` int NOT NULL,
  `is_admin` int NOT NULL,
  `demo_owner` int NOT NULL,
  `workshift_id` int NOT NULL,
  `workshift_hours` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `workshift_in_time` time NOT NULL DEFAULT '00:00:00',
  `workshift_out_time` time NOT NULL DEFAULT '00:00:00',
  `week_off_code` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `target_id` int NOT NULL,
  `salary_type` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - Basic, 1 - Fixed , 2 -  per hour, 3 - per child,  4 - per hour (min. gaurentee), 5- Hybrid, 6-per day, 7 - Full Base Sal',
  `salary` float NOT NULL COMMENT 'Amount paid as basic salary',
  `tds_type` int NOT NULL COMMENT '1 - Fixed , 2 - %',
  `tds_percent` float(10,2) NOT NULL COMMENT 'TDS %',
  `rate_multiplier` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Rate Multiplier',
  `allowance` decimal(20,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `calculate_salary` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `incentive_new` varchar(11) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `incentive_renew` varchar(11) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `p_incentive_c` varchar(11) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `p_incentive_sc` varchar(11) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `trainer_incentive` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'check for teachers incentive should be given',
  `mt_incentive` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `mt_incentive_type` int NOT NULL,
  `rec_dir` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `type` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0 - Employee / 1 - Freelancer',
  `invoice_payment` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `assignment_check` varchar(11) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `assignment_no` int NOT NULL,
  `expense_balance` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `multipleAccounts` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `teacherContactId` varchar(225) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Franchisee Teacher contact id',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `red_flag` date NOT NULL,
  `cash_collector` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `embedding` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_parent` int DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `emergency_id` (`emergency_id`),
  KEY `position_id` (`position_id`),
  KEY `workshift_id` (`workshift_id`),
  KEY `target_id` (`target_id`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `idx_emp_department_id` (`department_id`),
  KEY `idx_emp_status_park` (`id`,`status`,`park`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=1117 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.employee_acheivement_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `employee_acheivement_view` AS select `employee_task_view`.`id` AS `id`,`employee_task_view`.`assigned_to_name` AS `assigned_to_name`,`employee_task_view`.`assigned_to_emp_status` AS `assigned_to_emp_status`,sum(`employee_task_view`.`final_points_no`) AS `points_earned`,sum(`employee_task_view`.`value`) AS `can_acheive`,`employee_task_view`.`park` AS `park` from `employee_task_view` where ((`employee_task_view`.`assigned_to` <> `employee_task_view`.`assigned_by`) and (`employee_task_view`.`park` = 0)) group by `employee_task_view`.`assigned_to` order by `employee_task_view`.`assigned_to_name`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.employee_advance
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `employee_advance` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `emp_id` int NOT NULL,
  `bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `advance_amount` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `remaining_amount` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `repayment_type` enum('EMI','FULL') COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'EMI',
  `emi_amount` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT 'Monthly installment amount (if EMI)',
  `total_installments` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `remaining_installments` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `start_month` date NOT NULL COMMENT 'First deduction month (1st of month)',
  `end_month` date NOT NULL COMMENT 'Last deduction month (capped at March of FY)',
  `financial_year` varchar(9) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'e.g. 2025-2026',
  `reason` text COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT 'Reason for advance',
  `status` enum('active','completed','cancelled') COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  `approved_by` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `park` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `modified_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `idx_emp_id` (`emp_id`),
  KEY `idx_status` (`status`),
  KEY `idx_financial_year` (`financial_year`),
  KEY `idx_park` (`park`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=5 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.employee_advance_schedule
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `employee_advance_schedule` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `advance_id` int NOT NULL,
  `contact_id` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `emp_id` int NOT NULL,
  `month` date NOT NULL COMMENT '1st of the scheduled month',
  `emi_amount` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00' COMMENT 'Amount to deduct this month',
  `status` enum('pending','deducted','skipped','adjusted') COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `salary_id` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'FK to salary.id once punched',
  `skip_reason` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `park` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_advance_id` (`advance_id`),
  KEY `idx_contact_month` (`contact_id`,`month`),
  KEY `idx_status` (`status`),
  KEY `idx_park` (`park`),
  CONSTRAINT `employee_advance_schedule_ibfk_1` FOREIGN KEY (`advance_id`) REFERENCES `employee_advance` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=14 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.employee_birthday_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `employee_birthday_view` AS select `e`.`id` AS `id`,`e`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`e`.`doj` AS `doj`,date_format(`e`.`doj`,'%M %e, %Y') AS `doj_string`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`c`.`dob` AS `dob`,date_format(`c`.`dob`,'%M %e, %Y') AS `human_readable_date`,concat(convert(date_format(`c`.`dob`,'%M') using utf8mb4),' ',convert(date_format(`c`.`dob`,'%e') using utf8mb4)) AS `formatted_month_and_date`,`epv`.`position` AS `position`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`e`.`park` AS `park` from ((`employee` `e` join `contact` `c` on(((`e`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`) and (`c`.`contact_group_id` = '2')))) join `employee_position_view` `epv` on((`e`.`position_id` = `epv`.`id`))) where ((`e`.`park` = 0) and (`e`.`status` = '1') and (`c`.`bid` <> '31') and (`epv`.`position` <> 'Franchisee')) group by `e`.`contact_id` order by `c`.`dob`;

`assignment_check`,`e`.`assignment_no` AS `assignment_no`,(case when (`e`.`salary` >= 10000) then 200 else 0 end) AS `tds`,(case when (`e`.`salary` >= 10000) then 'P.T.' else '' end) AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`c`.`document_type_id` AS `document_type_id`,`c`.`document_number` AS `document_number`,`c`.`document_type_id_2` AS `document_type_id_2`,`c`.`document_number_2` AS `document_number_2`,`c`.`document_image_2` AS `document_image_2`,`c`.`country_code_2` AS `country_code_2`,`c`.`mobile2` AS `mobile2`,`c`.`phone_no` AS `phone_no`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`c`.`gender` AS `gender`,`c`.`image` AS `image`,`c`.`quick_comment` AS `quick_comment`,`c`.`dob` AS `dob`,date_format(`c`.`dob`,'%d %b %y') AS `dob_string`,date_format(`e`.`doj`,'%d %b %y') AS `doj_string`,`c`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`c`.`relation` AS `relation`,`c`.`address` AS `address`,`c`.`document_image` AS `document_image`,`c`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`c`.`state` AS `state`,`c`.`city` AS `city`,`c`.`park` AS `cont_park`,`cg`.`contact_group` AS `contact_group`,`eb`.`bid` AS `bid`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,group_concat(distinct `b`.`type` separator ',') AS `branches_type`,`b`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`eb`.`zoom_user_id` AS `zoom_user_id`,`c`.`occupation` AS `occupation`,`c`.`gstin` AS `gstin`,`c`.`company` AS `company` from (((((`contact` `c` join `employee` `e`) join `contact_group` `cg`) join `pf_central`.`employee_position` `ep`) join `employee_bid` `eb`) left join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `eb`.`bid`))) where ((`cg`.`id` = `c`.`contact_group_id`) and (`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`) and (`e`.`position_id` = `ep`.`id`) and (`e`.`id` = `eb`.`employee_id`)) group by `e`.`id` order by `e`.`id` desc;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.employee_salary_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `employee_salary_view` AS select `s`.`id` AS `id`,`s`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`s`.`year_month` AS `year_month`,`s`.`from_date` AS `from_date`,date_format(`s`.`from_date`,'%d %b %y') AS `from_date_string`,`s`.`to_date` AS `to_date`,date_format(`s`.`to_date`,'%d %b %y') AS `to_date_string`,`e`.`salary` AS `current_salary`,`s`.`base_amount` AS `base_amount`,`s`.`present_days` AS `present_days`,`s`.`paid_leave` AS `paid_leave`,`s`.`deduction` AS `deduction`,`s`.`deduction_comment` AS `deduction_comment`,`s`.`addition` AS `addition`,`s`.`addition_comment` AS `addition_comment`,`s`.`incentive` AS `incentive`,`s`.`incentive_comment` AS `incentive_comment`,`s`.`extra_amount` AS `extra_amount`,`s`.`extra_comment` AS `extra_comment`,`s`.`advance_amount` AS `advance_amount`,`s`.`advance_comment` AS `advance_comment`,`s`.`fine_amount` AS `fine_amount`,`s`.`fine_comment` AS `fine_comment`,`s`.`pay_mode` AS `pay_mode`,`s`.`sub_total` AS `sub_total`,`s`.`salary` AS `salary`,`e`.`salary_type` AS `salary_type`,`s`.`tax_amount` AS `tax_amount`,`s`.`tax_comment` AS `tax_comment`,`s`.`paid` AS `paid`,`s`.`bid` AS `bid`,`s`.`comments` AS `comments`,`s`.`park` AS `park`,`e`.`ecode` AS `ecode`,`e`.`doj` AS `doj`,`e`.`tds_percent` AS `tds_percent`,`ep`.`position` AS `position`,`ed`.`department` AS `department`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`s`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`s`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`s`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`s`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`s`.`response_data` AS `response_data`,`s`.`pay_slip_data` AS `pay_slip_data`,(case when (`c`.`document_type_id` = 1) then `c`.`document_number` when (`c`.`document_type_id_2` = 1) then `c`.`document_number_2` else '' end) AS `pan_card`,md5(`s`.`id`) AS `enc_id` from ((((`contact` `c` join `employee` `e` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) join `salary` `s` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `s`.`contact_id`))) join `pf_central`.`employee_position` `ep` on((`e`.`position_id` = `ep`.`id`))) join `pf_central`.`employee_department` `ed` on((`e`.`department_id` = `ed`.`id`)));

  `end_time` time NOT NULL,

  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.employee_target

CREATE TABLE `employee_target` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `employee_id` int NOT NULL,
  `category_id` int NOT NULL,
  `target_id` int NOT NULL,
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `pay_way` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0 - Not Paid / 1 - Fixed / 2 - Percentage',
  `pay_value` int NOT NULL COMMENT ' Amount (Only in case of 1 - Fixed)',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `employee_id` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `category_id` (`category_id`),
  KEY `target_id` (`target_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `contact_id_2` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `employee_id_2` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `category_id_2` (`category_id`),
  KEY `target_id_2` (`target_id`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `contact_id_3` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `employee_id_3` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `category_id_3` (`category_id`),
  KEY `target_id_3` (`target_id`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `contact_id_4` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `employee_id_4` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `category_id_4` (`category_id`),
  KEY `target_id_4` (`target_id`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;
