--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.employee_task
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `employee_task` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `assigned_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `assigned_to` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `task_code` varchar(11) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `task_level` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `parent_task_id` int NOT NULL,
  `task_title` text NOT NULL,
  `task_description` text NOT NULL,
  `priority` varchar(250) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `assigned_date` date NOT NULL,
  `due_date` date NOT NULL,
  `completion_date` date NOT NULL,
  `is_completed` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-not completed,1-completed',
  `is_approved` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-not approved,1-approved',
  `approval_date` date NOT NULL,
  `file` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=1104 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.employee_task_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `employee_task_view` AS select `et`.`id` AS `id`,`et`.`task_code` AS `task_code`,`et`.`assigned_by` AS `assigned_by`,`et`.`assigned_to` AS `assigned_to`,`ce`.`fullname` AS `assigned_by_name`,`cee`.`fullname` AS `assigned_to_name`,`cee`.`status` AS `assigned_to_emp_status`,`ce`.`email` AS `assigned_by_email`,`et`.`task_level` AS `task_level`,`et`.`task_title` AS `task_title`,`et`.`task_description` AS `task_description`,`et`.`priority` AS `priority`,`et`.`assigned_date` AS `assigned_date`,`et`.`due_date` AS `due_date`,`et`.`completion_date` AS `completion_date`,`et`.`is_completed` AS `is_completed`,`et`.`is_approved` AS `is_approved`,`et`.`parent_task_id` AS `parent_task_id`,`et`.`file` AS `file`,(case when ((to_days(`et`.`assigned_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) = 0) then '1 Points' else concat((to_days(`et`.`due_date`) - to_days(`et`.`assigned_date`)),' ','Points') end) AS `value`,(case when ((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) > 0) then concat((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)),' ','days delay') when ((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) = 1) then concat((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)),' ','day delay') when ((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) < 0) then concat((to_days(`et`.`due_date`) - to_days(`et`.`completion_date`)),' ','days earlier') when ((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) = -(1)) then concat((to_days(`et`.`due_date`) - to_days(`et`.`completion_date`)),' ','day earlier') when ((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) = 0) then 'On time' else '-' end) AS `consumed_days`,(case when (`et`.`is_approved` = 0) then '-' else (case when ((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) > 0) then concat(((to_days(`et`.`due_date`) - to_days(`et`.`assigned_date`)) - (to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`))),' ','Points') when ((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) < 0) then concat((to_days(`et`.`due_date`) - to_days(`et`.`assigned_date`)),' ','Points') when ((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) = 0) then (case when ((to_days(`et`.`assigned_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) = 0) then '1 Point' else concat((to_days(`et`.`due_date`) - to_days(`et`.`assigned_date`)),' ','Points') end) else '-' end) end) AS `final_value`,(case when ((`et`.`is_approved` = 0) or (`et`.`assigned_by` = `et`.`assigned_to`)) then 0 else (case when ((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) > 0) then concat(((to_days(`et`.`due_date`) - to_days(`et`.`assigned_date`)) - (to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)))) when ((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) < 0) then concat((to_days(`et`.`due_date`) - to_days(`et`.`assigned_date`))) when ((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) = 0) then (case when ((to_days(`et`.`assigned_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) = 0) then 1 else (to_days(`et`.`due_date`) - to_days(`et`.`assigned_date`)) end) else 0 end) end) AS `final_points_no`,concat((select concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`) from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = (select `todo_remarks`.`emp_contact_id` from `todo_remarks` where (`todo_remarks`.`task_id` = `et`.`id`) order by `todo_remarks`.`id` desc limit 1))),' : ',(select `todo_remarks`.`comment` from `todo_remarks` where (`todo_remarks`.`task_id` = `et`.`id`) order by `todo_remarks`.`id` desc limit 1)) AS `comment`,cast((case when (`et`.`is_completed` = 0) then 'Task Pending' else 'Task Completed' end) as char charset utf8mb3) AS `is_completed_val`,cast((case when (`et`.`is_approved` = 0) then 'Not Approved' when (`et`.`is_approved` = 2) then 'Rejected' else 'Approved' end) as char charset utf8mb3) AS `is_approved_val`,`et`.`approval_date` AS `approval_date`,`et`.`park` AS `park`,`et`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`et`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from ((`employee_task` `et` left join (select `e`.`id` AS `id`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname` from (`employee` `e` left join `contact` `c` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`)))) `ce` on((`et`.`assigned_by` = `ce`.`id`))) left join (select `ee`.`id` AS `id`,`ee`.`status` AS `status`,concat(`cc`.`fname`,' ',`cc`.`mname`,' ',`cc`.`lname`) AS `fullname` from (`employee` `ee` left join `contact` `cc` on((`ee`.`contact_id` = `cc`.`id`)))) `cee` on((`et`.`assigned_to` = `cee`.`id`))) order by `et`.`id` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.employee_tutorial
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `employee_tutorial` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `url` varchar(500) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `song` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `type` enum('Audio','PPT','Video') CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PPT',
  `park` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=102 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3 COMMENT='Used for TR only';


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.employee_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `employee_view` AS select `e`.`id` AS `id`,`e`.`id` AS `emp_id`,`e`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`e`.`type` AS `type`,`e`.`emergency_id` AS `emergency_id`,`e`.`ecode` AS `ecode`,`e`.`department_id` AS `department_id`,`e`.`position_id` AS `position_id`,`e`.`interviewer` AS `interviewer`,`e`.`grade` AS `grade`,`e`.`auto_assign_inq` AS `auto_assign_inq`,`e`.`auto_asign_folder` AS `auto_asign_folder`,`e`.`qualifier` AS `qualifier`,`e`.`associate` AS `associate`,`ep`.`position` AS `position`,(case when ((`ep`.`position` = 'Senior-Trainer') or (`ep`.`position` = 'Trainer')) then 'Training Partner' when (`ep`.`position` = 'Franchisee') then 'Franchisee Partner' else `ep`.`position` end) AS `position_subheader`,`ep`.`level` AS `level`,`e`.`doj` AS `doj`,`epp`.`parent_emp_id` AS `parent_emp_id`,`e`.`notice_start_date` AS `notice_start_date`,`e`.`doe` AS `doe`,`e`.`on_notice` AS `on_notice`,`e`.`exit_date` AS `exit_date`,`e`.`status` AS `status`,`e`.`salary` AS `salary`,`e`.`salary_type` AS `salary_type`,`e`.`tds_type` AS `tds_type`,`e`.`tds_percent` AS `tds_percent`,`e`.`rate_multiplier` AS `rate_multiplier`,`e`.`allowance` AS `allowance`,`e`.`calculate_salary` AS `calculate_salary`,`e`.`incentive_new` AS `incentive_new`,`e`.`incentive_renew` AS `incentive_renew`,`e`.`rec_dir` AS `rec_dir`,`e`.`p_incentive_c` AS `p_incentive_c`,`e`.`p_incentive_sc` AS `p_incentive_sc`,`e`.`assignment_check` AS `assignment_check`,`e`.`assignment_no` AS `assignment_no`,(case when (`e`.`salary` >= 10000) then 200 else 0 end) AS `tds`,(case when (`e`.`salary` >= 10000) then 'P.T.' else '' end) AS `tds_comment`,`e`.`user_account` AS `user_account`,`e`.`workshift_id` AS `workshift_id`,`e`.`workshift_in_time` AS `workshift_in_time`,`e`.`workshift_out_time` AS `workshift_out_time`,`e`.`week_off_code` AS `week_off_code`,`e`.`target_id` AS `target_id`,`e`.`expense_balance` AS `expense_balance`,`e`.`park` AS `park`,`c`.`id` AS `cont_id`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`mname` AS `mname`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`c`.`nick_name` AS `nick_name`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,(case when (`c`.`document_type_id` = 3) then `c`.`document_number` when (`c`.`document_type_id_2` = 3) then `c`.`document_number_2` else NULL end) AS `aadhar_card_num`,(case when (`c`.`document_type_id` = 1) then `c`.`document_number` when (`c`.`document_type_id_2` = 1) then `c`.`document_number_2` else NULL end) AS `pan_card_num`,(case when (`c`.`document_type_id` = 3) then `c`.`document_image` when (`c`.`document_type_id_2` = 3) then `c`.`document_image_2` else NULL end) AS `aadhar_card_image`,(case when (`c`.`document_type_id` = 1) then `c`.`document_image` when (`c`.`document_type_id_2` = 1) then `c`.`document_image_2` else NULL end) AS `pan_card_image`,`c`.`document_type_id` AS `document_type_id`,`c`.`document_number` AS `document_number`,`c`.`document_image` AS `document_image`,`c`.`document_type_id_2` AS `document_type_id_2`,`c`.`document_number_2` AS `document_number_2`,`c`.`document_image_2` AS `document_image_2`,`c`.`document_type_id_3` AS `document_type_id_3`,`c`.`document_image_3` AS `document_image_3`,`c`.`country_code_2` AS `country_code_2`,`c`.`mobile2` AS `mobile2`,`c`.`phone_no` AS `phone_no`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`c`.`personal_email` AS `personal_email`,`c`.`gender` AS `gender`,`c`.`image` AS `image`,`c`.`quick_comment` AS `quick_comment`,`c`.`dob` AS `dob`,date_format(`c`.`dob`,'%d %b %y') AS `dob_string`,date_format(`e`.`doj`,'%d %b %y') AS `doj_string`,`c`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`c`.`relation` AS `relation`,`c`.`address` AS `address`,`c`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`c`.`state` AS `state`,`c`.`city` AS `city`,`c`.`park` AS `cont_park`,`cg`.`contact_group` AS `contact_group`,`eb`.`bid` AS `bid`,`b`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`eb`.`zoom_user_id` AS `zoom_user_id`,`c`.`occupation` AS `occupation`,`c`.`gstin` AS `gstin`,`c`.`company` AS `company`,date_format(`e`.`modified_at`,'%d %b %y') AS `modified_at` from ((((((`contact` `c` join `employee` `e`) join `contact_group` `cg`) join `pf_central`.`employee_position` `ep`) join `employee_bid` `eb`) left join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `eb`.`bid`))) left join `employee_parent` `epp` on((`epp`.`emp_id` = `e`.`id`))) where ((`cg`.`id` = `c`.`contact_group_id`) and (`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`) and (`e`.`position_id` = `ep`.`id`) and (`e`.`id` = `eb`.`employee_id`) and (not((`c`.`fname` like '%test%'))) and (not((`c`.`mname` like '%test%'))) and (not((`c`.`lname` like '%test%')))) group by `e`.`id` order by `e`.`id`,`b`.`type`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.employee_workshift_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `employee_workshift_view` AS select `e`.`id` AS `id`,`e`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`e`.`type` AS `type`,`e`.`ecode` AS `ecode`,`ep`.`position` AS `position`,`e`.`doj` AS `doj`,`e`.`status` AS `status`,`e`.`salary` AS `salary`,`e`.`user_account` AS `user_account`,`e`.`workshift_id` AS `workshift_id`,`e`.`target_id` AS `target_id`,`e`.`park` AS `park`,`c`.`id` AS `cont_id`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`mname` AS `mname`,`w`.`workshift` AS `workshift`,`w`.`gracetime_early` AS `gracetime_early`,`w`.`gracetime_late` AS `gracetime_late`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`c`.`document_type_id` AS `document_type_id`,`c`.`document_number` AS `document_number`,`c`.`mobile2` AS `mobile2`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`eb`.`bid` AS `bid`,`c`.`gender` AS `gender` from (((((`contact` `c` join `employee` `e`) join `contact_group` `cg`) join `pf_central`.`employee_position` `ep`) join `employee_bid` `eb`) join `workshift` `w`) where ((`cg`.`id` = `c`.`contact_group_id`) and (`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`) and (`e`.`position_id` = `ep`.`id`) and (`e`.`id` = `eb`.`employee_id`) and (`e`.`workshift_id` = `w`.`id`));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.equipment_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `equipment_view` AS select `e`.`id` AS `id`,`e`.`equipment_id` AS `equipment_id`,`ce`.`equipment` AS `equipment`,`ce`.`description` AS `description`,`e`.`machine_name` AS `machine_name`,`e`.`ip` AS `ip`,`e`.`sensor` AS `sensor`,`e`.`uom` AS `uom`,`e`.`ultra_max` AS `ultra_max`,`e`.`ultra_min` AS `ultra_min`,`e`.`plate_count` AS `plate_count`,`e`.`plate_weight` AS `plate_weight`,`e`.`bid` AS `bid` from (`equipments` `e` join `pf_central`.`equipment` `ce` on((`e`.`equipment_id` = `ce`.`id`)));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.equipments
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `equipments` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `equipment_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Equipment ID from central',
  `machine_name` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Name to describe the machine',
  `ip` varchar(15) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0.0.0' COMMENT 'Ip of sensor',
  `sensor` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0 - No, 1 - Yes)',
  `uom` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT 'Flag(0 - lbs, 1 - Kgs, 2 - Kms)',
  `ultra_max` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `ultra_min` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `plate_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `plate_weight` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Weight of each plate 0 in case of no weight / dumble',
  `bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `equipment_id` (`equipment_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `equipment_id_2` (`equipment_id`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `equipment_id_3` (`equipment_id`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_3` (`park`),
  KEY `equipment_id_4` (`equipment_id`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_4` (`park`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.event_occurrence_cost
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `event_occurrence_cost` (
  `id` bigint unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `bid` int unsigned NOT NULL,
  `occurrence_date` date NOT NULL,
  `event_type` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '1=batch,2=demo,3=other_event',
  `event_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `original_event_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `effective_batch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `original_batch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `venue_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `branch_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `master_category_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `teacher_contact_id` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `occurrence_slot_key` varchar(120) NOT NULL,
  `students_present_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `students_assigned_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `teacher_cost` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `associate_cost` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `venue_cost` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `reimbursement_cost` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `revenue` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `invoice_consumed_value` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `teacher_basis_json` longtext,
  `venue_basis_json` longtext,
  `invoice_basis_json` longtext,
  `reimbursement_basis_json` longtext,
  `derivation_status` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '1=ok,2=partial,3=error',
  `warning_codes_json` text,
  `source_hash` char(32) NOT NULL,
  `is_active` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `stale_reason_code` tinyint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0=none,1=not_seen_in_run',
  `stale_marked_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_synced_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `last_sync_run_id` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_event_occurrence` (`bid`,`occurrence_date`,`event_type`,`event_id`,`occurrence_slot_key`),
  KEY `idx_occ_date` (`occurrence_date`),
  KEY `idx_bid_date` (`bid`,`occurrence_date`),
  KEY `idx_bid_date_active` (`bid`,`occurrence_date`,`is_active`),
  KEY `idx_venue_date` (`venue_id`,`occurrence_date`),
  KEY `idx_event_date` (`event_type`,`event_id`,`occurrence_date`),
  KEY `idx_batch_date` (`effective_batch_id`,`occurrence_date`),
  KEY `idx_last_sync` (`last_sync_run_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=40203 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.exam_log_answer_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `exam_log_answer_view` AS select `el`.`id` AS `id`,`el`.`exam_id` AS `exam_id`,`e`.`name` AS `name`,`e`.`session_master_id` AS `session_master_id`,`e`.`duration` AS `duration`,`e`.`negative_score` AS `negative_score`,`e`.`per_score` AS `per_score`,`e`.`schedule_days` AS `schedule_days`,`e`.`schedule_time` AS `schedule_time`,`e`.`complete_days` AS `complete_days`,`e`.`submission_time` AS `submission_time`,`el`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`el`.`start` AS `start`,`el`.`end` AS `end`,`el`.`score` AS `score`,`eql`.`question_id` AS `question_id`,`eql`.`option_id` AS `option_id`,`eq`.`question` AS `question`,`eqo`.`choice` AS `choice` from ((((`exam_log` `el` join `exam_question_log` `eql` on((`el`.`id` = `eql`.`exam_log_id`))) join `exam_question` `eq` on((`eql`.`question_id` = `eq`.`id`))) join `exam_question_option` `eqo` on((`eql`.`option_id` = `eqo`.`id`))) join `exam` `e` on((`el`.`exam_id` = `e`.`id`)));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.exam_log_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `exam_log_view` AS select distinct `el`.`id` AS `id`,`el`.`exam_id` AS `exam_id`,`el`.`module_id` AS `module_id`,`e`.`name` AS `name`,`e`.`session_master_id` AS `session_master_id`,`e`.`duration` AS `duration`,`e`.`negative_score` AS `negative_score`,`e`.`per_score` AS `per_score`,`e`.`schedule_days` AS `schedule_days`,`e`.`schedule_time` AS `schedule_time`,`e`.`complete_days` AS `complete_days`,`e`.`submission_time` AS `submission_time`,`el`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`el`.`assign_date` AS `assign_date`,`el`.`submission` AS `submission`,`el`.`start` AS `start`,`el`.`end` AS `end`,(case when (`el`.`start` = '0000-00-00 00:00:00') then ' - ' when (`el`.`feedback_submitted` = '1') then `el`.`score` else 'hidden' end) AS `score`,`el`.`score` AS `score_actual`,`el`.`total_score` AS `total_score`,`el`.`feedback_submitted` AS `feedback_submitted`,(case when (`el`.`assign_date` > now()) then 'Upcoming' when ((`el`.`submission` < now()) and (`el`.`end` = '0000-00-00 00:00:00')) then 'Missed' when (`el`.`end` = '0000-00-00 00:00:00') then 'Pending' else 'Completed' end) AS `status`,`m`.`module` AS `module`,`m`.`category` AS `category`,`el`.`park` AS `park`,`m`.`bid` AS `bid`,`m`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,`m`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`m`.`email` AS `email`,`m`.`code` AS `code`,`m`.`batch` AS `batch`,`m`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id` from ((`exam_log` `el` join `exam` `e` on((`el`.`exam_id` = `e`.`id`))) join `invoice_invoiceitem_module_view` `m` on(((`m`.`module_id` = `el`.`module_id`) and (`m`.`contact_id` = `el`.`contact_id`))));

  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.exam_question_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `exam_question_view` AS select `e`.`id` AS `id`,`e`.`name` AS `name`,`e`.`session_master_id` AS `session_master_id`,`e`.`duration` AS `duration`,`e`.`per_score` AS `per_score`,`e`.`schedule_days` AS `schedule_days`,`e`.`schedule_time` AS `schedule_time`,`e`.`complete_days` AS `complete_days`,`e`.`submission_time` AS `submission_time`,`eq`.`id` AS `question_id`,`eq`.`question` AS `question`,`e`.`bid` AS `bid` from (`exam` `e` left join `exam_question` `eq` on((`e`.`id` = `eq`.`exam_id`)));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.exam_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `exam_view` AS select `e`.`id` AS `id`,`e`.`name` AS `name`,`e`.`session_master_id` AS `session_master_id`,`e`.`duration` AS `duration`,`e`.`per_score` AS `per_score`,`e`.`schedule_days` AS `schedule_days`,`e`.`schedule_time` AS `schedule_time`,`e`.`complete_days` AS `complete_days`,`e`.`submission_time` AS `submission_time`,`eq`.`id` AS `question_id`,`eq`.`question` AS `question`,`a`.`id` AS `answer_id`,`a`.`choice` AS `choice`,`a`.`correct` AS `correct`,`e`.`park` AS `park`,`e`.`bid` AS `bid` from ((`exam` `e` left join `exam_question` `eq` on((`e`.`id` = `eq`.`exam_id`))) left join `exam_question_option` `a` on((`a`.`exam_question_id` = `eq`.`id`)));

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.exercise_log
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `exercise_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `exercise_id` int NOT NULL,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `sequence` int NOT NULL COMMENT ' Sequence of exercise for that day',
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `weight` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Active weight for time based activity / just weight for task based activity',
  `passive_weight` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Passive weight for time based activity',
  `uom` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `repeition` float NOT NULL,
  `speed` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Active Speed for time based activity / just speed for task based activity',
  `passive_speed` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Passive Speed for time based activity',
  `distance` varchar(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `calories` float(7,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `comment` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `exercise_schedule_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `time` time NOT NULL COMMENT 'Time to taken for exercise to complete',
  `active_time` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Active Time for time based Task',
  `passive_time` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Passive Time for time based exercise',
  `rest` time NOT NULL,
  `sets` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `exercise_divider_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `level` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `workout_feel_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `exercise_id` (`exercise_id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `sequence` (`sequence`),
  KEY `date` (`date`),
  KEY `exercise_schedule_id` (`exercise_schedule_id`),
  KEY `exercise_divider_id` (`exercise_divider_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `level` (`level`),
  KEY `exercise_id_2` (`exercise_id`),
  KEY `contact_id_2` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `sequence_2` (`sequence`),
  KEY `date_2` (`date`),
  KEY `exercise_schedule_id_2` (`exercise_schedule_id`),
  KEY `exercise_divider_id_2` (`exercise_divider_id`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `level_2` (`level`),
  KEY `exercise_id_3` (`exercise_id`),
  KEY `contact_id_3` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `sequence_3` (`sequence`),
  KEY `date_3` (`date`),
  KEY `exercise_schedule_id_3` (`exercise_schedule_id`),
  KEY `exercise_divider_id_3` (`exercise_divider_id`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_3` (`park`),
  KEY `level_3` (`level`),
  KEY `exercise_id_4` (`exercise_id`),
  KEY `contact_id_4` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `sequence_4` (`sequence`),
  KEY `date_4` (`date`),
  KEY `exercise_schedule_id_4` (`exercise_schedule_id`),
  KEY `exercise_divider_id_4` (`exercise_divider_id`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_4` (`park`),
  KEY `level_4` (`level`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.exercise_schedule
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `exercise_schedule` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `workout_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `exercise_id` int NOT NULL,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `sequence` int NOT NULL COMMENT ' Sequence of exercise for that day',
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `weight` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Active weight for time based activity / just weight for task based activity',
  `passive_weight` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Passive weight for time based activity',
  `uom` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `repeition` float NOT NULL,
  `speed` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Active Speed for time based activity / just speed for task based activity',
  `passive_speed` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Passive Speed for time based activity',
  `distance` varchar(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `employee_id` int NOT NULL,
  `time` time NOT NULL COMMENT 'Time to taken for exercise to complete',
  `active_time` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Active Time for time based Task',
  `passive_time` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'passive time for time based activity',
  `rest` time NOT NULL,
  `sets` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `level` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'level of the exercise',
  `component_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `exercise_divider_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `shoot_video` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag for shooting the video',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `workout_id` (`workout_id`),
  KEY `exercise_id` (`exercise_id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `sequence` (`sequence`),
  KEY `date` (`date`),
  KEY `employee_id` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `component_id` (`component_id`),
  KEY `level` (`level`),
  KEY `exercise_divider_id` (`exercise_divider_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `workout_id_2` (`workout_id`),
  KEY `exercise_id_2` (`exercise_id`),
  KEY `contact_id_2` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `sequence_2` (`sequence`),
  KEY `date_2` (`date`),
  KEY `employee_id_2` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `component_id_2` (`component_id`),
  KEY `level_2` (`level`),
  KEY `exercise_divider_id_2` (`exercise_divider_id`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `workout_id_3` (`workout_id`),
  KEY `exercise_id_3` (`exercise_id`),
  KEY `contact_id_3` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `sequence_3` (`sequence`),
  KEY `date_3` (`date`),
  KEY `employee_id_3` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `component_id_3` (`component_id`),
  KEY `level_3` (`level`),
  KEY `exercise_divider_id_3` (`exercise_divider_id`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_3` (`park`),
  KEY `workout_id_4` (`workout_id`),
  KEY `exercise_id_4` (`exercise_id`),
  KEY `contact_id_4` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `sequence_4` (`sequence`),
  KEY `date_4` (`date`),
  KEY `employee_id_4` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `component_id_4` (`component_id`),
  KEY `level_4` (`level`),

  KEY `park_4` (`park`)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.expense
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `expense` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `ecat_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Expense Category Id (from central database)',
  `master_category_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `category` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `reason` varchar(500) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Reason for Expense',
  `amount` int NOT NULL,
  `payment` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'calculate part payment amount',
  `payment_done` int NOT NULL,
  `payment_reject` varchar(10) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '1-approve\r\n2-reject',
  `expense_reject_comment` varchar(225) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `transaction_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `pay_mode` int NOT NULL,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `employee_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'employee',
  `authorised_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `to_employee_id` int NOT NULL,
  `expense_balance` float NOT NULL,
  `resulting_expense_balance` float NOT NULL,
  `salary_id` int NOT NULL,
  `attachments` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `attachments1` varchar(150) DEFAULT NULL,
  `attachments2` varchar(150) DEFAULT NULL,
  `comment` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `venue_id` int NOT NULL,
  `relation_id` int NOT NULL,
  `expense_line_items` longtext,
  `detailedData` int NOT NULL,
  `ledger_data` int NOT NULL,
  `approved_expense` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `approved_date` date NOT NULL,
  `type_head` varchar(5) NOT NULL,
  `type_head1` varchar(5) NOT NULL,
  `type_head2` varchar(5) NOT NULL,
  `type_head3` varchar(5) NOT NULL,
  `tax_1` float NOT NULL COMMENT 'cgst',
  `tax_2` float NOT NULL COMMENT 'sgst',
  `tax_3` float NOT NULL COMMENT 'igst',
  `total_amount` float NOT NULL,
  `cleared` int NOT NULL,
  `tr_1` int NOT NULL,
  `tr_2` int NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `ecat_id` (`ecat_id`),
  KEY `employee_id` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `salary_id` (`salary_id`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `ecat_id_2` (`ecat_id`),
  KEY `employee_id_2` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `salary_id_2` (`salary_id`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `ecat_id_3` (`ecat_id`),
  KEY `employee_id_3` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `salary_id_3` (`salary_id`),
  KEY `park_3` (`park`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `ecat_id_4` (`ecat_id`),
  KEY `employee_id_4` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `salary_id_4` (`salary_id`),
  KEY `park_4` (`park`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`),
  KEY `idx_expense_ledger_posting` (`park`,`date`,`bid`,`master_category_id`,`salary_id`,`total_amount`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=12120 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.expense_credit_log_company_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `expense_credit_log_company_view` AS select `expense`.`id` AS `id`,`expense`.`date` AS `date`,`expense`.`reason` AS `reason`,`expense`.`bid` AS `bid`,`expense`.`amount` AS `credit_amount`,'' AS `debit_amount`,`expense`.`comment` AS `comment`,`expense`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`expense`.`created_by` AS `user_id`,concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`) AS `employee_name`,concat(`managers`.`fname`,' ',`managers`.`lname`) AS `user_name`,`expense`.`park` AS `park` from ((((`expense` join `employee` on((`expense`.`employee_id` = `employee`.`id`))) join `contact` on((`employee`.`contact_id` = `contact`.`id`))) join `pf_central`.`user` on((`expense`.`created_by` = `pf_central`.`user`.`id`))) join `contact` `managers` on((`pf_central`.`user`.`contact_id` = `managers`.`id`))) union select `emp_expense_credit_log`.`id` AS `id`,`emp_expense_credit_log`.`date` AS `date`,'' AS `reason`,`emp_expense_credit_log`.`bid` AS `bid`,'' AS `credit_amount`,`emp_expense_credit_log`.`amount` AS `debit_amount`,`emp_expense_credit_log`.`comment` AS `comment`,`emp_expense_credit_log`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`emp_expense_credit_log`.`created_by` AS `user_id`,concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`) AS `employee_name`,concat(`managers`.`fname`,' ',`managers`.`lname`) AS `user_name`,`emp_expense_credit_log`.`park` AS `park` from ((((`emp_expense_credit_log` join `employee` on((`emp_expense_credit_log`.`employee_id` = `employee`.`id`))) join `contact` on((`employee`.`contact_id` = `contact`.`id`))) join `pf_central`.`user` on((`emp_expense_credit_log`.`created_by` = `pf_central`.`user`.`id`))) join `contact` `managers` on((`pf_central`.`user`.`contact_id` = `managers`.`id`))) order by `date` desc;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.expense_line_item
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `expense_line_item` (
  `id` bigint unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `expense_id` bigint unsigned NOT NULL,
  `line_no` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `venue_id` bigint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` bigint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `amount` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `tax_1` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `tax_2` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `tax_3` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `total_amount` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `created_by` bigint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_by` bigint unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_expense_line_item_expense_line` (`expense_id`,`line_no`),
  KEY `idx_expense_line_item_expense_id` (`expense_id`),
  KEY `idx_expense_line_item_bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `idx_expense_line_item_venue_id` (`venue_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=421 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;

  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `reference_code` int NOT NULL,
  `type_of_expense` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `type_head` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Flag is main type_head',
  `type_head1` int NOT NULL,
  `type_head2` int NOT NULL,
  `type_head3` int NOT NULL,
  `start_code` varchar(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Not using yet can add later on',
  `end_code` varchar(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'No using can add later on',
  `park` int NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=371 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.expense_type_head_master_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `expense_type_head_master_view` AS select `e`.`id` AS `id`,`e`.`reference_code` AS `reference_code`,`e`.`type_of_expense` AS `type_of_expense`,`e`.`type_head` AS `type_head`,`e`.`type_head1` AS `type_head1`,`e`.`type_head2` AS `type_head2`,`e`.`type_head3` AS `type_head3`,coalesce(`th1`.`reference_code`,0) AS `type_head1_reference_code`,coalesce(`th2`.`reference_code`,0) AS `type_head2_reference_code`,coalesce(`th3`.`reference_code`,0) AS `type_head3_reference_code`,`e`.`start_code` AS `start_code`,`e`.`end_code` AS `end_code`,`e`.`park` AS `park` from (((`expense_type_head_master` `e` left join `expense_type_head_master` `th1` on((`e`.`type_head1` = `th1`.`id`))) left join `expense_type_head_master` `th2` on((`e`.`type_head2` = `th2`.`id`))) left join `expense_type_head_master` `th3` on((`e`.`type_head3` = `th3`.`id`)));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.expense_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `expense_view` AS select `expense`.`id` AS `id`,`expense`.`ecat_id` AS `ecat_id`,`expense`.`category` AS `category`,`expense`.`payment_done` AS `payment_done`,`expense`.`payment_reject` AS `payment_reject`,`expense`.`expense_reject_comment` AS `expense_reject_comment`,concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`) AS `employee`,`expense`.`reason` AS `reason`,`expense`.`amount` AS `amount`,`expense`.`transaction_id` AS `transaction_id`,`expense`.`pay_mode` AS `pay_mode`,(select `pf_central`.`pay_mode`.`mode` from `pf_central`.`pay_mode` where (`pf_central`.`pay_mode`.`id` = `expense`.`pay_mode`)) AS `pay_mode_string`,`expense`.`date` AS `date`,date_format(`expense`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `date_string`,`expense`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,concat(`u`.`fname`,' ',`u`.`lname`) AS `emp_name`,`expense`.`to_employee_id` AS `to_employee_id`,concat(`cnt`.`fname`,' ',`cnt`.`lname`) AS `to_employee_name`,`expense`.`expense_balance` AS `expense_balance`,`expense`.`resulting_expense_balance` AS `resulting_expense_balance`,`expense`.`attachments` AS `attachments`,`expense`.`attachments1` AS `attachments1`,`expense`.`attachments2` AS `attachments2`,(case when ((0 <> length(`expense`.`attachments`)) and (0 <> length(`expense`.`attachments1`)) and (length(`expense`.`attachments2`) <> 'NULL')) then 3 when ((0 <> length(`expense`.`attachments`)) and (length(`expense`.`attachments1`) <> 'NULL')) then 2 when ((0 <> length(`expense`.`attachments1`)) and (length(`expense`.`attachments2`) <> 'NULL')) then 2 when ((0 <> length(`expense`.`attachments`)) and (length(`expense`.`attachments2`) <> 'NULL')) then 2 when (length(`expense`.`attachments`) <> 'NULL') then 1 when (length(`expense`.`attachments1`) <> 'NULL') then 1 when (length(`expense`.`attachments2`) <> 'NULL') then 1 else 0 end) AS `no_of_attachments`,`expense`.`comment` AS `comment`,`expense`.`park` AS `park`,`expense`.`bid` AS `bid`,`expense`.`payment` AS `payment`,`br`.`branch` AS `branch`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,`expense`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`expense`.`relation_id` AS `relation_id`,`expense`.`cleared` AS `cleared`,`expense`.`detailedData` AS `detailedData`,`expense`.`ledger_data` AS `ledger_data`,`expense`.`approved_expense` AS `approved_expense`,`expense`.`approved_date` AS `approved_date`,`expense`.`type_head` AS `type_head`,`expense`.`type_head1` AS `type_head1`,`expense`.`type_head2` AS `type_head2`,`expense`.`type_head3` AS `type_head3`,`ethm`.`type_of_expense` AS `type_head_name`,`ethm1`.`type_of_expense` AS `type_head1_name`,`ethm2`.`type_of_expense` AS `type_head2_name`,`ethm3`.`type_of_expense` AS `type_head3_name`,`ethm`.`reference_code` AS `type_head_code`,`ethm1`.`reference_code` AS `type_head1_code`,`ethm2`.`reference_code` AS `type_head2_code`,`ethm3`.`reference_code` AS `type_head3_code`,`expense`.`tax_1` AS `tax_1`,`expense`.`tax_2` AS `tax_2`,`expense`.`tax_3` AS `tax_3`,`expense`.`total_amount` AS `total_amount`,`expense`.`tr_1` AS `tr_1`,`expense`.`tr_2` AS `tr_2`,(case when ((`expense`.`payment_done` = 0) and (`expense`.`approved_expense` = 0)) then 0 else 1 end) AS `global_expense_pending`,(case when ((`expense`.`payment_done` = 0) and (`expense`.`approved_expense` = 1)) then 0 else 1 end) AS `global_expense_approved`,(case when ((`expense`.`payment_done` = 1) and (`expense`.`approved_expense` = 1)) then 0 else 1 end) AS `global_expense_payment_approved`,`expense`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`expense`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`expense`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`expense`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from (((((((((((`expense` join `employee` on((`employee`.`id` = `expense`.`employee_id`))) join `contact` on((`employee`.`contact_id` = `contact`.`id`))) join `pf_central`.`user` `u` on((`u`.`id` = `expense`.`created_by`))) left join `branch` `br` on((`br`.`id` = `expense`.`bid`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`v`.`id` = `expense`.`venue_id`))) left join `expense_type_head_master` `ethm` on((`ethm`.`id` = `expense`.`type_head`))) left join `expense_type_head_master` `ethm1` on((`ethm1`.`id` = `expense`.`type_head1`))) left join `expense_type_head_master` `ethm2` on((`ethm2`.`id` = `expense`.`type_head2`))) left join `expense_type_head_master` `ethm3` on((`ethm3`.`id` = `expense`.`type_head3`))) left join `employee` `emp` on((`emp`.`id` = `expense`.`to_employee_id`))) left join `contact` `cnt` on((`cnt`.`id` = `emp`.`contact_id`))) order by `expense`.`id` desc;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.facebook_converted_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `facebook_converted_view` AS select `fl`.`id` AS `id`,`c`.`id` AS `contact_id`,`i`.`id` AS `inquiry_id`,`i`.`bid` AS `bid`,`f`.`id` AS `f_id`,`f`.`park` AS `park`,ifnull(`m`.`status`,'Inquiry') AS `member_status`,if((`fl`.`fullname` = ''),concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`),`fl`.`fullname`) AS `fullname2`,concat(`cc`.`fname`,' ',`cc`.`lname`) AS `c_fullname`,`fl`.`type` AS `type`,`fl`.`lead_gen_id` AS `lead_gen_id`,`fl`.`clid` AS `clid`,`fl`.`ad_id` AS `ad_id`,`fl`.`ad_name` AS `ad_name_id`,`fl`.`platform` AS `platform_id`,`hf`.`heard_from` AS `ad_name`,`inqs`.`source` AS `platform`,`fl`.`email` AS `email`,concat(`fl`.`country_code`,`fl`.`mobile`) AS `mobile`,`fl`.`city` AS `city`,`fl`.`comment` AS `comment`,`f`.`old_comment` AS `f_comment`,`fl`.`status` AS `status`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`fl`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`m`.`created_at` AS `mem_created_at`,date_format(`fl`.`created_at`,'%d %b %y \n %h:%i %p') AS `date_of_reinquiry`,date_format(`m`.`created_at`,'%d %b %y \n %h:%i %p') AS `date_of_conversion`,if(`m`.`id`,'Yes','No') AS `converted`,`inv`.`amount` AS `invoice_amount`,`inv`.`date` AS `invoice_date`,`inv`.`total` AS `invoice_total`,`ii`.`currency` AS `invoice_currency`,`fl`.`conversion_api` AS `conversion_api` from ((((((((((((`facebook_leads` `fl` join `contact` `c` on(((`fl`.`mobile` = `c`.`mobile`) and (`fl`.`country_code` = `c`.`country_code`)))) join `inquiry` `i` on((`c`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`i`.`c_employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) join `member` `m` on((`c`.`id` = `m`.`contact_id`))) left join `contact` `cc` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `cc`.`id`))) left join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `i`.`bid`))) left join `heard_from` `hf` on((`fl`.`ad_name` = `hf`.`id`))) left join `inquiry_source` `inqs` on((`fl`.`platform` = `inqs`.`id`))) left join `latest_followup_table` `f` on(((`f`.`master_id` = `i`.`id`) and (`f`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`) and (`f`.`park` = '0')))) left join `invoice` `inv` on(((`i`.`contact_id` = `inv`.`contact_id`) and (`inv`.`park` = 0) and (`inv`.`invoice_count` < 2) and (`inv`.`balance` = 0)))) left join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`inv`.`id` = `ii`.`invoice_id`))) join (select `fl2`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`fl2`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`m2`.`id` AS `member_id`,max(`fl2`.`created_at`) AS `chosen_created_at` from ((`facebook_leads` `fl2` join `contact` `c2` on(((`fl2`.`mobile` = `c2`.`mobile`) and (`fl2`.`country_code` = `c2`.`country_code`)))) join `member` `m2` on((`c2`.`id` = `m2`.`contact_id`))) where (`fl2`.`created_at` <= `m2`.`created_at`) group by `fl2`.`mobile`,`fl2`.`country_code`,`m2`.`id`) `chosen` on(((`fl`.`mobile` = `chosen`.`mobile`) and (`fl`.`country_code` = `chosen`.`country_code`) and (`m`.`id` = `chosen`.`member_id`) and (`fl`.`created_at` = `chosen`.`chosen_created_at`)))) where ((`i`.`park` = '0') and (`m`.`id` is not null)) order by `fl`.`status` desc;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.facebook_lead_error
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `facebook_lead_error` AS select `facebook_leads`.`id` AS `id`,`facebook_leads`.`lead_gen_id` AS `lead_gen_id`,json_unquote(json_extract(`facebook_leads`.`raw_data`,'$.ad_id')) AS `ad_id`,json_unquote(json_extract(`facebook_leads`.`raw_data`,'$.ad_name')) AS `ad_name`,json_unquote(json_extract(`facebook_leads`.`raw_data`,'$.adset_id')) AS `adset_id`,json_unquote(json_extract(`facebook_leads`.`raw_data`,'$.platform')) AS `platform`,json_unquote(json_extract(`facebook_leads`.`raw_data`,'$.campaign_id')) AS `campaign_id`,json_unquote(json_extract(`facebook_leads`.`raw_data`,'$.campaign_name')) AS `campaign_name`,`facebook_leads`.`inquiry_added` AS `inquiry_added`,`facebook_leads`.`email` AS `email`,`facebook_leads`.`city` AS `city`,`facebook_leads`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,coalesce(json_unquote(json_extract(`facebook_leads`.`raw_data`,replace(json_unquote(json_search(`facebook_leads`.`raw_data`,'one','phone_number',NULL,'$.field_data[*].name')),'.name','.values[0]'))),json_unquote(json_extract(`facebook_leads`.`raw_data`,replace(json_unquote(json_search(`facebook_leads`.`raw_data`,'one','phone',NULL,'$.field_data[*].name')),'.name','.values[0]')))) AS `mobile`,coalesce(json_unquote(json_extract(`facebook_leads`.`raw_data`,replace(json_unquote(json_search(`facebook_leads`.`raw_data`,'one','full_name',NULL,'$.field_data[*].name')),'.name','.values[0]'))),json_unquote(json_extract(`facebook_leads`.`raw_data`,replace(json_unquote(json_search(`facebook_leads`.`raw_data`,'one','name',NULL,'$.field_data[*].name')),'.name','.values[0]'))),json_unquote(json_extract(`facebook_leads`.`raw_data`,replace(json_unquote(json_search(`facebook_leads`.`raw_data`,'one','parent\'s_name',NULL,'$.field_data[*].name')),'.name','.values[0]'))),json_unquote(json_extract(`facebook_leads`.`raw_data`,replace(json_unquote(json_search(`facebook_leads`.`raw_data`,'one','parent’s_name',NULL,'$.field_data[*].name')),'.name','.values[0]'))),json_unquote(json_extract(`facebook_leads`.`raw_data`,replace(json_unquote(json_search(`facebook_leads`.`raw_data`,'one','parents_name',NULL,'$.field_data[*].name')),'.name','.values[0]')))) AS `full_name` from `facebook_leads` where ((`facebook_leads`.`status` <> '1') and (`facebook_leads`.`inquiry_added` = '0')) order by `facebook_leads`.`created_at` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.facebook_leads
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `facebook_leads` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `type` int DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '(0-Leadgen,1-ctwa_clid,2-lp_clid)',
  `lead_gen_id` varchar(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `clid` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `ad_id` varchar(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `ad_name` varchar(250) NOT NULL,
  `platform` varchar(150) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '22-fb, 23-insta',
  `fullname` varchar(150) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `email` varchar(150) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `country_code` varchar(15) NOT NULL,
  `mobile` varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `city` varchar(150) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `comment` varchar(250) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `status` varchar(10) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '0 - No ,1 - Exist',
  `inquiry_added` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `doubleTick_message_sent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `conversion_api` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '(0-no,1-converted,2-Qualified,3-QualifiedLost,4-Lost)',
  `conversion_api_response` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `raw_data` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=61189 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `facebook_leads_view` AS select `fl`.`id` AS `id`,`c`.`id` AS `contact_id`,`i`.`id` AS `inquiry_id`,`i`.`bid` AS `bid`,`i`.`primary_heard_from` AS `primary_heard_from_id`,`phf`.`heard_from` AS `primary_heard_from`,(case when (`pcp`.`campaign_name` is not null) then `pcp`.`campaign_name` else 'Undefined' end) AS `primary_campaign_name`,`f`.`id` AS `f_id`,`f`.`park` AS `park`,ifnull(`m`.`status`,'Inquiry') AS `member_status`,if((`fl`.`fullname` = ''),concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`),`fl`.`fullname`) AS `fullname2`,concat(`cc`.`fname`,' ',`cc`.`lname`) AS `c_fullname`,`fl`.`lead_gen_id` AS `lead_gen_id`,`fl`.`ad_id` AS `ad_id`,`fl`.`ad_name` AS `ad_name_id`,`fl`.`platform` AS `platform_id`,`hf`.`heard_from` AS `ad_name`,`cp`.`campaign_name` AS `campaign_name`,`inqs`.`source` AS `platform`,`fl`.`email` AS `email`,`fl`.`country_code` AS `cc`,`fl`.`mobile` AS `contact`,`fl`.`city` AS `city`,`fl`.`comment` AS `comment`,`f`.`old_comment` AS `f_comment`,`fl`.`status` AS `status`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`fl`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`m`.`created_at` AS `mem_created_at`,date_format(`fl`.`created_at`,'%d %b %y \n %h:%i %p') AS `date_of_reinquiry`,date_format(`m`.`created_at`,'%d %b %y \n %h:%i %p') AS `date_of_conversion`,if(`m`.`id`,'Yes','No') AS `converted` from ((((((((((((`facebook_leads` `fl` left join `contact` `c` on(((`fl`.`mobile` = `c`.`mobile`) and (`fl`.`country_code` = `c`.`country_code`)))) left join `inquiry` `i` on((`c`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`i`.`c_employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) left join `member` `m` on((`c`.`id` = `m`.`contact_id`))) left join `contact` `cc` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `cc`.`id`))) left join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `i`.`bid`))) left join `heard_from` `hf` on((`fl`.`ad_name` = `hf`.`id`))) left join `campaign` `cp` on((`hf`.`campaign_id` = `cp`.`campaign_id`))) left join `inquiry_source` `inqs` on((`fl`.`platform` = `inqs`.`id`))) left join `latest_followup_table` `f` on(((`f`.`master_id` = `i`.`id`) and (`f`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`) and (`f`.`park` = '0')))) left join `heard_from` `phf` on((`i`.`primary_heard_from` = `phf`.`id`))) left join `campaign` `pcp` on((`phf`.`campaign_id` = `pcp`.`campaign_id`))) where (`i`.`park` = '0');

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.facebook_reinquiry_view_madhawk

CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `facebook_reinquiry_view_madhawk` AS select `fl`.`id` AS `id`,`c`.`id` AS `contact_id`,`i`.`id` AS `inquiry_id`,`i`.`bid` AS `bid`,`f`.`id` AS `f_id`,`f`.`park` AS `park`,ifnull(`m`.`status`,'Inquiry') AS `member_status`,if((`fl`.`fullname` = ''),concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`),`fl`.`fullname`) AS `fullname2`,concat(`cc`.`fname`,' ',`cc`.`lname`) AS `c_fullname`,`fl`.`lead_gen_id` AS `lead_gen_id`,`fl`.`ad_id` AS `ad_id`,`fl`.`ad_name` AS `ad_name_id`,`fl`.`platform` AS `platform_id`,`hf`.`heard_from` AS `ad_name`,`inqs`.`source` AS `platform`,`fl`.`email` AS `email`,`fl`.`country_code` AS `cc`,`fl`.`mobile` AS `contact`,`fl`.`city` AS `city`,`fl`.`comment` AS `comment`,`f`.`old_comment` AS `f_comment`,`fl`.`status` AS `status`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`fl`.`created_at` AS `created_at` from (((((((((`facebook_leads` `fl` left join `contact` `c` on(((`fl`.`mobile` = `c`.`mobile`) and (`fl`.`country_code` = `c`.`country_code`)))) left join `inquiry` `i` on((`c`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`i`.`c_employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) left join `member` `m` on((`c`.`id` = `m`.`contact_id`))) left join `contact` `cc` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `cc`.`id`))) left join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `i`.`bid`))) left join `heard_from` `hf` on((`fl`.`ad_name` = `hf`.`id`))) left join `inquiry_source` `inqs` on((`fl`.`platform` = `inqs`.`id`))) left join (select `f`.`id` AS `id`,`f`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`f`.`type` AS `type`,`f`.`master` AS `master`,`f`.`status` AS `status`,`f`.`interest` AS `interest`,`f`.`interest_string` AS `interest_string`,`f`.`comment` AS `comment`,`f2`.`comment` AS `old_comment`,`f`.`followup` AS `followup`,`f`.`reminder` AS `reminder`,`f`.`master_id` AS `master_id`,`f`.`unfollow` AS `unfollow`,`f`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`f`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`f`.`park` AS `park`,`f`.`bid` AS `bid` from (`followup` `f` left join `followup` `f2` on((`f`.`parent_id` = `f2`.`id`))) where (`f`.`id` in (select max(`followup`.`id`) from `followup` where (`followup`.`master` = '0') group by `followup`.`contact_id`,`followup`.`master`,`followup`.`master_id`) and (`f`.`master` = '0')) group by `f`.`id`) `f` on((`f`.`master_id` = `i`.`id`))) where ((`fl`.`status` = '1') and (`i`.`park` = '0')) order by `fl`.`status` desc;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.feedback
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `feedback` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `question` varchar(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'feedback question',
  `answer_type` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '(0-Textbox, 1-Stars, 2-Hearts, 3-Radio, 4-Select)',
  `rating` set('0','1','2') NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0- Normal, 1 - Trainer Rating, 2- Module Rating)',
  `threshold_value` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_3` (`park`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_4` (`park`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.feedback_log
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `feedback_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `module_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `submitted_on` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `module_id` (`module_id`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `contact_id_2` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `module_id_2` (`module_id`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `contact_id_3` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `module_id_3` (`module_id`),
  KEY `park_3` (`park`),
  KEY `contact_id_4` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `module_id_4` (`module_id`),
  KEY `park_4` (`park`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.feedback_log_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `feedback_log_view` AS select distinct `fl`.`id` AS `id`,`fl`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`fl`.`module_id` AS `module_id`,`fl`.`submitted_on` AS `submitted_on`,`fol`.`feedback_id` AS `feedback_id`,`f`.`question` AS `question`,`f`.`rating` AS `rating`,`f`.`threshold_value` AS `threshold_value`,`f`.`answer_type` AS `answer_type`,`fol`.`option_id` AS `option_id`,`fol`.`value` AS `value`,`mcv`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,`mv`.`module` AS `module`,`fl`.`park` AS `park`,`mcv`.`bid` AS `bid` from ((((`feedback_log` `fl` join `feedback_option_log` `fol` on((`fl`.`id` = `fol`.`feedback_log_id`))) join `member_contact_view` `mcv` on((`mcv`.`contact_id` = `fl`.`contact_id`))) join `module_view` `mv` on((`mv`.`id` = `fl`.`module_id`))) join `feedback` `f` on((`f`.`id` = `fol`.`feedback_id`)));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.feedback_option
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `feedback_option` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `feedback_id` int NOT NULL,
  `answer` varchar(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `tooltip` varchar(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `feedback_id` (`feedback_id`),
  KEY `feedback_id_2` (`feedback_id`),
  KEY `feedback_id_3` (`feedback_id`),
  KEY `feedback_id_4` (`feedback_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.feedback_option_log
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `feedback_option_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `feedback_log_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `feedback_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `option_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `value` varchar(1000) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `feedback_log_id` (`feedback_log_id`),
  KEY `feedback_id` (`feedback_id`),
  KEY `option_id` (`option_id`),
  KEY `feedback_log_id_2` (`feedback_log_id`),
  KEY `feedback_id_2` (`feedback_id`),
  KEY `option_id_2` (`option_id`),
  KEY `feedback_log_id_3` (`feedback_log_id`),
  KEY `feedback_id_3` (`feedback_id`),
  KEY `option_id_3` (`option_id`),
  KEY `feedback_log_id_4` (`feedback_log_id`),
  KEY `feedback_id_4` (`feedback_id`),
  KEY `option_id_4` (`option_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.feedback_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `feedback_view` AS select `f`.`id` AS `id`,`f`.`question` AS `question`,`f`.`answer_type` AS `answer_type`,`f`.`rating` AS `rating`,`f`.`bid` AS `bid`,`f`.`park` AS `park`,`f`.`threshold_value` AS `threshold_value`,`fo`.`id` AS `option_id`,`fo`.`answer` AS `answer`,`fo`.`tooltip` AS `tooltip` from (`feedback` `f` join `feedback_option` `fo` on((`f`.`id` = `fo`.`feedback_id`)));

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.followup
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `followup` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `type` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Follow Up Type (0-Visit, 1-Call, 2-SMS, 3-Email)',
  `comment` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Narration',
  `followup` datetime NOT NULL COMMENT 'When followup is done',
  `reminder` datetime NOT NULL COMMENT 'When followup should be done',
  `master` int NOT NULL COMMENT ' Follow Up master type (0-Inquiry, 1-Balance, 2-Expiry, 3-Attendance,4-Birthday,5-Free Trial), 6- teacher Followup, 7- Franchisee Followup',
  `master_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Follow Up Master Id (inquiry_id / payment_id / order_item_id / attendance_id), Followup Teacher Applicant_id, Followup Franchisee_id',
  `status` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Status (0-Lead, 1-Prospect, 2-Pending, 3-Closed, 4-Lost, 5-Reopen, 6-Dropout)',
  `franchisee_fee` text NOT NULL COMMENT 'for franchisee followup',
  `royalty` text NOT NULL COMMENT 'for franchisee followup',
  `royalty_online` float NOT NULL,
  `royalty_offline` float NOT NULL,
  `term` float NOT NULL,
  `authorized_representatives` int NOT NULL,
  `agreement` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `right_to_refusal` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `km` float NOT NULL COMMENT 'for franchisee followup',
  `interest` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-Warm, 1-Hot, 2-Cold, 3-Dead',
  `interest_string` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `sub_interest_string` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `lost_reason` text NOT NULL,
  `source` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `heard_from` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `preferences` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `slot` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `area` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `country` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `city` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `venue_id` int NOT NULL,
  `pincode` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `call_rec` text NOT NULL,
  `call_duration` varchar(250) NOT NULL,
  `unfollow` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-No, 1-Yes',
  `employee_id` int NOT NULL,
  `parent_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `inq_noti_id` int NOT NULL,
  `calendar_flag` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `master_id` (`master_id`),
  KEY `employee_id` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `parent_id` (`parent_id`),
  KEY `inq_noti_id` (`inq_noti_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `reminder` (`reminder`),
  KEY `master` (`master`),
  KEY `unfollow` (`unfollow`),
  KEY `folllowup_venue_id` (`venue_id`),
  KEY `idx_followup_subquery` (`park`,`contact_id`,`master`,`master_id`,`id`),
  KEY `idx_followup_contact_park_created` (`contact_id`,`park`,`created_at` DESC,`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=590245 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.followup_emp_setting_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `followup_emp_setting_view` AS select `fes`.`id` AS `id`,`fes`.`master` AS `master`,`cvl`.`label` AS `master_value`,`fes`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`ecv`.`ecode` AS `ecode`,`ecv`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,`fes`.`priority` AS `priority`,`fes`.`bid` AS `bid`,`fes`.`park` AS `park` from ((`followup_emp_setting` `fes` join `pf_central`.`column_value_label` `cvl` on(((`fes`.`master` = `cvl`.`value`) and (`cvl`.`view_name` = 'contact_followup_view') and (`cvl`.`name` = 'master')))) join `emp_cont_view` `ecv` on((`fes`.`employee_id` = `ecv`.`id`)));

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.followup_invalid_date
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `followup_invalid_date` AS select `latest_followup_table`.`id` AS `id`,`latest_followup_table`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`latest_followup_table`.`temporary_column` AS `temporary_column`,`latest_followup_table`.`type` AS `type`,`latest_followup_table`.`master` AS `master`,`latest_followup_table`.`status` AS `status`,`latest_followup_table`.`interest` AS `interest`,`latest_followup_table`.`preferences` AS `preferences`,`latest_followup_table`.`slot` AS `slot`,`latest_followup_table`.`country` AS `country`,`latest_followup_table`.`area` AS `area`,`latest_followup_table`.`city` AS `city`,`latest_followup_table`.`venue` AS `venue`,`latest_followup_table`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`latest_followup_table`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`latest_followup_table`.`comment` AS `comment`,`latest_followup_table`.`old_comment` AS `old_comment`,`latest_followup_table`.`old_comment_date` AS `old_comment_date`,`latest_followup_table`.`followup` AS `followup`,`latest_followup_table`.`employee` AS `employee`,`latest_followup_table`.`date` AS `date`,`latest_followup_table`.`reminder_string` AS `reminder_string`,`latest_followup_table`.`followup_string` AS `followup_string`,`latest_followup_table`.`reminder` AS `reminder`,`latest_followup_table`.`master_id` AS `master_id`,`latest_followup_table`.`unfollow` AS `unfollow`,`latest_followup_table`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`latest_followup_table`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`latest_followup_table`.`park` AS `park`,`latest_followup_table`.`bid` AS `bid`,`latest_followup_table`.`interest_string` AS `interest_string`,`latest_followup_table`.`sub_interest_string` AS `sub_interest_string`,`latest_followup_table`.`lost_reason` AS `lost_reason`,`latest_followup_table`.`heard_from_id` AS `heard_from_id`,`latest_followup_table`.`source_id` AS `source_id`,`latest_followup_table`.`recommended_batch` AS `recommended_batch`,`latest_followup_table`.`last_updated` AS `last_updated`,`latest_followup_table`.`source` AS `source`,`latest_followup_table`.`heard_from` AS `heard_from`,`latest_followup_table`.`fname` AS `fname`,`latest_followup_table`.`mname` AS `mname`,`latest_followup_table`.`email` AS `email`,`latest_followup_table`.`lname` AS `lname`,`latest_followup_table`.`dob` AS `dob`,`latest_followup_table`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`latest_followup_table`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`latest_followup_table`.`dob_string` AS `dob_string`,`latest_followup_table`.`age` AS `age`,`latest_followup_table`.`age_group` AS `age_group`,`latest_followup_table`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,`latest_followup_table`.`master_data` AS `master_data`,`latest_followup_table`.`contact_modified_at` AS `contact_modified_at`,`latest_followup_table`.`followup_modified_at` AS `followup_modified_at`,`latest_followup_table`.`inquiry_modified_at` AS `inquiry_modified_at` from `latest_followup_table` where ((`latest_followup_table`.`followup` = '0000-00-00 00:00:00') and `latest_followup_table`.`id` in (select `followup`.`id` from `followup` where ((`followup`.`reminder` = '0000-00-00 00:00:00') and (`followup`.`parent_id` <> 0) and (`followup`.`master` = 0) and (`followup`.`unfollow` = 0) and (`followup`.`created_at` >= '2025-01-01')) order by `followup`.`id` desc) and (`latest_followup_table`.`interest` in (0,1)) and (`latest_followup_table`.`park` = 0) and (`latest_followup_table`.`bid` <> 35) and (not((`latest_followup_table`.`interest_string` like 'cold')))) order by `latest_followup_table`.`id` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.followup_log_new_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `followup_log_new_view` AS select `f`.`id` AS `id`,`f`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`f`.`type` AS `type`,`f`.`master` AS `master`,`f`.`status` AS `status`,`f`.`interest` AS `interest`,(case when (`i`.`converted` = 0) then 'Lead' when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 'Converted' else '' end) AS `inquiry_status`,(select `followup`.`interest_string` from `followup` where (`followup`.`id` = (select max(`followup`.`id`) from `followup` where (`followup`.`contact_id` = `f`.`contact_id`)))) AS `interest_string`,`f`.`preferences` AS `preferences`,`f`.`slot` AS `slot`,(select concat(`followup`.`comment`,' | ',convert(date_format(`followup`.`followup`,'%d %b  %y') using utf8mb3)) from `followup` where ((`followup`.`contact_id` = `f`.`contact_id`) and (`followup`.`comment` <> '')) order by `followup`.`id` desc limit 1) AS `comment1`,(select concat(`followup`.`comment`,' | ',convert(date_format(`followup`.`followup`,'%d %b  %y') using utf8mb3)) from `followup` where (`followup`.`contact_id` = `f`.`contact_id`) order by `followup`.`id` desc limit 2,1) AS `comment2`,(select concat(`followup`.`comment`,' | ',convert(date_format(`followup`.`followup`,'%d %b  %y') using utf8mb3)) from `followup` where (`followup`.`contact_id` = `f`.`contact_id`) order by `followup`.`id` desc limit 3,1) AS `comment3`,(select concat(`followup`.`comment`,' | ',convert(date_format(`followup`.`followup`,'%d %b  %y') using utf8mb3)) from `followup` where (`followup`.`contact_id` = `f`.`contact_id`) order by `followup`.`id` desc limit 4,1) AS `comment4`,`f`.`area` AS `area`,`f`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`f`.`followup` AS `followup`,`i`.`source` AS `source`,`i`.`heard_from` AS `heard_from`,concat(`ce`.`fname`,' ',`ce`.`lname`) AS `employee`,cast(`f`.`followup` as date) AS `date`,date_format(`f`.`reminder`,'%d %b  %y %k:%i') AS `reminder_string`,date_format(`i`.`doi`,'%d %b  %y') AS `doi`,`f`.`reminder` AS `reminder`,`f`.`master_id` AS `master_id`,`f`.`unfollow` AS `unfollow`,`f`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`i`.`c_employee_id` AS `c_employee_id`,(select concat(`cc`.`fname`,' ',`cc`.`lname`) from `contact` `cc` where (`cc`.`id` = (select `emp`.`contact_id` from `employee` `emp` where (`emp`.`id` = `i`.`c_employee_id`)))) AS `c_emp_name`,`f`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`f`.`park` AS `park`,`f`.`bid` AS `bid`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `name`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,(case when (`c`.`dob` <> '0000-00-00') then convert(date_format(`c`.`dob`,'%d %b %y') using utf8mb3) else ' - ' end) AS `dob_string`,(case when (`c`.`dob` <> '0000-00-00') then concat(floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)),'y',(timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) % 12),'m') else '0' end) AS `age` from ((((`followup` `f` join `contact` `c` on((`f`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) join `employee` `e` on((`f`.`employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) join `contact` `ce` on((`ce`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) left join `inquiry` `i` on((`f`.`contact_id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) group by `f`.`contact_id`;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.food_log
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `food_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,

  `date` date NOT NULL,

  `weight` varchar(50) NOT NULL COMMENT ' Unit of Measure',
  `calories` varchar(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Total calories',
  `carbs` varchar(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Percentage of carbs',
  `protein` varchar(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Percentage of protein',
  `fat` varchar(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Percentage of fat',
  `fibre` varchar(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Percentage of fibre',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `meal_id` (`meal_id`),
  KEY `food_id` (`food_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `contact_id_2` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `meal_id_2` (`meal_id`),
  KEY `food_id_2` (`food_id`),

  KEY `form_id_2` (`form_id`),
  KEY `form_id_3` (`form_id`),
  KEY `form_id_4` (`form_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=35 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.form_relation_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `form_relation_view` AS select `fr`.`id` AS `id`,`fr`.`assignment_name` AS `assignment_name`,`fr`.`report_id` AS `report_id`,`fr`.`training_id` AS `training_id`,`fr`.`training_position` AS `training_position`,`fr`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`fr`.`assignment_no` AS `assignment_no`,`fr`.`type` AS `type`,`fr`.`form_id` AS `form_id`,(case when (`fr`.`type` = 0) then `fr`.`training_id` when (`fr`.`type` = 1) then `fr`.`report_id` when (`fr`.`type` = 2) then `fr`.`form_id` else '' end) AS `number`,`fr`.`park` AS `park`,`fr`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`fr`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`fr`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`fr`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from `form_relation` `fr` where (`fr`.`park` = 0) order by `fr`.`id` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.form_training_time
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `form_training_time` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `training_no` int NOT NULL,
  `start_date` datetime NOT NULL,
  `end_date` datetime NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `created_by` varchar(2500) NOT NULL,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=817 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.form_training_time_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `form_training_time_view` AS select `ftt`.`id` AS `id`,`ftt`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`ftt`.`training_no` AS `training_no`,`ftt`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`ftt`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,`tf`.`date_time` AS `submit_date`,`ftt`.`park` AS `park`,`ftt`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`ftt`.`created_by` AS `created_by` from (`form_training_time` `ftt` left join `trainee_form` `tf` on(((`ftt`.`contact_id` = `tf`.`contact_id`) and (`ftt`.`training_no` = `tf`.`training_no`))));

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.fran_acc_prev_month_combine_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `fran_acc_prev_month_combine_view` AS select `on`.`id` AS `id`,`off`.`id` AS `offline_id`,(case when ((`on`.`total_sale` + `off`.`total_sale`) is not null) then (`on`.`total_sale` + `off`.`total_sale`) else `on`.`total_sale` end) AS `total_sale`,`on`.`branch` AS `branch`,`on`.`branch_name` AS `branch_name`,`on`.`invoice_ids` AS `invoice_ids`,`on`.`month` AS `month`,(case when ((`on`.`royalty` + `off`.`royalty`) is not null) then (`on`.`royalty` + `off`.`royalty`) else `on`.`royalty` end) AS `royalty`,(case when ((`on`.`prev_month_revenue` + `off`.`prev_month_revenue`) is not null) then (`on`.`prev_month_revenue` + `off`.`prev_month_revenue`) else `on`.`prev_month_revenue` end) AS `prev_month_revenue`,(case when ((`on`.`tds` + `off`.`tds`) is not null) then (`on`.`tds` + `off`.`tds`) else `on`.`tds` end) AS `tds`,`on`.`zoom` AS `zoom`,(case when (`on`.`zoom` is null) then (`off`.`payable` - `off`.`zoom`) else (case when ((`on`.`payable` + `off`.`payable`) is not null) then (`on`.`payable` + `off`.`payable`) else `off`.`payable` end) end) AS `payable` from (`fran_acc_prev_month_view1` `on` left join `fran_acc_prev_month_view1_offline` `off` on((`on`.`branch` = `off`.`branch`))) group by `on`.`id` union select `on`.`id` AS `online_id`,`off`.`id` AS `offline_id`,(case when ((`on`.`total_sale` + `off`.`total_sale`) is not null) then (`on`.`total_sale` + `off`.`total_sale`) else `off`.`total_sale` end) AS `total_sale`,`off`.`branch` AS `branch`,`off`.`branch_name` AS `branch_name`,`on`.`invoice_ids` AS `invoice_ids`,`off`.`month` AS `month`,(case when ((`on`.`royalty` + `off`.`royalty`) is not null) then (`on`.`royalty` + `off`.`royalty`) else `off`.`royalty` end) AS `royalty`,(case when ((`on`.`prev_month_revenue` + `off`.`prev_month_revenue`) is not null) then (`on`.`prev_month_revenue` + `off`.`prev_month_revenue`) else `off`.`prev_month_revenue` end) AS `prev_month_revenue`,(case when ((`on`.`tds` + `off`.`tds`) is not null) then (`on`.`tds` + `off`.`tds`) else `off`.`tds` end) AS `tds`,(case when (`on`.`zoom` is null) then `off`.`zoom` else `on`.`zoom` end) AS `zoom`,(case when (`on`.`zoom` is null) then (`off`.`payable` - `off`.`zoom`) else (case when ((`on`.`payable` + `off`.`payable`) is not null) then (`on`.`payable` + `off`.`payable`) else `off`.`payable` end) end) AS `payable` from (`fran_acc_prev_month_view1_offline` `off` left join `fran_acc_prev_month_view1` `on` on((`on`.`branch` = `off`.`branch`))) group by `off`.`id`;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.fran_acc_prev_month_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `fran_acc_prev_month_view` AS select `b`.`id` AS `id`,`b`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name_actual`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,cast(`prev_month`.`prev_month_amount` as signed) AS `prev_month_amount`,cast(((`prev_month`.`prev_month_amount` * `b`.`royalty`) / 100) as signed) AS `prev_month_royalty`,cast((`prev_month`.`prev_month_amount` - ((`prev_month`.`prev_month_amount` * `b`.`royalty`) / 100)) as signed) AS `prev_month_revenue`,cast((((`prev_month`.`prev_month_amount` - ((`prev_month`.`prev_month_amount` * `b`.`royalty`) / 100)) * `b`.`tds`) / 100) as signed) AS `tds`,`b`.`zoom` AS `zoom`,cast((((`prev_month`.`prev_month_amount` - ((`prev_month`.`prev_month_amount` * `b`.`royalty`) / 100)) - (((`prev_month`.`prev_month_amount` - ((`prev_month`.`prev_month_amount` * `b`.`royalty`) / 100)) * `b`.`tds`) / 100)) - `b`.`zoom`) as signed) AS `payable` from ((`payment` `p` left join `branch` `b` on((`p`.`bid` = `b`.`id`))) left join (select `payment`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`payment`.`bid` AS `bid`,sum(`payment`.`actual_amount`) AS `prev_month_amount` from `payment` where ((`payment`.`created_at` >= concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 1),'-01')) and (`payment`.`created_at` <= concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 1),'-31')) and (`payment`.`park` = 0)) group by `payment`.`bid`) `prev_month` on((`prev_month`.`bid` = `b`.`id`))) where (`b`.`type` = 'Franchisee') group by `b`.`id`;
