--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.franc_package
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `franc_package` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `service` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `branch` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `branch_name_actual` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `1_month` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `3_months` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `6_months` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `12_months` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `PB_1_month` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `PB_3_months` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `PB_6_months` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `PB_12_months` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `unusual_package` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=33 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.franchise_im_invoice_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `franchise_im_invoice_view` AS select `fi`.`id` AS `id`,`fi`.`invoice` AS `invoice`,`fi`.`owner_name_id` AS `owner_name_id`,`b`.`id` AS `bid`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`branch_invoice_name` AS `branch_invoice_name`,`c`.`currency` AS `currency`,`b`.`invoice_address` AS `address`,`b`.`invoice_pin_code` AS `pincode`,`b`.`pan_number` AS `pan_number`,`b`.`unregistered` AS `unregistered`,`b`.`email` AS `email`,`b`.`cc_email` AS `cc_email`,(case when (`fi`.`id` <> 0) then concat(`b`.`branch`,' - ',`fi`.`id`) else '' end) AS `invoice_number`,`fi`.`month_year` AS `month_year`,`fi`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`fi`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,`fi`.`invoice_date` AS `invoice_date`,`fi`.`tr_share` AS `tr_share`,`fi`.`franchisee_share` AS `franchisee_share`,`fi`.`tds` AS `tds`,`fi`.`zoom` AS `zoom`,`fi`.`other` AS `other`,`fi`.`pert_1` AS `pert_1`,`fi`.`pert_2` AS `pert_2`,`fi`.`pert_3` AS `pert_3`,`fi`.`pert_4` AS `pert_4`,`fi`.`pert_5` AS `pert_5`,`fi`.`pert_6` AS `pert_6`,`fi`.`pert_7` AS `pert_7`,`fi`.`pert_8` AS `pert_8`,`fi`.`pert_9` AS `pert_9`,`fi`.`pert_10` AS `pert_10`,`fi`.`pert_value_1` AS `pert_value_1`,`fi`.`pert_value_2` AS `pert_value_2`,`fi`.`pert_value_3` AS `pert_value_3`,`fi`.`pert_value_4` AS `pert_value_4`,`fi`.`pert_value_5` AS `pert_value_5`,`fi`.`pert_value_6` AS `pert_value_6`,`fi`.`pert_value_7` AS `pert_value_7`,`fi`.`pert_value_8` AS `pert_value_8`,`fi`.`pert_value_9` AS `pert_value_9`,`fi`.`pert_value_10` AS `pert_value_10`,`fi`.`other_items` AS `other_items`,`fi`.`grant_total` AS `grant_total`,`fi`.`email_sent` AS `email_sent`,`fi`.`document` AS `document`,`fi`.`park` AS `park`,`fi`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`fi`.`created_at` AS `created_at` from ((`franchise_im_invoice` `fi` join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`branch` = `fi`.`branch`))) join `currency` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `b`.`primary_currency`)));

  `pert_value_2` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `pert_value_3` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `pert_value_4` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `pert_value_5` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `pert_value_6` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `pert_value_7` varchar(50) NOT NULL,

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.franchise_invoice_sub
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `franchise_invoice_sub` (
  `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `parent_invoice_id` int unsigned NOT NULL,
  `invoice` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `branch` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `owner_name_id` int unsigned NOT NULL,
  `month_year` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `start_date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `end_date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `invoice_date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `total_sale` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `royality` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `cgst` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `sgst` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `igst` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `calculated_igst` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `item_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `item_hsn` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `item_cgst_rate` decimal(8,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `item_sgst_rate` decimal(8,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `item_igst_rate` decimal(8,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `item_gst_amount` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `other_items` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `sales_invoice_payload` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `sales_invoice_id` int unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `sales_invoice_no` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `sales_invoice_status` varchar(30) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `sales_invoice_message` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `sales_invoice_created_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `grant_total` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `proforma` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_parent_invoice_id` (`parent_invoice_id`),
  KEY `idx_owner_name_id` (`owner_name_id`),
  KEY `idx_invoice_date` (`invoice_date`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=39 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.franchise_invoice_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `franchise_invoice_view` AS select `fi`.`id` AS `id`,`fi`.`invoice` AS `invoice`,`fi`.`owner_name_id` AS `owner_name_id`,`b`.`id` AS `bid`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`bom`.`owner_name` AS `branch_invoice_name`,`c`.`currency` AS `currency`,`b`.`invoice_address` AS `address`,`b`.`invoice_pin_code` AS `pin_code`,`b`.`pan_number` AS `pan_number`,`b`.`unregistered` AS `unregistered`,`b`.`email` AS `email`,`b`.`cc_email` AS `cc_email`,(case when (`fi`.`id` <> 0) then concat(`b`.`branch`,' - ',`fi`.`id`) else '' end) AS `invoice_number`,`fi`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`fi`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,`fi`.`invoice_date` AS `invoice_date`,`fi`.`month_year` AS `month_year`,`fi`.`total_sale` AS `total_sale`,`fi`.`royality` AS `royality`,`fi`.`cgst` AS `cgst`,`fi`.`sgst` AS `sgst`,`fi`.`igst` AS `igst`,`fi`.`calculated_igst` AS `calculated_igst`,`fi`.`other` AS `other`,`fi`.`pert_1` AS `pert_1`,`fi`.`pert_2` AS `pert_2`,`fi`.`pert_3` AS `pert_3`,`fi`.`pert_4` AS `pert_4`,`fi`.`pert_5` AS `pert_5`,`fi`.`pert_6` AS `pert_6`,`fi`.`pert_7` AS `pert_7`,`fi`.`pert_8` AS `pert_8`,`fi`.`pert_9` AS `pert_9`,`fi`.`pert_10` AS `pert_10`,`fi`.`pert_value_1` AS `pert_value_1`,`fi`.`pert_value_2` AS `pert_value_2`,`fi`.`pert_value_3` AS `pert_value_3`,`fi`.`pert_value_4` AS `pert_value_4`,`fi`.`pert_value_5` AS `pert_value_5`,`fi`.`pert_value_6` AS `pert_value_6`,`fi`.`pert_value_7` AS `pert_value_7`,`fi`.`pert_value_8` AS `pert_value_8`,`fi`.`pert_value_9` AS `pert_value_9`,`fi`.`pert_value_10` AS `pert_value_10`,`fi`.`other_items` AS `other_items`,`fi`.`document` AS `document`,`fi`.`grant_total` AS `grant_total`,`fi`.`email_sent` AS `email_sent`,`fi`.`transaction_id` AS `transaction_id`,`fi`.`payment` AS `payment`,(`fi`.`grant_total` - `fi`.`payment`) AS `balance_payment`,`fi`.`date` AS `date`,`fi`.`park` AS `park`,`fi`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`fi`.`created_at` AS `created_at` from (((`franchise_invoice` `fi` join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`branch` = `fi`.`branch`))) join `currency` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `b`.`primary_currency`))) join `branch_owner_master` `bom` on((`fi`.`owner_name_id` = `bom`.`id`)));

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.franchisee_calculations
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `franchisee_calculations` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `parent_id` int NOT NULL,
  `rental` int NOT NULL,
  `main_teacher` int NOT NULL,
  `associate_teacher` int NOT NULL,
  `revenue_per_child_per_hour` int NOT NULL,
  `kids_per_hour` int NOT NULL,
  `royalty_percent` decimal(10,0) NOT NULL,
  `royalty_online` float NOT NULL,
  `royalty_offline` float NOT NULL,
  `term` float NOT NULL,
  `radius` int NOT NULL,
  `area` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `authorized_representatives` int NOT NULL,
  `agreement` varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `franchisee_fees` int NOT NULL,
  `numberofkidsYear1` int NOT NULL,
  `numberofkidsYear2` int NOT NULL,
  `numberofkidsYear3` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=89 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci;

CREATE TABLE `franchisee_form_response` (

  `type` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '1- Franchisee Association ,  2 - PresSchool/Venue Association  ',

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.franchisee_form_response_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `franchisee_form_response_view` AS select `ffr`.`id` AS `id`,(((`ffr`.`id` + 10) * 7) - 50) AS `enc_id`,`ffr`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`f`.`id` AS `f_id`,(case when (`c`.`contact_group_id` = 1) then 'Inquiry' when (`c`.`contact_group_id` = 2) then 'Employee' when (`c`.`contact_group_id` = 4) then 'Member' when (`c`.`contact_group_id` = 5) then 'Applicant' when (`c`.`contact_group_id` = 6) then 'Vendor' when (`c`.`contact_group_id` = 8) then 'Franchisee' end) AS `contact_group_name`,`ffr`.`name` AS `name`,`ffr`.`email` AS `email`,`ffr`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`ffr`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`ffr`.`type` AS `type`,(case when (`ffr`.`type` = 1) then 'Franchisee Association' when (`ffr`.`type` = 2) then 'Preschool/Venue Associate' end) AS `type_description`,`ffr`.`school_name` AS `school_name`,`ffr`.`association_type` AS `association_type`,`ffr`.`social_link` AS `social_link`,concat(`ffr`.`country_code`,`ffr`.`mobile`) AS `contact_number`,`ffr`.`heard_about_tickle_right` AS `heard_about_tickle_right`,`ffr`.`future_in_adding_centres` AS `future_in_adding_centres`,(case when (`ffr`.`future_in_adding_centres` = 1) then 'Yes' when (`ffr`.`future_in_adding_centres` = 0) then 'No' else NULL end) AS `future_in_adding_centres_name`,`ffr`.`why_tickle_right` AS `why_tickle_right`,`ffr`.`expected_student_count` AS `expected_student_count`,`ffr`.`opening_centre_date` AS `opening_centre_date`,date_format(`ffr`.`opening_centre_date`,'%M %e, %Y') AS `opening_centre_date_string`,`ffr`.`city_center_name` AS `city_center_name`,`ffr`.`area_center_name` AS `area_center_name`,`ffr`.`annual_income_info` AS `annual_income_info`,`ffr`.`franchisee_type` AS `franchisee_type`,`f`.`agreement` AS `agreement`,(case when (`ffr`.`franchisee_type` = 1) then 'International' when (`ffr`.`franchisee_type` = 0) then 'Domestic' else NULL end) AS `franchisee_type_name`,`ffr`.`slot_date` AS `slot_date`,`ffr`.`slot_time` AS `slot_time`,concat(date_format(`ffr`.`slot_date`,'%D %M %Y'),' at ',date_format(`ffr`.`slot_time`,'%h:%i %p')) AS `slot_string`,`bom`.`franchisee_start_date` AS `franchisee_start_date`,`ffr`.`agreement_document` AS `agreement_document`,`ffr`.`financial_discussion_done` AS `financial_discussion_done`,`ffr`.`park` AS `park`,`ffr`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,date_format(`ffr`.`created_at`,'%M %e, %Y') AS `created_at_string`,`ffr`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from ((((`franchisee_form_response` `ffr` left join `contact` `c` on((`ffr`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join (select `followup`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,max(`followup`.`created_at`) AS `latest_followup_date` from `followup` where (`followup`.`master` = 7) group by `followup`.`contact_id`) `latest_f` on((`ffr`.`contact_id` = `latest_f`.`contact_id`))) left join `followup` `f` on(((`latest_f`.`contact_id` = `f`.`contact_id`) and (`latest_f`.`latest_followup_date` = `f`.`created_at`)))) left join `branch_owner_master` `bom` on((`ffr`.`contact_id` = `bom`.`contact_id`))) where (`f`.`park` = 0) group by `ffr`.`id`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.franchisee_package_list_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `franchisee_package_list_view` AS select `s`.`id` AS `id`,`b`.`id` AS `batch_id`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name_actual`,`s`.`service` AS `service`,`s`.`duration` AS `duration`,`s`.`duration_type` AS `duration_type`,concat(`s`.`sessions`,' sessions') AS `sessions`,(case when (concat(`s`.`duration`,' ',`s`.`duration_type`) = '1 M') then concat('₹',`s`.`amount`) else '-' end) AS `1_month`,(case when (concat(`s`.`duration`,' ',`s`.`duration_type`) = '3 M') then concat('₹',`s`.`amount`) else '-' end) AS `3_months`,(case when (concat(`s`.`duration`,' ',`s`.`duration_type`) = '6 M') then concat('₹',`s`.`amount`) else '-' end) AS `6_months`,(case when ((concat(`s`.`duration`,' ',`s`.`duration_type`) = '12 M') or (concat(`s`.`duration`,' ',`s`.`duration_type`) = '1 Y')) then concat('₹',`s`.`amount`) else '-' end) AS `12_months`,(case when (((case when (concat(`s`.`duration`,' ',`s`.`duration_type`) = '1 M') then concat('₹',`s`.`amount`) else '-' end) = '-') and ((case when (concat(`s`.`duration`,' ',`s`.`duration_type`) = '3 M') then concat('₹',`s`.`amount`) else '-' end) = '-') and ((case when (concat(`s`.`duration`,' ',`s`.`duration_type`) = '6 M') then concat('₹',`s`.`amount`) else '-' end) = '-') and ((case when ((concat(`s`.`duration`,' ',`s`.`duration_type`) = '12 M') or (concat(`s`.`duration`,' ',`s`.`duration_type`) = '1 Y')) then concat('₹',`s`.`amount`) else '-' end) = '-')) then concat('₹',`s`.`amount`) else '-' end) AS `unusual_package` from (`branch` `b` left join `service` `s` on((`b`.`id` = `s`.`bid`))) where ((`b`.`park` = 0) and (`s`.`park` = 0) and (`b`.`type` = 'Franchisee')) order by `b`.`branch`;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.google_converted_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `google_converted_view` AS select `gl`.`id` AS `id`,`c`.`id` AS `contact_id`,`i`.`id` AS `inquiry_id`,`i`.`bid` AS `bid`,`f`.`id` AS `f_id`,`f`.`park` AS `park`,ifnull(`m`.`status`,'Inquiry') AS `member_status`,if((`gl`.`fullname` = ''),convert(concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) using utf8mb4),`gl`.`fullname`) AS `fullname2`,concat(`cc`.`fname`,' ',`cc`.`lname`) AS `c_fullname`,`gl`.`type` AS `type`,`gl`.`lead_gen_id` AS `lead_gen_id`,`gl`.`clid` AS `clid`,`gl`.`gclid` AS `gclid`,`gl`.`gbraid` AS `gbraid`,`gl`.`wbraid` AS `wbraid`,`gl`.`ad_id` AS `ad_id`,`gl`.`heard_from_id` AS `ad_name_id`,`gl`.`platform` AS `platform_id`,`hf`.`heard_from` AS `ad_name`,`gl`.`platform` AS `platform`,`gl`.`email` AS `email`,concat(`gl`.`country_code`,`gl`.`mobile`) AS `mobile`,`gl`.`city` AS `city`,`gl`.`comment` AS `comment`,`f`.`old_comment` AS `f_comment`,`gl`.`status` AS `status`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`gl`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`m`.`created_at` AS `mem_created_at`,date_format(`gl`.`created_at`,'%d %b %y \n %h:%i %p') AS `date_of_reinquiry`,date_format(`m`.`created_at`,'%d %b %y \n %h:%i %p') AS `date_of_conversion`,if(`m`.`id`,'Yes','No') AS `converted`,`inv`.`amount` AS `invoice_amount`,`inv`.`date` AS `invoice_date`,`inv`.`total` AS `invoice_total`,`ii`.`currency` AS `invoice_currency`,`gl`.`conversion_status` AS `conversion_status` from (((((((((((`google_leads` `gl` join `contact` `c` on(((`gl`.`mobile` = `c`.`mobile`) and (`gl`.`country_code` = `c`.`country_code`)))) join `inquiry` `i` on((`c`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`i`.`c_employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) join `member` `m` on((`c`.`id` = `m`.`contact_id`))) left join `contact` `cc` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `cc`.`id`))) left join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `i`.`bid`))) left join `heard_from` `hf` on((`gl`.`heard_from_id` = `hf`.`id`))) left join `latest_followup_table` `f` on(((`f`.`master_id` = `i`.`id`) and (`f`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`) and (`f`.`park` = '0')))) left join `invoice` `inv` on(((`i`.`contact_id` = `inv`.`contact_id`) and (`inv`.`park` = 0) and (`inv`.`invoice_count` < 2) and (`inv`.`balance` = 0)))) left join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`inv`.`id` = `ii`.`invoice_id`))) join (select `gl2`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`gl2`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`m2`.`id` AS `member_id`,max(`gl2`.`created_at`) AS `chosen_created_at` from ((`google_leads` `gl2` join `contact` `c2` on(((`gl2`.`mobile` = `c2`.`mobile`) and (`gl2`.`country_code` = `c2`.`country_code`)))) join `member` `m2` on((`c2`.`id` = `m2`.`contact_id`))) where (`gl2`.`created_at` <= `m2`.`created_at`) group by `gl2`.`mobile`,`gl2`.`country_code`,`m2`.`id`) `chosen` on(((`gl`.`mobile` = `chosen`.`mobile`) and (`gl`.`country_code` = `chosen`.`country_code`) and (`m`.`id` = `chosen`.`member_id`) and (`gl`.`created_at` = `chosen`.`chosen_created_at`)))) where ((`i`.`park` = '0') and (`m`.`id` is not null)) order by `gl`.`status` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.google_leads
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `google_leads` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `type` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '0-LeadGen, 1-LandingPage, 2-CTWA, 3-CallTracking',
  `lead_gen_id` varchar(200) DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Google Lead Gen webhook ID',
  `clid` text COMMENT 'Click ID for CTWA leads',
  `inquiry_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `contact_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `fullname` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `mobile` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  `country_code` varchar(10) DEFAULT NULL,
  `whatsapp_number` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'for CTWA leads',
  `email` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `city` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `gclid` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `gbraid` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `wbraid` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `campaign_id` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `campaign_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `adgroup_id` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `adgroup_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `ad_id` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `ad_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `keyword` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `matchtype` varchar(10) DEFAULT NULL,
  `network` varchar(10) DEFAULT NULL,
  `device` varchar(10) DEFAULT NULL,
  `platform` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'search, display, pmax, etc.',
  `heard_from_id` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'FK to heard_from.id',
  `utm` text,
  `source_url` text,
  `comment` text,
  `raw_data` longtext,
  `conversion_action` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'conversion action ID used',
  `conversion_status` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0=pending, 1=purchase, 2=qualified, 3=qualified_lost, 4=lost',
  `conversion_response` text,
  `cron_id` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'reference to inquiry_cron.id',
  `inquiry_added` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `doubleTick_message_sent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `status` varchar(20) DEFAULT '' COMMENT '0-new, 1-existing contact',
  `park` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_gclid` (`gclid`),
  KEY `idx_gbraid` (`gbraid`),
  KEY `idx_mobile` (`mobile`),
  KEY `idx_inquiry_id` (`inquiry_id`),
  KEY `idx_contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `idx_cron_id` (`cron_id`),
  KEY `idx_conversion_status` (`conversion_status`),
  KEY `idx_heard_from_id` (`heard_from_id`),
  KEY `idx_ad_id` (`ad_id`),
  KEY `idx_lead_gen_id` (`lead_gen_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=766 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.heard_from
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `heard_from` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `platform` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0=Meta, 1=Google',
  `ad_id` varchar(300) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `heard_from` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci COMMENT 'Ad Name',
  `campaign_id` varchar(225) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `adset_id` text,
  `cost` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `cost_type` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `total_cost` double DEFAULT '0',
  `start_date` date NOT NULL,
  `end_date` date NOT NULL,
  `link_flag` int NOT NULL,
  `textComments` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `generated_link` varchar(550) NOT NULL,
  `campaign_ended` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_hf_campaign` (`campaign_id`),
  KEY `idx_hf_ad_id` (`ad_id`),
  KEY `idx_hf_campaign_pk` (`campaign_id`,`park`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=1667 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

CREATE TABLE `heard_from_adcost` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `ad_id` varchar(300) NOT NULL,
  `spend` float NOT NULL,
  `impressions` int NOT NULL,
  `reach` int NOT NULL,
  `clicks` int NOT NULL,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL,
  `no_data` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'No data returned from API for ad_id\r\n1- no data,\r\n2- raw data updated',
  `raw` json NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_ad_date` (`ad_id`,`date`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=71405 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.heard_from_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `heard_from_view` AS select `hf`.`id` AS `id`,`hf`.`heard_from` AS `heard_from`,`cp`.`campaign_name` AS `campaign`,(case when (`hf`.`total_cost` = 0) then (case when (`hf`.`end_date` is not null) then (case when (`hf`.`cost_type` = 'per day cost') then ((to_days(`hf`.`end_date`) - to_days(`hf`.`start_date`)) * `hf`.`cost`) else `hf`.`cost` end) else (case when (`hf`.`cost_type` = 'per day cost') then ((to_days(curdate()) - to_days(`hf`.`start_date`)) * `hf`.`cost`) else `hf`.`cost` end) end) else `hf`.`total_cost` end) AS `campaign_cost`,(to_days(`hf`.`end_date`) - to_days(`hf`.`start_date`)) AS `days`,`hf`.`cost` AS `cost`,`hf`.`total_cost` AS `total_cost`,`hf`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`hf`.`cost_type` AS `cost_type`,`hf`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,concat('https://tickleright.com/contact-us/?hf=',`hf`.`id`) AS `generated_link`,`hf`.`link_flag` AS `link_flag`,`hf`.`campaign_ended` AS `is_ended`,(select count(`i`.`id`) from `inquiry` `i` where ((`i`.`heard_from` = `hf`.`id`) and (`i`.`park` = 0)) group by `hf`.`heard_from`) AS `leads`,(select count(`i`.`id`) from `inquiry` `i` where ((`i`.`heard_from` = `hf`.`id`) and (`i`.`converted` = 1) and (`i`.`park` = 0)) group by `hf`.`heard_from`) AS `converted`,(select (case when (sum(`in`.`total`) is null) then '0' else sum(`in`.`total`) end) from (`inquiry` `i` join `invoice` `in` on((`i`.`contact_id` = `in`.`contact_id`))) where ((`i`.`heard_from` = `hf`.`id`) and (`i`.`converted` = 1) and (`i`.`park` = 0) and (`in`.`park` = 0))) AS `converted_amount`,cast(((case when (`hf`.`total_cost` = 0) then (case when (`hf`.`end_date` is not null) then (case when (`hf`.`cost_type` = 'per day cost') then ((to_days(`hf`.`end_date`) - to_days(`hf`.`start_date`)) * `hf`.`cost`) else `hf`.`cost` end) else (case when (`hf`.`cost_type` = 'per day cost') then ((to_days(curdate()) - to_days(`hf`.`start_date`)) * `hf`.`cost`) else `hf`.`cost` end) end) else `hf`.`total_cost` end) / (select count(`i`.`id`) from `inquiry` `i` where ((`i`.`heard_from` = `hf`.`id`) and (`i`.`park` = 0)) group by `hf`.`heard_from`)) as decimal(10,0)) AS `cpl`,cast(((case when (`hf`.`total_cost` = 0) then (case when (`hf`.`end_date` is not null) then (case when (`hf`.`cost_type` = 'per day cost') then ((to_days(`hf`.`end_date`) - to_days(`hf`.`start_date`)) * `hf`.`cost`) else `hf`.`cost` end) else (case when (`hf`.`cost_type` = 'per day cost') then ((to_days(curdate()) - to_days(`hf`.`start_date`)) * `hf`.`cost`) else `hf`.`cost` end) end) else `hf`.`total_cost` end) / (select count(`i`.`id`) from `inquiry` `i` where ((`i`.`heard_from` = `hf`.`id`) and (`i`.`converted` = 1) and (`i`.`park` = 0)) group by `hf`.`heard_from`)) as decimal(10,0)) AS `cpc`,cast(((select (case when (sum(`in`.`amount`) is null) then '0' else sum(`in`.`amount`) end) from (`inquiry` `i` join (select `invoice`.`id` AS `id`,`invoice`.`invoice` AS `invoice`,`invoice`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`invoice`.`code` AS `code`,`invoice`.`date` AS `date`,`invoice`.`amount` AS `amount`,`invoice`.`tax` AS `tax`,`invoice`.`tax_amount` AS `tax_amount`,`invoice`.`total` AS `total`,`invoice`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`invoice`.`balance` AS `balance`,`invoice`.`quotation` AS `quotation`,`invoice`.`notes` AS `notes`,`invoice`.`invoice_comment` AS `invoice_comment`,`invoice`.`document` AS `document`,`invoice`.`bid` AS `bid`,`invoice`.`park` AS `park`,`invoice`.`dropout` AS `dropout`,`invoice`.`freeze` AS `freeze`,`invoice`.`invoice_count` AS `invoice_count`,`invoice`.`batchless_link` AS `batchless_link`,`invoice`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`invoice`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`invoice`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`invoice`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from `invoice` where (`invoice`.`park` = 0) group by `invoice`.`contact_id` order by `invoice`.`id`) `in` on((`i`.`contact_id` = `in`.`contact_id`))) where ((`i`.`heard_from` = `hf`.`id`) and (`i`.`converted` = 1) and (`i`.`park` = 0) and (`in`.`park` = 0))) - (case when (`hf`.`total_cost` = 0) then (case when (`hf`.`end_date` is not null) then (case when (`hf`.`cost_type` = 'per day cost') then ((to_days(`hf`.`end_date`) - to_days(`hf`.`start_date`)) * `hf`.`cost`) else `hf`.`cost` end) else (case when (`hf`.`cost_type` = 'per day cost') then ((to_days(curdate()) - to_days(`hf`.`start_date`)) * `hf`.`cost`) else `hf`.`cost` end) end) else `hf`.`total_cost` end)) as decimal(10,0)) AS `return`,`hf`.`park` AS `park` from (`heard_from` `hf` left join `campaign` `cp` on(((`hf`.`campaign_id` = `cp`.`campaign_id`) and (`cp`.`park` = 0))));

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.holiday

CREATE TABLE `holiday` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `every_year` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `national` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `for_faculty` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `for_employee` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `meraki` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `park_3` (`park`),
  KEY `park_4` (`park`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=67 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.im_franchisee_combine_owner
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `im_franchisee_combine_owner` AS select `x`.`id` AS `id`,sum(`x`.`total_sale`) AS `total_sale`,`x`.`category` AS `category`,`x`.`branch` AS `branch`,`x`.`branch_name` AS `branch_name`,`x`.`owner_name` AS `owner_name`,`x`.`owner_id` AS `owner_id`,(case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-01') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 1),'-01') end) AS `start_date`,(case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-31') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 1),'-31') end) AS `end_date`,group_concat(`x`.`invoice_id` separator ',') AS `invoice_ids`,group_concat(`x`.`fullname` separator ',') AS `fullname`,`x`.`month` AS `month`,cast(sum(`x`.`royalty`) as decimal(10,2)) AS `royalty`,cast(sum(`x`.`prev_month_revenue`) as decimal(10,2)) AS `prev_month_revenue`,cast(sum(`x`.`tds`) as decimal(10,2)) AS `tds`,`x`.`zoom` AS `zoom`,cast(sum(`x`.`payable`) as decimal(10,2)) AS `payable` from (select `invoice_payment_view`.`id` AS `id`,(case when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_mode_text` = 'Cash') then `invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` <= 10000) then (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * 2) / 100)) when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` > 10000) then (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * 4) / 100)) else 0 end) AS `total_sale`,`invoice_payment_view`.`category` AS `category`,`invoice_payment_view`.`branch` AS `branch`,`invoice_payment_view`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name`,`invoice_payment_view`.`owner_name` AS `owner_name`,`invoice_payment_view`.`owner_name_id` AS `owner_id`,`invoice_payment_view`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,`invoice_payment_view`.`code_fullname` AS `fullname`,date_format(`invoice_payment_view`.`date`,'%b %y') AS `month`,cast((((case when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_mode_text` = 'Cash') then `invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` <= 10000) then (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * 2) / 100)) when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` > 10000) then (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * 4) / 100)) else 0 end) * `invoice_payment_view`.`offline_royalty`) / 100) as decimal(10,2)) AS `royalty`,cast(((case when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_mode_text` = 'Cash') then `invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` <= 10000) then (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * 2) / 100)) when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` > 10000) then (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * 4) / 100)) else 0 end) - (((case when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_mode_text` = 'Cash') then `invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` <= 10000) then (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * 2) / 100)) when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` > 10000) then (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * 4) / 100)) else 0 end) * `invoice_payment_view`.`offline_royalty`) / 100)) as decimal(10,2)) AS `prev_month_revenue`,cast(((((case when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_mode_text` = 'Cash') then `invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` <= 10000) then (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * 2) / 100)) when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` > 10000) then (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * 4) / 100)) else 0 end) - (((case when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_mode_text` = 'Cash') then `invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` <= 10000) then (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * 2) / 100)) when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` > 10000) then (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * 4) / 100)) else 0 end) * `invoice_payment_view`.`offline_royalty`) / 100)) * `invoice_payment_view`.`tds`) / 100) as decimal(10,2)) AS `tds`,`invoice_payment_view`.`zoom` AS `zoom`,cast((((case when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_mode_text` = 'Cash') then `invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` <= 10000) then (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * 2) / 100)) when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` > 10000) then (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * 4) / 100)) else 0 end) - (((case when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_mode_text` = 'Cash') then `invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` <= 10000) then (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * 2) / 100)) when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` > 10000) then (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * 4) / 100)) else 0 end) * `invoice_payment_view`.`offline_royalty`) / 100)) - ((((case when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_mode_text` = 'Cash') then `invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` <= 10000) then (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * 2) / 100)) when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` > 10000) then (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * 4) / 100)) else 0 end) - (((case when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_mode_text` = 'Cash') then `invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` <= 10000) then (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * 2) / 100)) when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` > 10000) then (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * 4) / 100)) else 0 end) * `invoice_payment_view`.`offline_royalty`) / 100)) * `invoice_payment_view`.`tds`) / 100)) as decimal(10,2)) AS `payable` from `invoice_payment_view` where ((`invoice_payment_view`.`date` >= (case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-01') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 1),'-01') end)) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`date` <= (case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-31') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 1),'-31') end)) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'Points') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`branch_type` = 'Franchisee') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`invoice_park` = '0') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`category` = 'Offline Right Brain Development') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`clear` = '1')) union all select `invoice_payment_view`.`id` AS `id`,(case when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_mode_text` = 'Cash') then `invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` <= 10000) then (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * 2) / 100)) when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` > 10000) then (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * 4) / 100)) else 0 end) - (((case when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_mode_text` = 'Cash') then `invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` when (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` <= 10000) then (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - `invoice_payment_view`.`zoom`) AS `payable` from `invoice_payment_view` where ((`invoice_payment_view`.`date` >= (case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-01') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.india_states
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `india_states` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `state_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `country_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `state_name` varchar(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0- active, 1- delete',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=36 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

(select `e`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname` from (`contact` `c` join `employee` `e` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`)))) `ecv`) left join (select `f`.`id` AS `id`,`f`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`f`.`type` AS `type`,`f`.`master` AS `master`,`f`.`status` AS `status`,`f`.`interest` AS `interest`,`f`.`interest_string` AS `interest_string`,`f`.`comment` AS `comment`,`f2`.`comment` AS `old_comment`,`f`.`followup` AS `followup`,`f`.`reminder` AS `reminder`,`f`.`master_id` AS `master_id`,`f`.`unfollow` AS `unfollow`,`f`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`f`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`f`.`park` AS `park`,`f`.`bid` AS `bid` from (`followup` `f` left join `followup` `f2` on((`f`.`parent_id` = `f2`.`id`))) where (`f`.`id` in (select max(`followup`.`id`) from `followup` where (`followup`.`master` = '0') group by `followup`.`contact_id`,`followup`.`master`,`followup`.`master_id`) and (`f`.`master` = '0')) group by `f`.`id`) `f` on((`f`.`master_id` = `i`.`id`))) left join (select `e`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname` from (`contact` `c` join `employee` `e` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`)))) `cecv` on((`cecv`.`id` = `i`.`c_employee_id`))) left join `heard_from` `hf` on((`i`.`heard_from` = `hf`.`id`))) left join `inquiry_source` `inqs` on((`i`.`source` = `inqs`.`id`))) left join `invoice` `inv` on((`i`.`contact_id` = `inv`.`contact_id`))) left join `payment` `p` on((`inv`.`id` = `p`.`invoice_id`))) where ((`cg`.`id` = `c`.`contact_group_id`) and (`c`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`) and (`i`.`id` = `ic`.`inquiry_id`) and (`ic`.`category_id` = `cat`.`id`) and (`i`.`employee_id` = `ecv`.`id`) and (0 <> (select min(`invoice`.`created_at`) from `invoice` where (`invoice`.`contact_id` = `i`.`contact_id`)))) order by `p`.`actual_amount` desc;

`heard_from_id`,`hf`.`heard_from` AS `heard_from`,`cp`.`campaign_name` AS `campaign_name`,`i`.`receive_worksheet` AS `receive_worksheet`,`i`.`allocation_date` AS `allocation_date_time`,(case when (`i`.`allocation_date` = '0000-00-00 00:00:00') then ' - ' else convert(date_format(`i`.`allocation_date`,'%d %b %y') using utf8mb3) end) AS `allocation_date_string`,(case when (`i`.`allocation_date` = '0000-00-00 00:00:00') then ' - ' else convert(date_format(`i`.`allocation_date`,'%Y-%m-%d') using utf8mb3) end) AS `allocation_date`,`i`.`tap` AS `tap`,`i`.`dot` AS `dot`,(case when (`i`.`dot` = '0000-00-00') then '' else date_format(`i`.`dot`,'%d %b %y') end) AS `dot_string`,`i`.`dut` AS `dut`,`i`.`tap_count` AS `tap_count`,`i`.`doi` AS `doi`,cast(`i`.`created_at` as date) AS `doi_created`,date_format(`i`.`doi`,'%d %b %y') AS `doi_string`,date_format(`i`.`created_at`,'%d %b %y') AS `doi_creation`,cast(`m`.`created_at` as date) AS `doc`,date_format(`m`.`created_at`,'%d %b %y') AS `doc_string`,(to_days(cast(`m`.`created_at` as date)) - to_days(cast(`i`.`created_at` as date))) AS `days_of_conversion`,`i`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,(case when (`i`.`c_employee_id` <> 0) then `i`.`c_employee_id` else `i`.`employee_id` end) AS `c_employee_id`,`ecv`.`fullname` AS `emp_name`,`i`.`park` AS `park`,`cat`.`category` AS `category`,`cat`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,`i`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`mname` AS `mname`,`c`.`parent_name` AS `parent_name`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`c`.`country_code_2` AS `country_code_2`,`c`.`mobile2` AS `mobile2`,`c`.`contact_group_id` AS `contact_group_id`,`c`.`phone_no` AS `phone_no`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`c`.`gender` AS `gender`,`c`.`image` AS `image`,`c`.`dob` AS `dob`,`c`.`blogger` AS `blogger`,`i`.`franchisee` AS `franchisee`,`i`.`runo_assigned` AS `runo_assigned`,(case when (`c`.`dob` <> '0000-00-00') then concat(floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)),'y',(timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) % 12),'m') else '0' end) AS `age`,(case when (`c`.`dob` = '0000-00-00') then '-' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 0) then 'below 0' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 1) then '0-1' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 2) then '1-2' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 3) then '2-3' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 4) then '3-4' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 5) then '4-5' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 6) then '5-6' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 7) then '6-7' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 8) then '7-8' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 9) then '8-9' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 10) then '9-10' else 'above 10' end) AS `age_group`,date_format(`c`.`dob`,'%d %b %y') AS `dob_string`,`c`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`ic`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`c`.`relation` AS `relation`,`c`.`address` AS `address`,`c`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`c`.`city` AS `city`,`c`.`state` AS `state`,`c`.`country` AS `country`,`i`.`bid` AS `bid`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name_actual`,`b`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`b`.`type_code` AS `branch_type_code`,`c`.`park` AS `cont_park`,`cg`.`contact_group` AS `contact_group`,`i`.`converted` AS `converted`,(case when (`i`.`converted` = 0) then 'Pending' when (`i`.`converted` = 1) then 'Converted' else '-' end) AS `inquiry_converted_text`,`c`.`quick_comment` AS `quick_comment`,`c`.`occupation` AS `occupation`,`c`.`gstin` AS `gstin`,`c`.`company` AS `company`,`f`.`interest` AS `interest`,`f`.`interest_string` AS `interest_string`,`f`.`sub_interest_string` AS `sub_interest_string`,`f`.`status` AS `status`,(case when (`f`.`id` is null) then '-' when ((`f`.`status` = '2') or (`f`.`status` = '1')) then 'Pending' when (`f`.`status` = '4') then 'Dead' when ((`f`.`status` = '3') or (`i`.`converted` = '1')) then 'Converted' end) AS `interest_text`,(case when (`f`.`id` is null) then '0' when ((`f`.`status` = '2') or (`f`.`status` = '1')) then '0' when (`f`.`status` = '4') then '3' when ((`f`.`status` = '3') or (`i`.`converted` = '1')) then '1' end) AS `row_color`,`cecv`.`fullname` AS `counsellor_name`,`cecv`.`cc` AS `counsellor_cc`,`cecv`.`mobile` AS `counsellor_mobile`,`cecv`.`cc2` AS `counsellor_cc2`,`cecv`.`mobile2` AS `counsellor_mobile2`,`cecv`.`contact_id` AS `counsellor_contact_id` from (((((((((((((`contact` `c` join `contact_group` `cg`) join `category` `cat`) join `inquiry` `i`) join `inquiry_category` `ic`) join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `i`.`bid`))) join (select `e`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname` from (`contact` `c` join `employee` `e` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`)))) `ecv`) left join `heard_from` `hf` on((`i`.`heard_from` = `hf`.`id`))) left join `campaign` `cp` on((`hf`.`campaign_id` = `cp`.`campaign_id`))) left join `inquiry_source` `inqs` on((`i`.`source` = `inqs`.`id`))) left join `latest_followup_table` `f` on(((`f`.`master_id` = `i`.`id`) and (`f`.`master` = 0) and (`f`.`park` = 0)))) left join (select `e`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`c`.`id` AS `contact_id`,`c`.`country_code` AS `cc`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`c`.`country_code_2` AS `cc2`,`c`.`mobile2` AS `mobile2` from (`contact` `c` join `employee` `e` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`)))) `cecv` on((`cecv`.`id` = (case when (`i`.`c_employee_id` <> 0) then `i`.`c_employee_id` else `i`.`employee_id` end)))) left join `member` `m` on((`c`.`id` = `m`.`contact_id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`f`.`venue_id` = `v`.`id`))) where ((`cg`.`id` = `c`.`contact_group_id`) and (`c`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`) and (`i`.`id` = `ic`.`inquiry_id`) and (`ic`.`category_id` = `cat`.`id`) and (`i`.`employee_id` = `ecv`.`id`)) order by (to_days(cast(`m`.`created_at` as date)) - to_days(`i`.`doi`)) desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.inquiry
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `inquiry` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `type` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - Normal , 1 - Applicant, 2 - Franchisee',
  `employee_id` int NOT NULL,
  `c_employee_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Counseller Id',
  `qualifier_id` int NOT NULL,
  `allocation_date` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `doi` date NOT NULL,
  `doc` date NOT NULL,
  `source` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Walk in' COMMENT '0-WalkIn, 1-Reference, 2-Social Media, 3-Advertisement, 4-Campaign',
  `interest_string` varchar(150) DEFAULT '-',
  `blogger` int NOT NULL,
  `franchisee` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `comment` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `receive_worksheet` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `heard_from` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `primary_heard_from` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `primary_source` varchar(225) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `source_url` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL,
  `venue_id` int NOT NULL,
  `converted` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0 - Not converted, 1 - converted)',
  `recommended_batch` varchar(225) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `text_color` int NOT NULL,
  `last_updated` date NOT NULL,
  `tap` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `tap_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `demo_registered` int NOT NULL,
  `demo_registered_count` int NOT NULL,
  `demo_attended` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `demo_attendance_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `dot` date NOT NULL,
  `dut` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `runo_assigned` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-unassigned,1-assigned',
  `balance` int NOT NULL,
  `batch_id` int NOT NULL,
  `utm` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `service_id` int NOT NULL,
  `category_id` int NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `employee_id` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `allocation_date` (`allocation_date`),
  KEY `heard_from` (`heard_from`),
  KEY `inquiry_source` (`source`),
  KEY `idx_inquiry_subquery` (`contact_id`,`park`),
  KEY `idx_inquiry_park_contact` (`park`,`contact_id`,`id`),
  KEY `idx_inquiry_park_alloc` (`park`,`allocation_date`),
  KEY `idx_inquiry_source_date` (`heard_from`,`park`,`doi`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=99827 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

CREATE TABLE `inquiry_15_day_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `source` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `leads` int NOT NULL,
  `converted` int NOT NULL,
  `report_period_start` date NOT NULL,
  `report_period_end` date NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=9 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.inquiry_category
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `inquiry_category` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `inquiry_id` int NOT NULL,
  `category_id` int NOT NULL,
  `package_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `offer_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `inquiry_id` (`inquiry_id`),
  KEY `category_id` (`category_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `idx_ic_inquiry_category` (`inquiry_id`,`category_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=121293 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.inquiry_converted_export_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `inquiry_converted_export_view` AS select `inquiry_converted_view`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`inquiry_converted_view`.`fullname` AS `NAME`,`inquiry_converted_view`.`doj` AS `Date of joining`,`inquiry_converted_view`.`source` AS `Source`,`inquiry_converted_view`.`heard_from` AS `Heard From`,`inquiry_converted_view`.`c_fullname` AS `Counsellor`,`inquiry_converted_view`.`item_total` AS `Ammout`,`inquiry_converted_view`.`branch` AS `branch`,`inquiry_converted_view`.`branch_type` AS `branch_type`,`inquiry_converted_view`.`created_at` AS `Member creat date` from `inquiry_converted_view` where (`inquiry_converted_view`.`created_at` between '2023-01-01 00:00:00.000000' and '2023-01-31 00:00:00.000000') order by `inquiry_converted_view`.`fullname` desc;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.inquiry_converted_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `inquiry_converted_view` AS select `c`.`id` AS `contact_id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`m`.`code` AS `member_code`,concat(`c`.`country_code`,' ',`c`.`mobile`) AS `phone_number`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`p`.`calculated_amount` AS `calculated_amount`,`i`.`id` AS `inquiry_id`,`m`.`doj` AS `doj`,`m`.`status` AS `status`,`i`.`converted` AS `converted`,`inv`.`total` AS `total`,`i`.`source` AS `source_id`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,`is`.`source` AS `source`,`pcp`.`campaign_name` AS `primary_campaign_name`,`cp`.`campaign_name` AS `campaign_name`,`cp`.`id` AS `campaign_id`,`hf`.`heard_from` AS `heard_from`,`i`.`heard_from` AS `heard_from_id`,`phf`.`heard_from` AS `primary_heard_from`,`pis`.`source` AS `primary_source`,`m`.`c_employee_id` AS `c_employee_id`,concat(`c2`.`fname`,' ',`c2`.`mname`,' ',`c2`.`lname`) AS `c_fullname`,min(`inv`.`id`) AS `invoice_id`,`ii`.`id` AS `invoice_item_id`,`ii`.`item_total` AS `item_total`,`ii`.`service_id` AS `service_id`,`ii`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`s`.`service` AS `service`,`cat`.`category` AS `category`,`cat`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,`m`.`bid` AS `bid`,`br`.`branch` AS `branch`,`br`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`ii`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`m`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`m`.`park` AS `park`,(select count(`total_inv`.`id`) AS `invoice_count` from `invoice` `total_inv` where ((`total_inv`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`) and (`inv`.`park` = 0)) group by `total_inv`.`contact_id`) AS `invoice_count` from ((((((((((((((((((`inquiry` `i` join `member` `m` on(((`m`.`contact_id` = `i`.`contact_id`) and (`i`.`park` = 0)))) join `invoice` `inv` on(((`inv`.`contact_id` = `m`.`contact_id`) and (`inv`.`park` = 0)))) join `invoice_item` `ii` on(((`ii`.`invoice_id` = `inv`.`id`) and (`ii`.`batch_id` <> 0)))) join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `m`.`contact_id`))) left join `service` `s` on((`ii`.`service_id` = `s`.`id`))) left join `category` `cat` on((`ii`.`category_id` = `cat`.`id`))) left join `heard_from` `hf` on((`i`.`heard_from` = `hf`.`id`))) left join `campaign` `cp` on((`hf`.`campaign_id` = `cp`.`campaign_id`))) left join `branch` `br` on((`m`.`bid` = `br`.`id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`i`.`c_employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c2` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `c2`.`id`))) left join `inquiry_source` `is` on((`is`.`id` = `i`.`source`))) left join `payment` `p` on((`inv`.`id` = `p`.`invoice_id`))) left join `batch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `ii`.`batch_id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`v`.`id` = `b`.`venue_id`))) left join `inquiry_source` `pis` on((`pis`.`id` = `i`.`primary_source`))) left join `heard_from` `phf` on((`phf`.`id` = `i`.`primary_heard_from`))) left join `campaign` `pcp` on((`hf`.`campaign_id` = `pcp`.`campaign_id`))) where ((`m`.`created_at` <= date_format(curdate(),'%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')) and (`m`.`park` = 0) and (`i`.`bid` <> 35)) group by `m`.`contact_id` order by `m`.`created_at` desc;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.inquiry_cron
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `inquiry_cron` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `fname` varchar(25) NOT NULL,
  `mname` varchar(25) NOT NULL,
  `lname` varchar(25) NOT NULL,
  `parent_name` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `country_code` varchar(5) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `mobile` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `doi` date NOT NULL,
  `dob` date NOT NULL,
  `gender` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `address` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `country` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `state` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `pincode` int NOT NULL,
  `city` int NOT NULL,
  `venue` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `source_url` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `source` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `heard_from` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `utm` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `blogger` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `inq_cat` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `inquiry_added` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '1 = inquiry insert \r\n2 = processing\r\n3 = duplicate contact\r\n4 = duplicate inquiry\r\n5 = error occurred',
  `raw_data` json NOT NULL,
  `done_check` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `error_comment` text NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `inquiry_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `campaign_id` int NOT NULL,
  `campaign_name` text,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=6038 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.inquiry_invoice_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `inquiry_invoice_view` AS select `i`.`id` AS `invoice_id`,`i`.`id` AS `id`,`i`.`invoice` AS `invoice`,`i`.`quotation` AS `quotation`,`i`.`date` AS `date`,date_format(`i`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `date_string`,`i`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,concat(`con`.`fname`,' ',`con`.`lname`,' ',`con`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,`i`.`dropout` AS `dropout`,`con`.`fname` AS `fname`,`con`.`mname` AS `mname`,`con`.`lname` AS `lname`,`con`.`gstin` AS `gstin`,concat(`i`.`code`,' - ',`con`.`fname`,' ',`con`.`lname`,' ',`con`.`mname`) AS `code_name`,(case when (`con`.`blogger` = '1') then 'Blogger' when (`con`.`blogger` = '0') then 'VIP' else '' end) AS `member_type`,`con`.`company` AS `company`,`con`.`company_add` AS `company_add`,`m`.`code` AS `code`,`con`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`con`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`con`.`dob` AS `dob`,`m`.`status` AS `status`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`b`.`avg_age` AS `avg_age`,`b`.`min_age` AS `min_age`,`b`.`max_age` AS `max_age`,`b`.`waiting_list` AS `waiting_list`,`b`.`level_id` AS `level_id`,`b`.`enrolled` AS `enrolled`,`b`.`limit` AS `limit`,`b`.`completed_sessions` AS `completed_sessions`,`b`.`offline` AS `offline`,`b`.`private` AS `private`,`branch`.`branch` AS `branch`,`branch`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`con`.`email` AS `email`,`con`.`address` AS `address`,`con`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`con`.`city` AS `city`,`i`.`amount` AS `invoice_amount`,`i`.`tax` AS `invoice_tax`,`i`.`tax_amount` AS `tax_amount`,`i`.`total` AS `total`,`i`.`notes` AS `notes`,`i`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`i`.`balance` AS `balance`,`ii`.`id` AS `item_id`,`ii`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`ii`.`service_id` AS `service_id`,`ii`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`ii`.`currency` AS `currency`,`ii`.`referral_code` AS `referral_code`,`ii`.`redemed` AS `redemed`,`ii`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,date_format(`ii`.`start_date`,'%d %b %y') AS `start_date_string`,date_format(`ii`.`end_date`,'%d %b %y') AS `end_date_string`,`ii`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`ii`.`item_amount` AS `item_amount`,`ii`.`item_tax` AS `item_tax`,`ii`.`item_tax_amount` AS `item_tax_amount`,`ii`.`item_tax_type` AS `item_tax_type`,`ii`.`item_total` AS `item_total`,`ii`.`sessions` AS `sessions`,concat(`ii`.`sessions_used`,' / ',`ii`.`sessions`) AS `session_consumed`,`ii`.`item_discount` AS `item_discount`,`ii`.`sessions_used` AS `sessions_used`,`ii`.`change_id` AS `change_id`,`ii`.`item_change` AS `item_change`,`ii`.`extend_reason` AS `extend_reason`,`c`.`category` AS `category`,`s`.`service` AS `service`,`s`.`amount` AS `service_amount`,`s`.`module_id` AS `module_id`,`s`.`topic_id` AS `topic_id`,`s`.`session_master_id` AS `session_master_id`,'' AS `module`,'' AS `topic`,'' AS `title`,`s`.`tax` AS `service_tax`,`s`.`tax_type` AS `service_tax_type`,`s`.`duration` AS `duration`,`s`.`duration_type` AS `duration_type`,`be`.`employee` AS `batch_employee`,`be`.`days` AS `batch_days`,`be`.`level` AS `level`,`ii`.`is_product` AS `is_product`,`ii`.`renew` AS `renew`,`ii`.`park` AS `item_park`,`i`.`bid` AS `bid`,`i`.`park` AS `park`,`i`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`ii`.`session_settled` AS `session_settled`,`cecv`.`counsellor_name` AS `counsellor_name` from (((((((((`invoice` `i` join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`i`.`id` = `ii`.`invoice_id`))) join (select `e`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `counsellor_name` from (`contact` `c` join `employee` `e` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`)))) `cecv` on((`cecv`.`id` = `i`.`employee_id`))) join `category` `c` on((`ii`.`category_id` = `c`.`id`))) join `service` `s` on((`ii`.`service_id` = `s`.`id`))) join `contact` `con` on((`i`.`contact_id` = `con`.`id`))) join `member` `m` on(((`m`.`code` = `i`.`code`) and (`i`.`contact_id` = `m`.`contact_id`)))) left join `batch` `b` on((`ii`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `batch_view` `be` on((`be`.`id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `branch` on((`i`.`bid` = `branch`.`id`)));

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.inquiry_link
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `inquiry_link` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `inquiry_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `otp` varchar(6) NOT NULL,
  `offline` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `custom_branch` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` varchar(25) NOT NULL,
  `custom_venue` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `venue_id` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `custom_batch` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `batch_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `custom_service` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `service_id` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `spot_discount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `discount_amount` float NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `discount_type` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-none,1- discount in rupees,2- demo discount ,3- discount in precent,4-discount without expiry,5-8th yr anniversary,6-hpd discount,7-AK Discount,8-All time present(mem),9- Sibling Discount,10-Group , 11 - trial_discount ',
  `discount_value` float NOT NULL,
  `referral_discount_flag` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `promo_code_flag` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `batchless_link` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `generated_on` datetime NOT NULL,
  `discount_hrs` varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '24' COMMENT 'value in hour',
  `festive_offer` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `opened_on` datetime NOT NULL,
  `batch_selected_on` datetime NOT NULL,
  `package_selected_on` datetime NOT NULL,
  `package_start_selected_on` datetime NOT NULL,
  `payment_clicked_on` datetime NOT NULL,
  `payment_done_on` datetime NOT NULL,
  `first_logged_in_on` datetime NOT NULL,
  `payment_status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-pending, 1-paid',
  `timezone` varchar(500) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Asia/Calcutta',
  `park` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_inquiry_link_inquiry_id_park` (`inquiry_id`,`park`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=18732 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.inquiry_link_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `inquiry_link_view` AS select `il`.`id` AS `id`,`il`.`inquiry_id` AS `inquiry_id`,`il`.`otp` AS `otp`,`il`.`offline` AS `offline`,`il`.`custom_branch` AS `custom_branch`,`il`.`bid` AS `link_for_bid`,`il`.`custom_venue` AS `custom_venue`,`il`.`venue_id` AS `link_for_venue_id`,`il`.`custom_batch` AS `custom_batch`,`il`.`batch_id` AS `link_for_batch_id`,`il`.`custom_service` AS `custom_service`,`il`.`service_id` AS `link_for_service_id`,`il`.`spot_discount` AS `spot_discount`,`il`.`discount_amount` AS `discount_amount`,`il`.`discount_type` AS `discount_type`,`il`.`discount_value` AS `discount_value`,`il`.`referral_discount_flag` AS `referral`,`il`.`promo_code_flag` AS `promo_code`,`il`.`batchless_link` AS `batchless_link`,`il`.`generated_on` AS `generated_on`,`il`.`discount_hrs` AS `discount_hrs`,`il`.`festive_offer` AS `festive_offer`,`il`.`opened_on` AS `opened_on`,`il`.`batch_selected_on` AS `batch_selected_on`,`il`.`package_selected_on` AS `package_selected_on`,`il`.`package_start_selected_on` AS `package_start_selected_on`,`il`.`payment_clicked_on` AS `payment_clicked_on`,`il`.`payment_done_on` AS `payment_done_on`,`il`.`first_logged_in_on` AS `first_logged_in_on`,`il`.`payment_status` AS `payment_status`,`i`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`i`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`i`.`c_employee_id` AS `c_employee_id`,`i`.`allocation_date` AS `allocation_date`,`i`.`doi` AS `doi`,`i`.`source` AS `source`,`i`.`comment` AS `comment`,`i`.`receive_worksheet` AS `receive_worksheet`,`i`.`heard_from` AS `heard_from`,`i`.`converted` AS `converted`,`i`.`tap` AS `tap`,`i`.`tap_count` AS `tap_count`,`i`.`dot` AS `dot`,`i`.`dut` AS `dut`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`mname` AS `mname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`c`.`country_code_2` AS `country_code_2`,`c`.`mobile2` AS `mobile2`,`c`.`phone_no` AS `phone_no`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`c`.`gender` AS `gender`,`c`.`image` AS `image`,`c`.`dob` AS `dob`,(case when (`il`.`custom_batch` <> 0) then concat('https://registration.tickleright.com/join-us/forBatchInquiry.php?tag=',`il`.`id`,'_',`il`.`otp`) else concat('https://registration.tickleright.com/join-us/home.php?tag=',`il`.`id`,'_',`il`.`otp`) end) AS `link`,`il`.`park` AS `park`,`i`.`bid` AS `bid` from ((`inquiry_link` `il` join `inquiry` `i` on((`i`.`id` = `il`.`inquiry_id`))) join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`)));

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.inquiry_log
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `inquiry_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `inquiry_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `employee_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `dot` date NOT NULL,
  `doa` date NOT NULL,
  `dut` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `tap_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `utm` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `park` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `inquiry_id` (`inquiry_id`),
  KEY `employee_id` (`employee_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=207507 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.inquiry_log_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `inquiry_log_view` AS select `i`.`id` AS `id`,`i`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`i`.`c_employee_id` AS `c_employee_id`,`il`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`il`.`doa` AS `doa`,`i`.`doi` AS `doi`,`i`.`source` AS `source`,`i`.`comment` AS `comment`,`i`.`receive_worksheet` AS `receive_worksheet`,`i`.`heard_from` AS `heard_from`,`i`.`converted` AS `converted`,`i`.`tap` AS `tap`,`i`.`tap_count` AS `total_tap_count`,`il`.`tap_count` AS `tap_count`,`il`.`dot` AS `dot`,`il`.`dut` AS `dut`,`i`.`bid` AS `bid`,`i`.`utm` AS `utm`,`i`.`park` AS `park`,`i`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`i`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`i`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`i`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,concat(`ce`.`fname`,' ',`ce`.`lname`) AS `counsellor_name`,concat(`ci`.`fname`,' ',`ci`.`lname`) AS `student` from ((((`inquiry` `i` join `inquiry_log` `il` on((`i`.`id` = `il`.`inquiry_id`))) join `employee` `e` on((`il`.`employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) join `contact` `ce` on((`ce`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) join `contact` `ci` on((`ci`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) where (0 <> 1);


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.inquiry_online
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `inquiry_online` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `employee_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `c_employee_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Counseller Id',
  `allocation_date` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `doi` date NOT NULL,
  `dob` date NOT NULL,
  `country_code` varchar(11) NOT NULL,
  `mobile` varchar(11) NOT NULL,
  `source` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Walk in' COMMENT '0-WalkIn, 1-Reference, 2-Social Media, 3-Advertisement, 4-Campaign',
  `blogger` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `comment` varchar(200) DEFAULT '',
  `receive_worksheet` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `heard_from` varchar(50) DEFAULT '',
  `converted` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0 - Not converted, 1 - converted)',
  `tap` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `tap_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `dot` date NOT NULL,
  `dut` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `offline` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Flag for online= 0 , offline=1',
  `master_category_id` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'offline=2 online=1',
  `callback_url` text NOT NULL,
  `batch_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `balance` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `employee_id` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `contact_id_2` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `employee_id_2` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `contact_id_3` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `employee_id_3` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_3` (`park`),
  KEY `contact_id_4` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `employee_id_4` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_4` (`park`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=20042 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.inquiry_online_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `inquiry_online_view` AS select `io`.`id` AS `id`,`io`.`doi` AS `doi`,`io`.`dob` AS `dob`,`io`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`io`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,concat(`io`.`country_code`,' ',`io`.`mobile`) AS `contact_number`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`cg`.`contact_group` AS `contact_group`,`io`.`park` AS `park`,`c`.`id` AS `contact_id`,`io`.`contact_id` AS `unupdated_c_id` from ((`inquiry_online` `io` left join `contact` `c` on((`io`.`mobile` = `c`.`mobile`))) left join `contact_group` `cg` on((`cg`.`id` = `c`.`contact_group_id`))) where ((`io`.`mobile` <> '') and (`io`.`country_code` <> '')) order by `io`.`id` desc;

) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=44 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;
