VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.inquiry_structured_report_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `inquiry_structured_report_view` AS with `latest_followup` as (select `f1`.`id` AS `id`,`f1`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`f1`.`type` AS `type`,`f1`.`comment` AS `comment`,`f1`.`followup` AS `followup`,`f1`.`reminder` AS `reminder`,`f1`.`master` AS `master`,`f1`.`master_id` AS `master_id`,`f1`.`status` AS `status`,`f1`.`franchisee_fee` AS `franchisee_fee`,`f1`.`royalty` AS `royalty`,`f1`.`royalty_online` AS `royalty_online`,`f1`.`royalty_offline` AS `royalty_offline`,`f1`.`term` AS `term`,`f1`.`authorized_representatives` AS `authorized_representatives`,`f1`.`agreement` AS `agreement`,`f1`.`km` AS `km`,`f1`.`interest` AS `interest`,`f1`.`interest_string` AS `interest_string`,`f1`.`sub_interest_string` AS `sub_interest_string`,`f1`.`lost_reason` AS `lost_reason`,`f1`.`source` AS `source`,`f1`.`heard_from` AS `heard_from`,`f1`.`preferences` AS `preferences`,`f1`.`slot` AS `slot`,`f1`.`area` AS `area`,`f1`.`country` AS `country`,`f1`.`city` AS `city`,`f1`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`f1`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`f1`.`call_rec` AS `call_rec`,`f1`.`call_duration` AS `call_duration`,`f1`.`unfollow` AS `unfollow`,`f1`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`f1`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`f1`.`inq_noti_id` AS `inq_noti_id`,`f1`.`park` AS `park`,`f1`.`bid` AS `bid`,`f1`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`f1`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`f1`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`f1`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from (`followup` `f1` join (select `followup`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,max(`followup`.`id`) AS `max_id` from `followup` where ((`followup`.`park` = 0) and (`followup`.`master_id` <> 0)) group by `followup`.`contact_id`) `fx` on((`f1`.`id` = `fx`.`max_id`)))), `latest_demo` as (select `demo_form_response`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,max(`demo_form_response`.`id`) AS `id` from `demo_form_response` where (`demo_form_response`.`park` = 0) group by `demo_form_response`.`mobile`), `demo_join` as (select `dfr`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`dfr`.`id` AS `id`,`dfr`.`demo_id` AS `demo_id`,`dfr`.`demo_attended` AS `demo_attended`,`d`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`dfr`.`created_at` AS `created_at` from ((`demo_form_response` `dfr` join `latest_demo` `ld` on((`dfr`.`id` = `ld`.`id`))) left join `demo` `d` on((`d`.`id` = `dfr`.`demo_id`)))), `first_invoice_per_contact` as (select `inv`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,min(`inv`.`id`) AS `first_invoice_id` from `invoice` `inv` group by `inv`.`contact_id`), `first_payment` as (select `fi`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,min(`p`.`amount`) AS `amount` from (`first_invoice_per_contact` `fi` join `payment` `p` on(((`p`.`invoice_id` = `fi`.`first_invoice_id`) and (`p`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'Points')))) group by `fi`.`contact_id`), `google_gclid` as (select `inquiry`.`id` AS `inquiry_id`,`inquiry`.`utm` AS `utm`,(case when (`inquiry`.`utm` like '%gclid=%') then substring_index(substr(`inquiry`.`utm`,(locate('gclid=',`inquiry`.`utm`) + 6)),'&',1) else '' end) AS `gclid` from `inquiry` where ((`inquiry`.`utm` <> '') and (`inquiry`.`utm` is not null))), `data_table` as (select `i`.`id` AS `id`,`f`.`id` AS `followup_id`,`i`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,concat_ws(' ',`c`.`fname`,`c`.`lname`,`c`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,`c`.`dob` AS `dob`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,(case when ((`c`.`dob` is not null) and (`c`.`dob` <> '0000-00-00')) then concat(floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)),'y',(timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) % 12),'m') else '0' end) AS `age`,date_format(nullif(`c`.`dob`,'0000-00-00'),'%d %b %y') AS `dob_string`,`f`.`city` AS `city`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,`f`.`country` AS `country`,concat_ws(' ',`ce`.`fname`,`ce`.`lname`) AS `counsellor_name`,`b`.`id` AS `bid`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`type` AS `branch_type`,(case when (`cat`.`master_category_id` = 1) then 'Online Program' when (`cat`.`master_category_id` = 2) then 'Offline Program' else '' end) AS `program_type`,`i`.`created_at` AS `doi_created`,`i`.`allocation_date` AS `allocation_date`,`i`.`doi` AS `doi`,date_format(`i`.`doi`,'%d %b %y') AS `doi_string`,`f`.`interest_string` AS `interest_string`,`s`.`id` AS `source_id`,(case when (`s`.`source` is not null) then `s`.`source` else 'Undefined' end) AS `source`,`ps`.`id` AS `primary_source_id`,(case when (`ps`.`source` is not null) then `ps`.`source` else 'Undefined' end) AS `primary_source`,(case when (`cp`.`campaign_name` is not null) then `cp`.`campaign_name` else 'Undefined' end) AS `campaign_name`,(case when (`pcp`.`campaign_name` is not null) then `pcp`.`campaign_name` else 'Undefined' end) AS `primary_campaign_name`,(case when (`h`.`heard_from` is not null) then `h`.`heard_from` else 'Undefined' end) AS `heard_from`,(case when (`ph`.`heard_from` is not null) then `ph`.`heard_from` else 'Undefined' end) AS `primary_heard_from`,`ph`.`id` AS `primary_heard_from_id`,`i`.`utm` AS `utm`,`dfr`.`start_date` AS `demo_date`,`dfr`.`created_at` AS `demo_registered_date`,`dfr`.`demo_attended` AS `demo_attended`,`i`.`demo_registered` AS `demo_registered`,(case when (`i`.`demo_registered` = 1) then 'Yes' else 'No' end) AS `demo_registered_string`,`i`.`demo_registered_count` AS `demo_registered_count`,`i`.`demo_attendance_count` AS `demo_attendance_count`,`m`.`created_at` AS `date_of_conversion`,(case when (`m`.`id` is null) then 0 else 1 end) AS `inquiry_converted`,`il`.`payment_status` AS `payment_status`,(case when (`il`.`payment_status` = 0) then 'Pending' when (`il`.`payment_status` = 1) then 'Paid' else '' end) AS `payment_status_string`,`fp`.`amount` AS `payment`,(case when (`f`.`interest_string` in ('Hot','Warm')) then 'Yes' when ((case when (`m`.`id` is null) then 0 else 1 end) = 1) then 'Yes' when ((`f`.`interest_string` = 'Cold') and (`f`.`lost_reason` in ('Expensive','No Device for Online Program','Requested for a Trial Class','Location Proximity','No Centre in the City','Batch Unavailability/Batches Maxed Out'))) then 'Yes' else 'No' end) AS `sql_flag`,`f`.`lost_reason` AS `lost_reason`,`f`.`comment` AS `followup_comment`,(case when ((`i`.`demo_registered` = 1) and (`dfr`.`start_date` is not null) and (curdate() > `dfr`.`start_date`)) then (case when (`dfr`.`demo_attended` = 1) then 'Yes' else 'No' end) else '' end) AS `demo_attended_string`,(case when ((`i`.`demo_registered` = 1) and (`dfr`.`start_date` is not null) and (curdate() > `dfr`.`start_date`)) then (case when (`dfr`.`demo_attended` = 1) then 'No' else 'Yes' end) else '' end) AS `demo_no_show`,`gg`.`gclid` AS `gclid`,`i`.`park` AS `park` from (((((((((((((((((((`inquiry` `i` left join `contact` `c` on(((`i`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`) and (`i`.`park` = 0) and (`c`.`park` = 0)))) left join `inquiry_link` `il` on(((`il`.`inquiry_id` = `i`.`id`) and (`il`.`park` = 0)))) left join `latest_followup` `f` on((`f`.`contact_id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`v`.`id` = `f`.`venue_id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`e`.`id` = `f`.`employee_id`))) left join `contact` `ce` on((`ce`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) left join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `i`.`bid`))) left join `demo_join` `dfr` on((`dfr`.`mobile` = `c`.`mobile`))) left join `member` `m` on((`m`.`contact_id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) left join `inquiry_source` `s` on((`s`.`id` = `i`.`source`))) left join `inquiry_source` `ps` on((`ps`.`id` = `i`.`primary_source`))) left join `heard_from` `h` on((`h`.`id` = `i`.`heard_from`))) left join `heard_from` `ph` on((`ph`.`id` = `i`.`primary_heard_from`))) left join `campaign` `cp` on((`h`.`campaign_id` = `cp`.`campaign_id`))) left join `campaign` `pcp` on((`ph`.`campaign_id` = `pcp`.`campaign_id`))) left join `inquiry_category` `ic` on((`ic`.`inquiry_id` = `i`.`id`))) left join `category` `cat` on((`cat`.`id` = `ic`.`category_id`))) left join `first_payment` `fp` on((`fp`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join `google_gclid` `gg` on((`gg`.`inquiry_id` = `i`.`id`))) where ((`i`.`created_at` >= '2024-01-01') and (`i`.`bid` <> '84') and (`i`.`bid` <> '86') and (`i`.`bid` <> '82') and (`i`.`bid` <> '76') and (`i`.`bid` <> '39') and (`i`.`bid` <> '78') and (`i`.`bid` <> '41') and (`i`.`bid` <> '77') and (`i`.`bid` <> '40') and (`i`.`bid` <> '74') and (`i`.`bid` <> '37') and (`i`.`bid` <> '80') and (`i`.`bid` <> '43') and (`i`.`bid` <> '90'))) select `dt`.`age` AS `age`,`dt`.`allocation_date` AS `allocation_date`,`dt`.`bid` AS `bid`,`dt`.`branch` AS `branch`,`dt`.`branch_type` AS `branch_type`,`dt`.`primary_campaign_name` AS `primary_campaign_name`,`dt`.`campaign_name` AS `campaign_name`,`dt`.`city` AS `city`,`dt`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`dt`.`country` AS `country`,`dt`.`counsellor_name` AS `counsellor_name`,`dt`.`date_of_conversion` AS `date_of_conversion`,`dt`.`demo_attendance_count` AS `demo_attendance_count`,`dt`.`demo_attended` AS `demo_attended`,`dt`.`demo_attended_string` AS `demo_attended_string`,`dt`.`demo_date` AS `demo_date`,`dt`.`demo_no_show` AS `demo_no_show`,`dt`.`demo_registered` AS `demo_registered`,`dt`.`demo_registered_count` AS `demo_registered_count`,`dt`.`demo_registered_date` AS `demo_registered_date`,`dt`.`demo_registered_string` AS `demo_registered_string`,`dt`.`dob` AS `dob`,`dt`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`dt`.`email` AS `email`,`dt`.`dob_string` AS `dob_string`,`dt`.`doi` AS `doi`,`dt`.`doi_created` AS `doi_created`,`dt`.`doi_string` AS `doi_string`,`dt`.`followup_comment` AS `followup_comment`,`dt`.`followup_id` AS `followup_id`,`dt`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,`dt`.`heard_from` AS `heard_from`,`dt`.`id` AS `id`,`dt`.`inquiry_converted` AS `inquiry_converted`,`dt`.`interest_string` AS `interest_string`,`dt`.`payment` AS `payment`,`dt`.`payment_status` AS `payment_status`,`dt`.`payment_status_string` AS `payment_status_string`,`dt`.`primary_heard_from` AS `primary_heard_from`,`dt`.`primary_heard_from_id` AS `primary_heard_from_id`,`dt`.`primary_source` AS `primary_source`,`dt`.`primary_source_id` AS `primary_source_id`,`dt`.`program_type` AS `program_type`,`dt`.`source` AS `source`,`dt`.`source_id` AS `source_id`,`dt`.`sql_flag` AS `sql_flag`,`dt`.`utm` AS `utm`,`dt`.`venue` AS `venue`,`dt`.`lost_reason` AS `lost_reason`,`dt`.`gclid` AS `gclid`,(case when ((`dt`.`inquiry_converted` = 0) and ((`dt`.`interest_string` = 'Cold') or (`dt`.`interest_string` = 'Junk'))) then 'Lost' when ((`dt`.`inquiry_converted` = 1) and ((`dt`.`payment_status` = 1) or (`dt`.`payment_status` is null))) then 'Converted' when (`dt`.`payment_status` = 0) then 'Payment Pending' when ((`dt`.`demo_registered` = 1) and (coalesce(`dt`.`demo_attended`,0) <> 1) and (`dt`.`demo_date` <= curdate())) then 'Demo No Show' when ((`dt`.`demo_registered` = 1) and (coalesce(`dt`.`demo_attended`,0) = 1)) then 'Demo Attended' when ((`dt`.`demo_registered` = 1) and (coalesce(`dt`.`demo_attended`,0) <> 1) and (`dt`.`demo_date` > curdate())) then 'Demo Booked' when ((`dt`.`inquiry_converted` = 0) and (`dt`.`demo_registered` = 0) and (`dt`.`interest_string` = 'Not Contacted')) then 'New' when ((`dt`.`interest_string` <> 'Not Contacted') and (`dt`.`interest_string` <> 'Cold')) then 'Approached' else 'Uncategorized' end) AS `col_filter` from `data_table` `dt` where (`dt`.`park` = 0);

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.inventory
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `inventory` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `code` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `pdf_filename` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `ai_filename` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `asset_pdf` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `asset_ai` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `asset_pdf2` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `pdf_filename2` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `config` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `type` int NOT NULL,
  `material_type` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `extra_material_set` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `extra_material_set_id` int NOT NULL,
  `cost_of_file` float NOT NULL,
  `pages` int NOT NULL,
  `view_barcode` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `folderA` varchar(1000) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `folderB` varchar(1000) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `folderC` varchar(1000) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `folderD` varchar(1000) NOT NULL,
  `activity` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `activityB` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `activityC` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `activityD` int NOT NULL,
  `folder` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Waste',
  `folders` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Waste',
  `front_back` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Waste',
  `print_properties` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Waste',
  `base_quantity` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `k_flag` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `k_flag_b` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `k_flag_c` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `company_name` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '1 - Tickle Right, 2 - Code Right',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `code` (`code`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=9590 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.inventory_folder_filter_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `inventory_folder_filter_view` AS select `inventory_print_log_view`.`id` AS `id`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`code` AS `code`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`filename` AS `filename`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`print_properties` AS `print_properties`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`front_back` AS `front_back`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`config` AS `config`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`material_type` AS `material_type`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`date` AS `date`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`print_on_date` AS `print_on_date`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`quantity` AS `quantity`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`lot_no` AS `lot_no`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`printer_cid` AS `printer_cid`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`comment` AS `comment`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`printer_name` AS `printer_name`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`status` AS `status`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`printed_on_date` AS `printed_on_date`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`approved` AS `approved`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`approved_date` AS `approved_date`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`folder_filter` AS `folder_filter`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`park` AS `park`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`duphash` AS `duphash` from `inventory_print_log_view` where (`inventory_print_log_view`.`park` = 0) group by `inventory_print_log_view`.`lot_no`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`print_on_date`,`inventory_print_log_view`.`printer_cid` order by `inventory_print_log_view`.`id` desc;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.inventory_print_log
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `inventory_print_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `code` varchar(30) NOT NULL,
  `filename` varchar(200) NOT NULL COMMENT 'asset_pdf',
  `print_properties` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `front_back` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `config` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `material_type` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `print_on_date` date NOT NULL,
  `quantity` int NOT NULL,
  `costing` float NOT NULL,
  `print_pages` int NOT NULL,
  `cost_of_printing_file` float NOT NULL,
  `cost_of_log` float NOT NULL,
  `cost_of_page` int NOT NULL,
  `lot_no` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `is_extra` int NOT NULL,
  `whole_folder` int NOT NULL COMMENT '1- it is whole folder\r\n2 - not a whole folder',
  `printer_cid` int NOT NULL,
  `comment` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `status` int DEFAULT '0',
  `printed_on_date` date NOT NULL,
  `approved` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `approved_date` date NOT NULL,
  `folder_filter` text NOT NULL,
  `rescheduled_file` int NOT NULL,
  `zip_filename` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00' ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `duphash` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=239021 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.inventory_print_log_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `inventory_print_log_view` AS select `ipl`.`id` AS `id`,`ipl`.`code` AS `code`,`ipl`.`filename` AS `filename`,`ipl`.`print_properties` AS `print_properties`,`ipl`.`front_back` AS `front_back`,`ipl`.`config` AS `config`,`ipl`.`material_type` AS `material_type`,`ipl`.`date` AS `date`,`ipl`.`print_on_date` AS `print_on_date`,`ipl`.`quantity` AS `quantity`,`ipl`.`costing` AS `costing`,`ipl`.`print_pages` AS `print_pages`,`ipl`.`cost_of_printing_file` AS `cost_of_printing_file`,`ipl`.`cost_of_log` AS `cost_of_log`,`ipl`.`lot_no` AS `lot_no`,`ipl`.`is_extra` AS `is_extra`,`ipl`.`printer_cid` AS `printer_cid`,`ipl`.`comment` AS `comment`,`c`.`fname` AS `printer_name`,`ipl`.`status` AS `status`,`ipl`.`printed_on_date` AS `printed_on_date`,`ipl`.`approved` AS `approved`,`ipl`.`approved_date` AS `approved_date`,`ipl`.`folder_filter` AS `folder_filter`,`ipl`.`park` AS `park`,`ipl`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`ipl`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`ipl`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`ipl`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`ipl`.`duphash` AS `duphash` from (`inventory_print_log` `ipl` left join `contact` `c` on((`ipl`.`printer_cid` = `c`.`id`)));

  `not_found` int NOT NULL,
  `checker_emp_id` int NOT NULL,

  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.inventory_reconciliation_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `inventory_reconciliation_view` AS select `ir`.`id` AS `id`,`ir`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`ir`.`is_folder` AS `is_folder`,`ir`.`barcode` AS `code`,`ir`.`date` AS `date`,`ir`.`park` AS `park`,`ir`.`checked` AS `checked`,`ir`.`checked_at` AS `checked_at`,`ir`.`lot_no` AS `lot_no`,`ir`.`not_found` AS `not_found`,concat(`ir`.`date`,'_',`ir`.`venue_id`,'_Lot-',`ir`.`lot_no`) AS `lot_name`,`ir`.`checker_emp_id` AS `checker_emp_id`,`iv`.`pdf_filename` AS `pdf_filename`,`iv`.`material_type` AS `material_type`,`ir`.`created_at` AS `logged_at`,`ir`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`ir`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`ir`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`ir`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`pv`.`folder_level` AS `folder_level`,`pv`.`venue` AS `venue`,`v`.`venue` AS `logged_venue`,(case when (`pv`.`venue` <> `v`.`venue`) then 'warning' when (`pv`.`venue` = NULL) then '' else '' end) AS `row_color` from (((`inventory_reconciliation` `ir` left join `products_level_view` `pv` on(((`ir`.`barcode` = `pv`.`barcode`) and (`ir`.`is_folder` = 1) and (`pv`.`park` = 0)))) left join `venue` `v` on((`ir`.`venue_id` = `v`.`id`))) left join `inventory_view` `iv` on(((`ir`.`barcode` = `iv`.`code`) and (`ir`.`is_folder` = 0)))) order by `ir`.`id` desc;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.inventory_stock
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `inventory_stock` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `venue` varchar(70) DEFAULT NULL,
  `barcode` varchar(6) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `25` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `9` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `4` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `10` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `11` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `3` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `42` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `30` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `31` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `35` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `24` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `33` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `45` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `23` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `50` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `49` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `56` varchar(4) DEFAULT NULL,
  `47` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `39` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `44` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `43` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `40` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `41` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `48` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `46` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `34` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `58` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `29` varchar(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `60` varchar(1) NOT NULL COMMENT 'JBCN',
  `61` varchar(1) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Parel-Path Finder',

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.inventory_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `inventory_view` AS select `inventory`.`id` AS `id`,`inventory`.`code` AS `code`,`inventory`.`pdf_filename` AS `pdf_filename`,`inventory`.`ai_filename` AS `ai_filename`,`inventory`.`asset_pdf` AS `asset_pdf`,`inventory`.`asset_ai` AS `asset_ai`,`inventory`.`pdf_filename2` AS `pdf_filename2`,`inventory`.`asset_pdf2` AS `asset_pdf2`,`pc`.`id` AS `config_id`,`pc`.`config` AS `config`,`inventory`.`front_back` AS `front_back`,`inventory`.`folder` AS `folder`,`inventory`.`folders` AS `folders`,`inventory`.`print_properties` AS `print_properties`,`inventory`.`base_quantity` AS `base_quantity`,`inventory`.`type` AS `print_type`,`pt`.`type` AS `type`,`inventory`.`material_type` AS `material_type`,`ems`.`label` AS `extra_material_set`,`inventory`.`extra_material_set_id` AS `extra_material_set_id`,`inventory`.`cost_of_file` AS `cost_of_file`,`inventory`.`pages` AS `pages`,`inventory`.`view_barcode` AS `view_barcode`,`inventory`.`folderA` AS `folderA`,`inventory`.`folderB` AS `folderB`,`inventory`.`folderC` AS `folderC`,`inventory`.`folderD` AS `folderD`,`inventory`.`activity` AS `activity`,`inventory`.`activityB` AS `activityB`,`inventory`.`activityC` AS `activityC`,`inventory`.`activityD` AS `activityD`,`av`.`activity` AS `activity_name`,`av1`.`activity` AS `activityB_name`,`av2`.`activity` AS `activityC_name`,`av3`.`activity` AS `activityD_name`,`inventory`.`k_flag` AS `k_flag`,`inventory`.`k_flag_b` AS `k_flag_b`,`inventory`.`k_flag_c` AS `k_flag_c`,concat(`inventory`.`folderA`,',',`inventory`.`folderB`,',',`inventory`.`folderC`) AS `folder_ABC`,concat(`inventory`.`folderA`,',',`inventory`.`folderB`,',',`inventory`.`folderC`,',',`inventory`.`folderD`) AS `folder_ABCD`,`inventory`.`company_name` AS `company_name`,`inventory`.`park` AS `park`,`inventory`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`inventory`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by` from (((((((`inventory` left join `print_config` `pc` on((`inventory`.`config` = `pc`.`id`))) left join `print_type` `pt` on((`inventory`.`type` = `pt`.`id`))) left join `activities` `av` on((`inventory`.`activity` = `av`.`id`))) left join `activities` `av1` on((`inventory`.`activityB` = `av1`.`id`))) left join `activities` `av2` on((`inventory`.`activityC` = `av2`.`id`))) left join `activities` `av3` on((`inventory`.`activityD` = `av3`.`id`))) left join `extra_material_set` `ems` on((`inventory`.`extra_material_set_id` = `ems`.`id`)));

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.inventory_zip_print_log
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `inventory_zip_print_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `code` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `filename` varchar(550) NOT NULL,
  `print_properties` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `config` varchar(220) NOT NULL,
  `material_type` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `print_on_date` date NOT NULL,
  `quantity` int NOT NULL,
  `costing` float NOT NULL,
  `print_pages` int NOT NULL,
  `cost_of_printing_file` float NOT NULL,
  `cost_of_log` float NOT NULL,
  `cost_of_page` int NOT NULL,
  `lot_no` int NOT NULL,
  `printer_cid` int NOT NULL,
  `folder_filter` text NOT NULL,
  `zip_filename` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `approved` int NOT NULL,
  `approved_by` int NOT NULL,
  `approved_date` date NOT NULL,
  `rejected` int NOT NULL,
  `rejected_by` int NOT NULL,
  `rejected_date` date NOT NULL,
  `rescheduled` int NOT NULL,
  `rescheduled_date` date NOT NULL,
  `status` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-pending,1-downloaded ,2-, 3-dispatched, 4-approve, 5-rejected, 6- reschedule, 7- partial reject, 8-partial approve, 9- billed 10-partial dispatched\r\n',
  `park` int NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `duphash` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=190783 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.inventory_zip_print_log_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `inventory_zip_print_log_view` AS select `inventory_zip_print_log`.`id` AS `id`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`code` AS `code`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`filename` AS `filename`,`iv`.`pdf_filename` AS `actual_filename`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`print_properties` AS `print_properties`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`config` AS `config`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`material_type` AS `material_type`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`date` AS `date`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`print_on_date` AS `print_on_date`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`quantity` AS `quantity`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`costing` AS `costing`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`print_pages` AS `print_pages`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`cost_of_printing_file` AS `cost_of_printing_file`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`cost_of_log` AS `cost_of_log`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`cost_of_page` AS `cost_of_page`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`lot_no` AS `lot_no`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`printer_cid` AS `printer_cid`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`folder_filter` AS `folder_filter`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`zip_filename` AS `zip_filename`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`approved` AS `approved`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`approved_date` AS `approved_date`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`rejected` AS `rejected`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`rejected_by` AS `rejected_by`,`c`.`fname` AS `rejected_by_name`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`rejected_date` AS `rejected_date`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`rescheduled` AS `rescheduled`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`rescheduled_date` AS `rescheduled_date`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`status` AS `status`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`park` AS `park`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`inventory_zip_print_log`.`duphash` AS `duphash`,(case when (`inventory_zip_print_log`.`approved` = 1) then `inventory_zip_print_log`.`cost_of_log` else 0 end) AS `billing_cost` from ((`inventory_zip_print_log` left join `inventory` `iv` on((`inventory_zip_print_log`.`code` = `iv`.`code`))) left join `contact` `c` on((`inventory_zip_print_log`.`rejected_by` = `c`.`id`))) order by `inventory_zip_print_log`.`id` desc;

  `printer_name` varchar(550) NOT NULL,

  `cost_of_lot` int NOT NULL,
  `cost_of_page` int NOT NULL,
  `deleted` int NOT NULL,
  `downloaded` int NOT NULL,
  `dispatched` int NOT NULL,
  `dispatched_date` date NOT NULL,
  `approved` int NOT NULL,
  `approved_date` date NOT NULL,
  `rejected` int NOT NULL,
  `rejected_date` date NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.inventory_zips_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `inventory_zips_view` AS select `inventory_zips`.`id` AS `id`,`inventory_zips`.`date` AS `date`,`inventory_zips`.`time` AS `time`,`inventory_zips`.`filename` AS `filename`,`inventory_zips`.`archive_file_name` AS `archive_file_name`,`inventory_zips`.`lot_no` AS `lot_no`,cast(substring_index(`inventory_zips`.`lot_no`,'-',-(1)) as unsigned) AS `ordered_lot_no`,`inventory_zips`.`printer_name` AS `printer_name`,`inventory_zips`.`printer_cid` AS `printer_cid`,`inventory_zips`.`status` AS `status`,`inventory_zips`.`cost_of_lot` AS `cost_of_lot`,`inventory_zips`.`cost_of_page` AS `cost_of_page`,`inventory_zips`.`deleted` AS `deleted`,`inventory_zips`.`downloaded` AS `downloaded`,`inventory_zips`.`dispatched` AS `dispatched`,`inventory_zips`.`dispatched_date` AS `dispatched_date`,`inventory_zips`.`approved` AS `approved`,`inventory_zips`.`approved_date` AS `approved_date`,`inventory_zips`.`rejected` AS `rejected`,`inventory_zips`.`rejected_date` AS `rejected_date`,`inventory_zips`.`park` AS `park`,`inventory_zips`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`inventory_zips`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`inventory_zips`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`inventory_zips`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`) AS `fullname` from (`inventory_zips` join `contact` on((`inventory_zips`.`printer_cid` = `contact`.`id`))) where (`inventory_zips`.`park` = 0);


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.invoice
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `invoice` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `invoice` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'invoice no.',
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `code` int NOT NULL,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `amount` int NOT NULL,
  `tax` int NOT NULL,
  `tax_amount` int NOT NULL,
  `total` int NOT NULL,
  `employee_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'invoice creator',
  `balance` int NOT NULL,
  `quotation` int NOT NULL COMMENT ' 0 - Invoice / 1 - Quotation',
  `notes` varchar(5000) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Additional comments on invoice',
  `invoice_comment` varchar(1000) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `document` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `source_bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `dropout` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `freeze` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `invoice_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `batchless_link` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `summer_turn` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-Not initiated,\r\n1-initiated,\r\n2-already provided,\r\n3-couldn''t provide',
  `refund` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '1-refund approved\r\n2-refund completed',
  `exclude` int NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `sales_invoice_id` bigint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `sales_invoice_no` varchar(120) DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `invoice` (`invoice`),
  KEY `employee_id` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `code` (`code`),
  KEY `contact_id_2` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `invoice_2` (`invoice`),
  KEY `employee_id_2` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `code_2` (`code`),
  KEY `contact_id_3` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `invoice_3` (`invoice`),
  KEY `employee_id_3` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_3` (`park`),
  KEY `code_3` (`code`),
  KEY `contact_id_4` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `invoice_4` (`invoice`),
  KEY `employee_id_4` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_4` (`park`),
  KEY `code_4` (`code`),
  KEY `idx_invoice_contact_park_id` (`contact_id`,`park`,`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=41526 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.invoice_active_range_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `invoice_active_range_view` AS select `i`.`id` AS `id`,`i`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`i`.`bid` AS `bid`,`m`.`code` AS `member_code`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name`,`b`.`type` AS `type`,`ii`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`ba`.`batch` AS `batch`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,`ct`.`category` AS `category`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,`i`.`invoice` AS `invoice`,`ii`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`ii`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,`i`.`park` AS `park` from (((((((`invoice` `i` join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`i`.`id` = `ii`.`invoice_id`))) join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) left join `member` `m` on((`m`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `i`.`bid`))) left join `batch` `ba` on((`ba`.`id` = `ii`.`batch_id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`v`.`id` = `ba`.`venue_id`))) left join `category` `ct` on((`ct`.`id` = `ii`.`category_id`))) where (('2024-01-31' >= `ii`.`start_date`) and ('2024-01-01' <= `ii`.`end_date`) and (`i`.`park` = 0) and (`ii`.`park` = 0) and (`c`.`bid` <> 35));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.invoice_active_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `invoice_active_view` AS select `i`.`id` AS `id`,`i`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`i`.`bid` AS `bid`,`m`.`code` AS `member_code`,`b`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`type` AS `type`,`ii`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`ba`.`batch` AS `batch`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,`ct`.`category` AS `category`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,`i`.`invoice` AS `invoice`,`ii`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`ii`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,`i`.`park` AS `park` from (((((((`invoice` `i` join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`i`.`id` = `ii`.`invoice_id`))) join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) left join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `i`.`bid`))) left join `batch` `ba` on((`ba`.`id` = `ii`.`batch_id`))) left join `member` `m` on((`m`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`v`.`id` = `ba`.`venue_id`))) left join `category` `ct` on((`ct`.`id` = `ii`.`category_id`))) where (('2024-01-01' >= `ii`.`start_date`) and ('2024-12-31' <= `ii`.`end_date`) and (`i`.`park` = 0)) group by `i`.`contact_id`;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.invoice_change_log
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `invoice_change_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `invoice_id` int NOT NULL,
  `from_item_id` int NOT NULL,
  `to_item_id` int NOT NULL,
  `change` int NOT NULL COMMENT '(1-Extend, 2-Upgrade, 3-TDS, 4 - Discard Balance, 5 - Package Transfer)',
  `dropout_reason` varchar(300) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '-',
  `comment` varchar(1000) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `image` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `start_extend_days` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Start Date Extension Days',
  `extend_days` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Extension Days',
  `extend_session` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Extended sessions',
  `is_invalid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `invoice_id` (`invoice_id`),
  KEY `from_item_id` (`from_item_id`),
  KEY `to_item_id` (`to_item_id`),
  KEY `change` (`change`),
  KEY `invoice_id_2` (`invoice_id`),
  KEY `from_item_id_2` (`from_item_id`),
  KEY `to_item_id_2` (`to_item_id`),
  KEY `change_2` (`change`),
  KEY `invoice_id_3` (`invoice_id`),
  KEY `from_item_id_3` (`from_item_id`),
  KEY `to_item_id_3` (`to_item_id`),
  KEY `change_3` (`change`),
  KEY `invoice_id_4` (`invoice_id`),
  KEY `from_item_id_4` (`from_item_id`),
  KEY `to_item_id_4` (`to_item_id`),
  KEY `change_4` (`change`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=297622 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.invoice_change_log_view

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.invoice_expiry_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `invoice_expiry_view` AS select `i`.`id` AS `invoice_id`,`i`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`con`.`fname` AS `fname`,`con`.`lname` AS `lname`,`con`.`mname` AS `mname`,concat(`con`.`fname`,' ',`con`.`lname`,' ',`con`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,`con`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`con`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`con`.`email` AS `email`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`b`.`min_age` AS `min_age`,`b`.`max_age` AS `max_age`,`b`.`bid` AS `bid`,`b`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`vb`.`double_tick_sms` AS `venue_double_tick_sms`,`brn`.`double_tick_sms` AS `double_tick_sms`,`brn`.`renewal_doubletick_account` AS `renewal_doubletick_account`,`ct`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,`brn`.`branch` AS `branch`,`brn`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`i`.`park` AS `park`,`i`.`dropout` AS `dropout`,`i`.`freeze` AS `freeze`,`ii`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`ii`.`sessions` AS `sessions`,`ii`.`sessions_used` AS `sessions_used`,max(`ii`.`end_date`) AS `end_date`,`bav`.`contact_id` AS `batch_emp_contact_id`,`bav`.`mobile` AS `employee_mobile`,`bav`.`employee` AS `batch_employee`,`cev`.`counsellor_name` AS `counsellor_name`,`cev`.`counsellor_email` AS `counsellor_email`,(case when ((select `contact`.`mobile` from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `ii`.`sc_contact_id`)) is null) then `cev`.`mobile` else (select `contact`.`mobile` from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `ii`.`sc_contact_id`)) end) AS `senior_mobile`,(case when ((select concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`,' ',`contact`.`mname`) from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `tc`.`c_contact_id`)) is null) then `cev`.`counsellor_name` else (select `contact`.`fname` from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `tc`.`c_contact_id`)) end) AS `new_senior_counsellor_name`,(case when ((select `contact`.`email` from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `tc`.`c_contact_id`)) is null) then `cev`.`counsellor_email` else (select `contact`.`email` from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `tc`.`c_contact_id`)) end) AS `new_senior_counsellor_email`,(case when ((select `contact`.`mobile2` from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `tc`.`c_contact_id`)) is null) then (select `contact`.`mobile` from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `tc`.`c_contact_id`)) else (select `contact`.`mobile2` from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `tc`.`c_contact_id`)) end) AS `new_senior_counsellor_mobile` from (((((((((((`invoice` `i` join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`i`.`id` = `ii`.`invoice_id`))) join (select `e`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`c`.`fname`) AS `counsellor_name`,`c`.`email` AS `counsellor_email`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile` from (`contact` `c` join `employee` `e` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`)))) `cev` on((`cev`.`id` = `i`.`employee_id`))) join `category` `c` on((`ii`.`category_id` = `c`.`id`))) join `contact` `con` on((`i`.`contact_id` = `con`.`id`))) left join `batch` `b` on((`ii`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `batch_view` `bav` on((`bav`.`id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `branch` `brn` on((`brn`.`id` = `i`.`bid`))) left join `batch_employee` `bemp` on((`ii`.`batch_id` = `bemp`.`batch_id`))) left join `teacher_counsellor` `tc` on((`bemp`.`contact_id` = `tc`.`t_contact_id`))) left join `venue_bid` `vb` on(((`b`.`venue_id` = `vb`.`venue_id`) and (`b`.`bid` = `vb`.`bid`) and (`vb`.`park` = 0)))) left join `category` `ct` on((`ct`.`id` = `b`.`category_id`))) where ((`brn`.`type` <> 'TEMP') and (`i`.`park` = 0) and (`i`.`balance` = 0) and `i`.`id` in (select max(`mi`.`id`) from `invoice` `mi` where (`mi`.`park` = 0) group by `mi`.`contact_id`)) group by `i`.`contact_id` order by `b`.`venue_id` desc;

',`con`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,`con`.`fname` AS `fname`,`con`.`mname` AS `mname`,`con`.`lname` AS `lname`,`con`.`gstin` AS `gstin`,concat(`i`.`code`,' - ',`con`.`fname`,' ',`con`.`lname`,' ',`con`.`mname`) AS `code_name`,`con`.`company` AS `company`,`con`.`company_add` AS `company_add`,`m`.`code` AS `code`,`con`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`b`.`assistant_teacher_cid` AS `assistant_teacher_cid`,`con`.`email` AS `email`,`i`.`amount` AS `invoice_amount`,`i`.`tax` AS `invoice_tax`,`i`.`tax_amount` AS `tax_amount`,`i`.`total` AS `total`,`i`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`i`.`balance` AS `balance`,`ii`.`id` AS `item_id`,`ii`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`ii`.`service_id` AS `service_id`,`ii`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`ii`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,date_format(`ii`.`start_date`,'%d %b %y') AS `start_date_string`,date_format(`ii`.`end_date`,'%d %b %y') AS `end_date_string`,`ii`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`ii`.`item_amount` AS `item_amount`,`ii`.`item_tax` AS `item_tax`,`ii`.`item_tax_amount` AS `item_tax_amount`,`ii`.`item_tax_type` AS `item_tax_type`,`ii`.`item_total` AS `item_total`,`ii`.`sessions` AS `sessions`,concat(`ii`.`sessions_used`,' / ',`ii`.`sessions`) AS `session_consumed`,`ii`.`item_discount` AS `item_discount`,`ii`.`sessions_used` AS `sessions_used`,`ii`.`change_id` AS `change_id`,`ii`.`item_change` AS `item_change`,`ii`.`extend_reason` AS `extend_reason`,`c`.`category` AS `category`,`sess`.`id` AS `session_id`,`s`.`service` AS `service`,`s`.`amount` AS `service_amount`,(case when (`s`.`module_id` is not null) then `s`.`module_id` else '0' end) AS `module_id`,`s`.`module` AS `module`,`s`.`ref_material` AS `ref_material`,min(`sess`.`date`) AS `module_start`,max(`sess`.`date`) AS `module_end`,`s`.`tax` AS `service_tax`,`s`.`tax_type` AS `service_tax_type`,`s`.`duration` AS `duration`,`s`.`duration_type` AS `duration_type`,`b`.`employee` AS `batch_employee`,`b`.`days` AS `batch_days`,`ii`.`is_product` AS `is_product`,`ii`.`renew` AS `renew`,`ii`.`park` AS `item_park`,`i`.`bid` AS `bid`,`i`.`park` AS `park`,`i`.`created_at` AS `created_at` from ((((((((`invoice` `i` join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`i`.`id` = `ii`.`invoice_id`))) join `category` `c` on((`ii`.`category_id` = `c`.`id`))) join `service_module_view` `s` on((`ii`.`service_id` = `s`.`service_id`))) join `contact` `con` on((`i`.`contact_id` = `con`.`id`))) join `member` `m` on(((`m`.`code` = `i`.`code`) and (`i`.`contact_id` = `m`.`contact_id`)))) left join `batch_view` `b` on((`ii`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `session_master` `sess_mas` on((`sess_mas`.`module_id` = `s`.`module_id`))) left join `session` `sess` on(((`sess_mas`.`id` = `sess`.`session_master_id`) and (`sess`.`batch_id` = `ii`.`batch_id`)))) where (`i`.`freeze` = 0) group by `s`.`module_id`,`ii`.`id`;

AS `master_category_id`,`cm`.`stage` AS `stage`,`c`.`category` AS `category`,`s`.`service` AS `service`,`s`.`amount` AS `service_amount`,`s`.`module_id` AS `module_id`,`s`.`topic_id` AS ',`contact`.`lname`,' ',`contact`.`mname`) from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `be`.`contact_id`)) AS `batch_employee_name`,`be`.`employee` AS `batch_employee`,`be`.`contact_id` AS `counsellor_name`,`cecv`.`counsellor_email` AS `counsellor_email`,(case when ((select concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`,' ',`contact`.`mname`) from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `ii`.`sc_contact_id`)) is null) then `cecv`.`counsellor_name` else (select concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`,' ',`contact`.`mname`) from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `contact` `con` on((`i`.`contact_id` = `con`.`id`))) join `member` `m` on(((`m`.`code` = `i`.`code`) and (`i`.`contact_id` = `m`.`contact_id`)))) left join `category_master` `cm` on((`c`.`master_category_id` = `cm`.`id`))) left join `batch` `b` on((`ii`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `batch_view` `be` on((`be`.`id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `branch` on((`i`.`bid` = `branch`.`id`))) left join `venue_bid` `vb` on(((`b`.`venue_id` = `vb`.`venue_id`) and (`b`.`bid` = `vb`.`bid`) and (`vb`.`park` = 0)))) order by `i`.`id` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.invoice_item
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `invoice_item` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `invoice_id` int NOT NULL,
  `category_id` int NOT NULL,
  `service_id` int NOT NULL,
  `start_date` date NOT NULL,
  `end_date` date NOT NULL,
  `batch_id` int NOT NULL,
  `senior_counsellor` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `sc_contact_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `item_amount` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Service Amount',
  `item_discount` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Discounted Amount',
  `item_disallowed_discount` int NOT NULL,
  `referral_code` varchar(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `promo_code` varchar(30) NOT NULL,
  `redemed` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `offer_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `sessions` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `sessions_used` int NOT NULL,
  `item_change` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - No / 1 - Extend / 2 - Upgrade / 3 - Downgrade',
  `change_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Item Changed from Id',
  `extend_reason` varchar(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Reason for validity / sessions extention',
  `module_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `item_tax` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'tax on service %',
  `item_tax_amount` int NOT NULL COMMENT '(tax amount on item',
  `item_total` int NOT NULL COMMENT '(amount - discount) + tax',
  `free_trial` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - No / 1 - Yes ',
  `item_tax_type` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0 - No Tax / 1 - Inc / 2 - Exc',
  `billing_cycle` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0: No Billing Cycle 1: BatchWise 2: MonthWise',
  `service_amount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Original amount of service if billing cycle applied',
  `session_settled` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0 - not / 1 - Yes) settled in nxt invoice',
  `is_product` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag(0 - Not / 1 - Yes) a product',
  `renew` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - No, 1 - Renewed',
  `currency` varchar(3) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INR',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `category_id` (`category_id`),
  KEY `invoice_id` (`invoice_id`),
  KEY `service_id` (`service_id`),
  KEY `batch_id` (`batch_id`),
  KEY `change_id` (`change_id`),
  KEY `module_id` (`module_id`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `idx_invoice_active` (`batch_id`,`start_date`,`end_date`,`park`),
  KEY `idx_invoice_item_ledger_posting` (`park`,`invoice_id`,`batch_id`,`category_id`,`start_date`,`end_date`,`sessions`,`sessions_used`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=44373 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.invoice_item_discount
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `invoice_item_discount` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `item_id` int NOT NULL,
  `type` varchar(30) NOT NULL,
  `amount` int NOT NULL,
  `disallowed` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=8265 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

  `end_date` date NOT NULL,

  `sc_contact_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `item_amount` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Service Amount',
  `item_discount` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Discounted Amount',
  `referral_code` varchar(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `promo_code` varchar(30) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `redemed` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `offer_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `sessions` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `sessions_used` int NOT NULL,
  `item_change` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - No / 1 - Extend / 2 - Upgrade / 3 - Downgrade',
  `change_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Item Changed from Id',
  `extend_reason` varchar(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Reason for validity / sessions extention',
  `module_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `item_tax` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'tax on service %',
  `item_tax_amount` int NOT NULL COMMENT '(tax amount on item',
  `item_total` int NOT NULL COMMENT '(amount - discount) + tax',
  `free_trial` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - No / 1 - Yes ',
  `item_tax_type` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0 - No Tax / 1 - Inc / 2 - Exc',
  `billing_cycle` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0: No Billing Cycle 1: BatchWise 2: MonthWise',
  `service_amount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Original amount of service if billing cycle applied',
  `session_settled` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0 - not / 1 - Yes) settled in nxt invoice',
  `is_product` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag(0 - Not / 1 - Yes) a product',
  `renew` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - No, 1 - Renewed',
  `currency` varchar(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Rs.',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `category_id` (`category_id`),
  KEY `invoice_id` (`invoice_id`),
  KEY `service_id` (`service_id`),
  KEY `batch_id` (`batch_id`),
  KEY `change_id` (`change_id`),
  KEY `module_id` (`module_id`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `category_id_2` (`category_id`),
  KEY `invoice_id_2` (`invoice_id`),
  KEY `service_id_2` (`service_id`),
  KEY `batch_id_2` (`batch_id`),
  KEY `change_id_2` (`change_id`),
  KEY `module_id_2` (`module_id`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `category_id_3` (`category_id`),
  KEY `invoice_id_3` (`invoice_id`),
  KEY `service_id_3` (`service_id`),
  KEY `batch_id_3` (`batch_id`),
  KEY `change_id_3` (`change_id`),
  KEY `module_id_3` (`module_id`),
  KEY `park_3` (`park`),
  KEY `category_id_4` (`category_id`),
  KEY `invoice_id_4` (`invoice_id`),
  KEY `service_id_4` (`service_id`),
  KEY `batch_id_4` (`batch_id`),
  KEY `change_id_4` (`change_id`),
  KEY `module_id_4` (`module_id`),
  KEY `park_4` (`park`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=8947 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.invoice_list_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `invoice_list_view` AS select `i`.`id` AS `invoice_id`,`i`.`id` AS `id`,`i`.`invoice` AS `invoice`,`i`.`quotation` AS `quotation`,`i`.`date` AS `date`,date_format(`i`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `date_string`,`i`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,concat(`con`.`fname`,' ',`con`.`lname`,' ',`con`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,`con`.`dob` AS `dob`,`i`.`dropout` AS `dropout`,`con`.`fname` AS `fname`,`con`.`mname` AS `mname`,`con`.`lname` AS `lname`,`con`.`age` AS `age`,(case when (`con`.`dob` = '0000-00-00') then '-' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`con`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 0) then 'below 0' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`con`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 1) then '0-1' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`con`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 2) then '1-2' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`con`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 3) then '2-3' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`con`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 4) then '3-4' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`con`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 5) then '4-5' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`con`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 6) then '5-6' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`con`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 7) then '6-7' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`con`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 8) then '7-8' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`con`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 9) then '8-9' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`con`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 10) then '9-10' else 'above 10' end) AS `age_group`,`con`.`gstin` AS `gstin`,concat(`i`.`code`,' - ',`con`.`fname`,' ',`con`.`lname`,' ',`con`.`mname`) AS `code_name`,`con`.`company` AS `company`,`con`.`company_add` AS `company_add`,`m`.`code` AS `code`,`con`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`con`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`con`.`email` AS `email`,`i`.`amount` AS `invoice_amount`,`i`.`tax` AS `invoice_tax`,`i`.`tax_amount` AS `tax_amount`,`i`.`total` AS `total`,`p`.`pay_mode_text` AS `pay_mode`,`i`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`i`.`balance` AS `balance`,`ii`.`id` AS `item_id`,`ii`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`ii`.`service_id` AS `service_id`,`ii`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,max(`ii`.`end_date`) AS `end_date`,date_format(`ii`.`start_date`,'%d %b %y') AS `start_date_string`,date_format(max(`ii`.`end_date`),'%d %b %y') AS `end_date_string`,`ii`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`ii`.`item_amount` AS `item_amount`,`ii`.`item_tax` AS `item_tax`,`ii`.`item_tax_amount` AS `item_tax_amount`,`ii`.`item_tax_type` AS `item_tax_type`,`ii`.`item_total` AS `item_total`,`ii`.`sessions` AS `sessions`,concat(`ii`.`sessions_used`,' / ',`ii`.`sessions`) AS `session_consumed`,`ii`.`item_discount` AS `item_discount`,`ii`.`sessions_used` AS `sessions_used`,`ii`.`change_id` AS `change_id`,`ii`.`item_change` AS `item_change`,`ii`.`extend_reason` AS `extend_reason`,`c`.`category` AS `category`,`s`.`service` AS `service`,`s`.`amount` AS `service_amount`,`s`.`tax` AS `service_tax`,`s`.`tax_type` AS `service_tax_type`,`s`.`duration` AS `duration`,`s`.`duration_type` AS `duration_type`,`be`.`employee` AS `batch_employee`,`be`.`days` AS `batch_days`,`ii`.`is_product` AS `is_product`,`ii`.`park` AS `item_park`,`i`.`bid` AS `bid`,`branch`.`branch` AS `branch`,`branch`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`i`.`park` AS `park`,`i`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,concat(`u`.`fname`,' ',`u`.`lname`) AS `created_by`,`u`.`id` AS `user_id` from ((((((((((`invoice` `i` join `invoice_item` `ii`) join `category` `c`) join `service` `s`) join `contact` `con`) join `member` `m`) join `branch` on((`branch`.`id` = `i`.`bid`))) left join `batch` `b` on((`ii`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `payment` `p` on((`p`.`invoice_id` = `i`.`id`))) left join `batch_view` `be` on((`be`.`id` = `b`.`id`))) join `pf_central`.`user` `u` on((`u`.`id` = `i`.`created_by`))) where ((`i`.`id` = `ii`.`invoice_id`) and (`ii`.`service_id` = `s`.`id`) and (`ii`.`category_id` = `c`.`id`) and (`i`.`contact_id` = `con`.`id`) and (`m`.`code` = `i`.`code`) and (`i`.`contact_id` = `m`.`contact_id`)) group by `i`.`id`;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.invoice_online
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `invoice_online` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `invoice` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'invoice no.',
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `code` int NOT NULL,
  `isMember` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `amount` int NOT NULL,
  `tax` int NOT NULL,
  `tax_amount` int NOT NULL,
  `total` int NOT NULL,
  `employee_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'invoice creator',
  `balance` int NOT NULL,
  `quotation` int NOT NULL COMMENT ' 0 - Invoice / 1 - Quotation',
  `notes` varchar(5000) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Additional comments on invoice',
  `batchless_link` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `dropout` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `freeze` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `invoice` (`invoice`),
  KEY `employee_id` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `code` (`code`),
  KEY `contact_id_2` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `invoice_2` (`invoice`),
  KEY `employee_id_2` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `code_2` (`code`),
  KEY `contact_id_3` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `invoice_3` (`invoice`),
  KEY `employee_id_3` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_3` (`park`),
  KEY `code_3` (`code`),
  KEY `contact_id_4` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `invoice_4` (`invoice`),
  KEY `employee_id_4` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_4` (`park`),
  KEY `code_4` (`code`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=8903 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.invoice_payment_coco_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `invoice_payment_coco_view` AS select `p`.`id` AS `id`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`mname` AS `mname`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`i`.`invoice` AS `invoice`,`i`.`quotation` AS `quotation`,`i`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`i`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`ive`.`contact_id` AS `ivc_contact_id`,concat(`ivc`.`fname`,' ',`ivc`.`lname`) AS `ivc_name`,`cat`.`category` AS `category`,`cat`.`id` AS `category_id`,`cat`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,`branch`.`branch` AS `branch`,`branch`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`branch`.`royalty` AS `royalty`,`branch`.`offline_royalty` AS `offline_royalty`,`branch`.`tds` AS `tds`,`branch`.`zoom` AS `zoom`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`v`.`id` AS `venue_id`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,replace(`v`.`venue`,' ','+') AS `link_search`,`v`.`address` AS `venue_address`,`bec`.`fname` AS `batch_emp_fname`,`i`.`code` AS `code`,concat(`i`.`code`,'-',`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `code_fullname`,`p`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,`p`.`date` AS `pay_date`,date_format(`p`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `pay_date_string`,`i`.`date` AS `invoice_date`,date_format(`i`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `invoice_date_string`,`ii`.`sessions` AS `sessions`,`ii`.`sessions_used` AS `sessions_used`,concat(`ii`.`sessions_used`,'/',`ii`.`sessions`) AS `sessions_consumed`,`ii`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,date_format(`ii`.`start_date`,'%D %M, %Y') AS `invoice_start_date_string`,`p`.`amount` AS `pay_amount`,`p`.`actual_amount` AS `actual_amount`,`i`.`total` AS `total`,`p`.`reminder` AS `reminder`,(case when (`p`.`clear` >= '1') then `p`.`date` else `p`.`reminder` end) AS `date`,date_format(`p`.`reminder`,'%d %b %y') AS `reminder_string`,`i`.`balance` AS `balance`,`branch`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name_actual`,`p`.`balance` AS `pay_balance`,`p`.`receipt` AS `receipt`,concat(`branch`.`branch`,'-',`p`.`receipt`) AS `full_receipt`,`p`.`pay_mode` AS `pay_mode`,`p`.`pay_mode_text` AS `pay_mode_text`,`p`.`pay_link` AS `pay_link`,`p`.`comment` AS `comment`,`p`.`clear` AS `clear`,`p`.`error` AS `error`,`p`.`park` AS `park`,`i`.`park` AS `invoice_park`,`p`.`bid` AS `bid`,`p`.`addpay_title` AS `addpay_title`,`p`.`addpay_amount` AS `addpay_amount`,`p`.`addpay_percent` AS `addpay_percent`,`p`.`addpay_id` AS `addpay_id`,`p`.`addpay_type` AS `addpay_type`,`p`.`receipt_copy` AS `receipt_copy`,concat(`u`.`fname`,' ',`u`.`lname`) AS `created_by`,`u`.`id` AS `user_id`,`s`.`service` AS `service`,`ii`.`renew` AS `renew`,(select count(`invoice`.`contact_id`) from `invoice` where ((`invoice`.`contact_id` = `i`.`contact_id`) and (`invoice`.`park` = 0) and (`invoice`.`amount` <> '0') and (`invoice`.`amount` <> '510'))) AS `renewed`,`p`.`pay_id` AS `pay_id` from (((((((((((((`contact` `c` join `invoice` `i` on((`c`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) join `payment` `p` on((`i`.`id` = `p`.`invoice_id`))) join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`ii`.`invoice_id` = `i`.`id`))) join `category` `cat` on((`cat`.`id` = `ii`.`category_id`))) join `batch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `ii`.`batch_id`))) join `service` `s` on((`s`.`id` = `ii`.`service_id`))) join `pf_central`.`user` `u` on((`u`.`id` = `i`.`created_by`))) join `branch` on((`branch`.`id` = `i`.`bid`))) join `batch_employee` `be` on((`ii`.`batch_id` = `be`.`batch_id`))) join `contact` `bec` on((`be`.`contact_id` = `bec`.`id`))) left join `employee` `ive` on((`ive`.`id` = `i`.`employee_id`))) left join `contact` `ivc` on((`ivc`.`id` = `ive`.`contact_id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`v`.`id` = `b`.`venue_id`))) where (`branch`.`type` = 'COCO') group by `p`.`id`;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.invoice_payment_franchisee_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `invoice_payment_franchisee_view` AS select `p`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`i`.`invoice` AS `invoice`,`i`.`amount` AS `amount`,`i`.`tax` AS `tax`,`i`.`tax_amount` AS `tax_amount`,`i`.`invoice_count` AS `invoice_count`,`cat`.`category` AS `category`,`cat`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,(case when (`mtr`.`invoice_id` is not null) then `bomo`.`owner_name` else `bom`.`owner_name` end) AS `owner_name`,concat(`i`.`code`,'-',`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `code_fullname`,`p`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,date_format(`p`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `pay_date_string`,`ii`.`item_discount` AS `item_discount`,`ii`.`item_disallowed_discount` AS `item_disallowed_discount`,(case when (`ii`.`promo_code` like 'TRDIW%') then `i`.`amount` else `p`.`amount` end) AS `pay_amount`,`p`.`calculated_amount` AS `calculated_amount`,`i`.`total` AS `total`,(case when (`p`.`clear` >= '1') then `p`.`date` else `p`.`reminder` end) AS `date`,`branch`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name_actual`,`p`.`pay_mode_text` AS `pay_mode_text`,`p`.`comment` AS `comment`,`p`.`clear` AS `clear`,`p`.`park` AS `park`,`i`.`park` AS `invoice_park`,`p`.`receipt_copy` AS `receipt_copy`,`p`.`declaration_copy` AS `declaration_copy`,`s`.`id` AS `service_id`,`s`.`service` AS `service`,`p`.`pay_id` AS `pay_id`,`p`.`vendor` AS `vendor`,`branch`.`accounts_model` AS `accounts_model`,`mtr`.`invoice_id` AS `mtr_invoice_id`,(case when (`mtr`.`invoice_id` is not null) then `mtr`.`bid` else `p`.`bid` end) AS `bid`,(case when (`mtr`.`invoice_id` is not null) then convert(`mtr`.`branch` using utf8mb4) else convert(`branch`.`branch` using utf8mb4) end) AS `branch`,(case when (`mtr`.`invoice_id` is not null) then convert(`mtr`.`type` using utf8mb4) else convert(`branch`.`type` using utf8mb4) end) AS `branch_type`,(case when (`mtr`.`invoice_id` is not null) then convert(`mtr`.`branch_invoice_name` using utf8mb4) else convert(`branch`.`branch_invoice_name` using utf8mb4) end) AS `branch_invoice_name`,(case when (`mtr`.`invoice_id` is not null) then `mtr`.`branch_owner_id` else `branch`.`invoice_name_id` end) AS `invoice_name_id`,(case when (`mtr`.`invoice_id` is not null) then `mtr`.`branch_online_rolyalty` else `branch`.`royalty` end) AS `royalty`,(case when (`mtr`.`invoice_id` is not null) then `mtr`.`tds` else `branch`.`tds` end) AS `tds`,(case when (`mtr`.`invoice_id` is not null) then `mtr`.`zoom` else `branch`.`zoom` end) AS `zoom`,(case when (`mtr`.`invoice_id` is not null) then `mtr`.`venue_id` else `v`.`id` end) AS `venue_id`,(case when (`mtr`.`invoice_id` is not null) then `mtr`.`venue_offline_royalty` else `v`.`royalty` end) AS `venue_offline_royalty`,(case when (`mtr`.`invoice_id` is not null) then convert(`mtr`.`venue_display_name` using utf8mb4) else convert(`v`.`display_name` using utf8mb4) end) AS `venue_display_name`,(case when (`mtr`.`invoice_id` is not null) then convert(`mtr`.`venue_owner_name_id` using utf8mb4) else convert(`v`.`owner_name_id` using utf8mb4) end) AS `owner_name_id`,(case when (`mtr`.`invoice_id` is not null) then convert(`mtr`.`venue` using utf8mb4) else convert(`v`.`venue` using utf8mb4) end) AS `venue` from ((((((((((((((((`contact` `c` join `invoice` `i` on((`c`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) join `payment` `p` on(((`i`.`id` = `p`.`invoice_id`) and (`p`.`park` = 0)))) join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`ii`.`invoice_id` = `i`.`id`))) join `category` `cat` on((`cat`.`id` = `ii`.`category_id`))) join `batch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `ii`.`batch_id`))) join `service` `s` on((`s`.`id` = `ii`.`service_id`))) join `pf_central`.`user` `u` on((`u`.`id` = `i`.`created_by`))) join `branch` on((`branch`.`id` = `i`.`bid`))) join `batch_employee` `be` on((`ii`.`batch_id` = `be`.`batch_id`))) join `contact` `bec` on((`be`.`contact_id` = `bec`.`id`))) left join `employee` `ive` on((`ive`.`id` = `i`.`employee_id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`v`.`id` = `b`.`venue_id`))) left join `zone_master` `zm` on((`v`.`zone` = `zm`.`id`))) left join `branch_owner_master` `bom` on((`v`.`owner_name_id` = `bom`.`id`))) left join `member_transfer_origin_view` `mtr` on((`mtr`.`invoice_id` = `p`.`invoice_id`))) left join `branch_owner_master` `bomo` on((`mtr`.`venue_owner_name_id` = `bomo`.`id`))) group by `p`.`id`;

`i`.`contact_id`) and (`invoice`.`park` = 0) and (`invoice`.`amount` <> '0') and (`invoice`.`amount` <> '510') and (`c2`.`blogger` = 0))) AS `renewed`,`p`.`pay_id` AS `pay_id` from ((((((((((((((((`contact` `c` join `invoice` `i` on((`c`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) join `payment` `p` on((`i`.`id` = `p`.`invoice_id`))) join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`ii`.`invoice_id` = `i`.`id`))) join `category` `cat` on((`cat`.`id` = `ii`.`category_id`))) join `batch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `ii`.`batch_id`))) join `service` `s` on((`s`.`id` = `ii`.`service_id`))) join `pf_central`.`user` `u` on((`u`.`id` = `i`.`created_by`))) join `branch` on((`branch`.`id` = `i`.`bid`))) join `batch_employee` `be` on((`ii`.`batch_id` = `be`.`batch_id`))) join `contact` `bec` on((`be`.`contact_id` = `bec`.`id`))) left join `employee` `ive` on((`ive`.`id` = `i`.`employee_id`))) left join `contact` `ivc` on((`ivc`.`id` = `ive`.`contact_id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`v`.`id` = `b`.`venue_id`))) left join `zone_master` `zm` on((`v`.`zone` = `zm`.`id`))) left join `branch_owner_master` `bom` on((`branch`.`invoice_name_id` = `bom`.`id`))) left join `inquiry` `inq` on(((`inq`.`contact_id` = `i`.`contact_id`) and (`inq`.`park` = 0)))) group by `p`.`id`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.invoice_payment_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `invoice_payment_view` AS select `p`.`id` AS `id`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`mname` AS `mname`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`i`.`invoice` AS `invoice`,`i`.`quotation` AS `quotation`,`i`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`i`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`ive`.`contact_id` AS `ivc_contact_id`,`i`.`amount` AS `amount`,`i`.`tax` AS `tax`,`i`.`tax_amount` AS `tax_amount`,`i`.`batchless_link` AS `batchless_link`,concat(`ivc`.`fname`,' ',`ivc`.`lname`) AS `ivc_name`,`cat`.`category` AS `category`,`cat`.`id` AS `category_id`,`cat`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,`branch`.`branch` AS `branch`,`branch`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`branch`.`accounts_model` AS `accounts_model`,`branch`.`branch_invoice_name` AS `branch_invoice_name`,`branch`.`invoice_name_id` AS `invoice_name_id`,`branch`.`royalty` AS `royalty`,`branch`.`offline_royalty` AS `offline_royalty`,`v`.`royalty` AS `venue_offline_royalty`,`branch`.`tds` AS `tds`,`branch`.`zoom` AS `zoom`,`b`.`id` AS `batch_id`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`b`.`display_name` AS `display_name`,`v`.`id` AS `venue_id`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,`v`.`display_name` AS `venue_display_name`,`v`.`owner_name_id` AS `owner_name_id`,`bom`.`owner_name` AS `owner_name`,`v`.`zone` AS `venue_zone_id`,`zm`.`zone` AS `venue_zone`,replace(`v`.`address`,' ','+') AS `link_search`,`v`.`address` AS `venue_address`,`bec`.`fname` AS `batch_emp_fname`,`i`.`code` AS `code`,concat(`i`.`code`,'-',`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `code_fullname`,`p`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,`p`.`date` AS `pay_date`,date_format(`p`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `pay_date_string`,`i`.`date` AS `invoice_date`,date_format(`i`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `invoice_date_string`,`ii`.`sessions` AS `sessions`,`ii`.`id` AS `item_id`,`ii`.`sessions_used` AS `sessions_used`,`ii`.`item_discount` AS `item_discount`,`ii`.`item_disallowed_discount` AS `item_disallowed_discount`,`ii`.`promo_code` AS `promo_code`,`ii`.`currency` AS `currency`,concat(`ii`.`sessions_used`,'/',`ii`.`sessions`) AS `sessions_consumed`,`ii`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,date_format(`ii`.`start_date`,'%D %M, %Y') AS `invoice_start_date_string`,`ii`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,date_format(`ii`.`end_date`,'%D %M, %Y') AS `invoice_end_date_string`,(case when (`ii`.`promo_code` like 'TRDIW%') then `i`.`amount` else `p`.`amount` end) AS `pay_amount`,`p`.`order_reference_no` AS `order_reference_no`,`p`.`actual_amount` AS `actual_amount`,`p`.`calculated_amount` AS `calculated_amount`,`p`.`ship_date_time` AS `ship_date_time`,`p`.`order_stlmt_date` AS `order_stlmt_date`,`p`.`order_fee_perc_value` AS `order_fee_perc_value`,`p`.`order_tax` AS `order_tax`,`i`.`total` AS `total`,`p`.`reminder` AS `reminder`,(case when (`p`.`clear` >= '1') then `p`.`date` else `p`.`reminder` end) AS `date`,date_format(`p`.`reminder`,'%d %b %y') AS `reminder_string`,`i`.`balance` AS `balance`,`branch`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name_actual`,`p`.`balance` AS `pay_balance`,`p`.`receipt` AS `receipt`,concat(`branch`.`branch`,'-',`p`.`receipt`) AS `full_receipt`,`p`.`pay_mode` AS `pay_mode`,`p`.`pay_mode_text` AS `pay_mode_text`,`p`.`payment_mode` AS `pay_method`,`p`.`pay_link` AS `pay_link`,`b`.`whatsapp_link` AS `whatsapp_link`,`p`.`comment` AS `comment`,`p`.`clear` AS `clear`,`p`.`error` AS `error`,`p`.`park` AS `park`,`i`.`park` AS `invoice_park`,`p`.`bid` AS `bid`,`p`.`addpay_title` AS `addpay_title`,`p`.`addpay_amount` AS `addpay_amount`,`p`.`addpay_percent` AS `addpay_percent`,`p`.`addpay_id` AS `addpay_id`,`p`.`addpay_type` AS `addpay_type`,`p`.`card_name` AS `card_name`,`p`.`receipt_copy` AS `receipt_copy`,`p`.`declaration_copy` AS `declaration_copy`,concat(`u`.`fname`,' ',`u`.`lname`) AS `created_by`,`u`.`id` AS `user_id`,`s`.`id` AS `service_id`,`s`.`service` AS `service`,`s`.`private_service` AS `private_service`,concat(`s`.`duration`,' ',`s`.`duration_type`) AS `duration`,`ii`.`renew` AS `renew`,`i`.`invoice_count` AS `invoice_count`,`inq`.`qualifier_id` AS `qualifier_id`,(select count(`invoice`.`contact_id`) from (`invoice` join `contact` `c2` on((`invoice`.`contact_id` = `c2`.`id`))) where ((`invoice`.`contact_id` = `i`.`contact_id`) and (`invoice`.`park` = 0) and (`invoice`.`amount` <> '0') and (`invoice`.`amount` <> '510') and (`c2`.`blogger` = 0) and (`invoice`.`exclude` = 0))) AS `renewed`,`p`.`pay_id` AS `pay_id` from ((((((((((((((((`contact` `c` join `invoice` `i` on((`c`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) join `payment` `p` on(((`i`.`id` = `p`.`invoice_id`) and (`p`.`park` = 0)))) join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`ii`.`invoice_id` = `i`.`id`))) join `category` `cat` on((`cat`.`id` = `ii`.`category_id`))) join `batch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `ii`.`batch_id`))) join `service` `s` on((`s`.`id` = `ii`.`service_id`))) join `pf_central`.`user` `u` on((`u`.`id` = `i`.`created_by`))) join `branch` on((`branch`.`id` = `i`.`bid`))) join `batch_employee` `be` on((`ii`.`batch_id` = `be`.`batch_id`))) join `contact` `bec` on((`be`.`contact_id` = `bec`.`id`))) left join `employee` `ive` on((`ive`.`id` = `i`.`employee_id`))) left join `contact` `ivc` on((`ivc`.`id` = `ive`.`contact_id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`v`.`id` = `b`.`venue_id`))) left join `zone_master` `zm` on((`v`.`zone` = `zm`.`id`))) left join `branch_owner_master` `bom` on((`v`.`owner_name_id` = `bom`.`id`))) left join `inquiry` `inq` on(((`inq`.`contact_id` = `i`.`contact_id`) and (`inq`.`park` = 0)))) group by `p`.`id`;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.invoice_refund
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `invoice_refund` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `invoice_id` int NOT NULL,
  `sessions_pending` int NOT NULL,
  `sessions_makeup` int NOT NULL,
  `amount_per_session` int NOT NULL,
  `comment` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `amount_refund` int NOT NULL,
  `transaction_id` varchar(2000) NOT NULL,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `source` int NOT NULL,
  `refund_categories` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-None,1-Fully Refunded,\r\n2-Partially Refunded',
  `type` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0 - None, 1 -Graduation',
  `transaction_status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '1-Pending Approval,\r\n2-on Hold,\r\n3-Approved',
  `update_reason` varchar(1000) NOT NULL,
  `approved_by` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=79 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.invoice_refund_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `invoice_refund_view` AS select `ir`.`id` AS `id`,`ir`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,(case when (`ii`.`promo_code` <> '') then (`i`.`amount` - `ii`.`item_discount`) else `p`.`amount` end) AS `pay_amount`,`ii`.`sessions` AS `sessions`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`id` AS `bid`,`ir`.`sessions_pending` AS `sessions_pending`,`ir`.`sessions_makeup` AS `sessions_makeup`,`ir`.`amount_per_session` AS `amount_per_session`,`ir`.`comment` AS `comment`,`ir`.`amount_refund` AS `amount_refund`,`ir`.`transaction_id` AS `transaction_id`,`ir`.`date` AS `date`,`ir`.`source` AS `source`,(case when (`ir`.`type` = 1) then 'Graduated' else '' end) AS `type`,`c2`.`fname` AS `approved_by_name`,`ir`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`ir`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`ir`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`ir`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`ir`.`park` AS `park` from ((((((`invoice_refund` `ir` left join `invoice` `i` on((`i`.`id` = `ir`.`invoice_id`))) left join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`ii`.`invoice_id` = `ir`.`invoice_id`))) left join `contact` `c` on((`i`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join `branch` `b` on((`i`.`bid` = `b`.`id`))) left join `payment` `p` on((`i`.`id` = `p`.`invoice_id`))) left join `contact` `c2` on((`ir`.`approved_by` = `c2`.`id`)));
