BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.invoice_register
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `invoice_register` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `invoice_id` int NOT NULL,
  `owner_id` int NOT NULL,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `invoice` varchar(225) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Invoice Number',
  `name` varchar(225) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Name',
  `gst_no` varchar(200) NOT NULL COMMENT 'GST NUMBER / PAN No.',
  `particualrs` varchar(200) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Particualrs',
  `place` varchar(200) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Place',
  `as_per_mark` varchar(222) NOT NULL COMMENT 'As per Mark4',
  `royalty` varchar(222) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Royalty %',
  `net_amount` varchar(225) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Net Amount after the royalty share',
  `tr_atom` varchar(225) NOT NULL COMMENT 'TR-ATOM',
  `transfer_addition` varchar(225) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Transfer kid addition',
  `transfer_decuction` varchar(225) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Transfer kid decuction',
  `total_amt` varchar(200) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Total amt',
  `shirts` varchar(225) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Shirts',
  `packaging` varchar(225) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Packaging',
  `shirts_tax` varchar(225) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Shirts Tax 12%',
  `cgst` varchar(225) NOT NULL COMMENT 'CGST 9%',
  `sgst` varchar(210) NOT NULL COMMENT 'SGST 9%',
  `igst` varchar(225) NOT NULL COMMENT 'IGST 18%',
  `teacher_salary` varchar(225) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Teacher''s salary',
  `reimbursement_expenses` varchar(225) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Travell or other reimbursement of the expenses',
  `extra` varchar(225) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Extra if any',
  `balance` varchar(200) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Balance we have',
  `gross` varchar(225) NOT NULL COMMENT 'GROSS',
  `remarks` varchar(200) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Remarks',
  `outstanding` varchar(225) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Outstanding',
  `receivable` varchar(225) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Receivable after TDS deduction',
  `payment_received_date` varchar(210) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Payment received on',
  `received_amt` varchar(225) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Received Amt',
  `account_no` varchar(225) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Account no. referance no.',
  `date_range` varchar(225) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Date',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `owner_id` (`owner_id`,`date`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=647 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.invoice_settings
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `invoice_settings` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `start_invoice` varchar(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Invoice No (to start with)',
  `start_quotation` int NOT NULL,
  `start_receipt` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `term_long` varchar(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `term_short` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `max_discount` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'max discount to be allow (in percentage)',
  `service_based_discount` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-none,1-allowed as per service settings',
  `direct_disallowed_discount` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-none,1-allowed (Disc Fixed,Disc %)',
  `size` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Paper Size (0-A4 / 1-A5 / 2-Thermal)',
  `margin_top` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'No of pixels (0-Default / 1+ - Letter head)',
  `header` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-Default / 1-Letterhead/ 2-Image',
  `header_image` varchar(200) NOT NULL COMMENT 'file name',
  `show_terms` int NOT NULL COMMENT ' (0-No / 1-URL / 2-List)',
  `batchwise_billing_cycle` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag to turn on batchwise billing cycle',
  `payment_admin_cc` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag(0- Dont send Payment cc to Admin, 1 - Send payment cc to admin)',
  `schedule_assessment` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flat(0-Dont show, 1-Show)Schedule assess dialog in invoice summary',
  `tds` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - For no tds and >0 for tds',
  `inquiry_convert` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT 'Flag(0 : No, 1 - Only for category, 2 - For any category',
  `clear_chq_bal` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT 'Flag (1- Check / 2- Don''t Check) for date before clearing cheque in balance payment',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `schedule_workout` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0 - Dont/ 1- Do) Show Assign workout',
  `past_payment` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0 - Not allow, 1 - Allow',
  `pay_mode` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - exclude paylink,1- show all, 2 - Show Paylink, netbanking and cash only',
  `tnc_accept` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'For tnc add column named tnc_accept in invoice_settings 0 - No, 1 - For first invoice of member, 2 - For every invoicee',
  `single_item` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - allow multiple, 1- allow only one packagee',
  `upgrade` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag(0-No Upgrade Option, -1 - Upgrade allowed anytime, >0 upgrade allowed till given days from start date of package)',
  `print_flag` enum('1','2','3','4') NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT 'Flag (1 - Invoice Print, 2 - Payment Invoice Print)',
  `expire_paylink_flag` int NOT NULL,
  `days_to_expire_link` int NOT NULL,
  `invoice_mail` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag ( 0 - Off, 1 - Onn)',
  `show_currency` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Used to show or hide currency on mail or pdf',
  `invoice_header` set('1','2') NOT NULL DEFAULT '2' COMMENT 'Flag (1 - Show Institute Details, 2 - Show Branch Details) only for invoice header (print)',
  `duration_session_based` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Calculate enddate based on sessions',
  `invoice_no_prefix` varchar(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Prefix to be printed before invoiceno',
  `allow_zero_payment` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT 'Flag to allow or disallow zero payment',
  `allow_part_pay` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-not allowed\r\n1-allowed',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=207 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.invoice_summer_turn_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `invoice_summer_turn_view` AS select `ii`.`invoice_id` AS `id`,`ii`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,`ii`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`ii`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,`sb`.`sessions` AS `sessions`,`ii`.`invoice` AS `invoice_no`,`ii`.`batch` AS `batch`,`ii`.`branch` AS `branch`,`ii`.`code` AS `code`,`icl`.`comment` AS `comment`,(case when (`icl`.`change` = 13) then 'Successfull' when (`icl`.`change` = 14) then 'Initiated' else 'Failed' end) AS `change_identity`,`icl`.`change` AS `change`,`ii`.`park` AS `park`,date_format(`ii`.`created_at`,'%Y-%m-%d') AS `created_at` from ((`invoice_invoiceitem_view` `ii` join `invoice_change_log` `icl` on((`ii`.`invoice_id` = `icl`.`invoice_id`))) left join `summer_break` `sb` on((`sb`.`invoice_id` = `icl`.`invoice_id`))) where ((`ii`.`summer_turn` <> 0) and (`icl`.`change` in (13,14,15)) and (`ii`.`park` = 0));

`owner_name`,`v`.`zone` AS `venue_zone_id`,`zm`.`zone` AS `venue_zone`,replace(`v`.`venue`,' ','+') AS `link_search`,`v`.`address` AS `venue_address`,`bec`.`fname` AS `batch_emp_fname`,`i`.`code` AS `code`,concat(`i`.`code`,'-',`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `code_fullname`,`p`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,`p`.`date` AS `pay_date`,date_format(`p`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `pay_date_string`,`i`.`date` AS `invoice_date`,date_format(`i`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `invoice_date_string`,`ii`.`sessions` AS `sessions`,`ii`.`sessions_used` AS `sessions_used`,`ii`.`item_discount` AS `item_discount`,`ii`.`promo_code` AS `promo_code`,concat(`ii`.`sessions_used`,'/',`ii`.`sessions`) AS `sessions_consumed`,`ii`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,date_format(`ii`.`start_date`,'%D %M, %Y') AS `invoice_start_date_string`,`ii`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,date_format(`ii`.`end_date`,'%D %M, %Y') AS `invoice_end_date_string`,(case when (`ii`.`promo_code` <> '') then `i`.`amount` else `p`.`amount` end) AS `pay_amount`,`p`.`actual_amount` AS `actual_amount`,`i`.`total` AS `total`,(case when (`p`.`pay_mode` = 1) then `i`.`total` when (`i`.`total` <= 10000) then ((`i`.`total` * 20) / 100) when (`i`.`total` > 10000) then ((`i`.`total` * 40) / 100) else 0 end) AS `royalityDeductAmount`,`p`.`reminder` AS `reminder`,(case when (`p`.`clear` >= '1') then `p`.`date` else `p`.`reminder` `whatsapp_link`,`p`.`comment` AS `comment`,`p`.`clear` AS `clear`,`p`.`error` AS `error`,`p`.`park` AS `park`,`i`.`park` AS `invoice_park`,`p`.`bid` AS `bid`,`p`.`addpay_title` AS `addpay_title`,`p`.`addpay_amount` AS `addpay_amount`,`p`.`addpay_percent` AS `addpay_percent`,`p`.`addpay_id` AS `addpay_id`,`p`.`addpay_type` AS `addpay_type`,`p`.`receipt_copy` AS `receipt_copy`,`p`.`declaration_copy` AS `declaration_copy`,concat(`u`.`fname`,' ',`u`.`lname`) AS `created_by`,`u`.`id` AS `user_id`,`s`.`id` AS `service_id`,`s`.`service` AS `service`,`ii`.`renew` AS `renew`,`inq`.`qualifier_id` AS `qualifier_id`,(select count(`invoice`.`contact_id`) from (`invoice` join `contact` `c2` on((`invoice`.`contact_id` = `c2`.`id`))) where ((`invoice`.`contact_id` = `i`.`contact_id`) and (`invoice`.`park` = 0) and (`invoice`.`amount` <> '0') and (`invoice`.`amount` <> '510') and (`c2`.`blogger` = 0))) AS `renewed`,`p`.`pay_id` AS `pay_id` from ((((((((((((((((`contact` `c` join `invoice` `i` on((`c`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) join `payment` `p` on((`i`.`id` = `p`.`invoice_id`))) join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`ii`.`invoice_id` = `i`.`id`))) join `category` `cat` on((`cat`.`id` = `ii`.`category_id`))) join `batch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `ii`.`batch_id`))) join `service` `s` on((`s`.`id` = `ii`.`service_id`))) join `pf_central`.`user` `u` on((`u`.`id` = `i`.`created_by`))) join `branch` on((`branch`.`id` = `i`.`bid`))) join `batch_employee` `be` on((`ii`.`batch_id` = `be`.`batch_id`))) join `contact` `bec` on((`be`.`contact_id` = `bec`.`id`))) left join `employee` `ive` on((`ive`.`id` = `i`.`employee_id`))) left join `contact` `ivc` on((`ivc`.`id` = `ive`.`contact_id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`v`.`id` = `b`.`venue_id`))) left join `zone_master` `zm` on((`v`.`zone` = `zm`.`id`))) left join `branch_owner_master` `bom` on((`v`.`owner_name_id` = `bom`.`id`))) left join `inquiry` `inq` on(((`inq`.`contact_id` = `i`.`contact_id`) and (`inq`.`park` = 0)))) group by `p`.`id`;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.job_applicant
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `job_applicant` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `job_id` int NOT NULL,
  `doi` date NOT NULL,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `fname` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `mname` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `lname` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `country_code` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `mobile` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `document` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `pincode` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `city` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `state` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `country` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `preferred_slot` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-any,1-first half,2-second-half',
  `referred_by_contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `short_listed` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-no,1-yes',
  `level_of_candidate` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-Select Level,                                  1-Rejected without Interview                                         ,2-Shortlisted For Interview,                                         3-Scheduled Interview,                                         4-Absent for Interview,                                         5-Present for Interview,                                         6-Rejected after interview,                                         7-Selected after Interview',
  `interviewer` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'HOD contact_id',
  `rejected` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=47 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.job_applicant_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `job_applicant_view` AS select `ja`.`id` AS `id`,`ja`.`job_id` AS `job_id`,`j`.`job_title` AS `job_title`,`j`.`job_department` AS `job_department`,`j`.`job_type` AS `job_type`,`ja`.`doi` AS `doi`,`ja`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`ja`.`fname` AS `fname`,`ji`.`status` AS `status`,`ji`.`attended` AS `attended`,`ji`.`meet_date` AS `meet_date`,`ji`.`job_applicant_id` AS `job_applicant_id`,`ja`.`mname` AS `mname`,`ja`.`lname` AS `lname`,concat(`ja`.`fname`,' ',`ja`.`mname`,' ',`ja`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`ja`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`ja`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`ja`.`mobile` AS `contact`,`ja`.`email` AS `email`,`ja`.`document` AS `document`,`ja`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`ja`.`city` AS `city`,`ja`.`state` AS `state`,`ja`.`country` AS `country`,`ja`.`preferred_slot` AS `preferred_slot`,`ja`.`short_listed` AS `short_listed`,`ja`.`level_of_candidate` AS `level_of_candidate`,`ja`.`rejected` AS `rejected`,`ja`.`referred_by_contact_id` AS `referred_by_contact_id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `referred_by_name`,`ja`.`interviewer` AS `interviewer`,concat(`ic`.`fname`,' ',`ic`.`mname`,' ',`ic`.`lname`) AS `interviewer_name`,`ja`.`park` AS `park`,`ja`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`ja`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`ja`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`ja`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from ((((`job_applicant` `ja` join `job` `j` on((`ja`.`job_id` = `j`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `ja`.`referred_by_contact_id`))) left join `contact` `ic` on((`ic`.`id` = `ja`.`interviewer`))) left join `job_interview` `ji` on((`ji`.`job_applicant_id` = `ja`.`id`))) group by `ja`.`id` order by `ji`.`status`;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.last_2_session_attendance_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `last_2_session_attendance_view` AS select `a`.`id` AS `id`,`i`.`id` AS `invoice_id`,`in`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `name`,(case when (`cn`.`id` is not null) then concat(`cn`.`fname`,' ',`cn`.`lname`) else '-' end) AS `counsellor_name`,(case when (`cn`.`id` is not null) then `cn`.`email` else '' end) AS `counsellor_email`,`a`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`a`.`date` AS `date`,date_format(`a`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `date_string`,`a`.`sessions_completed` AS `sessions_completed`,`in`.`sessions` AS `sessions`,`a`.`in_time` AS `in_time`,`a`.`out_time` AS `out_time`,`a`.`park` AS `park`,`a`.`bid` AS `bid` from (((((((`attendance` `a` join `contact` `c` on((`a`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) join `invoice_item` `in` on(((`a`.`batch_id` = `in`.`batch_id`) and (`a`.`sessions_completed` = (`in`.`sessions` - 2))))) join `invoice` `i` on(((`in`.`invoice_id` = `i`.`id`) and (`i`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`)))) join `member` `m` on((`m`.`contact_id` = `a`.`contact_id`))) join `batch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `a`.`batch_id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`e`.`id` = `m`.`c_employee_id`))) left join `contact` `cn` on((`cn`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) where (`a`.`date` between `in`.`start_date` and `in`.`end_date`);


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.last_week_dropout_expiry_all_branch_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `last_week_dropout_expiry_all_branch_view` AS select `iiv`.`invoice_id` AS `id`,`iiv`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,`iiv`.`date` AS `date`,`iiv`.`batch_employee_name` AS `batch_employee_name`,`iiv`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,`iiv`.`code_name` AS `code_name`,`iiv`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`iiv`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,concat(`iiv`.`country_code`,' ',`iiv`.`mobile`) AS `number`,`iiv`.`dob` AS `dob`,`iiv`.`start_date_string` AS `start_date_string`,`iiv`.`end_date_string` AS `end_date_string`,`iiv`.`batch_employee` AS `batch_employee`,`iiv`.`batch_employee_contact_id` AS `t_contact_id`,`iiv`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name_actual`,`iiv`.`batch` AS `batch`,`iiv`.`category` AS `category`,`iiv`.`service` AS `service`,concat(`iiv`.`duration`,' ',`iiv`.`duration_type`) AS `total_duration`,`iiv`.`park` AS `park` from `invoice_invoiceitem_view` `iiv` where ((`iiv`.`end_date` < cast((now() - interval 9 day) as date)) and (`iiv`.`end_date` >= cast((now() - interval 16 day) as date)) and (`iiv`.`park` = '0') and (`iiv`.`status` = '2') and (`iiv`.`renew` = '0'));

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.latest_followup_table
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `latest_followup_table` (
  `id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `temporary_column` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `type` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Follow Up Type (0-Visit, 1-Call, 2-SMS, 3-Email)',
  `master` int NOT NULL COMMENT ' Follow Up master type (0-Inquiry, 1-Balance, 2-Expiry, 3-Attendance,4-Birthday,5-Free Trial), 6- teacher Followup, 7- Franchisee Followup',
  `status` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Status (0-Lead, 1-Prospect, 2-Pending, 3-Closed, 4-Trash, 5-Reopen, 6-Dropout)',
  `interest` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-Warm, 1-Hot, 2-Cold, 3-Dead',
  `preferences` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `slot` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `country` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `area` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `city` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `venue` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `venue_id` int NOT NULL,
  `pincode` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `comment` text NOT NULL COMMENT 'Narration',
  `old_comment` text COMMENT 'Narration',
  `old_comment_date` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'When followup is done',
  `followup` datetime NOT NULL COMMENT 'When followup is done',
  `employee` varchar(61) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `reminder_string` varchar(49) DEFAULT NULL,
  `followup_string` varchar(49) DEFAULT NULL,
  `reminder` datetime NOT NULL COMMENT 'When followup should be done',
  `master_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Follow Up Master Id (inquiry_id / payment_id / order_item_id / attendance_id), Followup Teacher Applicant_id, Followup Franchisee_id',
  `unfollow` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-No, 1-Yes',
  `employee_id` int NOT NULL,
  `parent_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `interest_string` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `sub_interest_string` varchar(71) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `lost_reason` text NOT NULL,
  `heard_from_id` varchar(50) DEFAULT '',
  `source_id` varchar(50) DEFAULT 'Walk in' COMMENT '0-WalkIn, 1-Reference, 2-Social Media, 3-Advertisement, 4-Campaign',
  `recommended_batch` varchar(225) DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_updated` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `source` varchar(100) DEFAULT '',
  `heard_from` varchar(50) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Ad Name',
  `fname` varchar(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `mname` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `email` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `lname` varchar(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `dob` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `country_code` varchar(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '+91',
  `mobile` varchar(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'primary mobile',
  `dob_string` varchar(38) DEFAULT NULL,
  `age` varchar(45) DEFAULT NULL,
  `age_group` varchar(8) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `fullname` varchar(112) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `master_data` varchar(9) DEFAULT NULL,
  `contact_modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00',
  `followup_modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00',
  `inquiry_modified_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uniq_contact_master` (`contact_id`,`master`,`master_id`),
  KEY `idx_latest_followup_master` (`master_id`,`master`,`park`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.latest_followup_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `latest_followup_view` AS select `f`.`id` AS `id`,`f`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,0 AS `temporary_column`,`f`.`type` AS `type`,`f`.`master` AS `master`,`f`.`status` AS `status`,`f`.`interest` AS `interest`,`f`.`preferences` AS `preferences`,`f`.`slot` AS `slot`,`f`.`country` AS `country`,`f`.`area` AS `area`,`f`.`city` AS `city`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,`f`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`f`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`f`.`comment` AS `comment`,`f2`.`comment` AS `old_comment`,`f2`.`followup` AS `old_comment_date`,`f`.`followup` AS `followup`,concat(`ce`.`fname`,' ',`ce`.`lname`) AS `employee`,cast(`f`.`followup` as date) AS `date`,date_format(`f`.`reminder`,'%d %b %y %k:%i') AS `reminder_string`,date_format(`f`.`followup`,'%d %b %y %k:%i') AS `followup_string`,`f`.`reminder` AS `reminder`,`f`.`master_id` AS `master_id`,`f`.`unfollow` AS `unfollow`,`f`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`f`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`f`.`park` AS `park`,`f`.`bid` AS `bid`,`f`.`interest_string` AS `interest_string`,concat(`f`.`interest_string`,' ',`f`.`sub_interest_string`) AS `sub_interest_string`,`f`.`lost_reason` AS `lost_reason`,`iq`.`heard_from` AS `heard_from_id`,`iq`.`source` AS `source_id`,`iq`.`recommended_batch` AS `recommended_batch`,`iq`.`last_updated` AS `last_updated`,`inqs`.`source` AS `source`,`inqhf`.`heard_from` AS `heard_from`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`mname` AS `mname`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`dob` AS `dob`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,(case when (`c`.`dob` <> '0000-00-00') then convert(date_format(`c`.`dob`,'%d %b %y') using utf8mb3) else ' - ' end) AS `dob_string`,(case when (`c`.`dob` <> '0000-00-00') then concat(floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)),'y',(timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) % 12),'m') else '0' end) AS `age`,(case when (`c`.`dob` = '0000-00-00') then '-' when floor(((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12) < 0)) then 'below 0' when floor(((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12) < 1)) then '0-1' when floor(((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12) < 2)) then '1-2' when floor(((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12) < 3)) then '2-3' when floor(((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12) < 4)) then '3-4' when floor(((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12) < 5)) then '4-5' when floor(((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12) < 6)) then '5-6' when floor(((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12) < 7)) then '6-7' when floor(((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12) < 8)) then '7-8' when floor(((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12) < 9)) then '8-9' when floor(((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12) < 10)) then '9-10' else 'above 10' end) AS `age_group`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,(case when (`f`.`master` = 0) then 'Inquiry' when (`f`.`master` = 1) then 'Balance' when (`f`.`master` = 2) then 'Expiry' when (`f`.`master` = 3) then 'Irregular' when (`f`.`master` = 4) then 'Birthday' when (`f`.`master` = 5) then 'FreeTrial' end) AS `master_data`,`c`.`modified_at` AS `contact_modified_at`,`f`.`modified_at` AS `followup_modified_at`,`iq`.`modified_at` AS `inquiry_modified_at` from ((((((((`followup` `f` join `contact` `c` on((`f`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) join `employee` `e` on((`f`.`employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) join `contact` `ce` on((`ce`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) left join `followup` `f2` on((`f`.`parent_id` = `f2`.`id`))) left join `inquiry` `iq` on((`iq`.`contact_id` = `f`.`contact_id`))) left join `heard_from` `inqhf` on((`iq`.`heard_from` = `inqhf`.`id`))) left join `inquiry_source` `inqs` on((`iq`.`source` = `inqs`.`id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`f`.`venue_id` = `v`.`id`))) where `f`.`id` in (select max(`followup`.`id`) from `followup` where (`followup`.`park` = 0) group by `followup`.`contact_id`,`followup`.`master`,`followup`.`master_id`) group by `f`.`id`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.latest_followup_view_old
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `latest_followup_view_old` AS select `contact_followup_view`.`id` AS `id`,`contact_followup_view`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`contact_followup_view`.`type` AS `type`,`contact_followup_view`.`master` AS `master`,`contact_followup_view`.`status` AS `status`,`contact_followup_view`.`interest` AS `interest`,`contact_followup_view`.`comment` AS `comment`,`contact_followup_view`.`old_comment` AS `old_comment`,`contact_followup_view`.`followup` AS `followup`,`contact_followup_view`.`employee` AS `employee`,`contact_followup_view`.`date` AS `date`,`contact_followup_view`.`reminder_string` AS `reminder_string`,`contact_followup_view`.`followup_string` AS `followup_string`,`contact_followup_view`.`reminder` AS `reminder`,`contact_followup_view`.`master_id` AS `master_id`,`contact_followup_view`.`unfollow` AS `unfollow`,`contact_followup_view`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`contact_followup_view`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`contact_followup_view`.`park` AS `park`,`contact_followup_view`.`bid` AS `bid`,`contact_followup_view`.`fname` AS `fname`,`contact_followup_view`.`email` AS `email`,`contact_followup_view`.`lname` AS `lname`,`contact_followup_view`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`contact_followup_view`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,`contact_followup_view`.`master_data` AS `master_data`,`contact_followup_view`.`age` AS `age`,`contact_followup_view`.`dob_string` AS `dob_string` from (`contact_followup_view` left join `followup` `f` on((`contact_followup_view`.`parent_id` = `f`.`id`))) where `contact_followup_view`.`id` in (select max(`contact_followup_view`.`id`) from `contact_followup_view` group by `contact_followup_view`.`contact_id`,`contact_followup_view`.`master`,`contact_followup_view`.`master_id`);


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.latest_followup_view_optimised
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `latest_followup_view_optimised` AS select `f`.`id` AS `id`,`f`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,0 AS `temporary_column`,`f`.`type` AS `type`,`f`.`master` AS `master`,`f`.`status` AS `status`,`f`.`interest` AS `interest`,`f`.`preferences` AS `preferences`,`f`.`slot` AS `slot`,`f`.`country` AS `country`,`f`.`area` AS `area`,`f`.`city` AS `city`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,`f`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`f`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`f`.`comment` AS `comment`,`f2`.`comment` AS `old_comment`,`f2`.`followup` AS `old_comment_date`,`f`.`followup` AS `followup`,concat(`ce`.`fname`,' ',`ce`.`lname`) AS `employee`,cast(`f`.`followup` as date) AS `date`,date_format(`f`.`reminder`,'%d %b %y %k:%i') AS `reminder_string`,date_format(`f`.`followup`,'%d %b %y %k:%i') AS `followup_string`,`f`.`reminder` AS `reminder`,`f`.`master_id` AS `master_id`,`f`.`unfollow` AS `unfollow`,`f`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`f`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`f`.`park` AS `park`,`f`.`bid` AS `bid`,`f`.`interest_string` AS `interest_string`,concat(`f`.`interest_string`,' ',`f`.`sub_interest_string`) AS `sub_interest_string`,`f`.`lost_reason` AS `lost_reason`,`iq`.`heard_from` AS `heard_from_id`,`iq`.`source` AS `source_id`,`iq`.`recommended_batch` AS `recommended_batch`,`iq`.`last_updated` AS `last_updated`,`inqhf`.`heard_from` AS `heard_from`,`inqs`.`source` AS `source`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`mname` AS `mname`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`dob` AS `dob`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,(case when (`c`.`dob` <> '0000-00-00') then date_format(`c`.`dob`,'%d %b %y') else ' - ' end) AS `dob_string`,(case when (`c`.`dob` <> '0000-00-00') then concat(floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)),'y',(timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) % 12),'m') else '0' end) AS `age`,(case when (`c`.`dob` = '0000-00-00') then '-' when (timestampdiff(YEAR,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) < 0) then 'below 0' when (timestampdiff(YEAR,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) < 1) then '0-1' when (timestampdiff(YEAR,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) < 2) then '1-2' when (timestampdiff(YEAR,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) < 3) then '2-3' when (timestampdiff(YEAR,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) < 4) then '3-4' when (timestampdiff(YEAR,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) < 5) then '4-5' when (timestampdiff(YEAR,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) < 6) then '5-6' when (timestampdiff(YEAR,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) < 7) then '6-7' when (timestampdiff(YEAR,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) < 8) then '7-8' when (timestampdiff(YEAR,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) < 9) then '8-9' when (timestampdiff(YEAR,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) < 10) then '9-10' else 'above 10' end) AS `age_group`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,(case when (`f`.`master` = 0) then 'Inquiry' when (`f`.`master` = 1) then 'Balance' when (`f`.`master` = 2) then 'Expiry' when (`f`.`master` = 3) then 'Irregular' when (`f`.`master` = 4) then 'Birthday' when (`f`.`master` = 5) then 'FreeTrial' end) AS `master_data`,`c`.`modified_at` AS `contact_modified_at`,`f`.`modified_at` AS `followup_modified_at`,`iq`.`modified_at` AS `inquiry_modified_at` from (((((((((`followup` `f` join (select max(`followup`.`id`) AS `id` from `followup` where (`followup`.`park` = 0) group by `followup`.`contact_id`,`followup`.`master`,`followup`.`master_id`) `latest` on((`f`.`id` = `latest`.`id`))) join `contact` `c` on((`f`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) join `employee` `e` on((`f`.`employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) join `contact` `ce` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `ce`.`id`))) left join `followup` `f2` on((`f`.`parent_id` = `f2`.`id`))) left join `inquiry` `iq` on(((`iq`.`contact_id` = `f`.`contact_id`) and (`iq`.`park` = 0)))) left join `inquiry_source` `inqs` on((`iq`.`source` = `inqs`.`id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`f`.`venue_id` = `v`.`id`))) left join `heard_from` `inqhf` on((`iq`.`heard_from` = `inqhf`.`id`)));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.latest_product_productlog_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `latest_product_productlog_view` AS select `p`.`id` AS `id`,`p`.`id` AS `product_id`,`pl`.`id` AS `product_log_id`,`p`.`from_class` AS `from_class`,`p`.`to_class` AS `to_class`,concat(`p`.`from_class`,' - ',`p`.`to_class`) AS `from_to_class`,`p`.`description` AS `description`,`p`.`barcode` AS `barcode`,`p`.`status` AS `status`,(case when (`p`.`status` = '0') then 'Not Available' when (`p`.`status` = '1') then 'Available' when (`p`.`status` = '2') then 'Dispatched' when (`p`.`status` = '3') then 'Received' when (`p`.`status` = '4') then 'In Use' when (`p`.`status` = '5') then 'Reserved' end) AS `status_str`,`p`.`bid` AS `bid`,`p_branch`.`branch` AS `branch`,`p`.`level` AS `level`,`p`.`level_id` AS `level_id`,`pl`.`from_bid` AS `from_bid`,`f_branch`.`branch` AS `from_branch`,`pl`.`to_bid` AS `to_bid`,`t_branch`.`branch` AS `to_branch`,`pl`.`date` AS `date`,date_format(`pl`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `date_string`,`pl`.`time` AS `time`,`pl`.`status` AS `log_status`,`p`.`park` AS `park` from ((((`product_level_view` `p` left join `product_log` `pl` on((`pl`.`product_id` = `p`.`id`))) join `branch` `f_branch` on((`f_branch`.`id` = `pl`.`from_bid`))) join `branch` `t_branch` on((`t_branch`.`id` = `pl`.`to_bid`))) join `branch` `p_branch` on((`p_branch`.`id` = `p`.`bid`))) where `pl`.`id` in (select max(`product_log`.`id`) from `product_log` where (`product_log`.`park` = 0) group by `product_log`.`product_id`);

  `doc` date NOT NULL,

  `consumed` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `expired` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=9052 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

  `contract_id` bigint unsigned NOT NULL,

  `branch_id` bigint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `category_id` bigint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `master_category_id` bigint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `receipt_date` date NOT NULL,
  `allocation_ratio` decimal(18,8) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1.00000000',
  `txn_amount` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `amount_in_inr` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',

  `txn_currency_code` varchar(16) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INR',
  `fx_rate_to_inr` decimal(18,8) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1.00000000',
  `event_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `posting_batch_id` bigint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),

  KEY `idx_expense_alloc_expense` (`expense_entry_id`),
  KEY `idx_expense_alloc_session` (`allocated_class_session_id`),
  KEY `idx_expense_alloc_branch_master` (`allocated_branch_id`,`allocated_master_category_id`,`event_at`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_expense_alloc_expense` FOREIGN KEY (`expense_entry_id`) REFERENCES `lgr_expense_entries` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_expense_alloc_session` FOREIGN KEY (`allocated_class_session_id`) REFERENCES `lgr_class_sessions` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=4 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.lgr_expense_categories
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `lgr_expense_categories` (
  `id` bigint unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `category_code` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `category_name` varchar(128) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `allocation_basis` enum('direct','branch_ratio','batch_ratio','session_ratio','revenue_ratio','manual') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'direct',
  `active_flag` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uniq_expense_category_code` (`category_code`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=8 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.lgr_expense_entries
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `lgr_expense_entries` (
  `id` bigint unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `expense_date` date NOT NULL,
  `expense_category_id` bigint unsigned NOT NULL,
  `branch_id` bigint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `batch_id` bigint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `category_id` bigint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `master_category_id` bigint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `class_session_id` bigint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `venue_id` bigint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `vendor_contact_id` bigint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `source_expense_id` bigint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `invoice_reference` varchar(128) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `description` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `txn_currency_code` varchar(16) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INR',
  `fx_rate_to_inr` decimal(18,8) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1.00000000',
  `txn_amount_pre_tax` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `txn_gst_amount` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `txn_tds_amount` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `txn_net_payable_amount` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `amount_pre_tax_inr` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `gst_amount_inr` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `tds_amount_inr` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `net_payable_amount_inr` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `direct_cost_flag` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `source_type` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `source_id` bigint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uniq_expense_entries_source_expense` (`source_expense_id`),
  KEY `idx_expense_entry_date` (`expense_date`),
  KEY `idx_expense_entry_branch_batch` (`branch_id`,`batch_id`),
  KEY `idx_expense_entry_master_date` (`master_category_id`,`expense_date`),
  KEY `idx_expense_entry_session` (`class_session_id`),
  KEY `fk_expense_entry_category` (`expense_category_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_expense_entry_category` FOREIGN KEY (`expense_category_id`) REFERENCES `lgr_expense_categories` (`id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_expense_entry_session` FOREIGN KEY (`class_session_id`) REFERENCES `lgr_class_sessions` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=4 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.lgr_fact_batch_profitability
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `lgr_fact_batch_profitability` AS select `accr`.`branch_id` AS `branch_id`,`accr`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`accr`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`accr`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,`accr`.`month_start` AS `month_start`,`accr`.`revenue_inr` AS `revenue_inr`,coalesce(`cash`.`cash_collected_inr`,0) AS `cash_collected_inr`,`accr`.`teacher_cost_inr` AS `teacher_cost_inr`,`accr`.`expense_cost_inr` AS `expense_cost_inr`,`accr`.`rent_cost_inr` AS `rent_cost_inr`,`accr`.`contribution_margin_inr` AS `contribution_margin_inr` from ((select `fcf`.`branch_id` AS `branch_id`,`fcf`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`fcf`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`fcf`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,date_format(`fcf`.`scheduled_date`,'%Y-%m-01') AS `month_start`,sum(`fcf`.`recognized_revenue_inr`) AS `revenue_inr`,sum(`fcf`.`teacher_payable_cost_inr`) AS `teacher_cost_inr`,sum(`fcf`.`allocated_expense_cost_inr`) AS `expense_cost_inr`,sum(`fcf`.`allocated_rent_cost_inr`) AS `rent_cost_inr`,sum(`fcf`.`contribution_margin_inr`) AS `contribution_margin_inr` from `lgr_fact_class_financials` `fcf` group by `fcf`.`branch_id`,`fcf`.`batch_id`,`fcf`.`category_id`,`fcf`.`master_category_id`,date_format(`fcf`.`scheduled_date`,'%Y-%m-01')) `accr` left join (select `lgr_fact_cash_collections`.`branch_id` AS `branch_id`,`lgr_fact_cash_collections`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`lgr_fact_cash_collections`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`lgr_fact_cash_collections`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,`lgr_fact_cash_collections`.`month_start` AS `month_start`,sum(`lgr_fact_cash_collections`.`cash_collected_inr`) AS `cash_collected_inr` from `lgr_fact_cash_collections` group by `lgr_fact_cash_collections`.`branch_id`,`lgr_fact_cash_collections`.`batch_id`,`lgr_fact_cash_collections`.`category_id`,`lgr_fact_cash_collections`.`master_category_id`,`lgr_fact_cash_collections`.`month_start`) `cash` on(((`cash`.`branch_id` = `accr`.`branch_id`) and (`cash`.`batch_id` <=> `accr`.`batch_id`) and (`cash`.`category_id` <=> `accr`.`category_id`) and (`cash`.`master_category_id` <=> `accr`.`master_category_id`) and (`cash`.`month_start` = `accr`.`month_start`))));

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.lgr_fact_class_financials
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `lgr_fact_class_financials` AS select `cs`.`id` AS `class_session_id`,`cs`.`source_session_id` AS `source_session_id`,`cs`.`scheduled_date` AS `scheduled_date`,`cs`.`branch_id` AS `branch_id`,`cs`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`cs`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`cs`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,`cs`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`cs`.`teacher_contact_id` AS `teacher_contact_id`,coalesce(`rev`.`recognized_revenue_inr`,0) AS `recognized_revenue_inr`,coalesce(`pay`.`teacher_payable_cost_inr`,0) AS `teacher_payable_cost_inr`,coalesce(`exp`.`allocated_expense_cost_inr`,0) AS `allocated_expense_cost_inr`,coalesce(`rnt`.`allocated_rent_cost_inr`,0) AS `allocated_rent_cost_inr`,(((coalesce(`rev`.`recognized_revenue_inr`,0) - coalesce(`pay`.`teacher_payable_cost_inr`,0)) - coalesce(`exp`.`allocated_expense_cost_inr`,0)) - coalesce(`rnt`.`allocated_rent_cost_inr`,0)) AS `contribution_margin_inr` from ((((`lgr_class_sessions` `cs` left join (select `lgr_revenue_recognition_ledger`.`class_session_id` AS `class_session_id`,sum(`lgr_revenue_recognition_ledger`.`amount_in_inr`) AS `recognized_revenue_inr` from `lgr_revenue_recognition_ledger` group by `lgr_revenue_recognition_ledger`.`class_session_id`) `rev` on((`rev`.`class_session_id` = `cs`.`id`))) left join (select `lgr_teacher_payroll_transactions`.`class_session_id` AS `class_session_id`,sum((case when (`lgr_teacher_payroll_transactions`.`payable_flag` = 1) then `lgr_teacher_payroll_transactions`.`amount_in_inr` else 0 end)) AS `teacher_payable_cost_inr` from `lgr_teacher_payroll_transactions` group by `lgr_teacher_payroll_transactions`.`class_session_id`) `pay` on((`pay`.`class_session_id` = `cs`.`id`))) left join (select `lgr_expense_allocation_ledger`.`allocated_class_session_id` AS `class_session_id`,sum(`lgr_expense_allocation_ledger`.`allocated_amount_in_inr`) AS `allocated_expense_cost_inr` from `lgr_expense_allocation_ledger` group by `lgr_expense_allocation_ledger`.`allocated_class_session_id`) `exp` on((`exp`.`class_session_id` = `cs`.`id`))) left join (select `lgr_rent_rule_evaluation_ledger`.`class_session_id` AS `class_session_id`,sum(`lgr_rent_rule_evaluation_ledger`.`selected_amount_in_inr`) AS `allocated_rent_cost_inr` from `lgr_rent_rule_evaluation_ledger` group by `lgr_rent_rule_evaluation_ledger`.`class_session_id`) `rnt` on((`rnt`.`class_session_id` = `cs`.`id`)));

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.lgr_fact_makeup_liability
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `lgr_fact_makeup_liability` AS select `me`.`student_contact_id` AS `student_contact_id`,`me`.`contract_id` AS `contract_id`,`me`.`contract_line_id` AS `contract_line_id`,`me`.`branch_id` AS `branch_id`,`me`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`me`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`me`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,sum((case when (`me`.`event_type` = 'grant') then `me`.`units_delta` else 0 end)) AS `makeup_liability_created`,coalesce(sum((case when (`mu`.`usage_type` = 'consume') then `mu`.`units_delta` else 0 end)),0) AS `makeup_liability_consumed`,sum((case when (`me`.`event_type` = 'expire') then abs(`me`.`units_delta`) else 0 end)) AS `makeup_liability_expired`,(sum(`me`.`units_delta`) - coalesce(sum((case when (`mu`.`usage_type` = 'consume') then `mu`.`units_delta` when (`mu`.`usage_type` = 'restore') then (-(1) * `mu`.`units_delta`) else 0 end)),0)) AS `open_makeup_liability` from (`lgr_student_makeup_entitlement_ledger` `me` left join `lgr_student_makeup_usage_ledger` `mu` on((`mu`.`makeup_entitlement_ledger_id` = `me`.`id`))) group by `me`.`student_contact_id`,`me`.`contract_id`,`me`.`contract_line_id`,`me`.`branch_id`,`me`.`batch_id`,`me`.`category_id`,`me`.`master_category_id`;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.lgr_fact_student_consumption
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `lgr_fact_student_consumption` AS select `scl`.`id` AS `contract_line_id`,`sc`.`id` AS `contract_id`,`sc`.`student_contact_id` AS `student_contact_id`,coalesce(`scl`.`branch_id`,`sc`.`branch_id`) AS `branch_id`,`scl`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`scl`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`scl`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,`scl`.`plan_id` AS `plan_id`,`scl`.`plan_name_snapshot` AS `plan_name_snapshot`,`scl`.`txn_currency_code` AS `txn_currency_code`,`scl`.`fx_rate_to_inr` AS `fx_rate_to_inr`,`scl`.`entitled_sessions` AS `entitled_sessions`,`scl`.`line_net_value` AS `line_net_value`,`scl`.`line_net_value_inr` AS `line_net_value_inr`,`scl`.`per_session_value` AS `per_session_value`,`scl`.`per_session_value_inr` AS `per_session_value_inr`,coalesce(`ssl_agg`.`sessions_consumed`,0) AS `sessions_consumed`,coalesce(`ssl_agg`.`net_sessions_delta`,0) AS `net_sessions_delta`,(`scl`.`entitled_sessions` - coalesce(`ssl_agg`.`net_sessions_delta`,0)) AS `sessions_remaining`,coalesce(`rrl_agg`.`recognized_revenue_txn`,0) AS `contract_revenue_recognized`,coalesce(`rrl_agg`.`recognized_revenue_inr`,0) AS `contract_revenue_recognized_inr`,coalesce(`adj_agg`.`adjustment_txn`,0) AS `contract_adjustment_txn`,coalesce(`adj_agg`.`adjustment_inr`,0) AS `contract_adjustment_inr` from ((((`lgr_student_contract_lines` `scl` join `lgr_student_contracts` `sc` on((`sc`.`id` = `scl`.`contract_id`))) left join (select `lgr_student_subscription_session_ledger`.`contract_line_id` AS `contract_line_id`,sum((case when (`lgr_student_subscription_session_ledger`.`ledger_event_type` = 'consume') then abs(`lgr_student_subscription_session_ledger`.`session_units_delta`) else 0 end)) AS `sessions_consumed`,sum(`lgr_student_subscription_session_ledger`.`session_units_delta`) AS `net_sessions_delta` from `lgr_student_subscription_session_ledger` group by `lgr_student_subscription_session_ledger`.`contract_line_id`) `ssl_agg` on((`ssl_agg`.`contract_line_id` = `scl`.`id`))) left join (select `lgr_revenue_recognition_ledger`.`contract_line_id` AS `contract_line_id`,sum(`lgr_revenue_recognition_ledger`.`txn_amount`) AS `recognized_revenue_txn`,sum(`lgr_revenue_recognition_ledger`.`amount_in_inr`) AS `recognized_revenue_inr` from `lgr_revenue_recognition_ledger` group by `lgr_revenue_recognition_ledger`.`contract_line_id`) `rrl_agg` on((`rrl_agg`.`contract_line_id` = `scl`.`id`))) left join (select `lgr_student_contract_adjustments`.`contract_line_id` AS `contract_line_id`,sum(`lgr_student_contract_adjustments`.`amount_delta`) AS `adjustment_txn`,sum(`lgr_student_contract_adjustments`.`amount_in_inr_delta`) AS `adjustment_inr` from `lgr_student_contract_adjustments` group by `lgr_student_contract_adjustments`.`contract_line_id`) `adj_agg` on((`adj_agg`.`contract_line_id` = `scl`.`id`)));

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.lgr_fact_subscription_balance
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `lgr_fact_subscription_balance` AS select `fsc`.`contract_id` AS `contract_id`,`fsc`.`contract_line_id` AS `contract_line_id`,`fsc`.`student_contact_id` AS `student_contact_id`,`fsc`.`branch_id` AS `branch_id`,`fsc`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`fsc`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`fsc`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,`fsc`.`plan_id` AS `plan_id`,`fsc`.`plan_name_snapshot` AS `plan_name_snapshot`,`fsc`.`txn_currency_code` AS `txn_currency_code`,`fsc`.`fx_rate_to_inr` AS `fx_rate_to_inr`,`fsc`.`entitled_sessions` AS `entitled_sessions`,`fsc`.`sessions_consumed` AS `sessions_consumed`,`fsc`.`sessions_remaining` AS `sessions_remaining`,(`fsc`.`line_net_value` + `fsc`.`contract_adjustment_txn`) AS `adjusted_contract_value`,(`fsc`.`line_net_value_inr` + `fsc`.`contract_adjustment_inr`) AS `adjusted_contract_value_inr`,`fsc`.`contract_revenue_recognized` AS `contract_revenue_recognized`,`fsc`.`contract_revenue_recognized_inr` AS `contract_revenue_recognized_inr`,((`fsc`.`line_net_value` + `fsc`.`contract_adjustment_txn`) - `fsc`.`contract_revenue_recognized`) AS `deferred_revenue_remaining`,((`fsc`.`line_net_value_inr` + `fsc`.`contract_adjustment_inr`) - `fsc`.`contract_revenue_recognized_inr`) AS `deferred_revenue_remaining_inr`,((`fsc`.`line_net_value` + `fsc`.`contract_adjustment_txn`) - `fsc`.`contract_revenue_recognized`) AS `liability_remaining_to_serve`,((`fsc`.`line_net_value_inr` + `fsc`.`contract_adjustment_inr`) - `fsc`.`contract_revenue_recognized_inr`) AS `liability_remaining_to_serve_inr` from `lgr_fact_student_consumption` `fsc`;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.lgr_fact_teacher_cost

CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `lgr_fact_teacher_cost` AS select `tpt`.`teacher_contact_id` AS `teacher_contact_id`,`tpt`.`period_start_date` AS `period_start_date`,`tpt`.`period_end_date` AS `period_end_date`,`tpt`.`class_session_id` AS `class_session_id`,`tpt`.`branch_id` AS `branch_id`,`tpt`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`tpt`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`tpt`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,sum((case when (`tpt`.`payable_flag` = 1) then `tpt`.`amount_in_inr` else 0 end)) AS `payable_cost_inr`,sum((case when (`tpt`.`payable_flag` = 0) then `tpt`.`amount_in_inr` else 0 end)) AS `non_payable_cost_inr`,sum((case when (`tpt`.`transaction_type` = 'reimbursement') then `tpt`.`amount_in_inr` else 0 end)) AS `reimbursement_cost_inr`,sum(`tpt`.`amount_in_inr`) AS `total_cost_inr` from `lgr_teacher_payroll_transactions` `tpt` group by `tpt`.`teacher_contact_id`,`tpt`.`period_start_date`,`tpt`.`period_end_date`,`tpt`.`class_session_id`,`tpt`.`branch_id`,`tpt`.`batch_id`,`tpt`.`category_id`,`tpt`.`master_category_id`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.lgr_fact_trainer_student_activity
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `lgr_fact_trainer_student_activity` AS select `base`.`activity_date` AS `activity_date`,date_format(`base`.`activity_date`,'%Y-%m-01') AS `month_start`,`base`.`teacher_contact_id` AS `teacher_contact_id`,`base`.`branch_id` AS `branch_id`,`base`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`base`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`base`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,coalesce(`delivered`.`delivered_students_count`,0) AS `delivered_students_count`,coalesce(`assigned`.`assigned_active_students_count`,0) AS `assigned_active_students_count` from (((select distinct `cs`.`scheduled_date` AS `activity_date`,`de`.`teacher_contact_id` AS `teacher_contact_id`,`cs`.`branch_id` AS `branch_id`,`cs`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`cs`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`cs`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id` from (`lgr_class_session_delivery_events` `de` join `lgr_class_sessions` `cs` on((`cs`.`id` = `de`.`class_session_id`))) where (`de`.`delivery_status` in ('delivered','partial')) union select distinct `scd`.`scheduled_date` AS `activity_date`,`be`.`contact_id` AS `teacher_contact_id`,`b`.`bid` AS `branch_id`,`b`.`id` AS `batch_id`,`b`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`c`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id` from ((((select distinct `lgr_class_sessions`.`scheduled_date` AS `scheduled_date`,`lgr_class_sessions`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id` from `lgr_class_sessions`) `scd` join `batch_employee` `be` on((`be`.`batch_id` = `scd`.`batch_id`))) join `batch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `scd`.`batch_id`))) left join `category` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `b`.`category_id`)))) `base` left join (select `cs`.`scheduled_date` AS `activity_date`,`de`.`teacher_contact_id` AS `teacher_contact_id`,`cs`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,count(distinct `sslg`.`student_contact_id`) AS `delivered_students_count` from ((`lgr_class_session_delivery_events` `de` join `lgr_class_sessions` `cs` on((`cs`.`id` = `de`.`class_session_id`))) left join `lgr_student_subscription_session_ledger` `sslg` on(((`sslg`.`class_session_id` = `cs`.`id`) and (`sslg`.`ledger_event_type` = 'consume')))) where (`de`.`delivery_status` in ('delivered','partial')) group by `cs`.`scheduled_date`,`de`.`teacher_contact_id`,`cs`.`batch_id`) `delivered` on(((`delivered`.`activity_date` = `base`.`activity_date`) and (`delivered`.`teacher_contact_id` = `base`.`teacher_contact_id`) and (`delivered`.`batch_id` = `base`.`batch_id`)))) left join (select `scd`.`scheduled_date` AS `activity_date`,`be`.`contact_id` AS `teacher_contact_id`,`b`.`id` AS `batch_id`,count(distinct `sc`.`student_contact_id`) AS `assigned_active_students_count` from (((((select distinct `lgr_class_sessions`.`scheduled_date` AS `scheduled_date`,`lgr_class_sessions`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id` from `lgr_class_sessions`) `scd` join `batch_employee` `be` on((`be`.`batch_id` = `scd`.`batch_id`))) join `batch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `scd`.`batch_id`))) join `lgr_student_contract_lines` `scl` on((`scl`.`batch_id` = `scd`.`batch_id`))) join `lgr_student_contracts` `sc` on(((`sc`.`id` = `scl`.`contract_id`) and (`sc`.`contract_status` <> 'cancelled') and ((`sc`.`start_date` is null) or (`sc`.`start_date` <= `scd`.`scheduled_date`)) and ((`sc`.`end_date` is null) or (`sc`.`end_date` >= `scd`.`scheduled_date`))))) group by `scd`.`scheduled_date`,`be`.`contact_id`,`b`.`id`) `assigned` on(((`assigned`.`activity_date` = `base`.`activity_date`) and (`assigned`.`teacher_contact_id` = `base`.`teacher_contact_id`) and (`assigned`.`batch_id` = `base`.`batch_id`))));

  `net_contract_value` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `gross_contract_value_inr` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `discount_amount_inr` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `net_contract_value_inr` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `entitled_sessions` decimal(18,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `start_date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `end_date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `source_system` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'legacy_invoice',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uniq_student_contract_source_item` (`source_invoice_item_id`),
  KEY `idx_student_contract_student` (`student_contact_id`,`contract_status`),
  KEY `idx_student_contract_invoice` (`invoice_id`),
  KEY `idx_student_contract_dates` (`start_date`,`end_date`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=65536 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.makeup_log_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `makeup_log_view` AS select `ml`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `NAME`,(case when ((`u`.`fname` <> '') or (`u`.`lname` <> '')) then concat(`u`.`fname`,' ',`u`.`lname`) else 'System' end) AS `given_by`,`inv`.`id` AS `invoice_id`,`s`.`service` AS `package_name`,`ii`.`sessions` AS `total_sessions`,(select count(`attendance`.`negative`) AS `absent_count` from `attendance` where ((`attendance`.`contact_id` = `inv`.`contact_id`) and (`attendance`.`negative` = 1) and (`attendance`.`date` between `ii`.`start_date` and `ii`.`end_date`))) AS `absent`,`ml`.`makeup_session` AS `extension`,`ml`.`makeup_date` AS `makeup_date`,'0' AS `park` from (((((`makeup_log` `ml` left join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`ml`.`invoice_item_id` = `ii`.`id`))) left join `invoice` `inv` on((`inv`.`id` = `ii`.`invoice_id`))) left join `contact` `c` on((`inv`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join `service` `s` on((`s`.`id` = `ii`.`service_id`))) left join `pf_central`.`user` `u` on((`u`.`id` = `ml`.`created_by`))) where (`ml`.`makeup_session` <> 0) order by `ml`.`id` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.makeup_turn_mail_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `makeup_turn_mail_view` AS select `ml`.`id` AS `id`,`inv`.`id` AS `invoice_id`,`inv`.`invoice` AS `invoice_no`,`inv`.`code` AS `code`,`c`.`id` AS `contact_id`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `name`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`b`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`be`.`contact_id` AS `batch_emp_contact_id`,`s`.`service` AS `package_name`,`br`.`double_tick_sms` AS `double_tick_sms`,`br`.`renewal_doubletick_account` AS `renewal_doubletick_account`,`vb`.`double_tick_sms` AS `venue_double_tick_sms`,`ct`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,`ii`.`sessions` AS `total_sessions`,concat(`ii`.`sessions_used`,' / ',`ii`.`sessions`) AS `session_consumed`,`ii`.`renew` AS `renewed`,`inv`.`bid` AS `bid`,`br`.`branch` AS `branch`,`br`.`type` AS `branch_type`,(select count(`attendance`.`negative`) AS `absent_count` from `attendance` where ((`attendance`.`contact_id` = `inv`.`contact_id`) and (`attendance`.`negative` = 1) and (`attendance`.`date` between `ii`.`start_date` and `ii`.`end_date`))) AS `absent`,`ml`.`makeup_session` AS `extension`,`ml`.`makeup_date` AS `makeup_date` from ((((((((((`makeup_log` `ml` left join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`ml`.`invoice_item_id` = `ii`.`id`))) left join `invoice` `inv` on((`inv`.`id` = `ii`.`invoice_id`))) left join `contact` `c` on((`inv`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join `branch` `br` on((`inv`.`bid` = `br`.`id`))) left join `service` `s` on((`s`.`id` = `ii`.`service_id`))) left join `pf_central`.`user` `u` on((`u`.`id` = `ml`.`created_by`))) left join `batch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `ii`.`batch_id`))) left join `batch_employee` `be` on((`be`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `venue_bid` `vb` on(((`b`.`venue_id` = `vb`.`venue_id`) and (`b`.`bid` = `vb`.`bid`) and (`vb`.`park` = 0)))) left join `category` `ct` on((`ct`.`id` = `b`.`category_id`))) where ((`ml`.`makeup_session` <> 0) and (`ml`.`summer_turn` <> 1) and (`ml`.`makeup_date` = (curdate() + interval -(1) day)) and (`inv`.`park` = 0) and (`ii`.`park` = 0) and (`c`.`park` = 0)) order by `ml`.`makeup_date` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.marketing_data
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `marketing_data` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `category` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `branch_type` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `leads` int NOT NULL,
  `converted` int NOT NULL,
  `renewals_due` int NOT NULL,
  `renewals_due_count` int NOT NULL,
  `timely_renewals` int NOT NULL,
  `untimely_renewals` int NOT NULL,
  `timely_renewals_amount` int NOT NULL,
  `untimely_renewals_amount` int NOT NULL,
  `non_renewals_count` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `date` (`date`,`category`,`branch_type`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=9661146 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.member
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `member` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `code` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'member code',
  `doj` date NOT NULL,
  `status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT '0-Inactive , 1-Active, 2-Ex, 3- Undefined',
  `ex_member_date` date NOT NULL,
  `ex_from_date` date NOT NULL,
  `inactive_from_date` date NOT NULL,
  `rfid` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `weight` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Weight of Member',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `app_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0 - App Inactive, 1 - App Active)',
  `app_active_till` date NOT NULL COMMENT 'Date till the app is active.',
  `c_employee_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `t_contact_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `level_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `last_class` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `class_count` int NOT NULL,
  `referral_code` varchar(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `points` int NOT NULL,
  `pending_not_pay_sal_attendance` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `pending_makeup` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `dropout_comment` text NOT NULL,
  `dropout_other_reason` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `code` (`code`),
  KEY `rfid` (`rfid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `status` (`status`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=19510 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.member_bio
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `member_bio` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `code` varchar(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'member or employee code',
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'contact_id',
  `user_type` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-member,1-employee',
  `passwd` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `privilegs` varchar(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'device privilegs',
  `findex` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `fprint` mediumtext NOT NULL,
  `rfidcard` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `action` int NOT NULL COMMENT '(0-None, 1-Add, 2-Enable, 3-Disable, 4-Delete)',
  `to_date` date NOT NULL COMMENT 'End date for deletion or disable',
  `indevice` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-No, 1-Yes, 2-Disabled',
  `bid` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'branch id',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0:Not Parked, 1: Parked, 2: Deleted, 3: Archived',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `indevice` (`indevice`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.member_completed_sessions_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `member_completed_sessions_view` AS select `ac`.`id` AS `id`,`ac`.`batch` AS `batch`,`ac`.`attended_batch` AS `attended_batch`,`ac`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`ac`.`date` AS `date`,`ac`.`in_time` AS `in_time`,`ac`.`out_time` AS `out_time`,`ac`.`negative` AS `negative`,(case when (`ac`.`negative` = 0) then 'Present' when (`ac`.`negative` = 1) then 'Absent' when (`ac`.`negative` = 2) then 'Expired' when (`ac`.`negative` = 3) then 'Invalid' else '' end) AS `negative_value`,`ac`.`invalid` AS `invalid`,`ac`.`class_no` AS `class_no`,`ac`.`makeup` AS `makeup`,`ac`.`park` AS `park`,`ac`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id` from `attendance_cont_view` `ac` where (`ac`.`park` = 0) group by `ac`.`contact_id`,`ac`.`date` order by `negative_value`;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.member_contact_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `member_contact_view` AS select `m`.`id` AS `id`,`m`.`weight` AS `weight`,`m`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`i`.`id` AS `invoice_id`,`m`.`referral_code` AS `referral_code`,`m`.`rfid` AS `rfid`,`m`.`code` AS `code`,max(`ii`.`end_date`) AS `due_date`,date_format(max(`ii`.`end_date`),'%d %b %y') AS `due_date_string`,`m`.`doj` AS `doj`,date_format(`m`.`doj`,'%d %b %y') AS `doj_string`,`b`.`id` AS `batch_id`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`b`.`display_name` AS `display_name`,`v`.`id` AS `venue_id`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,`b`.`offline` AS `offline`,`cat`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,`cat`.`category` AS `category`,`m`.`status` AS `status`,`m`.`app_active` AS `app_active`,`m`.`app_active_till` AS `app_active_till`,`m`.`park` AS `park`,`m`.`bid` AS `bid`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`mname` AS `mname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`c`.`image` AS `image`,`c`.`dob` AS `dob`,date_format(`c`.`dob`,'%d %b %y') AS `dob_string`,`c`.`gender` AS `gender`,`c`.`age` AS `age`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`c`.`address` AS `address`,`c`.`city` AS `city`,`c`.`state` AS `state`,`c`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`c`.`carrot` AS `carrot`,`c`.`quick_comment` AS `quick_comment`,`c`.`country_code_2` AS `country_code_2`,`c`.`mobile2` AS `mobile2`,`c`.`phone_no` AS `phone_no`,`c`.`occupation` AS `occupation`,`c`.`gstin` AS `gstin`,`c`.`company` AS `company`,`c`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`c`.`relation` AS `relation`,`m`.`c_employee_id` AS `c_employee_id`,`m`.`t_contact_id` AS `t_contact_id`,`m`.`level_id` AS `level_id`,`m`.`last_class` AS `last_class`,`m`.`class_count` AS `class_count`,`ii`.`sessions_used` AS `sessions_used`,`ii`.`sessions` AS `sessions`,`ii`.`senior_counsellor` AS `senior_counsellor`,`ii`.`sc_contact_id` AS `sc_contact_id`,`inq`.`source` AS `source_id`,`inq`.`heard_from` AS `heard_from_id`,`inqs`.`source` AS `source`,`inqhf`.`heard_from` AS `heard_from`,`c`.`blogger` AS `blogger`,(case when (`m`.`t_contact_id` > 0) then concat(`t_cont`.`fname`,' ',`t_cont`.`lname`) else '-' end) AS `trainer_name`,(case when (`m`.`t_contact_id` > 0) then concat(convert((case when (`t_cont`.`gender` = 'M') then 'Mr. ' else 'Miss. ' end) using utf8mb3),`t_cont`.`fname`) else '-' end) AS `trainer_fname`,(case when (`m`.`level_id` > 0) then `l`.`level` else '-' end) AS `level`,(case when (`m`.`c_employee_id` > 0) then concat(`c_cont`.`fname`,' ',`c_cont`.`lname`) else '-' end) AS `counsellor_name`,`m`.`points` AS `points`,`branch`.`branch` AS `branch`,`branch`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name_actual`,`branch`.`managed_by_tr` AS `managed_by_tr`,`branch`.`counsellors_incentives` AS `counsellors_incentives`,(case when (`cat`.`master_category_id` = 1) then `bom1`.`owner_name` else `bom2`.`owner_name` end) AS `owner_name`,`branch`.`type` AS `branch_type` from ((((((((((((((((`member` `m` join `contact` `c` on((`m`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) join `invoice` `i` on((`m`.`contact_id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) join `invoice_item` `ii` on(((`i`.`id` = `ii`.`invoice_id`) and (`ii`.`batch_id` <> 0)))) join `branch` on((`branch`.`id` = `m`.`bid`))) left join `inquiry` `inq` on((`m`.`contact_id` = `inq`.`contact_id`))) left join `heard_from` `inqhf` on((`inq`.`heard_from` = `inqhf`.`id`))) left join `inquiry_source` `inqs` on((`inq`.`source` = `inqs`.`id`))) left join `batch` `b` on((`ii`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `category` `cat` on((`cat`.`id` = `ii`.`category_id`))) left join `contact` `t_cont` on((`t_cont`.`id` = `m`.`t_contact_id`))) left join `level` `l` on((`l`.`id` = `m`.`level_id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`e`.`id` = `m`.`c_employee_id`))) left join `contact` `c_cont` on((`c_cont`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`b`.`venue_id` = `v`.`id`))) left join `branch_owner_master` `bom1` on((`branch`.`invoice_name_id` = `bom1`.`id`))) left join `branch_owner_master` `bom2` on((`v`.`owner_name_id` = `bom2`.`id`))) where (`i`.`id` = (select max(`invoice`.`id`) from `invoice` where ((`invoice`.`contact_id` = `m`.`contact_id`) and (`invoice`.`park` = '0')))) group by `m`.`id` order by `m`.`id` desc;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.member_dropout_delhi_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `member_dropout_delhi_view` AS select `m`.`id` AS `id`,`m`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,concat(`c`.`country_code`,' ',`c`.`mobile`) AS `mobile`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`m`.`code` AS `code`,`m`.`c_employee_id` AS `c_employee_id`,concat(`c2`.`fname`,' ',`c2`.`mname`,' ',`c2`.`lname`) AS `c_fullname`,`m`.`t_contact_id` AS `t_contact_id`,concat(`c3`.`fname`,' ',`c3`.`mname`,' ',`c3`.`lname`) AS `t_fullname`,`m`.`bid` AS `bid`,`m`.`park` AS `park`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`id` AS `branch_id`,`b`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`m`.`ex_member_date` AS `dropout_date`,`m`.`dropout_comment` AS `dropout_comment`,`m`.`dropout_other_reason` AS `dropout_other_reason`,`idl`.`dropout_reason` AS `dropout_reason` from ((((((`member` `m` left join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `m`.`contact_id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`m`.`c_employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c2` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `c2`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c3` on((`m`.`t_contact_id` = `c3`.`id`))) left join `branch` `b` on((`m`.`bid` = `b`.`id`))) left join (select `i`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`icl`.`dropout_reason` AS `dropout_reason` from ((`invoice_change_log` `icl` join `invoice` `i` on((`i`.`id` = `icl`.`invoice_id`))) join (select `invoice`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,max(`invoice`.`id`) AS `latest_invoice_id` from `invoice` where (`invoice`.`park` = 0) group by `invoice`.`contact_id`) `latest_invoice` on((`i`.`id` = `latest_invoice`.`latest_invoice_id`))) where (`icl`.`change` = 7)) `idl` on((`m`.`contact_id` = `idl`.`contact_id`))) where ((`m`.`status` = 2) and (`m`.`park` = 0) and (`b`.`id` in (97,133,24,29,105,132,144,146,156,160,167))) order by `m`.`ex_member_date` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.member_dropout_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `member_dropout_view` AS select `m`.`id` AS `id`,`m`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,concat(`c`.`country_code`,' ',`c`.`mobile`) AS `mobile`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`m`.`code` AS `code`,`m`.`c_employee_id` AS `c_employee_id`,concat(`c2`.`fname`,' ',`c2`.`mname`,' ',`c2`.`lname`) AS `c_fullname`,`m`.`t_contact_id` AS `t_contact_id`,concat(`c3`.`fname`,' ',`c3`.`mname`,' ',`c3`.`lname`) AS `t_fullname`,`e_t`.`master_trainer_contact_id` AS `master_trainer_contact_id`,concat(`mtc`.`fname`,' ',`mtc`.`mname`,' ',`mtc`.`lname`) AS `master_trainer_fullname`,`m`.`bid` AS `bid`,`m`.`park` AS `park`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`id` AS `branch_id`,`b`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`m`.`ex_member_date` AS `dropout_date`,`m`.`dropout_comment` AS `dropout_comment`,`m`.`dropout_other_reason` AS `dropout_other_reason`,`idl`.`dropout_reason` AS `dropout_reason` from ((((((((`member` `m` left join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `m`.`contact_id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`m`.`c_employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c2` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `c2`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c3` on((`m`.`t_contact_id` = `c3`.`id`))) left join `branch` `b` on((`m`.`bid` = `b`.`id`))) left join `employee` `e_t` on((`e_t`.`contact_id` = `m`.`t_contact_id`))) left join `contact` `mtc` on((`mtc`.`id` = `e_t`.`master_trainer_contact_id`))) left join (select `i`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`icl`.`dropout_reason` AS `dropout_reason` from ((`invoice_change_log` `icl` join `invoice` `i` on((`i`.`id` = `icl`.`invoice_id`))) join (select `invoice`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,max(`invoice`.`id`) AS `latest_invoice_id` from `invoice` where (`invoice`.`park` = 0) group by `invoice`.`contact_id`) `latest_invoice` on((`i`.`id` = `latest_invoice`.`latest_invoice_id`))) where (`icl`.`change` = 7)) `idl` on((`m`.`contact_id` = `idl`.`contact_id`))) where ((`m`.`status` = 2) and (`m`.`park` = 0)) order by `m`.`ex_member_date` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.member_dropout_view_temp
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `member_dropout_view_temp` AS select `m`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`m`.`code` AS `code`,`m`.`c_employee_id` AS `c_employee_id`,concat(`c2`.`fname`,' ',`c2`.`mname`,' ',`c2`.`lname`) AS `c_fullname`,`m`.`t_contact_id` AS `t_contact_id`,concat(`c3`.`fname`,' ',`c3`.`mname`,' ',`c3`.`lname`) AS `t_fullname`,`m`.`bid` AS `bid`,`m`.`park` AS `park`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`sdl`.`date` AS `dropout_date` from ((((((`member` `m` left join `sdl_logger_table` `sdl` on((`sdl`.`row_id` = `m`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `m`.`contact_id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`m`.`c_employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c2` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `c2`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c3` on((`m`.`t_contact_id` = `c3`.`id`))) left join `branch` `b` on((`m`.`bid` = `b`.`id`))) where ((`m`.`status` = 2) and (`sdl`.`table_name` like 'member') and (`sdl`.`column_name` like 'status') and (`sdl`.`value_to` like '2') and (`m`.`park` = 0)) order by `sdl`.`date` desc;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.member_exercise_log

`exercise_divider_id`,`el`.`bid` AS `bid`,`el`.`park` AS `park`,`el`.`level` AS `level`,`e`.`exercise` AS `exercise`,`e`.`equipment_id` AS `equipment_id`,`e`.`vid` AS `vid`,`e`.`image` AS `image`,`e`.`thumbnail` AS `thumbnail`,`e`.`description` AS `description`,`mcv`.`id` AS `member_id`,`mcv`.`rfid` AS `rfid`,`mcv`.`code` AS `code`,`mcv`.`due_date` AS `due_date`,`mcv`.`due_date_string` AS `due_date_string`,`mcv`.`doj` AS `doj`,`mcv`.`doj_string` AS `doj_string`,`mcv`.`status` AS `status`,`mcv`.`fname` AS `fname`,`mcv`.`mname` AS `mname`,`mcv`.`lname` AS `lname`,`mcv`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,`mcv`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`mcv`.`image` AS `member_image`,`mcv`.`dob` AS `dob`,`mcv`.`dob_string` AS `dob_string`,`mcv`.`gender` AS `gender`,`mcv`.`age` AS `age`,`mcv`.`email` AS `email`,`mcv`.`address` AS `address`,`mcv`.`city` AS `city`,`mcv`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`mcv`.`mobile2` AS `mobile2`,`mcv`.`phone_no` AS `phone_no`,`mcv`.`occupation` AS `occupation`,`mcv`.`gstin` AS `mcv`.`contact_id`))) join `pf_central`.`exercise` `e` on((`e`.`id` = `el`.`exercise_id`))) where (0 <> 1);

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.member_exercise_schedule
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `member_exercise_schedule` AS select `el`.`id` AS `id`,`el`.`workout_id` AS `workout_id`,`el`.`exercise_id` AS `exercise_id`,`el`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`el`.`sequence` AS `sequence`,`el`.`date` AS `date`,`el`.`weight` AS `weight`,`el`.`passive_weight` AS `passive_weight`,`el`.`uom` AS `uom`,`el`.`repeition` AS `repeition`,`el`.`speed` AS `speed`,`el`.`passive_speed` AS `passive_speed`,`el`.`distance` AS `distance`,`el`.`time` AS `time`,`el`.`active_time` AS `active_time`,`el`.`passive_time` AS `passive_time`,`el`.`sets` AS `sets`,`el`.`rest` AS `rest`,`el`.`exercise_divider_id` AS `exercise_divider_id`,`el`.`shoot_video` AS `shoot_video`,`el`.`bid` AS `bid`,`el`.`park` AS `park`,`el`.`level` AS `level`,`el`.`component_id` AS `component_id`,`e`.`exercise` AS `exercise`,`e`.`equipment_id` AS `equipment_id`,`e`.`vid` AS `vid`,`e`.`image` AS `image`,`e`.`thumbnail` AS `thumbnail`,`e`.`description` AS `description`,`mcv`.`id` AS `member_id`,`mcv`.`rfid` AS `rfid`,`mcv`.`code` AS `code`,`mcv`.`due_date` AS `due_date`,`mcv`.`due_date_string` AS `due_date_string`,`mcv`.`doj` AS `doj`,`mcv`.`doj_string` AS `doj_string`,`mcv`.`status` AS `status`,`mcv`.`fname` AS `fname`,`mcv`.`mname` AS `mname`,`mcv`.`lname` AS `lname`,`mcv`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,`mcv`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`mcv`.`image` AS `member_image`,`mcv`.`dob` AS `dob`,`mcv`.`dob_string` AS `dob_string`,`mcv`.`gender` AS `gender`,`mcv`.`age` AS `age`,`mcv`.`email` AS `email`,`mcv`.`address` AS `address`,`mcv`.`city` AS `city`,`mcv`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`mcv`.`mobile2` AS `mobile2`,`mcv`.`phone_no` AS `phone_no`,`mcv`.`occupation` AS `occupation`,`mcv`.`gstin` AS `gstin`,`mcv`.`company` AS `company`,`mcv`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`mcv`.`relation` AS `relation` from ((`exercise_schedule` `el` join `member_contact_view` `mcv` on((`el`.`contact_id` = `mcv`.`contact_id`))) join `pf_central`.`exercise` `e` on((`e`.`id` = `el`.`exercise_id`))) where (0 <> 1);

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.member_extn
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `member_extn` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `code` varchar(5) NOT NULL,
  `count` int NOT NULL COMMENT ' Number of extended days',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `reason` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `ext_type` int NOT NULL COMMENT '(0-Payment / 1-Validity / 2-Sessions)',
  `type_rowid` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'row id of type defined in ext_type',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `type_rowid` (`type_rowid`),
  KEY `contact_id_2` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `type_rowid_2` (`type_rowid`),
  KEY `contact_id_3` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `type_rowid_3` (`type_rowid`),
  KEY `contact_id_4` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`),
  KEY `type_rowid_4` (`type_rowid`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `goal_id` int NOT NULL,

  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `goal_id` (`goal_id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `active` (`active`),
  KEY `goal_id_2` (`goal_id`),
  KEY `contact_id_2` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `active_2` (`active`),
  KEY `goal_id_3` (`goal_id`),
  KEY `contact_id_3` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_3` (`park`),
  KEY `active_3` (`active`),
  KEY `goal_id_4` (`goal_id`),
  KEY `contact_id_4` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_4` (`park`),
  KEY `active_4` (`active`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;
