BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.member_invoice_item_renewal_status
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `member_invoice_item_renewal_status` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `invoice_id` int NOT NULL,
  `invoice_item_id` int NOT NULL,
  `invoice_item_payment_date` date NOT NULL,
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `venue_id` int NOT NULL,
  `start_date` date NOT NULL,
  `end_date` date NOT NULL,
  `renewal_status` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'New enrollment = 0, Advance renewal= 1, Renewal = 2, Late renewal = 3, Active = 4, Dropout=5, Inactive = 6, Advance renewal (future cycle) = 7',
  `renewal_invoice_item_payment_date` date NOT NULL,
  `renewal_invoice_item_id` int NOT NULL,
  `renewal_invoice_id` int NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=70342 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.member_invoice_item_renewal_status_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `member_invoice_item_renewal_status_view` AS select `miirs`.`id` AS `id`,`miirs`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,concat_ws(' ',`c`.`fname`,`c`.`mname`,`c`.`lname`) AS `name`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,concat(`c`.`country_code`,`c`.`mobile`) AS `mobile`,`miirs`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,`miirs`.`invoice_item_id` AS `invoice_item_id`,`miirs`.`invoice_item_payment_date` AS `invoice_item_payment_date`,`miirs`.`bid` AS `bid`,`br`.`branch` AS `branch`,coalesce(`vii`.`id`,0) AS `venue_id`,`i`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,concat_ws(' ',`ce`.`fname`,`ce`.`mname`,`ce`.`lname`) AS `employee_name`,`ii`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`ii`.`service_id` AS `service_id`,`s`.`service` AS `service`,`s`.`display_name` AS `service_display_name`,concat(`s`.`duration`,' ',`s`.`duration_type`) AS `service_duration`,`b`.`id` AS `batch_id`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`vii`.`venue` AS `venue`,`vii`.`address` AS `venue_address`,`vii`.`display_name` AS `venue_display_name`,concat_ws(' ',`bc`.`fname`,`bc`.`mname`,`bc`.`lname`) AS `batch_employee_name`,`be_emp`.`id` AS `batch_employee_id`,`miirs`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`miirs`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,`miirs`.`renewal_status` AS `renewal_status`,(case `miirs`.`renewal_status` when 0 then 'New enrollment' when 1 then 'Advance renewal' when 2 then 'Renewal' when 3 then 'Late renewal' when 4 then 'Active' when 5 then 'Dropout' when 6 then 'Inactive' when 7 then 'Advance renewal (future cycle)' else '' end) AS `renewal_type_name`,`miirs`.`renewal_invoice_item_payment_date` AS `renewal_invoice_item_payment_date`,`miirs`.`renewal_invoice_item_id` AS `renewal_invoice_item_id`,`rii`.`service_id` AS `renewal_service_id`,`rs`.`service` AS `renewal_service`,`rs`.`display_name` AS `renewal_service_display_name`,concat(`rs`.`duration`,' ',`rs`.`duration_type`) AS `renewal_service_duration`,`miirs`.`renewal_invoice_id` AS `renewal_invoice_id`,`re`.`id` AS `renewal_employee_id`,concat_ws(' ',`cre`.`fname`,`cre`.`mname`,`cre`.`lname`) AS `renewal_employee_name`,`rb`.`id` AS `renewal_batch_id`,`rb`.`batch` AS `renewal_batch`,concat_ws(' ',`rbc`.`fname`,`rbc`.`mname`,`rbc`.`lname`) AS `renewal_batch_employee_name`,`rbe_emp`.`id` AS `renewal_batch_employee_id` from (((((((((((((((((((((((`member_invoice_item_renewal_status` `miirs` join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `miirs`.`contact_id`))) left join `invoice` `i` on((`i`.`id` = `miirs`.`invoice_id`))) left join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`ii`.`id` = `miirs`.`invoice_item_id`))) left join `batch` `bii` on(((`bii`.`id` = `ii`.`batch_id`) and (`miirs`.`bid` = `bii`.`bid`)))) left join `venue` `vii` on((`vii`.`id` = `bii`.`venue_id`))) left join `service` `s` on((`s`.`id` = `ii`.`service_id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`e`.`id` = `i`.`employee_id`))) left join `contact` `ce` on((`ce`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) left join `batch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `ii`.`batch_id`))) left join `batch_employee` `be` on((`be`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `contact` `bc` on((`bc`.`id` = `be`.`contact_id`))) left join `employee` `be_emp` on((`be_emp`.`contact_id` = `bc`.`id`))) left join `invoice_item` `rii` on((`rii`.`id` = `miirs`.`renewal_invoice_item_id`))) left join `service` `rs` on((`rs`.`id` = `rii`.`service_id`))) left join `invoice` `ri` on((`ri`.`id` = `miirs`.`renewal_invoice_id`))) left join `employee` `re` on((`re`.`id` = `ri`.`employee_id`))) left join `contact` `cre` on((`cre`.`id` = `re`.`contact_id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`v`.`id` = `miirs`.`venue_id`))) left join `batch` `rb` on((`rb`.`id` = `rii`.`batch_id`))) left join `batch_employee` `rbe` on((`rbe`.`batch_id` = `rb`.`id`))) left join `contact` `rbc` on((`rbc`.`id` = `rbe`.`contact_id`))) left join `employee` `rbe_emp` on((`rbe_emp`.`contact_id` = `rbc`.`id`))) left join `branch` `br` on((`br`.`id` = `miirs`.`bid`))) group by `miirs`.`invoice_item_id` order by `miirs`.`renewal_status` desc;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.member_link
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `member_link` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `inquiry_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `otp` varchar(6) NOT NULL,
  `offline` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `custom_branch` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` varchar(25) NOT NULL,
  `custom_venue` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `venue_id` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `custom_batch` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `batch_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `batchless_link` int NOT NULL,
  `custom_service` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `service_id` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `checkMember` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `memberCode` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `spot_discount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `discount_amount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `discount_type` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-none,1- discount in rupees,2- demo discount ,3- discount in precent,4-discount without expiry,5-8th yr anniversary,6-hpd discount',
  `discount_value` int NOT NULL,
  `referral_discount_flag` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `generated_on` datetime NOT NULL,
  `discount_hrs` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '24',
  `festive_offer` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `promo_code_flag` int NOT NULL,
  `employee_id` int NOT NULL,
  `opened_on` datetime NOT NULL,
  `batch_selected_on` datetime NOT NULL,
  `package_selected_on` datetime NOT NULL,
  `package_start_selected_on` datetime NOT NULL,
  `payment_clicked_on` datetime NOT NULL,
  `payment_done_on` datetime NOT NULL,
  `first_logged_in_on` datetime NOT NULL,
  `payment_status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-pending, 1-paid, 2-pending',
  `park` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=1354 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.member_link_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `member_link_view` AS select `mil`.`id` AS `id`,`mil`.`inquiry_id` AS `inquiry_id`,`mil`.`memberCode` AS `memberCode`,`mil`.`otp` AS `otp`,`mil`.`offline` AS `offline`,`mil`.`custom_branch` AS `custom_branch`,`mil`.`bid` AS `link_for_bid`,`mil`.`custom_venue` AS `custom_venue`,`mil`.`venue_id` AS `link_for_venue_id`,`mil`.`custom_batch` AS `custom_batch`,`mil`.`batch_id` AS `link_for_batch_id`,`mil`.`batchless_link` AS `batchless_link`,`mil`.`custom_service` AS `custom_service`,`mil`.`service_id` AS `link_for_service_id`,`mil`.`spot_discount` AS `spot_discount`,`mil`.`discount_amount` AS `discount_amount`,`mil`.`discount_type` AS `discount_type`,`mil`.`discount_value` AS `discount_value`,`mil`.`referral_discount_flag` AS `referral`,`mil`.`promo_code_flag` AS `promo_code`,`mil`.`generated_on` AS `generated_on`,`mil`.`discount_hrs` AS `discount_hrs`,`mil`.`festive_offer` AS `festive_offer`,`mil`.`opened_on` AS `opened_on`,`mil`.`batch_selected_on` AS `batch_selected_on`,`mil`.`package_selected_on` AS `package_selected_on`,`mil`.`package_start_selected_on` AS `package_start_selected_on`,`mil`.`payment_clicked_on` AS `payment_clicked_on`,`mil`.`payment_done_on` AS `payment_done_on`,`mil`.`first_logged_in_on` AS `first_logged_in_on`,`mil`.`payment_status` AS `payment_status`,`mil`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`m`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`m`.`c_employee_id` AS `c_employee_id`,`m`.`doj` AS `doj`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`mname` AS `mname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`c`.`country_code_2` AS `country_code_2`,`c`.`mobile2` AS `mobile2`,`c`.`phone_no` AS `phone_no`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`c`.`gender` AS `gender`,`c`.`image` AS `image`,`c`.`dob` AS `dob`,(case when (`mil`.`custom_batch` <> 0) then concat('https://registration.tickleright.com/join_us/forBatchInquiry.php?member_tag=',`mil`.`id`,'_',`mil`.`otp`) else concat('https://registration.tickleright.com/join_us/home.php?member_tag=',`mil`.`id`,'_',`mil`.`otp`) end) AS `link`,`mil`.`park` AS `park`,`m`.`bid` AS `bid` from ((`member_link` `mil` join `member` `m` on((`m`.`code` = `mil`.`memberCode`))) join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `m`.`contact_id`))) order by `mil`.`id` desc;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.member_referral_details_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `member_referral_details_view` AS select `c2`.`id` AS `id`,`c2`.`id` AS `referer_contact_id`,concat(`c2`.`fname`,' ',`c2`.`lname`) AS `referrer_fullname`,count(distinct `c`.`id`) AS `referred_count`,`c2`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`mc`.`bid` AS `bid`,`mc`.`t_contact_id` AS `t_contact_id`,concat(`c3`.`fname`,' ',`c3`.`lname`) AS `trainer_fullname`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`mc`.`class_count` AS `class_count`,`mc`.`status` AS `status`,`i2`.`id` AS `invoice_id`,`ii2`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`bat`.`batch` AS `batch_name`,`c2`.`park` AS `park` from (((((((((`contact` `c` join `invoice` `i` on((`i`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`ii`.`invoice_id` = `i`.`id`))) left join `member` `mc` on((`mc`.`referral_code` = `ii`.`referral_code`))) left join `contact` `c3` on((`c3`.`id` = `mc`.`t_contact_id`))) left join `contact` `c2` on((`c2`.`id` = `mc`.`contact_id`))) left join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `mc`.`bid`))) left join `invoice` `i2` on((`i2`.`contact_id` = `c2`.`id`))) join `invoice_item` `ii2` on((`ii2`.`invoice_id` = `i2`.`id`))) left join `batch` `bat` on((`bat`.`id` = `ii2`.`batch_id`))) where ((`i`.`park` = 0) and (`ii`.`park` = 0) and (`ii`.`referral_code` <> '') and (`b`.`park` = 0)) group by `referrer_fullname`,`c2`.`id`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.member_referral_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `member_referral_view` AS select `c`.`id` AS `id`,`mc`.`contact_id` AS `referer_contact_id`,`mc`.`class_count` AS `class_count`,`mc`.`status` AS `status`,concat(`c2`.`fname`,' ',`c2`.`lname`) AS `referrer_fullname`,`ii`.`referral_code` AS `referral_code`,`i`.`date` AS `referral_on_date`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname` from ((((`contact` `c` join `invoice` `i` on((`i`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`ii`.`invoice_id` = `i`.`id`))) left join `member` `mc` on((`mc`.`referral_code` = `ii`.`referral_code`))) left join `contact` `c2` on((`c2`.`id` = `mc`.`contact_id`))) where ((`ii`.`park` = 0) and (`ii`.`referral_code` <> ''));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.member_sessions_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `member_sessions_view` AS select `a`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `name`,`a`.`code` AS `code`,`i`.`invoice_count` AS `invoice_count`,`m`.`status` AS `status`,`a`.`date` AS `date`,`a`.`sessions_completed` AS `sessions_completed`,`a`.`attendance_count` AS `attendance_count`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`br`.`branch_code` AS `branch_code`,`a`.`park` AS `park` from (((((`attendance` `a` left join `contact` `c` on((`a`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join `branch` `br` on((`a`.`bid` = `br`.`id`))) left join `batch` `b` on((`a`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `member` `m` on((`a`.`code` = `m`.`code`))) left join `invoice` `i` on(((`i`.`code` = `a`.`code`) and (`i`.`id` = (select max(`inv`.`id`) from `invoice` `inv` where ((`inv`.`code` = `a`.`code`) and (`inv`.`park` = '0'))))))) where (`a`.`id` in (select max(`attendance`.`id`) from `attendance` where (`attendance`.`park` = 0) group by `attendance`.`contact_id`) and (`a`.`negative` = 0) and (`a`.`type` like 'M') and (`a`.`park` = 0)) group by `i`.`code` order by `i`.`code` desc;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.member_transfer
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `member_transfer` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `invoice_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `item_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `payment_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `ft_contact_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `tt_contact_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `from_bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `to_bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `from_master_category` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `to_master_category` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `from_category` varchar(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `to_category` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `from_batch` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `to_batch` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `from_ammount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `to_ammount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `action_date` date NOT NULL,
  `request_comment` varchar(300) NOT NULL,
  `approve_comment` varchar(300) NOT NULL,
  `bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '27' COMMENT 'For visibility in HQ bid=27 ',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `error` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `modified_by` int DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `invoice_id` (`invoice_id`),
  KEY `action_date` (`action_date`),
  KEY `status` (`status`),
  KEY `idx_member_transfer_status_action_invoice` (`status`,`action_date`,`invoice_id`,`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=2969 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.member_transfer_origin_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `member_transfer_origin_view` AS select `mtr`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,`b`.`id` AS `batch_id`,`br`.`id` AS `bid`,`br`.`branch` AS `branch`,`br`.`type` AS `type`,`br`.`branch_invoice_name` AS `branch_invoice_name`,`v`.`id` AS `venue_id`,`br`.`invoice_name_id` AS `branch_owner_id`,`br`.`royalty` AS `branch_online_rolyalty`,`br`.`tds` AS `tds`,`br`.`zoom` AS `zoom`,`v`.`royalty` AS `venue_offline_royalty`,`v`.`display_name` AS `venue_display_name`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,`v`.`owner_name_id` AS `venue_owner_name_id`,`mtr`.`payment_date` AS `payment_date`,`mtr`.`from_master_category` AS `master_category`,`mtr`.`from_category` AS `category` from ((((select `mt`.`id` AS `id`,`mt`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,`mt`.`item_id` AS `item_id`,`mt`.`payment_id` AS `payment_id`,`mt`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`mt`.`ft_contact_id` AS `ft_contact_id`,`mt`.`tt_contact_id` AS `tt_contact_id`,`mt`.`from_bid` AS `from_bid`,`mt`.`to_bid` AS `to_bid`,`mt`.`from_master_category` AS `from_master_category`,`mt`.`to_master_category` AS `to_master_category`,`mt`.`from_category` AS `from_category`,`mt`.`to_category` AS `to_category`,`mt`.`from_batch` AS `from_batch`,`mt`.`to_batch` AS `to_batch`,`mt`.`from_ammount` AS `from_ammount`,`mt`.`to_ammount` AS `to_ammount`,`mt`.`status` AS `status`,`mt`.`action_date` AS `action_date`,`mt`.`request_comment` AS `request_comment`,`mt`.`approve_comment` AS `approve_comment`,`mt`.`bid` AS `bid`,`mt`.`park` AS `park`,`mt`.`error` AS `error`,`mt`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`mt`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`mt`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`mt`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`p`.`date` AS `payment_date` from (`member_transfer` `mt` join `payment` `p` on((`mt`.`payment_id` = `p`.`id`))) where ((`mt`.`id` = (select min(`mt2`.`id`) from `member_transfer` `mt2` where (`mt2`.`payment_id` = `mt`.`payment_id`))) and (`mt`.`park` = 0) and (`mt`.`status` = 1) and (exists(select 1 from `branch` `b` where ((`b`.`id` = `mt`.`from_bid`) and (`b`.`park` = 0) and (`b`.`type` in ('Franchisee','OM_Franchisee','OI_Franchisee')))) or exists(select 1 from `branch` `b` where ((`b`.`id` = `mt`.`to_bid`) and (`b`.`park` = 0) and (`b`.`type` in ('Franchisee','OM_Franchisee','OI_Franchisee'))))))) `mtr` left join `batch` `b` on((`mtr`.`from_batch` = `b`.`id`))) left join `branch` `br` on((`b`.`bid` = `br`.`id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`b`.`venue_id` = `v`.`id`)));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.member_transfer_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `member_transfer_view` AS select `mt`.`id` AS `id`,`mt`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,`i`.`employee_id` AS `invoice_employee_id`,`i`.`date` AS `invoice_pay_date`,`mt`.`item_id` AS `item_id`,`mt`.`payment_id` AS `payment_id`,`mt`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `member_name`,`mt`.`ft_contact_id` AS `ft_contact_id`,`mt`.`tt_contact_id` AS `tt_contact_id`,concat(`ct`.`fname`,' ',`ct`.`mname`,' ',`ct`.`lname`) AS `teacher_name`,`mt`.`from_bid` AS `from_bid`,concat(`b`.`branch`,'-',`b`.`branch_name_actual`) AS `from_bid_name`,`mt`.`to_bid` AS `to_bid`,concat(`bt`.`branch`,'-',`bt`.`branch_name_actual`) AS `to_bid_name`,`mt`.`from_category` AS `from_category`,(case when (`ca`.`master_category_id` = 1) then `b`.`invoice_name_id` when (`ca`.`master_category_id` = 2) then `v`.`owner_name_id` end) AS `from_owner_id`,(case when (`cat`.`master_category_id` = 1) then `bt`.`invoice_name_id` when (`cat`.`master_category_id` = 2) then `vt`.`owner_name_id` end) AS `to_owner_id`,`b`.`invoice_name_id` AS `from_branch_owner_id`,`bt`.`invoice_name_id` AS `to_branch_owner_id`,`v`.`owner_name_id` AS `from_venue_owner_id`,`vt`.`owner_name_id` AS `to_venue_owner_id`,`ca`.`master_category_id` AS `from_category_master`,`cat`.`master_category_id` AS `to_category_master`,`b`.`type` AS `from_branch_type`,`bt`.`type` AS `to_branch_type`,`ba`.`venue_id` AS `from_venue_id`,`bat`.`venue_id` AS `to_venue_id`,`ca`.`category` AS `from_category_name`,`mt`.`to_category` AS `to_category`,`cat`.`category` AS `to_category_name`,`mt`.`from_batch` AS `from_batch`,`ba`.`batch` AS `from_batch_name`,`mt`.`to_batch` AS `to_batch`,`bat`.`batch` AS `to_batch_name`,`mt`.`from_ammount` AS `from_ammount`,`mt`.`to_ammount` AS `to_ammount`,`mt`.`status` AS `status`,`mt`.`request_comment` AS `request_comment`,`mt`.`approve_comment` AS `approve_comment`,`mt`.`action_date` AS `action_date`,`mt`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`mt`.`bid` AS `bid`,`mt`.`park` AS `park` from ((((((((((((`member_transfer` `mt` join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `mt`.`contact_id`))) left join `contact` `cf` on((`cf`.`id` = `mt`.`ft_contact_id`))) left join `contact` `ct` on((`ct`.`id` = `mt`.`tt_contact_id`))) join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `mt`.`from_bid`))) join `branch` `bt` on((`bt`.`id` = `mt`.`to_bid`))) join `category` `ca` on((`ca`.`id` = `mt`.`from_category`))) join `category` `cat` on((`cat`.`id` = `mt`.`to_category`))) join `batch` `ba` on((`ba`.`id` = `mt`.`from_batch`))) join `batch` `bat` on((`bat`.`id` = `mt`.`to_batch`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`v`.`id` = `ba`.`venue_id`))) left join `venue` `vt` on((`vt`.`id` = `bat`.`venue_id`))) left join `invoice` `i` on((`i`.`id` = `mt`.`invoice_id`))) where (`mt`.`park` <> 1) order by `mt`.`id` desc;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.member_workout
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `member_workout` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `total_time` time NOT NULL,
  `worked_out_time` time NOT NULL,
  `cal_total` float(7,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `cal_burn` float(7,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `comment` varchar(500) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `workout_feel_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `carrot_target` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `employee_id` int NOT NULL,
  `assessment_flag` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0 - Normal Workout, 1 - Assessment, 2 - Assessment Completed)',
  `component_log_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `week` int NOT NULL,
  `day` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `workout_feel_id` (`workout_feel_id`),
  KEY `employee_id` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `component_log_id` (`component_log_id`),
  KEY `date` (`date`),
  KEY `contact_id_2` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `workout_feel_id_2` (`workout_feel_id`),
  KEY `employee_id_2` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `component_log_id_2` (`component_log_id`),
  KEY `date_2` (`date`),
  KEY `contact_id_3` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `workout_feel_id_3` (`workout_feel_id`),
  KEY `employee_id_3` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `component_log_id_3` (`component_log_id`),
  KEY `date_3` (`date`),
  KEY `contact_id_4` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `workout_feel_id_4` (`workout_feel_id`),
  KEY `employee_id_4` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `component_log_id_4` (`component_log_id`),
  KEY `date_4` (`date`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `module` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `category_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `exam_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `exam_trigger` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT 'Flag (-1 Before, 1 After)',
  `assignment_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `assignment_trigger` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '-1' COMMENT 'Flag (-1 Before, 1 After)',

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.module_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `module_view` AS select `m`.`id` AS `id`,`c`.`id` AS `category_id`,`m`.`module` AS `module`,`m`.`exam_id` AS `exam_id`,`m`.`exam_trigger` AS `exam_trigger`,`m`.`assignment_id` AS `assignment_id`,`m`.`assignment_trigger` AS `assignment_trigger`,`m`.`ref_material` AS `ref_material`,`m`.`ref_material_trigger` AS `ref_material_trigger`,`c`.`category` AS `category`,`c`.`type` AS `category_type`,`c`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,`cm`.`master_category` AS `master_category`,`c`.`bid` AS `bid`,`m`.`park` AS `park` from ((`category_master` `cm` join `module` `m` on((`m`.`category_id` = `cm`.`id`))) join `category` `c` on((`cm`.`id` = `c`.`master_category_id`))) where ((`c`.`park` = 0) and (`cm`.`park` = 0));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.month_absent_count_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `month_absent_count_view` AS select `a`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,concat(`a`.`code`,' - ',`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `code_name`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`a`.`date` AS `date`,date_format(`a`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `date_string`,concat(`a`.`date`,' ',`a`.`in_time`) AS `datetime`,`a`.`sessions_completed` AS `sessions_completed`,`a`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`a`.`type` AS `type`,`a`.`status` AS `status`,`a`.`code` AS `code`,`a`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`a`.`negative` AS `negative`,sum(`a`.`negative`) AS `absent_count`,`a`.`session` AS `session`,`a`.`user_id` AS `user_id`,`a`.`park` AS `park`,`a`.`bid` AS `bid`,`a`.`source` AS `source`,`a`.`makeup` AS `makeup`,`a`.`invalid` AS `invalid`,`a`.`comment` AS `comment`,if(((`b`.`batch` is null) or (`b`.`batch` = '')),'-',`b`.`batch`) AS `batch`,'-' AS `title`,'-' AS `module`,'' AS `module_id`,'' AS `category`,(case when (`cn`.`id` is not null) then concat(`cn`.`fname`,`cn`.`lname`) else '-' end) AS `counsellor_name`,(case when (`cn`.`id` is not null) then `cn`.`email` else '' end) AS `counsellor_email`,`bv`.`employee` AS `employee`,`cv`.`email` AS `employee_email` from (((((((`attendance` `a` left join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `a`.`contact_id`))) left join `batch` `b` on((`a`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `member` `m` on((`m`.`contact_id` = `a`.`contact_id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`e`.`id` = `m`.`c_employee_id`))) left join `contact` `cn` on((`cn`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) left join `batch_view` `bv` on((`bv`.`id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `contact` `cv` on((`cv`.`id` = `bv`.`contact_id`))) where ((`a`.`date` >= (curdate() - 98)) and (`a`.`date` <= curdate()) and (`a`.`negative` = 1) and (`a`.`contact_id` <> 0) and (`a`.`type` = 'M') and (`a`.`park` = 0)) group by `a`.`contact_id` order by `absent_count` desc;

CREATE TABLE `msg_parameter` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'SMS parameter name',
  `value` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'able & Column Name (e.g., contact.firstname)',
  `msg_type_id` int NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.next_class_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `next_class_view` AS select `b`.`id` AS `id`,`mc`.`id` AS `contact_id`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`l`.`level` AS `level`,`b`.`completed_sessions` AS `completed_sessions`,(`b`.`completed_sessions` + 1) AS `next_class`,`b`.`bid` AS `bid`,`a`.`id` AS `asset_id`,`a`.`type` AS `asset_type`,`a`.`file` AS `asset_file`,`a`.`park` AS `park`,`inv`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`inv`.`end_date` AS `end_date` from ((((`batch` `b` join `level` `l` on((`l`.`id` = `b`.`level_id`))) left join `asset_view` `a` on(((`a`.`age_group` = `l`.`level`) and (`a`.`class_f_value` = (`b`.`completed_sessions` + 1))))) left join `batch_member_view` `mc` on((`mc`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `invoice_invoiceitem_view` `inv` on((`mc`.`contact_id` = `inv`.`contact_id`))) where ((`inv`.`renew` = 0) and (curdate() between `inv`.`start_date` and `inv`.`end_date`) and (`inv`.`park` = 0) and (`inv`.`dropout` = 0) and (`inv`.`freeze` = 0) and (`a`.`park` = 0));

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.next_month_class_folder
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `batch_id` int NOT NULL,
  `batch_name` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `level` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `completed_sessions` int NOT NULL,
  `day_code` int NOT NULL,
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `branch_name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `venue` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `date1` date NOT NULL,
  `class1` int NOT NULL,
  `date2` date NOT NULL,
  `class2` int NOT NULL,
  `date3` date NOT NULL,
  `class3` int NOT NULL,
  `date4` date NOT NULL,
  `class4` int NOT NULL,
  `date5` date NOT NULL,
  `class5` int NOT NULL,
  `class_nos` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `level_actual` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `folders` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `status` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.no_make_up_turn_mail_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `no_make_up_turn_mail_view` AS select `ml`.`id` AS `id`,`inv`.`id` AS `invoice_id`,`c`.`id` AS `contact_id`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `name`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`s`.`service` AS `package_name`,`ii`.`sessions` AS `total_sessions`,`inv`.`bid` AS `bid`,`br`.`branch` AS `branch`,`br`.`type` AS `branch_type`,(select count(`attendance`.`negative`) AS `absent_count` from `attendance` where ((`attendance`.`contact_id` = `inv`.`contact_id`) and (`attendance`.`negative` = 1) and (`attendance`.`date` between `ii`.`start_date` and `ii`.`end_date`))) AS `absent`,`ml`.`makeup_session` AS `extension`,`ml`.`makeup_date` AS `makeup_date` from (((((((`makeup_log` `ml` left join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`ml`.`invoice_item_id` = `ii`.`id`))) left join `invoice` `inv` on((`inv`.`id` = `ii`.`invoice_id`))) left join `contact` `c` on((`inv`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join `branch` `br` on((`inv`.`bid` = `br`.`id`))) left join `service` `s` on((`s`.`id` = `ii`.`service_id`))) left join `pf_central`.`user` `u` on((`u`.`id` = `ml`.`created_by`))) left join `batch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `ii`.`batch_id`))) where ((`ml`.`makeup_session` = 0) and (`ml`.`makeup_date` between (curdate() + interval -(8) day) and curdate()) and (`inv`.`park` = 0) and (`ii`.`park` = 0) and (`c`.`park` = 0)) order by `ml`.`makeup_date` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.notification
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `notification` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `employee_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'User Id',
  `employee` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Contact Name (First Last)',
  `action` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Action (created / updated / deleted)',
  `element` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Module (Attendance / Invoice / Inquiry)',
  `record_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Record Id (Row Id of respective module-table)',
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `record_value` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Constant value of Record (Contact / Invoice #)',
  `datetime` datetime NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(500) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `comment` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Comments (Value shown under notification)',
  `sourceHeardFrom` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `href` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Destination on user click action',
  `concat_id` int NOT NULL,
  `onclick` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - href, 1- function ',
  `modal` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'modal name',
  `module_id` int NOT NULL,
  `action_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `web_icon` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT ' Icon on Web',
  `mobile_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `mobile_icon` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Icon on Mobile',
  `icon_color` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Icon Background Color',
  `user_type` set('M','E','F') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'E' COMMENT 'Flag (E - Employee, M - Member, F - Faculty) Notify',
  `alert_user` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT ' Send Notification',
  `broadcast` set('0','1') NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT 'Flag (1 - Broadcast to users of same type, 0 - Send to respective user only)',
  `user_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'User to which notification must be sent.',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `flag` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `employee_id` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `record_id` (`record_id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `concat_id` (`concat_id`),
  KEY `module_id` (`module_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `datetime` (`datetime`),
  KEY `broadcast` (`broadcast`),
  KEY `action_id` (`action_id`),
  KEY `user_id` (`user_id`),
  KEY `alert_user` (`alert_user`),
  KEY `user_type` (`user_type`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=1656127 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.notification_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `notification_view` AS select `notification`.`id` AS `id`,`notification`.`employee` AS `employee`,(case when (`notification`.`title` = '') then concat(`notification`.`employee`,' ',`notification`.`action`,' ',`notification`.`element`,' ',`notification`.`record_value`) else `notification`.`title` end) AS `noti`,`notification`.`title` AS `title`,`notification`.`comment` AS `comment`,`notification`.`datetime` AS `datetime`,date_format(`notification`.`datetime`,'%d %b %y  %k:%i') AS `datetime_string`,`notification`.`module_id` AS `module_id`,`notification`.`user_type` AS `user_type`,`notification`.`element` AS `element`,`notification`.`broadcast` AS `broadcast`,`notification`.`action` AS `action`,`notification`.`web_icon` AS `web_icon`,`notification`.`mobile_id` AS `mobile_id`,`notification`.`mobile_icon` AS `mobile_icon`,`notification`.`icon_color` AS `icon_color`,`notification`.`alert_user` AS `alert_user`,`notification`.`bid` AS `bid`,`notification`.`park` AS `park`,`notification`.`record_id` AS `record_id`,`notification`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id` from `notification`;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.offer
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `offer` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `offer` varchar(200) NOT NULL COMMENT 'offer name',
  `offer_code` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `amount` int NOT NULL,
  `tax_percent` int NOT NULL,
  `tax_type` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0 - No Tax / 1 - Inclusive / 2 - Exclusive',
  `tax_amount` int NOT NULL,
  `total` int NOT NULL,
  `valid` date NOT NULL COMMENT 'Validity Date',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_3` (`park`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_4` (`park`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.offline_franchisee_package_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `offline_franchisee_package_view` AS select `b`.`id` AS `bid`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name_actual`,`s`.`service` AS `service`,(select group_concat(`s1`.`amount` separator ',') from `service` `s1` where ((((`s1`.`duration` = 1) and (`s1`.`duration_type` = 'M')) or ((`s1`.`duration` = 30) and (`s1`.`duration_type` = 'D'))) and (`s1`.`private_service` = '0') and (`s1`.`park` = 0) and (`s1`.`bid` = `s`.`bid`) and (`s1`.`service` like '%Offline%'))) AS `1_month`,(select group_concat(`s2`.`amount` separator ',') from `service` `s2` where ((((`s2`.`duration` = 3) and (`s2`.`duration_type` = 'M')) or ((`s2`.`duration` = 90) and (`s2`.`duration_type` = 'D'))) and (`s2`.`private_service` = '0') and (`s2`.`park` = 0) and (`s2`.`bid` = `s`.`bid`) and (`s2`.`service` like '%Offline%'))) AS `3_month`,(select group_concat(`s3`.`amount` separator ',') from `service` `s3` where ((((`s3`.`duration` = 6) and (`s3`.`duration_type` = 'M')) or ((`s3`.`duration` = 120) and (`s3`.`duration_type` = 'D'))) and (`s3`.`private_service` = '0') and (`s3`.`park` = 0) and (`s3`.`bid` = `s`.`bid`) and (`s3`.`service` like '%Offline%'))) AS `6_month`,(select group_concat(`s4`.`amount` separator ',') from `service` `s4` where ((((`s4`.`duration` = 1) and (`s4`.`duration_type` = 'Y')) or ((`s4`.`duration` = 365) and (`s4`.`duration_type` = 'D')) or ((`s4`.`duration` = 12) and (`s4`.`duration_type` = 'M'))) and (`s4`.`private_service` = '0') and (`s4`.`park` = 0) and (`s4`.`bid` = `s`.`bid`) and (`s4`.`service` like '%Offline%'))) AS `12_month`,(select group_concat(`s5`.`amount` separator ',') from `service` `s5` where ((`s5`.`duration` = 3) and (`s5`.`duration_type` = 'D') and (`s5`.`private_service` = '0') and (`s5`.`park` = 0) and (`s5`.`bid` = `s`.`bid`) and (`s5`.`service` like '%Offline%'))) AS `referral`,(select group_concat(`s6`.`amount` separator ',') from `service` `s6` where ((((`s6`.`duration` = 1) and (`s6`.`duration_type` = 'M')) or ((`s6`.`duration` = 30) and (`s6`.`duration_type` = 'D'))) and (`s6`.`private_service` = '1') and (`s6`.`park` = 0) and (`s6`.`bid` = `s`.`bid`) and (`s6`.`service` like '%Offline%'))) AS `PB_1_month`,(select group_concat(`s7`.`amount` separator ',') from `service` `s7` where ((((`s7`.`duration` = 3) and (`s7`.`duration_type` = 'M')) or ((`s7`.`duration` = 90) and (`s7`.`duration_type` = 'D'))) and (`s7`.`private_service` = '1') and (`s7`.`park` = 0) and (`s7`.`bid` = `s`.`bid`) and (`s7`.`service` like '%Offline%'))) AS `PB_3_month`,(select group_concat(`s8`.`amount` separator ',') from `service` `s8` where ((((`s8`.`duration` = 6) and (`s8`.`duration_type` = 'M')) or ((`s8`.`duration` = 120) and (`s8`.`duration_type` = 'D'))) and (`s8`.`private_service` = '1') and (`s8`.`park` = 0) and (`s8`.`bid` = `s`.`bid`) and (`s8`.`service` like '%Offline%'))) AS `PB_6_month`,(select group_concat(`s9`.`amount` separator ',') from `service` `s9` where ((((`s9`.`duration` = 1) and (`s9`.`duration_type` = 'Y')) or ((`s9`.`duration` = 365) and (`s9`.`duration_type` = 'D')) or ((`s9`.`duration` = 12) and (`s9`.`duration_type` = 'M'))) and (`s9`.`private_service` = '1') and (`s9`.`park` = 0) and (`s9`.`bid` = `s`.`bid`) and (`s9`.`service` like '%Offline%'))) AS `PB_12_month`,(select group_concat(`s10`.`amount` separator ',') from `service` `s10` where ((`s10`.`duration` = 3) and (`s10`.`duration_type` = 'D') and (`s10`.`private_service` = '1') and (`s10`.`park` = 0) and (`s10`.`bid` = `s`.`bid`) and (`s10`.`service` like '%Offline%'))) AS `PB_referral`,`s`.`park` AS `park` from (((`service` `s` join `category` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `s`.`category_id`))) join `category_master` `cm` on((`cm`.`id` = `c`.`master_category_id`))) join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `s`.`bid`))) where ((`b`.`type` = 'Franchisee') and (`s`.`park` = 0) and (`c`.`master_category_id` = 2)) group by `b`.`id` order by `PB_referral` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.offline_franchisee_package_view_table
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `offline_franchisee_package_view_table` (
  `bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `branch` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'name of branch',
  `branch_name_actual` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `service` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `1_month` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `3_month` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `6_month` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `12_month` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `referral` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `PB_1_month` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `PB_3_month` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `PB_6_month` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `PB_12_month` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `PB_referral` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0'
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.oi_fran_acc_prev_month_combine_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `oi_fran_acc_prev_month_combine_view` AS select `invoice_payment_view`.`id` AS `id`,sum(`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount`) AS `total_sale`,`invoice_payment_view`.`branch` AS `branch`,`invoice_payment_view`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name`,group_concat(`invoice_payment_view`.`invoice_id` separator ',') AS `invoice_ids`,group_concat(`invoice_payment_view`.`code_fullname` separator ',') AS `fullname`,date_format(`invoice_payment_view`.`date`,'%b %y') AS `month`,cast(sum(((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * `invoice_payment_view`.`royalty`) / 100)) as decimal(10,2)) AS `royalty`,`invoice_payment_view`.`zoom` AS `zoom`,cast(sum((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * `invoice_payment_view`.`royalty`) / 100))) as decimal(10,2)) AS `payable` from `invoice_payment_view` where ((`invoice_payment_view`.`date` >= (case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-01') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 1),'-01') end)) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`date` <= (case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-31') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 1),'-31') end)) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'Points') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`branch_type` = 'OI_Franchisee') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`category` in ('Offline Right Brain Development','Right Brain Education')) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`invoice_park` = '0') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`clear` = '1') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`park` = '0')) group by `invoice_payment_view`.`branch`;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.oi_fran_acc_prev_month_view_offline_venue
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `oi_fran_acc_prev_month_view_offline_venue` AS select `invoice_payment_view`.`id` AS `id`,sum(`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount`) AS `total_sale`,`invoice_payment_view`.`venue` AS `venue`,`invoice_payment_view`.`venue_display_name` AS `venue_display_name`,`invoice_payment_view`.`branch_invoice_name` AS `branch_invoice_name`,`invoice_payment_view`.`branch` AS `branch`,`invoice_payment_view`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name`,group_concat(`invoice_payment_view`.`invoice_id` separator ',') AS `invoice_ids`,group_concat(`invoice_payment_view`.`code_fullname` separator ',') AS `fullname`,date_format(`invoice_payment_view`.`date`,'%b %y') AS `month`,cast(sum(((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * `invoice_payment_view`.`royalty`) / 100)) as decimal(10,2)) AS `royalty`,cast(sum((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * `invoice_payment_view`.`royalty`) / 100))) as decimal(10,2)) AS `payable` from `invoice_payment_view` where ((`invoice_payment_view`.`date` >= (case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-01') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 1),'-01') end)) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`date` <= (case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-31') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 1),'-31') end)) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'Points') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`branch_type` = 'OI_Franchisee') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`category` = 'Offline Right Brain Development') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`invoice_park` = '0') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`clear` = '1') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`park` = '0')) group by `invoice_payment_view`.`venue_id`;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.oi_fran_acc_prev_month_view_online
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `oi_fran_acc_prev_month_view_online` AS select `invoice_payment_view`.`id` AS `id`,sum(`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount`) AS `total_sale`,`invoice_payment_view`.`branch` AS `branch`,`invoice_payment_view`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name`,group_concat(`invoice_payment_view`.`invoice_id` separator ',') AS `invoice_ids`,group_concat(`invoice_payment_view`.`code_fullname` separator ',') AS `fullname`,date_format(`invoice_payment_view`.`date`,'%b %y') AS `month`,cast(sum(((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * `invoice_payment_view`.`royalty`) / 100)) as decimal(10,2)) AS `royalty`,`invoice_payment_view`.`zoom` AS `zoom`,cast(sum((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * `invoice_payment_view`.`royalty`) / 100))) as decimal(10,2)) AS `payable` from `invoice_payment_view` where ((`invoice_payment_view`.`date` >= (case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-01') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 1),'-01') end)) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`date` <= (case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-31') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 1),'-31') end)) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'Points') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`branch_type` = 'OI_Franchisee') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`category` = 'Right Brain Education') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`invoice_park` = '0') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`clear` = '1') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`park` = '0')) group by `invoice_payment_view`.`branch`;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.oi_franchisee_combine_owner
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `oi_franchisee_combine_owner` AS select `x`.`id` AS `id`,sum(`x`.`total_sale`) AS `total_sale`,`x`.`category` AS `category`,`x`.`branch` AS `branch`,`x`.`branch_name` AS `branch_name`,`x`.`owner_name` AS `owner_name`,`x`.`owner_id` AS `owner_id`,group_concat(`x`.`invoice_id` separator ',') AS `invoice_ids`,group_concat(`x`.`fullname` separator ',') AS `fullname`,`x`.`month` AS `month`,cast(sum(`x`.`royalty`) as decimal(10,2)) AS `royalty`,sum(`x`.`zoom`) AS `zoom`,cast(sum(`x`.`payable`) as decimal(10,2)) AS `payable` from (select `invoice_payment_view`.`id` AS `id`,`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` AS `total_sale`,`invoice_payment_view`.`category` AS `category`,`invoice_payment_view`.`branch` AS `branch`,`invoice_payment_view`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name`,`invoice_payment_view`.`owner_name` AS `owner_name`,`invoice_payment_view`.`owner_name_id` AS `owner_id`,`invoice_payment_view`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,`invoice_payment_view`.`code_fullname` AS `fullname`,date_format(`invoice_payment_view`.`date`,'%b %y') AS `month`,cast(((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * `invoice_payment_view`.`royalty`) / 100) as decimal(10,2)) AS `royalty`,`invoice_payment_view`.`zoom` AS `zoom`,cast((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * `invoice_payment_view`.`royalty`) / 100)) as decimal(10,2)) AS `payable` from `invoice_payment_view` where ((`invoice_payment_view`.`date` >= (case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-01') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 1),'-01') end)) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`date` <= (case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-31') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 1),'-31') end)) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'Points') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`branch_type` = 'OI_Franchisee') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`category` = 'Offline Right Brain Development') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`invoice_park` = '0') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`clear` = '1') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`park` = '0')) union all select `invoice_payment_view`.`id` AS `id`,`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` AS `total_sale`,`invoice_payment_view`.`category` AS `category`,`invoice_payment_view`.`branch` AS `branch`,`invoice_payment_view`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name`,`invoice_payment_view`.`branch_invoice_name` AS `owner_name`,`invoice_payment_view`.`invoice_name_id` AS `owner_id`,`invoice_payment_view`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,`invoice_payment_view`.`code_fullname` AS `fullname`,date_format(`invoice_payment_view`.`date`,'%b %y') AS `month`,cast(((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * `invoice_payment_view`.`royalty`) / 100) as decimal(10,2)) AS `royalty`,`invoice_payment_view`.`zoom` AS `zoom`,cast((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` - ((`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount` * `invoice_payment_view`.`royalty`) / 100)) as decimal(10,2)) AS `payable` from `invoice_payment_view` where ((`invoice_payment_view`.`date` >= (case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-01') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 1),'-01') end)) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`date` <= (case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-31') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 1),'-31') end)) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'Points') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`branch_type` = 'OI_Franchisee') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`category` = 'Right Brain Education') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`invoice_park` = '0') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`clear` = '1') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`park` = '0'))) `x` group by `x`.`owner_id`;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.om_fran_acc_prev_month_view2_offline
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `om_fran_acc_prev_month_view2_offline` AS select `invoice_payment_view`.`id` AS `id`,sum(`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount`) AS `total_sale`,`invoice_payment_view`.`branch` AS `branch`,`invoice_payment_view`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name`,group_concat(`invoice_payment_view`.`invoice_id` separator ',') AS `invoice_ids`,group_concat(`invoice_payment_view`.`code_fullname` separator ',') AS `fullname`,date_format(`invoice_payment_view`.`date`,'%b %y') AS `month`,cast(((sum(`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount`) * `invoice_payment_view`.`offline_royalty`) / 100) as decimal(10,2)) AS `offline_royalty`,cast(((((sum(`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount`) * `invoice_payment_view`.`offline_royalty`) / 100) * 18) / 100) as decimal(10,2)) AS `gst`,cast((((sum(`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount`) * `invoice_payment_view`.`offline_royalty`) / 100) + ((((sum(`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_amount`) * `invoice_payment_view`.`offline_royalty`) / 100) * 18) / 100)) as decimal(10,2)) AS `payable` from `invoice_payment_view` where ((`invoice_payment_view`.`date` >= (case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-11','-01') when (month(curdate()) = 2) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-01') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 2),'-01') end)) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`date` <= (case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-11','-01') when (month(curdate()) = 2) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-01') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 2),'-31') end)) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'Points') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`branch_type` = 'OM_Franchisee') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`invoice_park` = '0') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`category` = 'Offline Right Brain Development') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`park` = '0') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`clear` = '1')) group by `invoice_payment_view`.`branch`;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.om_franchisee_combine_owner
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `om_franchisee_combine_owner` AS select `x`.`id` AS `id`,sum(`x`.`total_sale`) AS `total_sale`,`x`.`category` AS `category`,`x`.`branch` AS `branch`,`x`.`branch_name` AS `branch_name`,`x`.`owner_name` AS `owner_name`,`x`.`owner_id` AS `owner_id`,group_concat(`x`.`invoice_id` separator ',') AS `invoice_ids`,group_concat(`x`.`fullname` separator ',') AS `fullname`,`x`.`month` AS `month`,(case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-01') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 1),'-01') end) AS `start_date`,(case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-31') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 1),'-31') end) AS `end_date`,cast(sum(`x`.`royalty`) as decimal(10,2)) AS `royalty`,cast(sum(`x`.`gst`) as decimal(10,2)) AS `gst`,`x`.`zoom` AS `zoom`,cast(sum(`x`.`payable`) as decimal(10,2)) AS `payable` from (select `invoice_payment_view`.`id` AS `id`,`invoice_payment_view`.`total` AS `total_sale`,`invoice_payment_view`.`category` AS `category`,`invoice_payment_view`.`branch` AS `branch`,`invoice_payment_view`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name`,`invoice_payment_view`.`owner_name` AS `owner_name`,`invoice_payment_view`.`owner_name_id` AS `owner_id`,`invoice_payment_view`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,`invoice_payment_view`.`code_fullname` AS `fullname`,date_format(`invoice_payment_view`.`date`,'%b %y') AS `month`,cast(((`invoice_payment_view`.`total` * `invoice_payment_view`.`offline_royalty`) / 100) as decimal(10,2)) AS `royalty`,cast(((((`invoice_payment_view`.`total` * `invoice_payment_view`.`offline_royalty`) / 100) * 18) / 100) as decimal(10,2)) AS `gst`,`invoice_payment_view`.`zoom` AS `zoom`,cast((((`invoice_payment_view`.`total` * `invoice_payment_view`.`offline_royalty`) / 100) + ((((`invoice_payment_view`.`total` * `invoice_payment_view`.`offline_royalty`) / 100) * 18) / 100)) as decimal(10,2)) AS `payable` from `invoice_payment_view` where ((`invoice_payment_view`.`date` >= (case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-01') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 1),'-01') end)) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`date` <= (case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-31') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 1),'-31') end)) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_mode_text` not in ('Points','Referral')) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`branch_type` = 'OM_Franchisee') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`invoice_park` = '0') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`category` = 'Offline Right Brain Development') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`park` = '0') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`clear` = '1')) union all select `invoice_payment_view`.`id` AS `id`,`invoice_payment_view`.`total` AS `total_sale`,`invoice_payment_view`.`category` AS `category`,`invoice_payment_view`.`branch` AS `branch`,`invoice_payment_view`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name`,`invoice_payment_view`.`branch_invoice_name` AS `owner_name`,`invoice_payment_view`.`invoice_name_id` AS `owner_id`,`invoice_payment_view`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,`invoice_payment_view`.`code_fullname` AS `fullname`,date_format(`invoice_payment_view`.`date`,'%b %y') AS `month`,cast(((`invoice_payment_view`.`total` * `invoice_payment_view`.`royalty`) / 100) as decimal(10,2)) AS `royalty`,cast(((((`invoice_payment_view`.`total` * `invoice_payment_view`.`royalty`) / 100) * 18) / 100) as decimal(10,2)) AS `gst`,`invoice_payment_view`.`zoom` AS `zoom`,(cast((((`invoice_payment_view`.`total` * `invoice_payment_view`.`royalty`) / 100) + ((((`invoice_payment_view`.`total` * `invoice_payment_view`.`royalty`) / 100) * 18) / 100)) as decimal(10,2)) + `invoice_payment_view`.`zoom`) AS `payable` from `invoice_payment_view` where ((`invoice_payment_view`.`date` >= (case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-01') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 1),'-01') end)) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`date` <= (case when (month(curdate()) = 1) then concat((year(curdate()) - 1),'-12','-31') else concat(year(curdate()),'-',(month(curdate()) - 1),'-31') end)) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`pay_mode_text` not in ('Points','Referral')) and (`invoice_payment_view`.`branch_type` = 'OM_Franchisee') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`invoice_park` = '0') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`category` = 'Right Brain Education') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`park` = '0') and (`invoice_payment_view`.`clear` = '1'))) `x` group by `x`.`owner_id`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.onboard1_from1_response
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `onboard1_from1_response` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `form_id` int NOT NULL,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `question_id` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `answer` varchar(225) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=85 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.onboard_master
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `onboard_master` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `form_id` int NOT NULL,
  `question` char(225) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin NOT NULL,
  `type` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '0- radio , 1- input',
  `lbl1` char(225) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin NOT NULL,
  `lbl2` varchar(225) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin NOT NULL,
  `lbl3` varchar(225) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin NOT NULL,
  `lbl4` varchar(225) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin NOT NULL,
  `other` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=13 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.one_year_graduation_certificate
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `one_year_graduation_certificate` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `invoice_id` varchar(30) NOT NULL,
  `gender` varchar(5) NOT NULL,
  `fullname` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `graduation_date` date NOT NULL,
  `approved_by` varchar(25) NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=16 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.one_year_message_certificate
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `one_year_message_certificate` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `invoice_id` int NOT NULL,
  `message_title` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `child_message` text NOT NULL,
  `from_message` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `message_length` varchar(5) NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.online_assign_c_log
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `online_assign_c_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `emp_id` int NOT NULL,
  `counsellor_name` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `assign_type` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=70470 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.online_assign_c_log_count_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `online_assign_c_log_count_view` AS select `cl`.`id` AS `id`,`cl`.`emp_id` AS `emp_id`,count(`cl`.`emp_id`) AS `allocated`,`cl`.`counsellor_name` AS `c_name`,`cl`.`created_at` AS `date`,`cl`.`assign_type` AS `assign_type`,`cl`.`bid` AS `bid` from `online_assign_c_log` `cl` where (`cl`.`emp_id` <> 0) group by `cl`.`emp_id`,cast(`cl`.`created_at` as date);


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.online_franchisee_package_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `online_franchisee_package_view` AS select `b`.`id` AS `bid`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name_actual`,`s`.`service` AS `service`,(select group_concat(`s1`.`amount` separator ',') from `service` `s1` where ((((`s1`.`duration` = 1) and (`s1`.`duration_type` = 'M')) or ((`s1`.`duration` = 30) and (`s1`.`duration_type` = 'D'))) and (`s1`.`private_service` = '0') and (`s1`.`park` = 0) and (`s1`.`bid` = `s`.`bid`) and (`s1`.`service` like '%Online%'))) AS `1_month`,(select group_concat(`s2`.`amount` separator ',') from `service` `s2` where ((((`s2`.`duration` = 3) and (`s2`.`duration_type` = 'M')) or ((`s2`.`duration` = 90) and (`s2`.`duration_type` = 'D'))) and (`s2`.`private_service` = '0') and (`s2`.`park` = 0) and (`s2`.`bid` = `s`.`bid`) and (`s2`.`service` like '%Online%'))) AS `3_month`,(select group_concat(`s3`.`amount` separator ',') from `service` `s3` where ((((`s3`.`duration` = 6) and (`s3`.`duration_type` = 'M')) or ((`s3`.`duration` = 120) and (`s3`.`duration_type` = 'D'))) and (`s3`.`private_service` = '0') and (`s3`.`park` = 0) and (`s3`.`bid` = `s`.`bid`) and (`s3`.`service` like '%Online%'))) AS `6_month`,(select group_concat(`s4`.`amount` separator ',') from `service` `s4` where ((((`s4`.`duration` = 1) and (`s4`.`duration_type` = 'Y')) or ((`s4`.`duration` = 365) and (`s4`.`duration_type` = 'D')) or ((`s4`.`duration` = 12) and (`s4`.`duration_type` = 'M'))) and (`s4`.`private_service` = '0') and (`s4`.`park` = 0) and (`s4`.`bid` = `s`.`bid`) and (`s4`.`service` like '%Online%'))) AS `12_month`,(select group_concat(`s5`.`amount` separator ',') from `service` `s5` where ((`s5`.`duration` = 3) and (`s5`.`duration_type` = 'D') and (`s5`.`private_service` = '0') and (`s5`.`park` = 0) and (`s5`.`bid` = `s`.`bid`) and (`s5`.`service` like '%Online%'))) AS `referral`,(select group_concat(`s6`.`amount` separator ',') from `service` `s6` where ((((`s6`.`duration` = 1) and (`s6`.`duration_type` = 'M')) or ((`s6`.`duration` = 30) and (`s6`.`duration_type` = 'D'))) and (`s6`.`private_service` = '1') and (`s6`.`park` = 0) and (`s6`.`bid` = `s`.`bid`) and (`s6`.`service` like '%Online%'))) AS `PB_1_month`,(select group_concat(`s7`.`amount` separator ',') from `service` `s7` where ((((`s7`.`duration` = 3) and (`s7`.`duration_type` = 'M')) or ((`s7`.`duration` = 90) and (`s7`.`duration_type` = 'D'))) and (`s7`.`private_service` = '1') and (`s7`.`park` = 0) and (`s7`.`bid` = `s`.`bid`) and (`s7`.`service` like '%Online%'))) AS `PB_3_month`,(select group_concat(`s8`.`amount` separator ',') from `service` `s8` where ((((`s8`.`duration` = 6) and (`s8`.`duration_type` = 'M')) or ((`s8`.`duration` = 120) and (`s8`.`duration_type` = 'D'))) and (`s8`.`private_service` = '1') and (`s8`.`park` = 0) and (`s8`.`bid` = `s`.`bid`) and (`s8`.`service` like '%Online%'))) AS `PB_6_month`,(select group_concat(`s9`.`amount` separator ',') from `service` `s9` where ((((`s9`.`duration` = 1) and (`s9`.`duration_type` = 'Y')) or ((`s9`.`duration` = 365) and (`s9`.`duration_type` = 'D')) or ((`s9`.`duration` = 12) and (`s9`.`duration_type` = 'M'))) and (`s9`.`private_service` = '1') and (`s9`.`park` = 0) and (`s9`.`bid` = `s`.`bid`) and (`s9`.`service` like '%Online%'))) AS `PB_12_month`,(select group_concat(`s10`.`amount` separator ',') from `service` `s10` where ((`s10`.`duration` = 3) and (`s10`.`duration_type` = 'D') and (`s10`.`private_service` = '1') and (`s10`.`park` = 0) and (`s10`.`bid` = `s`.`bid`) and (`s10`.`service` like '%Online%'))) AS `PB_referral`,`s`.`park` AS `park` from (((`service` `s` join `category` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `s`.`category_id`))) join `category_master` `cm` on((`cm`.`id` = `c`.`master_category_id`))) join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `s`.`bid`))) where ((`b`.`type` = 'Franchisee') and (`s`.`park` = 0) and (`c`.`master_category_id` = 1)) group by `b`.`id` order by `PB_6_month` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.online_franchisee_package_view_table
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `online_franchisee_package_view_table` (
  `bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `branch` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'name of branch',
  `branch_name_actual` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `service` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `1_month` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `3_month` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `6_month` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `12_month` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `referral` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `PB_1_month` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `PB_3_month` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `PB_6_month` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `PB_12_month` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `PB_referral` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0'
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.online_inq_cont_cat_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `online_inq_cont_cat_view` AS select `i`.`id` AS `id`,`i`.`comment` AS `comment`,`f`.`old_comment` AS `f_comment`,`i`.`source` AS `source`,`i`.`heard_from` AS `heard_from`,`i`.`receive_worksheet` AS `receive_worksheet`,`i`.`allocation_date` AS `allocation_date`,(case when (`i`.`allocation_date` = '0000-00-00 00:00:00') then ' - ' else convert(date_format(`i`.`allocation_date`,'%d %b %y') using utf8mb3) end) AS `allocation_date_string`,`i`.`tap` AS `tap`,`i`.`dot` AS `dot`,(case when (`i`.`dot` = '0000-00-00') then '' else date_format(`i`.`dot`,'%d %b %y') end) AS `dot_string`,`i`.`dut` AS `dut`,`i`.`tap_count` AS `tap_count`,`i`.`doi` AS `doi`,cast(`i`.`created_at` as date) AS `doi_created`,date_format(`i`.`doi`,'%d %b %y') AS `doi_string`,date_format(`i`.`created_at`,'%d %b %y') AS `doi_creation`,cast(`m`.`created_at` as date) AS `doc`,date_format(`m`.`created_at`,'%d %b %y') AS `doc_string`,(to_days(cast(`m`.`created_at` as date)) - to_days(`i`.`doi`)) AS `days_of_conversion`,`i`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`i`.`c_employee_id` AS `c_employee_id`,`ecv`.`fullname` AS `emp_name`,`i`.`park` AS `park`,`i`.`batch_id` AS `i_batch_id`,`i`.`balance` AS `i_balance`,`i`.`master_category_id` AS `i_master_category_id`,`i`.`offline` AS `i_offline`,`cat`.`category` AS `category`,`cat`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,`i`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`mname` AS `mname`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`c`.`country_code_2` AS `country_code_2`,`c`.`mobile2` AS `mobile2`,`c`.`contact_group_id` AS `contact_group_id`,`c`.`phone_no` AS `phone_no`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`c`.`gender` AS `gender`,`c`.`image` AS `image`,`c`.`dob` AS `dob`,`c`.`blogger` AS `blogger`,(case when (`c`.`dob` <> '0000-00-00') then concat(floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)),'y',(timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) % 12),'m') else '0' end) AS `age`,(case when (`c`.`dob` = '0000-00-00') then '-' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 0) then 'below 0' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 1) then '0-1' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 2) then '1-2' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 3) then '2-3' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 4) then '3-4' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 5) then '4-5' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 6) then '5-6' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 7) then '6-7' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 8) then '7-8' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 9) then '8-9' when (floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)) < 10) then '9-10' else 'above 10' end) AS `age_group`,date_format(`c`.`dob`,'%d %b %y') AS `dob_string`,`c`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`ic`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`c`.`relation` AS `relation`,`c`.`address` AS `address`,`c`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`c`.`city` AS `city`,`c`.`state` AS `state`,`i`.`bid` AS `bid`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name_actual`,`b`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`c`.`park` AS `cont_park`,`cg`.`contact_group` AS `contact_group`,`i`.`converted` AS `converted`,`c`.`quick_comment` AS `quick_comment`,`c`.`occupation` AS `occupation`,`c`.`gstin` AS `gstin`,`c`.`company` AS `company`,`f`.`interest` AS `interest`,`f`.`interest_string` AS `interest_string`,`f`.`status` AS `status`,(case when (`f`.`id` is null) then '-' when ((`f`.`status` = '2') or (`f`.`status` = '1')) then 'Pending' when (`f`.`status` = '4') then 'Dead' when ((`f`.`status` = '3') or (`i`.`converted` = '1')) then 'Converted' end) AS `interest_text`,(case when (`f`.`id` is null) then '0' when ((`f`.`status` = '2') or (`f`.`status` = '1')) then '0' when (`f`.`status` = '4') then '3' when ((`f`.`status` = '3') or (`i`.`converted` = '1')) then '1' end) AS `row_color`,`cecv`.`fullname` AS `counsellor_name` from (((((((((`contact` `c` join `contact_group` `cg`) join `category` `cat`) join `inquiry_online` `i`) join `inquiry_category` `ic`) join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `i`.`bid`))) join (select `e`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname` from (`contact` `c` join `employee` `e` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`)))) `ecv`) left join `latest_followup_table` `f` on((`f`.`master_id` = `i`.`id`))) left join (select `e`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname` from (`contact` `c` join `employee` `e` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`)))) `cecv` on((`cecv`.`id` = `i`.`c_employee_id`))) left join `member` `m` on((`c`.`id` = `m`.`contact_id`))) where ((`cg`.`id` = `c`.`contact_group_id`) and (`c`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`) and (`i`.`id` = `ic`.`inquiry_id`) and (`ic`.`category_id` = `cat`.`id`) and (`i`.`employee_id` = `ecv`.`id`)) order by (to_days(cast(`m`.`created_at` as date)) - to_days(`i`.`doi`)) desc;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.online_inquiry_category
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `online_inquiry_category` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `inquiry_id` int NOT NULL,
  `category_id` int NOT NULL,
  `package_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `offer_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `inquiry_id` (`inquiry_id`),
  KEY `category_id` (`category_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `inquiry_id_2` (`inquiry_id`),
  KEY `category_id_2` (`category_id`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `inquiry_id_3` (`inquiry_id`),
  KEY `category_id_3` (`category_id`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `inquiry_id_4` (`inquiry_id`),
  KEY `category_id_4` (`category_id`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.online_invoice_invoiceitem_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `online_invoice_invoiceitem_view` AS select `i`.`id` AS `invoice_id`,`i`.`id` AS `id`,`i`.`invoice` AS `invoice`,`i`.`isMember` AS `isMember`,`i`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`i`.`quotation` AS `quotation`,`i`.`date` AS `date`,date_format(`i`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `date_string`,`i`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,concat(`con`.`fname`,' ',`con`.`lname`,' ',`con`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,`i`.`dropout` AS `dropout`,`i`.`freeze` AS `freeze`,`con`.`fname` AS `fname`,`con`.`mname` AS `mname`,`con`.`lname` AS `lname`,`con`.`gstin` AS `gstin`,concat(`i`.`code`,' - ',`con`.`fname`,' ',`con`.`lname`,' ',`con`.`mname`) AS `code_name`,(case when (`con`.`blogger` = '1') then 'Blogger' when (`con`.`blogger` = '0') then 'VIP' else 'VIP' end) AS `member_type`,`con`.`company` AS `company`,`con`.`company_add` AS `company_add`,`con`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`con`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`con`.`dob` AS `dob`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`b`.`avg_age` AS `avg_age`,`b`.`min_age` AS `min_age`,`b`.`max_age` AS `max_age`,`b`.`waiting_list` AS `waiting_list`,`b`.`level_id` AS `level_id`,`b`.`enrolled` AS `enrolled`,`b`.`limit` AS `limit`,`b`.`completed_sessions` AS `completed_sessions`,`b`.`offline` AS `offline`,`b`.`private` AS `private`,`branch`.`branch` AS `branch`,`branch`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`con`.`email` AS `email`,`con`.`address` AS `address`,`con`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`con`.`city` AS `city`,`i`.`amount` AS `invoice_amount`,`i`.`tax` AS `invoice_tax`,`i`.`tax_amount` AS `tax_amount`,`i`.`total` AS `total`,`i`.`notes` AS `notes`,`i`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`i`.`balance` AS `balance`,`i`.`batchless_link` AS `batchless_link`,`ii`.`id` AS `item_id`,`ii`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`ii`.`service_id` AS `service_id`,`ii`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`ii`.`currency` AS `currency`,`ii`.`referral_code` AS `referral_code`,`ii`.`promo_code` AS `promo_code`,`ii`.`redemed` AS `redemed`,`ii`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,date_format(`ii`.`start_date`,'%d %b %y') AS `start_date_string`,date_format(`ii`.`end_date`,'%d %b %y') AS `end_date_string`,`ii`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`ii`.`senior_counsellor` AS `senior_counsellor`,`ii`.`sc_contact_id` AS `sc_contact_id`,`ii`.`item_amount` AS `item_amount`,`ii`.`item_tax` AS `item_tax`,`ii`.`item_tax_amount` AS `item_tax_amount`,`ii`.`item_tax_type` AS `item_tax_type`,`ii`.`item_total` AS `item_total`,`ii`.`sessions` AS `sessions`,concat(`ii`.`sessions_used`,' / ',`ii`.`sessions`) AS `session_consumed`,`ii`.`item_discount` AS `item_discount`,`ii`.`sessions_used` AS `sessions_used`,`ii`.`change_id` AS `change_id`,`ii`.`item_change` AS `item_change`,`ii`.`extend_reason` AS `extend_reason`,`c`.`category` AS `category`,`s`.`service` AS `service`,`s`.`amount` AS `service_amount`,`s`.`module_id` AS `module_id`,`s`.`topic_id` AS `topic_id`,`s`.`session_master_id` AS `session_master_id`,'' AS `module`,'' AS `topic`,'' AS `title`,`s`.`tax` AS `service_tax`,`s`.`tax_type` AS `service_tax_type`,`s`.`duration` AS `duration`,`s`.`duration_type` AS `duration_type`,`be`.`employee` AS `batch_employee`,`be`.`days` AS `batch_days`,`be`.`level` AS `level`,`ii`.`is_product` AS `is_product`,`ii`.`renew` AS `renew`,`ii`.`park` AS `item_park`,`i`.`bid` AS `bid`,`branch`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name_actual`,`i`.`park` AS `park`,`i`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`ii`.`session_settled` AS `session_settled`,`cecv`.`counsellor_name` AS `counsellor_name`,`cecv`.`counsellor_email` AS `counsellor_email`,(case when ((select concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`,' ',`contact`.`mname`) from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `ii`.`sc_contact_id`)) is null) then `cecv`.`counsellor_name` else (select concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`,' ',`contact`.`mname`) from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `ii`.`sc_contact_id`)) end) AS `senior_counsellor_name`,(case when ((select `contact`.`email` from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `ii`.`sc_contact_id`)) is null) then `cecv`.`counsellor_email` else (select `contact`.`email` from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `ii`.`sc_contact_id`)) end) AS `senior_counsellor_mail` from ((((((((`invoice_online` `i` join `invoice_item_online` `ii` on((`i`.`id` = `ii`.`invoice_id`))) join (select `e`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `counsellor_name`,`c`.`email` AS `counsellor_email` from (`contact` `c` join `employee` `e` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`)))) `cecv` on((`cecv`.`id` = `i`.`employee_id`))) join `category` `c` on((`ii`.`category_id` = `c`.`id`))) join `service` `s` on((`ii`.`service_id` = `s`.`id`))) join `contact` `con` on((`i`.`contact_id` = `con`.`id`))) left join `batch` `b` on((`ii`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `batch_view` `be` on((`be`.`id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `branch` on((`i`.`bid` = `branch`.`id`))) order by `i`.`id` desc;
