VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.online_invoice_payment_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `online_invoice_payment_view` AS select `p`.`id` AS `id`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`mname` AS `mname`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`i`.`invoice` AS `invoice`,`i`.`quotation` AS `quotation`,`i`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`cat`.`id` AS `category_id`,`cat`.`category` AS `category`,`branch`.`branch` AS `branch`,`branch`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`branch`.`royalty` AS `royalty`,`branch`.`offline_royalty` AS `offline_royalty`,`branch`.`tds` AS `tds`,`branch`.`zoom` AS `zoom`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`b`.`display_name` AS `display_name`,`i`.`code` AS `code`,`i`.`isMember` AS `isMember`,concat(`i`.`code`,'-',`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `code_fullname`,`p`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,`p`.`date` AS `pay_date`,date_format(`p`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `pay_date_string`,`i`.`date` AS `invoice_date`,date_format(`i`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `invoice_date_string`,`ii`.`sessions` AS `sessions`,`ii`.`sessions_used` AS `sessions_used`,concat(`ii`.`sessions_used`,'/',`ii`.`sessions`) AS `sessions_consumed`,`ii`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`ii`.`currency` AS `currency`,`p`.`amount` AS `pay_amount`,`p`.`actual_amount` AS `actual_amount`,`i`.`total` AS `total`,`p`.`reminder` AS `reminder`,(case when (`p`.`clear` >= '1') then `p`.`date` else `p`.`reminder` end) AS `date`,date_format(`p`.`reminder`,'%d %b %y') AS `reminder_string`,`i`.`balance` AS `balance`,`i`.`batchless_link` AS `batchless_link`,`branch`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name_actual`,`p`.`balance` AS `pay_balance`,`p`.`receipt` AS `receipt`,concat(`branch`.`branch`,'-',`p`.`receipt`) AS `full_receipt`,`p`.`pay_mode` AS `pay_mode`,`p`.`pay_mode_text` AS `pay_mode_text`,`p`.`pay_link` AS `pay_link`,`b`.`whatsapp_link` AS `whatsapp_link`,`p`.`comment` AS `comment`,`p`.`clear` AS `clear`,`p`.`error` AS `error`,`p`.`park` AS `park`,`i`.`park` AS `invoice_park`,`p`.`bid` AS `bid`,`p`.`addpay_title` AS `addpay_title`,`p`.`addpay_amount` AS `addpay_amount`,`p`.`addpay_percent` AS `addpay_percent`,`p`.`addpay_id` AS `addpay_id`,`p`.`addpay_type` AS `addpay_type`,`p`.`receipt_copy` AS `receipt_copy`,`p`.`pay_id` AS `pay_id`,concat(`u`.`fname`,' ',`u`.`lname`) AS `created_by`,`u`.`id` AS `user_id`,group_concat(' ',`s`.`service` separator ',') AS `service` from ((((((((`contact` `c` join `invoice_online` `i` on((`c`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) join `payment_online` `p` on((`i`.`id` = `p`.`invoice_id`))) join `invoice_item_online` `ii` on((`ii`.`invoice_id` = `i`.`id`))) join `category` `cat` on((`cat`.`id` = `ii`.`category_id`))) join `batch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `ii`.`batch_id`))) join `service` `s` on((`s`.`id` = `ii`.`service_id`))) join `pf_central`.`user` `u` on((`u`.`id` = `i`.`created_by`))) join `branch` on((`branch`.`id` = `i`.`bid`))) group by `p`.`id`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.opglog
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `opglog` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `body` varchar(65000) CHARACTER SET latin1 COLLATE latin1_swedish_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `type` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET latin1 COLLATE latin1_swedish_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=26171 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

`duration`,`s`.`duration_type` AS `duration_type`,`be`.`employee` AS `batch_employee`,`be`.`contact_id` AS `batch_employee_contact_id`,`be`.`employee` AS `teacher_name`,`be`.`employee_mail` AS `teacher_mail`,`be`.`days` AS `batch_days`,`be`.`level` AS `level`,`ii`.`is_product` AS `is_product`,`ii`.`renew` AS `renew`,`ii`.`park` AS `item_park`,`i`.`bid` AS `bid`,`br`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name_actual`,`i`.`park` AS `park`,`i`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`ii`.`session_settled` AS `session_settled`,`cecv`.`counsellor_name` AS `counsellor_name`,`cecv`.`counsellor_email` AS `counsellor_email`,(case when ((select concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`,' ',`contact`.`mname`) from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `ii`.`sc_contact_id`)) is null) then `cecv`.`counsellor_name` else (select concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`,' ',`contact`.`mname`) from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `ii`.`sc_contact_id`)) end) AS `senior_counsellor_name`,(case when ((select `contact`.`email` from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `ii`.`sc_contact_id`)) is null) then `cecv`.`counsellor_email` else (select `contact`.`email` from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `ii`.`sc_contact_id`)) end) AS `senior_counsellor_mail`,(case when ((select concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`,' ',`contact`.`mname`) from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `tc`.`c_contact_id`)) is null) then `cecv`.`counsellor_name` else (select concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`,' ',`contact`.`mname`) from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `tc`.`c_contact_id`)) end) AS `new_senior_counsellor_name`,(case when ((select `contact`.`email` from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `tc`.`c_contact_id`)) is null) then `cecv`.`counsellor_email` else (select `contact`.`email` from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = `tc`.`c_contact_id`)) end) AS `new_senior_counsellor_email` from ((((((((((((`invoice` `i` join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`i`.`id` = `ii`.`invoice_id`))) join (select `e`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `counsellor_name`,`c`.`email` AS `counsellor_email` from (`contact` `c` join `employee` `e` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`)))) `cecv` on((`cecv`.`id` = `i`.`employee_id`))) join `category` `c` on((`ii`.`category_id` = `c`.`id`))) join `service` `s` on((`ii`.`service_id` = `s`.`id`))) join `contact` `con` on((`i`.`contact_id` = `con`.`id`))) join `member` `m` on(((`m`.`code` = `i`.`code`) and (`i`.`contact_id` = `m`.`contact_id`)))) left join `batch` `b` on((`ii`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `batch_view` `be` on((`be`.`id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `branch` `br` on((`i`.`bid` = `br`.`id`))) left join `venue_bid` `vb` on(((`b`.`venue_id` = `vb`.`venue_id`) and (`b`.`bid` = `vb`.`bid`) and (`vb`.`park` = 0)))) left join `batch_employee` `bemp` on((`ii`.`batch_id` = `bemp`.`batch_id`))) left join `teacher_counsellor` `tc` on((`bemp`.`contact_id` = `tc`.`t_contact_id`))) order by `i`.`id` desc;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.payment
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `payment` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `invoice_id` int NOT NULL,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `amount` float(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `calculated_amount` float(10,2) NOT NULL COMMENT 'As per Gateway Charges',
  `actual_amount` float(10,2) NOT NULL COMMENT 'as per assumption 2/4 %',
  `order_fee_perc_value` float(10,2) NOT NULL COMMENT 'ccevenue_fee ',
  `order_tax` float(10,2) NOT NULL COMMENT 'ccavenue_tax',
  `points` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `reminder` date NOT NULL,
  `balance` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'remaining amount',
  `receipt` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'receipt no.',
  `pay_mode` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'id from pay_mode talble of central',
  `pay_mode_text` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `pay_link` varchar(500) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `payment_request_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `comment` varchar(250) NOT NULL,
  `order_reference_no` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `bank_transaction_id` varchar(150) DEFAULT NULL,
  `expected_rate_label` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `expected_fee_rate` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `expected_tax_rate` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `expected_fee_amount` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `expected_tax_amount` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `expected_net_amount` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `txn_number` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `clear` int NOT NULL COMMENT ' Flag to mark payment successful',
  `vendor` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `addpay_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Additional Payment Id',
  `addpay_title` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Name of additional payment',
  `addpay_type` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Flag ( 0 - Amount / 1 - Percentage)',
  `addpay_percent` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Additional Payment Value',
  `addpay_amount` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `tracking_id` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  `bank_ref_no` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  `payment_mode` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  `card_name` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  `expire_paylink_flag` int NOT NULL,
  `date_to_expire_link` date NOT NULL,
  `ship_date_time` datetime NOT NULL,
  `order_stlmt_date` date NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `error` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `receipt_copy` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `declaration_copy` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `pay_id` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `invoice_id` (`invoice_id`),
  KEY `clear` (`clear`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `reminder` (`reminder`),
  KEY `date` (`date`),
  KEY `invoice_id_2` (`invoice_id`,`date`),
  KEY `idx_payment_invoice_status_date` (`invoice_id`,`park`,`balance`,`date`,`calculated_amount`),
  KEY `idx_payment_ledger_posting` (`park`,`clear`,`date`,`invoice_id`,`bid`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=42429 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.payment_actual_all_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `payment_actual_all_view` AS select `payment`.`id` AS `id`,`i`.`id` AS `invoice_id`,`i`.`invoice` AS `invoice_no`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,`payment`.`amount` AS `amount`,`payment`.`pay_mode_text` AS `pay_mode_text`,(case when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` <> '') and (`payment`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'Adjustment')) then `payment`.`payment_mode` else `payment`.`pay_mode_text` end) AS `payment_mode`,(select `branch`.`branch` from `branch` where (`branch`.`id` = `payment`.`bid`)) AS `branch`,`payment`.`card_name` AS `card_name`,(case when (`payment`.`payment_mode` <> '') then cast((case when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Credit Card') and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Visa') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'MasterCard') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Diners'))) then ((`payment`.`amount` - ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100)) - ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'EMI') and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Visa') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'MasterCard') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Diners'))) then ((`payment`.`amount` - ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100)) - ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Credit Card') and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Corporate') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Commercial'))) then ((`payment`.`amount` - ((`payment`.`amount` * 2.60) / 100)) - ((((`payment`.`amount` * 2.60) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Debit Card') and (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay')) then ((`payment`.`amount` - ((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100)) - ((((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Debit Card') then ((`payment`.`amount` - ((`payment`.`amount` * 1) / 100)) - ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Unified Payments') then ((`payment`.`amount` - ((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100)) - ((((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Net Banking') then ((`payment`.`amount` - ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.6) / 100)) - ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.6) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Wallet') then ((`payment`.`amount` - ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.85) / 100)) - ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.85) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Payzapp') then ((`payment`.`amount` - ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.90) / 100)) - ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.90) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Credit Card') or (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Debit Card')) then ((`payment`.`amount` - ((`payment`.`amount` * 3.30) / 100)) - ((((`payment`.`amount` * 3.30) / 100) * 18) / 100)) else 0 end) as decimal(10,2)) else `payment`.`amount` end) AS `actual_amount`,cast((case when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Credit Card') and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Visa') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'MasterCard') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Diners'))) then ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'EMI') and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Visa') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'MasterCard') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Diners'))) then ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Credit Card') and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Corporate') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Commercial'))) then ((`payment`.`amount` * 2.60) / 100) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Debit Card') and (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay')) then ((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Debit Card') then ((`payment`.`amount` * 1) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Unified Payments') then ((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Net Banking') then ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.6) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Wallet') then ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.85) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Payzapp') then ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.90) / 100) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Credit Card') or (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Debit Card')) then ((`payment`.`amount` * 3.30) / 100) else 0 end) as decimal(10,2)) AS `CC_Avenue_share1`,cast((case when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Credit Card') and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Visa') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'MasterCard') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Diners'))) then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100) * 18) / 100) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'EMI') and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Visa') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'MasterCard') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Diners'))) then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100) * 18) / 100) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Credit Card') and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Corporate') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Commercial'))) then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 2.60) / 100) * 18) / 100) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Debit Card') and (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay')) then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100) * 18) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Debit Card') then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1) / 100) * 18) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Unified Payments') then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100) * 18) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Net Banking') then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.6) / 100) * 18) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Wallet') then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.85) / 100) * 18) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Payzapp') then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.90) / 100) * 18) / 100) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Credit Card') or (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Debit Card')) then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 3.30) / 100) * 18) / 100) else 0 end) as decimal(10,2)) AS `tax`,cast((case when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Credit Card') and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Visa') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'MasterCard') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Diners'))) then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100)) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'EMI') and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Visa') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'MasterCard') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Diners'))) then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100)) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Credit Card') and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Corporate') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Commercial'))) then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 2.60) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 2.60) / 100)) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Debit Card') and (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay')) then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Debit Card') then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 1) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 1) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Unified Payments') then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Net Banking') then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.6) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.6) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Wallet') then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.85) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.85) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Payzapp') then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.90) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.90) / 100)) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Credit Card') or (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Debit Card')) then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 3.30) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 3.30) / 100)) else 0 end) as decimal(10,2)) AS `CC_Avenue_share`,cast(`payment`.`date` as date) AS `date`,`payment`.`receipt_copy` AS `receipt_copy`,`payment`.`park` AS `park` from ((`payment` left join `invoice` `i` on((`payment`.`invoice_id` = `i`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c` on((`i`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) where ((`payment`.`balance` = 0) and (`payment`.`date` >= '2021-09-01') and (`payment`.`amount` > 0) and (`payment`.`park` = 0) and (`payment`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'Points') and (`payment`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'PEYGK bank transfer') and ((not((`payment`.`pay_mode_text` like '%cash%'))) or (not((`payment`.`pay_mode_text` like '%QR Code%')))) and (`payment`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'Referral') and `payment`.`bid` in (select `branch`.`id` from `branch`)) order by `payment`.`id` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.payment_actualpayment_date_view_coco
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `payment_actualpayment_date_view_coco` AS select `payment_actualpayment_view_coco`.`id` AS `id`,`payment_actualpayment_view_coco`.`date` AS `date`,sum(`payment_actualpayment_view_coco`.`CC_Avenue_share1`) AS `CC_Avenue_share`,sum(`payment_actualpayment_view_coco`.`tax`) AS `tax`,sum(`payment_actualpayment_view_coco`.`actual_amount`) AS `tr_share`,`payment_actualpayment_view_coco`.`park` AS `park` from `payment_actualpayment_view_coco` where (`payment_actualpayment_view_coco`.`park` = 0) group by `payment_actualpayment_view_coco`.`date`;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.payment_actualpayment_date_view_franchisee
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `payment_actualpayment_date_view_franchisee` AS select `payment_actualpayment_view_franchisee`.`id` AS `id`,`payment_actualpayment_view_franchisee`.`date` AS `date`,`payment_actualpayment_view_franchisee`.`comment` AS `comment`,sum(`payment_actualpayment_view_franchisee`.`CC_Avenue_share1`) AS `CC_Avenue_share`,sum(`payment_actualpayment_view_franchisee`.`tax`) AS `tax`,sum(`payment_actualpayment_view_franchisee`.`actual_amount`) AS `tr_share`,`payment_actualpayment_view_franchisee`.`park` AS `park`,`payment_actualpayment_view_franchisee`.`accounts_model` AS `accounts_model` from `payment_actualpayment_view_franchisee` where ((`payment_actualpayment_view_franchisee`.`park` = 0) and (`payment_actualpayment_view_franchisee`.`accounts_model` = 'V1')) group by `payment_actualpayment_view_franchisee`.`date`;

',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,`payment`.`amount` AS `amount`,`payment`.`comment` AS `comment`,`payment`.`pay_mode_text` AS `pay_mode_text`,(case when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` <> '') and (`payment`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'Adjustment')) then `payment`.`payment_mode` else `payment`.`pay_mode_text` end) AS `payment_mode`,(select `branch`.`branch` from `branch` where (`branch`.`id` = `payment`.`bid`)) AS `branch`,`payment`.`card_name` AS `card_name`,(case when (`payment`.`payment_mode` <> '') then cast((case when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Credit Card') and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Visa') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'MasterCard') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Diners'))) then ((`payment`.`amount` - 'MasterCard') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Diners'))) then ((`payment`.`amount` - ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100)) - ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Credit Card') and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Corporate') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Commercial'))) then ((`payment`.`amount` - ((`payment`.`amount` * 2.60) / 100)) - ((((`payment`.`amount` * 2.60) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Debit Card') and (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay')) then ((`payment`.`amount` - ((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100)) - ((((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Debit Card') then ((`payment`.`amount` - ((`payment`.`amount` * 1) / 100)) - ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Unified Payments') then ((`payment`.`amount` - ((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100)) - ((((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Net Banking') then ((`payment`.`amount` - ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.6) / 100)) - ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.6) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Wallet') then ((`payment`.`amount` - ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.85) / 100)) - ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.85) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Payzapp') then ((`payment`.`amount` - ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.90) / 100)) - ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.90) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Credit Card') or (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Debit Card')) then ((`payment`.`amount` - ((`payment`.`amount` * 3.30) / 100)) - ((((`payment`.`amount` * 3.30) / 100) * 18) / 100)) else 0 end) as decimal(10,2)) else `payment`.`amount` end) AS `actual_amount`,cast((case when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Credit Card') and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Visa') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'MasterCard') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Diners'))) then ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'EMI') and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Visa') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'MasterCard') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Diners'))) then ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Credit Card') and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Corporate') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Commercial'))) then ((`payment`.`amount` * 2.60) / 100) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Debit Card') and (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay')) then ((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Debit Card') then ((`payment`.`amount` * 1) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Unified Payments') then ((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Net Banking') then ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.6) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Wallet') then ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.85) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Payzapp') then ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.90) / 100) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Credit Card') or (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Debit Card')) then ((`payment`.`amount` * 3.30) / 100) else 0 end) as decimal(10,2)) AS `CC_Avenue_share1`,cast((case when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Credit Card') and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Visa') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'MasterCard') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Diners'))) then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100) * 18) / 100) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'EMI') and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Visa') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'MasterCard') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Diners'))) then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100) * 18) / 100) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Credit Card') and (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay')) then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100) * 18) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Debit Card') then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1) / 100) * 18) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Unified Payments') then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100) * 18) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Net Banking') then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.6) / 100) * 18) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Wallet') then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.85) / 100) * 18) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Payzapp') then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.90) / 100) * 18) / 100) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Credit Card') or (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Debit Card')) then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 3.30) / 100) * 18) / 100) else 0 end) as decimal(10,2)) AS `tax`,cast((case when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Credit Card') and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Visa') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'MasterCard') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Diners'))) then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100)) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'EMI') and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Visa') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'MasterCard') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Diners'))) then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100) * ((`payment`.`amount` * 1) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Unified Payments') then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Net Banking') then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.6) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.6) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Wallet') then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.85) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.85) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Payzapp') then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.90) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.90) / 100)) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Credit Card') or (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Debit Card')) then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 3.30) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 3.30) / 100)) else 0 end) as decimal(10,2)) AS `CC_Avenue_share`,cast(`payment`.`date` as date) AS `date`,`payment`.`receipt_copy` AS `receipt_copy`,`payment`.`park` AS `park` from ((`payment` left join `invoice` `i` on((`payment`.`invoice_id` = `i`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c` on((`i`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) where ((`payment`.`balance` = 0) and (`payment`.`date` >= '2021-09-01') and (`payment`.`amount` > 0) and (`payment`.`park` = 0) and (`payment`.`bid` <> 35) and (`payment`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'Points') and (`payment`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'PEYGK bank transfer') and (not((`payment`.`pay_mode_text` like '%cash%'))) and (not((`payment`.`pay_mode_text` like '%QR Code%'))) and (`payment`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'Referral') and `payment`.`bid` in (select `branch`.`id` from `branch` where ((`branch`.`type` = 'COCO') or (`branch`.`type` = 'S_TEMP')))) order by `payment`.`id` desc;

then ((`payment`.`amount` - ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.90) / 100)) - ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.90) / 100) * 18) / 100)) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Credit Card') or (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Debit Card')) then ((`payment`.`amount` - ((`payment`.`amount` * 3.30) / 100)) - ((((`payment`.`amount` * 3.30) / 100) * 18) / 100)) else 0 end) as decimal(10,2)) AS `actual_amount`,cast((case when (((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Credit Card') or (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'EMI')) and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Visa') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'MasterCard') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Diners'))) then ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100) when (((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Credit Card') or (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'EMI')) and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Corporate') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Commercial'))) then ((`payment`.`amount` * 2.60) / 100) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Debit Card') and (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay')) then ((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Debit Card') then ((`payment`.`amount` * 1) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Unified Payments') then ((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Net Banking') then ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.6) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Wallet') then ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.85) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Payzapp') then ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.90) / 100) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Credit Card') or (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Debit Card')) then ((`payment`.`amount` * 3.30) / 100) else 0 end) as decimal(10,2)) AS `CC_Avenue_share1`,cast((case when (((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Credit Card') or (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'EMI')) and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Visa') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'MasterCard') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Diners'))) then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100) * 18) / 100) when (((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Credit Card') or (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'EMI')) and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Corporate') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Commercial'))) then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 2.60) / 100) * 18) / 100) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Debit Card') and (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay')) then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100) * 18) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Debit Card') then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1) / 100) * 18) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Unified Payments') then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100) * 18) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Net Banking') then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.6) / 100) * 18) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Wallet') then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.85) / 100) * 18) / 100) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Payzapp') then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.90) / 100) * 18) / 100) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Credit Card') or (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Debit Card')) then ((((`payment`.`amount` * 3.30) / 100) * 18) / 100) else 0 end) as decimal(10,2)) AS `tax`,cast((case when (((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Credit Card') or (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'EMI')) and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Visa') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'MasterCard') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Diners'))) then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.40) / 100)) when (((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Credit Card') or (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'EMI')) and ((`payment`.`card_name` = 'Corporate') or (`payment`.`card_name` = 'Commercial'))) then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 2.60) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 2.60) / 100)) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Debit Card') and (`payment`.`card_name` = 'RuPay')) then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Debit Card') then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 1) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 1) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Unified Payments') then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 0.25) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Net Banking') then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.6) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.6) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Wallet') then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.85) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.85) / 100)) when (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'Payzapp') then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 1.90) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 1.90) / 100)) when ((`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Credit Card') or (`payment`.`payment_mode` = 'International Debit Card')) then (((((`payment`.`amount` * 3.30) / 100) * 18) / 100) + ((`payment`.`amount` * 3.30) / 100)) else 0 end) as decimal(10,2)) AS `CC_Avenue_share`,cast(`payment`.`date` as date) AS `date`,`payment`.`park` AS `park` from ((`payment` left join `invoice` `i` on((`payment`.`invoice_id` = `i`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c` on((`i`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) where ((`payment`.`balance` = 0) and (`payment`.`modified_at` >= '2021-09-01') and (`payment`.`amount` > 0) and (`payment`.`park` = 0) and (`payment`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'Points') and (`payment`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'Cash') and (`payment`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'QR Code') and (`payment`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'Referral') and `payment`.`bid` in (select `branch`.`id` from `branch` where (`branch`.`type` = 'OM_Franchisee'))) order by `payment`.`date` desc;

CREATE TABLE `payment_bal_rm_05_20` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `invoice_id` int NOT NULL,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `amount` int NOT NULL,
  `reminder` date NOT NULL,
  `balance` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'remaining amount',
  `receipt` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'receipt no.',
  `pay_mode` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'id from pay_mode talble of central',
  `pay_mode_text` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `pay_link` varchar(500) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `payment_request_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `comment` varchar(250) NOT NULL,
  `clear` int NOT NULL COMMENT ' Flag to mark payment successful',
  `addpay_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Additional Payment Id',
  `addpay_title` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Name of additional payment',
  `addpay_type` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Flag ( 0 - Amount / 1 - Percentage)',
  `addpay_percent` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Additional Payment Value',
  `addpay_amount` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `error` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `invoice_id` (`invoice_id`),
  KEY `clear` (`clear`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `reminder` (`reminder`),
  KEY `date` (`date`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=10396 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.pramath_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `pramath_view` AS select `c`.`id` AS `id`,`c`.`id` AS `contact_id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`m`.`code` AS `member_code`,concat(`c`.`country_code`,' ',`c`.`mobile`) AS `phone_number`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`dob` AS `dob`,concat(timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()),'') AS `age`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`p`.`calculated_amount` AS `calculated_amount`,`i`.`id` AS `inquiry_id`,`m`.`doj` AS `doj`,`i`.`doi` AS `doi`,`lfv`.`area` AS `area`,`lfv`.`city` AS `city`,`lfv`.`venue` AS `follow_up_venue`,`m`.`status` AS `status`,(case when (`m`.`park` = '0') then 'Yes' else 'No' end) AS `converted`,(case when (`dfr`.`demo_attended` = 1) then 'Attended' else 'Not Attended' end) AS `demo_attended`,`inv`.`total` AS `total`,`inv`.`date` AS `invoice_created_date`,`dfr`.`created_at` AS `demo_form_filled_at`,`i`.`source` AS `source_id`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,`is`.`source` AS `source`,`cp`.`campaign_name` AS `campaign_name`,`hf`.`heard_from` AS `heard_from`,`m`.`c_employee_id` AS `c_employee_id`,concat(`c2`.`fname`,' ',`c2`.`mname`,' ',`c2`.`lname`) AS `c_fullname`,min(`inv`.`id`) AS `invoice_id`,`ii`.`id` AS `invoice_item_id`,`ii`.`item_total` AS `item_total`,`ii`.`service_id` AS `service_id`,`ii`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`s`.`service` AS `service`,`cat2`.`category` AS `inquiry_category`,`cat`.`category` AS `invoice_category`,`m`.`bid` AS `bid`,`br`.`branch` AS `branch`,concat(`c3`.`fname`,' ',`c3`.`mname`,' ',`c3`.`lname`) AS `teacher`,`br`.`type` AS `invoice_branch_type`,`b`.`completed_sessions` AS `completed_sessions`,`ii`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,timestampdiff(DAY,`ii`.`start_date`,`ii`.`end_date`) AS `duration_in_days`,`i`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`i`.`park` AS `park`,(select count(`total_inv`.`id`) AS `invoice_count` from `invoice` `total_inv` where ((`total_inv`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`) and (`inv`.`park` = 0)) group by `total_inv`.`contact_id`) AS `invoice_count` from ((((((((((((((((((((`inquiry` `i` left join `member` `m` on((`m`.`contact_id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) left join `invoice` `inv` on(((`inv`.`contact_id` = `i`.`contact_id`) and (`inv`.`park` = 0)))) left join `invoice_item` `ii` on(((`ii`.`invoice_id` = `inv`.`id`) and (`ii`.`batch_id` <> 0)))) join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) left join `service` `s` on((`ii`.`service_id` = `s`.`id`))) left join `latest_followup_table` `lfv` on(((`lfv`.`contact_id` = `i`.`contact_id`) and (`lfv`.`master_id` = `i`.`id`) and (`lfv`.`master` = 0)))) left join `category` `cat` on((`ii`.`category_id` = `cat`.`id`))) left join `heard_from` `hf` on((`i`.`heard_from` = `hf`.`id`))) left join `campaign` `cp` on((`hf`.`campaign_id` = `cp`.`campaign_id`))) left join `branch` `br` on((`m`.`bid` = `br`.`id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`i`.`c_employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c2` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `c2`.`id`))) left join `batch_employee` `be` on((`be`.`batch_id` = `ii`.`batch_id`))) left join `contact` `c3` on((`be`.`contact_id` = `c3`.`id`))) left join `inquiry_source` `is` on((`is`.`id` = `i`.`source`))) left join `demo_form_response` `dfr` on((`dfr`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join `payment` `p` on((`inv`.`id` = `p`.`invoice_id`))) left join `batch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `ii`.`batch_id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`v`.`id` = `b`.`venue_id`))) left join `category` `cat2` on((`i`.`category_id` = `cat2`.`id`))) where ((`i`.`created_at` <= date_format(curdate(),'%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00')) and (`i`.`park` = 0)) group by `i`.`contact_id` order by `i`.`created_at` desc;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation` AS select `emp_attendance_view`.`id` AS `id`,`emp_attendance_view`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`emp_attendance_view`.`emp_id` AS `emp_id`,`emp_attendance_view`.`monthly_salary` AS `monthly_salary`,round((`emp_attendance_view`.`monthly_salary` / 26),2) AS `day_salary`,`emp_attendance_view`.`workshift_in_time` AS `workshift_in_time`,`emp_attendance_view`.`workshift_out_time` AS `workshift_out_time`,`emp_attendance_view`.`workshift_time` AS `workshift_time`,`emp_attendance_view`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,`emp_attendance_view`.`date` AS `date`,`emp_attendance_view`.`ip_address` AS `ip_address`,`emp_attendance_view`.`logout_ip_address` AS `logout_ip_address`,`emp_attendance_view`.`in_time` AS `in_time`,`emp_attendance_view`.`out_time` AS `out_time`,`emp_attendance_view`.`total_time` AS `total_time`,`emp_attendance_view`.`valid_day` AS `valid_day`,`emp_attendance_view`.`invalid_day` AS `invalid_day`,`emp_attendance_view`.`total_time_str` AS `total_time_str`,`emp_attendance_view`.`valid_hrs` AS `valid_hrs`,`emp_attendance_view`.`invalid_hrs` AS `invalid_hrs`,`emp_attendance_view`.`status` AS `status`,`emp_attendance_view`.`login_details` AS `login_details`,`emp_attendance_view`.`logout_details` AS `logout_details`,`emp_attendance_view`.`login_logout` AS `login_logout`,`emp_attendance_view`.`park` AS `park`,sec_to_time(sum(time_to_sec(`emp_attendance_view`.`total_time`))) AS `total_worked_time`,sec_to_time(sum(time_to_sec(`emp_attendance_view`.`valid_hrs`))) AS `total_valid_worked_time`,sec_to_time((time_to_sec(`emp_attendance_view`.`workshift_time`) * 26)) AS `total_expected_time`,sec_to_time((time_to_sec(sec_to_time((time_to_sec(`emp_attendance_view`.`workshift_time`) * 24))) - time_to_sec(sec_to_time(sum(time_to_sec(`emp_attendance_view`.`valid_hrs`)))))) AS `difference` from `emp_attendance_view` where ((month(`emp_attendance_view`.`date`) = (month(curdate()) - 1)) and (year(`emp_attendance_view`.`date`) = year(curdate()))) group by `emp_attendance_view`.`emp_id`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.previous_month_salary_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `previous_month_salary_view` AS select `previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`id` AS `id`,`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`emp_id` AS `emp_id`,`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`monthly_salary` AS `monthly_salary`,`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`day_salary` AS `day_salary`,`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`workshift_in_time` AS `workshift_in_time`,`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`workshift_out_time` AS `workshift_out_time`,`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`workshift_time` AS `workshift_time`,`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`date` AS `date`,`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`park` AS `park`,`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`total_worked_time` AS `total_worked_time`,`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`total_valid_worked_time` AS `total_valid_worked_time`,`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`total_expected_time` AS `total_expected_time`,`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`difference` AS `difference`,round((time_to_sec(`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`difference`) / round(time_to_sec(`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`workshift_time`),1)),1) AS `deduction_days`,(round((time_to_sec(`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`difference`) / round(time_to_sec(`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`workshift_time`),1)),1) - 1) AS `unpaid_leaves`,(case when ((round((time_to_sec(`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`difference`) / round(time_to_sec(`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`workshift_time`),1)),1) - 1) > 0) then (round((time_to_sec(`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`difference`) / round(time_to_sec(`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`workshift_time`),1)),1) - 1) else '0' end) AS `final_unpaid_leave`,round((`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`day_salary` * (case when ((round((time_to_sec(`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`difference`) / round(time_to_sec(`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`workshift_time`),1)),1) - 1) > 0) then (round((time_to_sec(`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`difference`) / round(time_to_sec(`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`workshift_time`),1)),1) - 1) else '0' end)),2) AS `deduction_amount`,(case when (`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`monthly_salary` >= '10000') then '200' else '0' end) AS `pt`,(`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`monthly_salary` - (round((`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`day_salary` * (case when ((round((time_to_sec(`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`difference`) / round(time_to_sec(`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`workshift_time`),1)),1) - 1) > 0) then (round((time_to_sec(`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`difference`) / round(time_to_sec(`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`workshift_time`),1)),1) - 1) else '0' end)),2) + (case when (`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`monthly_salary` >= '10000') then '200' else '0' end))) AS `salary_this_month` from `previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation` where (`previous_month_emp_attendance_calculation`.`park` = 0);

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.printer_print_costing_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `printer_print_costing_view` AS select `printer_print_costing`.`id` AS `id`,`printer_print_costing`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`pc`.`config` AS `config`,`pt`.`type` AS `type`,`printer_print_costing`.`print_config_id` AS `print_config_id`,`printer_print_costing`.`print_type_id` AS `print_type_id`,`printer_print_costing`.`cost` AS `cost`,`printer_print_costing`.`extra_charges` AS `extra_charges`,`printer_print_costing`.`on_bulk_extra_charges` AS `on_bulk_extra_charges`,`printer_print_costing`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`printer_print_costing`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`printer_print_costing`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`printer_print_costing`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`printer_print_costing`.`park` AS `park` from (((`printer_print_costing` left join `print_config` `pc` on((`printer_print_costing`.`print_config_id` = `pc`.`id`))) left join `print_type` `pt` on((`printer_print_costing`.`print_type_id` = `pt`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c` on((`printer_print_costing`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) order by `printer_print_costing`.`on_bulk_extra_charges`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.product
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `product` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `from_class` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `to_class` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `level_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `description` varchar(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `barcode` varchar(15) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0- Not Available / 1 - Available / 2 - Dispatched / 3 - Received / 4 - In Use / 5 - Reserved)',
  `no_return` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Flag to set if product can be returned to the headquarter or not',
  `bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `level_id` (`level_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `barcode` (`barcode`),
  KEY `level_id_2` (`level_id`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `barcode_2` (`barcode`),
  KEY `level_id_3` (`level_id`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_3` (`park`),
  KEY `barcode_3` (`barcode`),
  KEY `level_id_4` (`level_id`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_4` (`park`),
  KEY `barcode_4` (`barcode`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=1025 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.product_level_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `product_level_view` AS select `p`.`id` AS `id`,`p`.`from_class` AS `from_class`,`p`.`to_class` AS `to_class`,`p`.`description` AS `description`,`p`.`barcode` AS `barcode`,`p`.`status` AS `status`,`p`.`no_return` AS `no_return`,`p`.`bid` AS `bid`,`l`.`level` AS `level`,`l`.`id` AS `level_id`,`p`.`park` AS `park` from (`product` `p` join `level` `l` on((`p`.`level_id` = `l`.`id`)));

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.product_log
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `product_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `product_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `from_bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `to_bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `time` time NOT NULL,
  `status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0- Not Available / 1 - Available / 2 - Dispatched / 3 - Received / 4 - In Use / 5 - Reserved)',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `product_id` (`product_id`),
  KEY `from_bid` (`from_bid`),
  KEY `to_bid` (`to_bid`),
  KEY `status` (`status`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `date` (`date`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=1892911 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.product_productlog_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `product_productlog_view` AS select `pl`.`id` AS `id`,`p`.`id` AS `product_id`,`pl`.`id` AS `product_log_id`,`p`.`from_class` AS `from_class`,`p`.`to_class` AS `to_class`,concat(`p`.`from_class`,' - ',`p`.`to_class`) AS `from_to_class`,`p`.`description` AS `description`,`p`.`barcode` AS `barcode`,`p`.`status` AS `status`,(case when (`pl`.`status` = '0') then 'Not Available' when (`pl`.`status` = '1') then 'Available' when (`pl`.`status` = '2') then 'Dispatched' when (`pl`.`status` = '3') then 'Received' when (`pl`.`status` = '4') then 'In Use' when (`pl`.`status` = '5') then 'Reserved' end) AS `status_str`,`p`.`bid` AS `bid`,`p_branch`.`branch` AS `branch`,`p`.`level` AS `level`,`p`.`level_id` AS `level_id`,`pl`.`from_bid` AS `from_bid`,`f_branch`.`branch` AS `from_branch`,`pl`.`to_bid` AS `to_bid`,`t_branch`.`branch` AS `to_branch`,`pl`.`date` AS `date`,date_format(`pl`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `date_string`,`pl`.`time` AS `time`,`pl`.`status` AS `log_status`,`pl`.`park` AS `park` from ((((`product_level_view` `p` left join `product_log` `pl` on((`pl`.`product_id` = `p`.`id`))) join `branch` `f_branch` on((`f_branch`.`id` = `pl`.`from_bid`))) join `branch` `t_branch` on((`t_branch`.`id` = `pl`.`to_bid`))) join `branch` `p_branch` on((`p_branch`.`id` = `p`.`bid`))) order by `pl`.`id`;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.production_delivery_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `production_delivery_view` AS select `pd`.`id` AS `id`,`pd`.`assigned_by_cont_id` AS `assigned_by_cont_id`,concat(`c2`.`fname`,' ',`c2`.`mname`,' ',`c2`.`lname`) AS `assigned_by_fullname`,`pd`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,concat(`c4`.`fname`,' ',`c4`.`mname`,' ',`c4`.`lname`) AS `assigned_fullname`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`pd`.`delivery_date` AS `delivery_date`,`pd`.`delivery_time` AS `delivery_time`,date_format(`pd`.`delivery_time`,'%h:%i %p') AS `formated_delivery_time`,`pd`.`city` AS `city`,`pd`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,`pd`.`collector_id` AS `collector_id`,concat(`c3`.`fname`,' ',`c3`.`mname`,' ',`c3`.`lname`) AS `collector_fullname`,`pd`.`status` AS `status`,`pd`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`pd`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`pd`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`pd`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`pd`.`park` AS `park` from (((((`production_delivery` `pd` left join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `pd`.`contact_id`))) left join `contact` `c2` on((`c2`.`id` = `pd`.`assigned_by_cont_id`))) left join `contact` `c3` on((`c3`.`id` = `pd`.`collector_id`))) left join `contact` `c4` on((`c4`.`id` = `pd`.`contact_id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`v`.`id` = `pd`.`venue_id`)));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.production_folder_assign
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `production_folder_assign` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `venue_id` int NOT NULL,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `assigned_by_cont_id` int NOT NULL,
  `creator_cont_id` int NOT NULL,
  `employee_id` int NOT NULL,
  `folder` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `level_id` int NOT NULL,
  `lot_no` int NOT NULL,
  `year_month` varchar(10) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0- to be created,1- available in HQ,\r\n2-preparing / rechecking,\r\n3-Ready,\r\n4-Dispatched,\r\n5-Approved,\r\n6-Rejected,\r\n7-Fine',
  `isExtra` int NOT NULL,
  `whole_folder` int NOT NULL COMMENT '1-whole folder\r\n2 - Extra Set\r\n3- lot',
  `production_folder_assign` int NOT NULL,
  `to_be_dispatched_date` date NOT NULL COMMENT 'Should be ready by this date',
  `started_preparing` date NOT NULL,
  `started_preparing_time` datetime NOT NULL,
  `completed` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `completed_date_time` datetime NOT NULL,
  `completed_date` date NOT NULL COMMENT 'Marked complete by employee',
  `delivered_date` date NOT NULL,
  `delivered_date_time` datetime NOT NULL,
  `barcode_applied` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-no,1-yes',
  `barcode` varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `product_id` int NOT NULL,
  `support_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'If support is raised',
  `auto_schedule` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-none\r\n1-scheduled from script',
  `comment` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=6038 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.production_folder_assign_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `production_folder_assign_view` AS select `pfa`.`id` AS `id`,`pfa`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`pfa`.`lot_no` AS `lot_no`,`pfa`.`isExtra` AS `isExtra`,`pfa`.`whole_folder` AS `whole_folder`,`pfa`.`assigned_by_cont_id` AS `assigned_by_cont_id`,`pfa`.`creator_cont_id` AS `creator_cont_id`,`pfa`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`pfa`.`folder` AS `folder`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`pfa`.`year_month` AS `year_month`,`pfa`.`park` AS `park`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue_name`,`pfa`.`level_id` AS `level_id`,`l`.`level` AS `level_name`,`l`.`level_value` AS `level_value`,`pfa`.`status` AS `status`,`pfa`.`status` AS `status_check`,`pfa`.`to_be_dispatched_date` AS `to_be_dispatched_date`,`pfa`.`started_preparing` AS `started_preparing`,`pfa`.`completed` AS `completed`,`pfa`.`completed_date` AS `completed_date`,`pfa`.`delivered_date` AS `delivered_date`,`pfa`.`barcode_applied` AS `barcode_applied`,`pfa`.`started_preparing_time` AS `started_preparing_time`,`pfa`.`completed_date_time` AS `completed_date_time`,`pfa`.`delivered_date_time` AS `delivered_date_time`,`pfa`.`barcode` AS `barcode`,`pfa`.`product_id` AS `product_id`,`pfa`.`support_id` AS `support_id`,`pfa`.`auto_schedule` AS `auto_schedule`,`pfa`.`comment` AS `comment`,(case when (`pfa`.`completed` = 0) then abs((to_days(`pfa`.`to_be_dispatched_date`) - to_days(curdate()))) else `pfa`.`completed` end) AS `priority`,abs((to_days(`pfa`.`to_be_dispatched_date`) - to_days(curdate()))) AS `closest_date_difference` from (((`production_folder_assign` `pfa` left join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `pfa`.`creator_cont_id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`v`.`id` = `pfa`.`venue_id`))) left join `level` `l` on((`l`.`id` = `pfa`.`level_id`))) order by `pfa`.`completed`,(case when (`pfa`.`completed` = 0) then abs((to_days(`pfa`.`to_be_dispatched_date`) - to_days(curdate()))) else `pfa`.`completed` end),`pfa`.`id` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.products
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `products` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `from_class` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `to_class` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `level_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `description` varchar(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `barcode` varchar(15) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `numeric_part` int NOT NULL,
  `alpha_part` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0- Not Available / 1 - Available / 2 - Dispatched / 3 - Received / 4 - In Use / 5 - Reserved)',
  `is_extra` int NOT NULL,
  `no_return` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Flag to set if product can be returned to the headquarter or not',
  `bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `venue_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `level_id` (`level_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `barcode` (`barcode`),
  KEY `level_id_2` (`level_id`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `barcode_2` (`barcode`),
  KEY `level_id_3` (`level_id`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_3` (`park`),
  KEY `barcode_3` (`barcode`),
  KEY `level_id_4` (`level_id`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_4` (`park`),
  KEY `barcode_4` (`barcode`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=32185 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.products_level_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `products_level_view` AS select `p`.`id` AS `id`,`p`.`from_class` AS `from_class`,`p`.`to_class` AS `to_class`,concat(`p`.`from_class`,'-',`p`.`to_class`) AS `folder`,concat(substr(`l`.`level`,1,1),`p`.`from_class`,'-',`p`.`to_class`) AS `folder_level`,`p`.`description` AS `description`,`p`.`barcode` AS `barcode`,`p`.`status` AS `status`,`p`.`is_extra` AS `is_extra`,(case when (`p`.`status` = '0') then 'Not Available' when (`p`.`status` = '1') then 'Available' when (`p`.`status` = '2') then 'Dispatched' when (`p`.`status` = '3') then 'Received' when (`p`.`status` = '4') then 'In Use' when (`p`.`status` = '5') then 'Reserved' when (`p`.`status` = '6') then 'Transit' when (`p`.`status` = '7') then 'Dispose' end) AS `status_str`,`p`.`no_return` AS `no_return`,`p`.`bid` AS `bid`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name_actual`,`p`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,`l`.`level` AS `level`,`p`.`level_id` AS `level_id`,`l2`.`label` AS `extra_material_set`,`p`.`park` AS `park`,`pl`.`date` AS `date` from (((((`products` `p` left join `level` `l` on(((`p`.`level_id` = `l`.`id`) and (`p`.`is_extra` = 0)))) left join `extra_material_set` `l2` on(((`p`.`level_id` = `l2`.`id`) and (`p`.`is_extra` = 1)))) left join `branch` `b` on((`p`.`bid` = `b`.`id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`p`.`venue_id` = `v`.`id`))) left join (select `products_log`.`date` AS `date`,`products_log`.`product_id` AS `product_id` from `products_log` where (`products_log`.`park` = 0) group by `products_log`.`product_id` order by `products_log`.`id` desc) `pl` on((`pl`.`product_id` = `p`.`id`)));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.products_log
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `products_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `product_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `from_bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `from_venue_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `to_bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `to_venue_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `time` time NOT NULL,
  `status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0- Not Available / 1 - Available / 2 - Dispatched / 3 - Received / 4 - In Use / 5 - Reserved)',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `product_id` (`product_id`),
  KEY `from_bid` (`from_bid`),
  KEY `to_bid` (`to_bid`),
  KEY `status` (`status`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `product_id_2` (`product_id`),
  KEY `from_bid_2` (`from_bid`),
  KEY `to_bid_2` (`to_bid`),
  KEY `status_2` (`status`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `product_id_3` (`product_id`),
  KEY `from_bid_3` (`from_bid`),
  KEY `to_bid_3` (`to_bid`),
  KEY `status_3` (`status`),
  KEY `park_3` (`park`),
  KEY `product_id_4` (`product_id`),
  KEY `from_bid_4` (`from_bid`),
  KEY `to_bid_4` (`to_bid`),
  KEY `status_4` (`status`),
  KEY `park_4` (`park`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=51059 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.products_productslog_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `products_productslog_view` AS select `pl`.`id` AS `id`,`p`.`id` AS `product_id`,`pl`.`id` AS `product_log_id`,`p`.`from_class` AS `from_class`,`p`.`to_class` AS `to_class`,`p`.`folder` AS `folder`,concat(`p`.`from_class`,' - ',`p`.`to_class`) AS `from_to_class`,`p`.`description` AS `description`,`p`.`barcode` AS `barcode`,`p`.`status` AS `status`,(case when (`pl`.`status` = '0') then 'Not Available' when (`pl`.`status` = '1') then 'Available' when (`pl`.`status` = '2') then 'Dispatched' when (`pl`.`status` = '3') then 'Received' when (`pl`.`status` = '4') then 'In Use' when (`pl`.`status` = '5') then 'Reserved' end) AS `status_str`,`p`.`bid` AS `bid`,`p_branch`.`branch` AS `branch`,`p_branch`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name_actual`,`p`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`p`.`venue` AS `venue`,`pl`.`from_venue_id` AS `from_venue_id`,`f_venue`.`venue` AS `from_venue`,`pl`.`to_venue_id` AS `to_venue_id`,`t_venue`.`venue` AS `to_venue`,`p`.`level` AS `level`,`p`.`level_id` AS `level_id`,`pl`.`from_bid` AS `from_bid`,`f_branch`.`branch` AS `from_branch`,`f_branch`.`branch_name_actual` AS `from_branch_name_actual`,`pl`.`to_bid` AS `to_bid`,`t_branch`.`branch` AS `to_branch`,`t_branch`.`branch_name_actual` AS `to_branch_name_actual`,`pl`.`date` AS `date`,date_format(`pl`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `date_string`,`pl`.`time` AS `time`,`pl`.`status` AS `log_status`,`pl`.`park` AS `park` from ((((((`products_level_view` `p` left join `products_log` `pl` on((`pl`.`product_id` = `p`.`id`))) join `branch` `f_branch` on((`f_branch`.`id` = `pl`.`from_bid`))) join `branch` `t_branch` on((`t_branch`.`id` = `pl`.`to_bid`))) join `branch` `p_branch` on((`p_branch`.`id` = `p`.`bid`))) join `venue` `f_venue` on((`f_venue`.`id` = `pl`.`from_venue_id`))) join `venue` `t_venue` on((`t_venue`.`id` = `pl`.`to_venue_id`))) order by `pl`.`id`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.promo_code
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `promo_code` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `promo_code` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `promo_disc_type` int NOT NULL COMMENT '1 - life time direct discount\r\n2- quantity direct discount\r\n3- quantity based % discount',
  `code_num` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `promo_disc_amount` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `disallow_disc` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-allowed, 1- dis allowed',
  `reusable` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-No,1-Yes(lifetime)',
  `quantity` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-NA',
  `available` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `start_date` date NOT NULL,
  `end_date` date NOT NULL,
  `festive_offer` int NOT NULL,
  `festival` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `discount_description` varchar(500) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `terms_and_cond` text NOT NULL,
  `redeemed` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-available, 1-already_used, 2-unavailable',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `check_bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `venues` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `check_venue` int NOT NULL,
  `check_service` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'check applicable service duration/sessions\r\n0-No\r\n1- min no of sessions\r\n2- min duration, \r\n3 - only on no of sessions\r\n4 - only on specific duration',
  `sessions` int NOT NULL,
  `duration` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `apply_on_amount` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-whatever + additional,\r\n1-Remove other discounts)original item-amount)',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `comment` text NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=2981 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.promo_code_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `promo_code_view` AS select `pc`.`id` AS `id`,`pc`.`promo_code` AS `promo_code`,`pc`.`venues` AS `venues`,`pc`.`reusable` AS `reusable`,`pc`.`disallow_disc` AS `disallow_disc`,regexp_replace(`pc`.`venues`,'[^0-9,]','') AS `venue_id`,group_concat(`v`.`id` order by `v`.`id` ASC separator ',') AS `extracted_venue_ids`,group_concat(`v`.`venue` order by `v`.`id` ASC separator ', ') AS `venue_names`,`pc`.`promo_disc_type` AS `promo_disc_type`,`pc`.`promo_disc_amount` AS `promo_disc_amount`,`pc`.`quantity` AS `quantity`,`pc`.`available` AS `available`,`pc`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`pc`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,`pc`.`festive_offer` AS `festive_offer`,`pc`.`festival` AS `festival`,`pc`.`discount_description` AS `discount_description`,`pc`.`terms_and_cond` AS `terms_and_cond`,`pc`.`redeemed` AS `redeemed`,`pc`.`bid` AS `bid`,`b`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name_actual`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch_id`,`pc`.`check_bid` AS `check_bid`,`pc`.`check_service` AS `check_service`,`pc`.`sessions` AS `sessions`,`pc`.`duration` AS `duration`,`pc`.`apply_on_amount` AS `apply_on_amount`,`pc`.`comment` AS `comment`,`pc`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`pc`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`pc`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`pc`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`pc`.`park` AS `park` from ((`promo_code` `pc` left join `venue` `v` on((find_in_set(`v`.`id`,regexp_replace(`pc`.`venues`,'[^0-9,]','')) > 0))) left join `branch` `b` on((`pc`.`bid` = `b`.`id`))) group by `pc`.`id`,`pc`.`promo_code`,`pc`.`venues`,`pc`.`reusable`,`pc`.`promo_disc_type`,`pc`.`promo_disc_amount`,`pc`.`quantity`,`pc`.`available`,`pc`.`start_date`,`pc`.`end_date`,`pc`.`festive_offer`,`pc`.`festival`,`pc`.`discount_description`,`pc`.`terms_and_cond`,`pc`.`redeemed`,`pc`.`bid`,`pc`.`check_bid`,`pc`.`comment`,`pc`.`created_at`,`pc`.`created_by`,`pc`.`modified_at`,`pc`.`modified_by`,`pc`.`park` order by `pc`.`id` desc;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.qualifier_inquiries_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `qualifier_inquiries_view` AS select `i`.`id` AS `id`,`c`.`id` AS `contact_id`,`c`.`contact_group_id` AS `contact_group_id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`i`.`id` AS `inquiry_id`,`i`.`qualifier_id` AS `qualifier_id`,concat(`c2`.`fname`,' ',`c2`.`mname`,' ',`c2`.`lname`) AS `q_fullname`,`i`.`park` AS `park`,`cvd`.`balance` AS `balance`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`cvd`.`venue` AS `venue`,`cvd`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,`i`.`doi` AS `doi`,`i`.`allocation_date` AS `allocation_date`,`h`.`heard_from` AS `heard_from`,`s`.`source` AS `source`,`cvd`.`date` AS `doc`,(case when (`cvd`.`invoice_id` > 0) then 'Converted' else 'Not Converted' end) AS `conversion_status` from (((((((`inquiry` `i` left join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`i`.`qualifier_id` = `e`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c2` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `c2`.`id`))) left join `heard_from` `h` on((`i`.`heard_from` = `h`.`id`))) left join `inquiry_source` `s` on((`i`.`source` = `s`.`id`))) left join `branch` `b` on((`i`.`bid` = `b`.`id`))) left join (select `inv`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`inv`.`balance` AS `balance`,`inv`.`park` AS `park`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,`inv`.`id` AS `invoice_id`,`inv`.`date` AS `date` from ((((`invoice` `inv` left join `invoice_item` `ii` on((`inv`.`id` = `ii`.`invoice_id`))) left join `service` `s` on((`ii`.`service_id` = `s`.`id`))) left join `batch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `ii`.`batch_id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`v`.`id` = `b`.`venue_id`))) where ((`inv`.`balance` = 0) and (`inv`.`park` = 0) and (not((`s`.`service` like '%Referral%')))) group by `inv`.`contact_id` order by `inv`.`date`) `cvd` on((`c`.`id` = `cvd`.`contact_id`))) where (`i`.`qualifier_id` <> 0) order by `i`.`heard_from` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.qualifier_transfer_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `qualifier_transfer_view` AS select `acl`.`id` AS `id`,`i`.`id` AS `inquiry_id`,`i`.`contact_id` AS `inquiry_contact_id`,(case when (`inv`.`contact_id` is not null) then true else false end) AS `invoice_present`,`i`.`converted` AS `converted`,concat(`c3`.`fname`,' ',`c3`.`lname`) AS `inquiry_name`,`acl`.`previous_emp_id` AS `previous_emp_id`,`c`.`id` AS `previous_emp_contact_id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `previous_emp_name`,`acl`.`assigned_emp_id` AS `assigned_emp_id`,`c2`.`id` AS `assigned_emp_contact_id`,concat(`c2`.`fname`,' ',`c2`.`lname`) AS `assigned_emp_name`,`acl`.`comment` AS `comment`,`acl`.`qualifier_flag` AS `qualifier_flag`,`acl`.`date` AS `date`,`acl`.`park` AS `park`,date_format(`acl`.`date`,'%d %b %Y') AS `date_formatted`,date_format(`i`.`created_at`,'%d %b %Y') AS `inquiry_created_at`,`acl`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`acl`.`created_at` AS `created_at` from (((((((`assign_counsellor_log` `acl` join `inquiry` `i` on((`i`.`id` = `acl`.`inquiry_id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`e`.`id` = `acl`.`previous_emp_id`))) left join `employee` `e2` on((`e2`.`id` = `acl`.`assigned_emp_id`))) left join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) left join `contact` `c2` on((`c2`.`id` = `e2`.`contact_id`))) left join `contact` `c3` on((`c3`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) left join `invoice` `inv` on(((`inv`.`contact_id` = `i`.`contact_id`) and (`inv`.`park` = 0) and (`inv`.`balance` = 0)))) order by (case when (`inv`.`contact_id` is not null) then true else false end) desc;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.renewal_expiry_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `renewal_expiry_view` AS select distinct `base`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,`base`.`id` AS `id`,`base`.`invoice` AS `invoice`,`base`.`quotation` AS `quotation`,`base`.`date` AS `date`,`base`.`date_string` AS `date_string`,`base`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`base`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,`base`.`fname` AS `fname`,`base`.`mname` AS `mname`,`base`.`lname` AS `lname`,`base`.`gstin` AS `gstin`,`base`.`code_name` AS `code_name`,`base`.`company` AS `company`,`base`.`company_add` AS `company_add`,`base`.`code` AS `code`,`base`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`base`.`batch` AS `batch`,`base`.`email` AS `email`,`base`.`invoice_amount` AS `invoice_amount`,`base`.`invoice_tax` AS `invoice_tax`,`base`.`tax_amount` AS `tax_amount`,`base`.`total` AS `total`,`base`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`base`.`balance` AS `balance`,`base`.`item_id` AS `item_id`,`base`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`base`.`service_id` AS `service_id`,`base`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`base`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,`base`.`start_date_string` AS `start_date_string`,`base`.`end_date_string` AS `end_date_string`,`base`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`base`.`item_amount` AS `item_amount`,`base`.`item_tax` AS `item_tax`,`base`.`item_tax_amount` AS `item_tax_amount`,`base`.`item_tax_type` AS `item_tax_type`,`base`.`item_total` AS `item_total`,`base`.`sessions` AS `sessions`,`base`.`session_consumed` AS `session_consumed`,`base`.`item_discount` AS `item_discount`,`base`.`sessions_used` AS `sessions_used`,`base`.`change_id` AS `change_id`,`base`.`item_change` AS `item_change`,`base`.`extend_reason` AS `extend_reason`,`base`.`category` AS `category`,`base`.`service` AS `service`,`base`.`service_amount` AS `service_amount`,`base`.`service_tax` AS `service_tax`,`base`.`service_tax_type` AS `service_tax_type`,`base`.`duration` AS `duration`,`base`.`duration_type` AS `duration_type`,`base`.`batch_employee` AS `batch_employee`,`base`.`batch_days` AS `batch_days`,`base`.`item_park` AS `item_park`,`base`.`bid` AS `bid`,`base`.`park` AS `park` from ((`invoice_invoiceitem_view` `base` join `invoice_invoiceitem_view` `comparator`) join `membership_settings` `ms`) where ((`ms`.`bid` = `base`.`bid`) and (`base`.`contact_id` = `comparator`.`contact_id`) and ((`ms`.`renewal` = 0) or (`ms`.`renewal` = 1) or ((`ms`.`renewal` = 2) and (`base`.`category_id` = `comparator`.`category_id`) and (`base`.`invoice_id` <> `comparator`.`invoice_id`)) or ((`ms`.`renewal` = 3) and (`base`.`service_id` = `comparator`.`service_id`) and (`base`.`invoice_id` <> `comparator`.`invoice_id`))));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.renewal_link_log
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `renewal_link_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `copied_by_contact_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `copied_link` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `copied_time` datetime NOT NULL,
  `bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `batch_id` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `invoice_id` int NOT NULL,
  `custom_service` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `service_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `discount_type` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-none,1- discount in rupees,2- demo discount ,3- discount in precent,4-discount without expiry,5-8th yr anniversary,6-hpd discount,7-  ,8-present all days discount',
  `discount_value` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `opt_cash` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `expired` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `renewed` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `promo_code` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `add_hour_in_discount` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '168',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=21749 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.renewal_link_log_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `renewal_link_log_view` AS select `rll`.`id` AS `id`,`rll`.`date` AS `date`,`bt`.`batch` AS `batch`,`bt`.`display_name` AS `display_name`,`rll`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,concat(`c1`.`fname`,' ',`c1`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`rll`.`copied_by_contact_id` AS `copied_by_contact_id`,`c1`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`e`.`id` AS `copied_by_emp_id`,concat(`c2`.`fname`,' ',`c2`.`lname`) AS `copied_by_name`,`rll`.`copied_link` AS `copied_link`,`rll`.`copied_time` AS `copied_time`,date_format(`rll`.`copied_time`,'%D %b, %Y %l:%i %p') AS `copied_time_string`,`rll`.`bid` AS `bid`,`rll`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`rll`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,`rll`.`custom_service` AS `custom_service`,`rll`.`service_id` AS `link_for_service_id`,`rll`.`discount_type` AS `discount_type`,`rll`.`discount_value` AS `discount_value`,`rll`.`renewed` AS `renewed`,`rll`.`expired` AS `expired`,`rll`.`opt_cash` AS `opt_cash`,`rll`.`promo_code` AS `promo_code`,`rll`.`add_hour_in_discount` AS `add_hour_in_discount`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`rll`.`park` AS `park`,`rll`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`rll`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`rll`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`rll`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from (((((`renewal_link_log` `rll` left join `contact` `c1` on((`rll`.`contact_id` = `c1`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c2` on((`rll`.`copied_by_contact_id` = `c2`.`id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `c2`.`id`))) left join `batch` `bt` on((`bt`.`id` = `rll`.`batch_id`))) left join `branch` `b` on((`rll`.`bid` = `b`.`id`)));
