--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.salary
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `salary` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Contact Id (Type: Employee)',
  `from_date` date NOT NULL,
  `to_date` date NOT NULL,
  `working_days` int NOT NULL,
  `present_days` int NOT NULL,
  `absent_days` int NOT NULL,
  `wo_days` int NOT NULL,
  `par_day` int NOT NULL,
  `total_leaves` float(10,1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0',
  `paid_leave` float(10,1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0',
  `unpaid_leave` float(10,1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0',
  `leave_balance_before` float(10,1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0',
  `leave_balance_after` float(10,1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0',
  `tax_amount` int NOT NULL,
  `tax_comment` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `advance_amount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `advance_comment` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `fine_amount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `fine_comment` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `base_amount` int NOT NULL COMMENT ' Base Salary',
  `incentive` int NOT NULL,
  `incentive_comment` varchar(300) NOT NULL,
  `deduction` int NOT NULL,
  `deduction_comment` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Reason for deductions',
  `addition` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Amount Added',
  `addition_comment` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'reason for addition (Incentives)',
  `extra_amount` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Other Amount (Admin defined) Positive / Negative',
  `extra_comment` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT ' Reason for Extras (Admin defined)',
  `allowance` int NOT NULL,
  `pay_mode` int NOT NULL,
  `sub_total` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'base_amount-deduction',
  `salary` int NOT NULL,
  `paid` int NOT NULL,
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `comments` varchar(1000) NOT NULL,
  `paid_holidays` int NOT NULL,
  `paid_holidays_dates` varchar(250) NOT NULL,
  `leaves` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `leaves_dates` varchar(400) NOT NULL,
  `wfh` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `wfh_dates` varchar(350) NOT NULL,
  `half_day` int DEFAULT '0',
  `half_day_dates` varchar(300) NOT NULL,
  `optional_holiday` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `optional_holiday_dates` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `punch_inout` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `punch_inout_dates` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `break` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `break_dates` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `supplementary` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `supplementary_dates` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `response_data` json NOT NULL COMMENT 'data of month',
  `response_data_app` json NOT NULL,
  `pay_slip_data` json NOT NULL,
  `incentive_html` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `year_month` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `idx_salary_ledger_posting` (`park`,`contact_id`,`from_date`,`to_date`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=4439 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.salary_excel_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `salary_excel_view` AS select `s`.`year_month` AS `Month`,`s`.`from_date` AS `from_date`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `Name`,`ed`.`department` AS `Dept`,(case when (`e`.`tds_type` = 1) then 'P.T.' when (`e`.`tds_type` = 2) then 'TDS' else '' end) AS `Employee Category`,(case when (`c`.`document_type_id` = 1) then `c`.`document_number` when (`c`.`document_type_id_2` = 1) then `c`.`document_type_id_2` else '' end) AS `PAN`,`c`.`gender` AS `Gender`,`e`.`salary` AS `Base Salary`,`s`.`working_days` AS `Total Working Days`,`s`.`par_day` AS `Salary Per day`,`s`.`present_days` AS `Actual Working Days`,`s`.`sub_total` AS `Base salary as per Attendance`,`s`.`incentive` AS `Incentive`,((`s`.`advance_amount` + `s`.`fine_amount`) + `s`.`deduction`) AS `Fine/Advance/Deductions`,((`s`.`allowance` + `s`.`addition`) + `s`.`extra_amount`) AS `Expense/Reimbursment/Sp. Bonus`,`s`.`salary` AS `Total Salary`,`s`.`tax_amount` AS `TDS/PT`,'' AS `Deductions After TDS`,`s`.`paid` AS `Final Transfer Amt` from ((((`contact` `c` join `employee` `e` on((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) join `salary` `s` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `s`.`contact_id`))) join `pf_central`.`employee_position` `ep` on((`e`.`position_id` = `ep`.`id`))) join `pf_central`.`employee_department` `ed` on((`e`.`department_id` = `ed`.`id`))) where (`s`.`from_date` >= '2026-03-01') group by `e`.`id`,`s`.`year_month`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.salary_payment_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `salary_payment_view` AS select `_`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`_`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,`_`.`position` AS `position`,`_`.`department` AS `department`,`_`.`year_month` AS `year_month`,`_`.`from_date` AS `from_date`,`_`.`to_date` AS `to_date`,`_`.`current_salary` AS `current_salary`,`_`.`base_amount` AS `base_amount`,`_`.`tax_amount` AS `tax_amount`,`_`.`advance_amount` AS `advance_amount`,`_`.`fine_amount` AS `fine_amount`,`_`.`addition` AS `addition`,`_`.`deduction` AS `deduction`,`_`.`extra_amount` AS `extra_amount`,`_`.`incentive` AS `incentive`,`_`.`sub_total` AS `sub_total`,`_`.`salary` AS `salary`,`_`.`paid` AS `paid` from `employee_salary_view` `_` where ((`_`.`from_date` >= '2024-01-01') and (`_`.`park` = 0) and (`_`.`base_amount` > 1));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.salary_ptrc_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `salary_ptrc_view` AS select `employee_salary_view`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,`employee_salary_view`.`tax_comment` AS `tax_comment`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2024-03-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`sub_total` end)) AS `sub_total_Mar_2024`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2024-03-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`tax_amount` end)) AS `tax_amount_Mar_2024`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2024-04-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`sub_total` end)) AS `sub_total_Apr_2024`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2024-04-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`tax_amount` end)) AS `tax_amount_Apr_2024`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2024-05-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`sub_total` end)) AS `sub_total_May_2024`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2024-05-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`tax_amount` end)) AS `tax_amount_May_2024`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2024-06-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`sub_total` end)) AS `sub_total_Jun_2024`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2024-06-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`tax_amount` end)) AS `tax_amount_Jun_2024`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2024-07-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`sub_total` end)) AS `sub_total_Jul_2024`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2024-07-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`tax_amount` end)) AS `tax_amount_Jul_2024`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2024-08-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`sub_total` end)) AS `sub_total_Aug_2024`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2024-08-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`tax_amount` end)) AS `tax_amount_Aug_2024`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2024-09-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`sub_total` end)) AS `sub_total_Sep_2024`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2024-09-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`tax_amount` end)) AS `tax_amount_Sep_2024`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2024-10-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`sub_total` end)) AS `sub_total_Oct_2024`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2024-10-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`tax_amount` end)) AS `tax_amount_Oct_2024`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2024-11-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`sub_total` end)) AS `sub_total_Nov_2024`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2024-11-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`tax_amount` end)) AS `tax_amount_Nov_2024`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2024-12-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`sub_total` end)) AS `sub_total_Dec_2024`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2024-12-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`tax_amount` end)) AS `tax_amount_Dec_2024`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2025-01-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`sub_total` end)) AS `sub_total_Jan_2025`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2025-01-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`tax_amount` end)) AS `tax_amount_Jan_2025`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2025-02-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`sub_total` end)) AS `sub_total_Feb_2025`,max((case when (`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` = '2025-02-01') then `employee_salary_view`.`tax_amount` end)) AS `tax_amount_Feb_2025` from `employee_salary_view` where ((`employee_salary_view`.`from_date` >= '2024-03-01') and (not((`employee_salary_view`.`tax_comment` like '%TDS%')))) group by `employee_salary_view`.`fullname`;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.sales_hsn_master
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `sales_hsn_master` (
  `id` bigint unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `code` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `description` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `item_type` enum('goods','services') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'services',
  `default_gst_rate` decimal(7,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `default_tax_treatment` enum('taxable','exempt','nil_rated','non_gst') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'taxable',
  `unit` varchar(16) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OTH',
  `effective_from` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `effective_to` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `active_flag` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uniq_sales_hsn_code` (`code`),
  KEY `idx_sales_hsn_active` (`active_flag`),
  KEY `idx_sales_hsn_dates` (`effective_from`,`effective_to`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=2137 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE `sales_invoice_item` (
  `id` bigint unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,

  `quantity` decimal(18,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `unit` varchar(16) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OTH',
  `unit_price` decimal(18,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `discount_percent` decimal(7,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `discount_amount` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `tax_treatment` enum('taxable','exempt','nil_rated','non_gst') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'taxable',
  `gst_rate` decimal(7,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `taxable_value` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `cgst_rate` decimal(7,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `cgst_amount` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `sgst_rate` decimal(7,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `sgst_amount` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `igst_rate` decimal(7,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `igst_amount` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `cess_rate` decimal(7,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `cess_amount` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `state_cess_rate` decimal(7,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `state_cess_amount` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `other_charges` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `tax_rate` decimal(7,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `tax_amount` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `line_total` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `total_amount` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `park` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_sales_invoice_items_invoice` (`invoice_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_sales_invoice_items_invoice` FOREIGN KEY (`invoice_id`) REFERENCES `sales_invoice_master` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=1272 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.sales_invoice_payment
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `sales_invoice_payment` (
  `id` bigint unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `invoice_id` bigint unsigned NOT NULL,
  `payment_method` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `payment_channel` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `gateway_name` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `gateway_transaction_id` varchar(191) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `reference_number` varchar(191) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `amount` decimal(18,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `round_off_amount` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `round_off_reason` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `currency` varchar(16) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INR',
  `status` enum('pending','success','failed') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `payment_date` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `remarks` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `bank_account_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `raw_response` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `source_system` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `source_invoice_id` bigint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `source_payment_id` bigint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `source_updated_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `sync_hash` char(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uniq_sales_invoice_payment_txn` (`gateway_transaction_id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uniq_sales_invoice_payment_source_row` (`source_system`,`source_payment_id`),
  KEY `idx_sales_invoice_payments_invoice` (`invoice_id`),
  KEY `idx_sales_invoice_payments_status` (`status`),
  KEY `idx_sales_invoice_payment_invoice_source` (`invoice_id`,`source_system`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_sales_invoice_payments_invoice` FOREIGN KEY (`invoice_id`) REFERENCES `sales_invoice_master` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=357 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.secure_share_link_access_logs
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `secure_share_link_access_logs` (
  `id` bigint unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `link_id` bigint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `token_prefix` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  `requested_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `requester_ip` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `user_agent` text,
  `referer` text,
  `result_status` enum('served','expired','revoked','invalid','max_views_reached','error') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'error',
  `http_status` smallint DEFAULT NULL,
  `tenant_db` varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
  `resolved_s3_key` varchar(1024) DEFAULT NULL,
  `response_meta` text,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_secure_share_link_logs_link_time` (`link_id`,`requested_at`),
  KEY `idx_secure_share_link_logs_requested_at` (`requested_at`),
  KEY `idx_secure_share_link_logs_result` (`result_status`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_secure_share_link_logs_link_id` FOREIGN KEY (`link_id`) REFERENCES `secure_share_links` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=6 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.secure_share_links
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `secure_share_links` (
  `id` bigint unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `token_hash` char(64) NOT NULL COMMENT 'sha256 hash of raw token',
  `token_prefix` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'short visible token prefix for support/debug',
  `resource_type` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'file_archive' COMMENT 'file_archive, training_video, generic_s3',
  `tenant_db` varchar(128) NOT NULL COMMENT 'tenant db name where resource belongs',
  `resource_id` bigint DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'row id in source table if available',
  `s3_key` varchar(1024) NOT NULL,
  `original_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `mime_type` varchar(150) DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_by_uid` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_by_bid` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `expires_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `max_views` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'NULL means unlimited',
  `views_used` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `one_time` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `allow_download` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `status` enum('active','revoked','expired') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  `revoked_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `revoked_by_uid` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_accessed_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uk_secure_share_links_token_hash` (`token_hash`),
  KEY `idx_secure_share_links_status_expires` (`status`,`expires_at`),
  KEY `idx_secure_share_links_created_by` (`created_by_uid`,`created_by_bid`),
  KEY `idx_secure_share_links_tenant_resource` (`tenant_db`,`resource_type`,`resource_id`),
  KEY `idx_secure_share_links_s3_key` (`s3_key`(191))
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=4 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.service
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `service` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `category_id` int NOT NULL,
  `service` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `display_name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `duration` int NOT NULL,
  `duration_type` varchar(2) NOT NULL,
  `venues` varchar(250) NOT NULL,
  `zone_id` int NOT NULL,
  `primary_currency` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '132',
  `amount` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'before tax',
  `tax` int NOT NULL,
  `tax_type` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0 - No Tax / 1 - Inc / 2 - Exc',
  `tax_amount` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'based on tax,type and fee',
  `total` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'after tax',
  `second_currency_flag` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-Not checked, 1- Checked',
  `secondary_currency` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '132',
  `secondary_amount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `secondary_tax` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `secondary_tax_type` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '	0 - No Tax / 1 - Inc / 2 - Exc',
  `secondary_tax_amount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `secondary_total` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `demo_discount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `demo_discount_total` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `ak_discount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `ak_discount_total` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `trial_discount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `trial_discount_total` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `hpd_discount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Higher Package Discount',
  `hpd_discount_total` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `batch` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-no,1-yes',
  `sessions` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'number of sessions',
  `rpoints` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'reference points',
  `spoints` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'subscription points',
  `renew` int DEFAULT '1' COMMENT 'flag for renewal',
  `free_trial` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0 - No / 1 - Yes',
  `summer_break` int NOT NULL,
  `inactive` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `product` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag(0 - Not / 1 - Yes) a product',
  `private_service` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `infant_service` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `festive_offer` int NOT NULL,
  `international_service` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `show_on_clone` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `topic_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `module_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `session_master_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `batch_book` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `reservation_fee` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `show_website` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-no,1-yes',
  `currency` varchar(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Rs.',
  `usd_amount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `online_paylink_discount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-none,1-fixed amount,2 -in %',
  `online_paylink_discount_amount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '500' COMMENT 'Discount Applied if type on',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `category_id` (`category_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `topic_id` (`topic_id`),
  KEY `module_id` (`module_id`),
  KEY `session_master_id` (`session_master_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=4881 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.service_category_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `service_category_view` AS select `s`.`id` AS `id`,`s`.`zone_id` AS `zone_id`,`s`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`s`.`module_id` AS `module_id`,`s`.`session_master_id` AS `session_master_id`,(case when (`m`.`module` is null) then '' else `m`.`module` end) AS `module`,(case when (`sm`.`title` is null) then '' else `sm`.`title` end) AS `title`,`s`.`free_trial` AS `free_trial`,`s`.`service` AS `service`,concat(`s`.`duration`,' ',`s`.`duration_type`) AS `total_duration`,`s`.`duration_type` AS `duration_type`,`s`.`duration` AS `duration`,`s`.`primary_currency` AS `primary_currency`,`cur`.`code` AS `code`,`cur`.`symbol` AS `symbol`,`s`.`amount` AS `amount`,`s`.`tax` AS `tax`,`s`.`tax_type` AS `tax_type`,`s`.`tax_amount` AS `tax_amount`,`s`.`topic_id` AS `topic_id`,`s`.`total` AS `total`,`s`.`second_currency_flag` AS `second_currency_flag`,`s`.`secondary_currency` AS `secondary_currency`,`s`.`secondary_amount` AS `amount2`,`s`.`secondary_tax` AS `tax2`,`s`.`secondary_tax_type` AS `tax_type2`,`s`.`secondary_tax_amount` AS `tax_amount2`,`s`.`secondary_total` AS `total2`,`s`.`demo_discount` AS `demo_discount`,`s`.`demo_discount_total` AS `demo_discount_total`,`s`.`ak_discount` AS `ak_discount`,`s`.`ak_discount_total` AS `ak_discount_total`,`s`.`trial_discount` AS `trial_discount`,`s`.`trial_discount_total` AS `trial_discount_total`,`s`.`hpd_discount` AS `hpd_discount`,`s`.`hpd_discount_total` AS `hpd_discount_total`,`s`.`batch` AS `batch`,`s`.`reservation_fee` AS `reservation_fee`,`s`.`sessions` AS `sessions`,`s`.`rpoints` AS `rpoints`,`s`.`spoints` AS `spoints`,`s`.`renew` AS `renew`,`s`.`inactive` AS `inactive`,`s`.`product` AS `product`,`s`.`park` AS `park`,`c`.`park` AS `category_park`,`s`.`bid` AS `bid`,`br`.`branch` AS `branch`,`c`.`category` AS `category`,`c`.`referral_code_value` AS `referral_code_value`,`c`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,`s`.`batch_book` AS `batch_book`,`s`.`show_website` AS `show_website`,`s`.`currency` AS `currency`,`s`.`usd_amount` AS `usd_amount`,`s`.`display_name` AS `display_name`,`s`.`private_service` AS `private_service`,`s`.`international_service` AS `international_service`,(case when ((`smup`.`makeup_session` > 0) and (`s`.`private_service` <> 1)) then 2 else 0 end) AS `summermakeup_turn`,`s`.`infant_service` AS `infant_service`,(case when (`s`.`service` like '%Diwali%') then 1 else `s`.`festive_offer` end) AS `festive_offer`,`s`.`show_on_clone` AS `show_on_clone`,`s`.`summer_break` AS `summer_break`,`smup`.`makeup_cycle` AS `makeup_cycle`,`smup`.`makeup_session` AS `makeup_turn`,`s`.`online_paylink_discount` AS `online_paylink_discount`,`s`.`online_paylink_discount_amount` AS `online_paylink_discount_amount`,`s`.`venues` AS `venues`,`zmv`.`venue_names` AS `zone_venue_names`,`zmv`.`venue_display_name` AS `zone_venue_display_names` from (((((((`service` `s` join `category` `c` on((`s`.`category_id` = `c`.`id`))) join `currency` `cur` on((`cur`.`id` = `s`.`primary_currency`))) left join `module` `m` on((`m`.`id` = `s`.`module_id`))) left join `branch` `br` on((`s`.`bid` = `br`.`id`))) left join `session_master` `sm` on((`sm`.`id` = `s`.`session_master_id`))) left join `service_makeup` `smup` on((`smup`.`service_id` = `s`.`id`))) left join `zone_master_view` `zmv` on((`s`.`zone_id` = `zmv`.`id`)));

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.session
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `session` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `session` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `session_master_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `batch_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Employees Contact id',
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `start_time` time NOT NULL,
  `end_time` time NOT NULL,
  `check_assignment` set('0','1') NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT 'Flag (0 - Dont check Assignment / 1 - Check Assignment)',
  `event_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Calendar Event ID',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `session_master_id` (`session_master_id`),
  KEY `batch_id` (`batch_id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `date` (`date`),
  KEY `check_assignment` (`check_assignment`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `session_master_id_2` (`session_master_id`),
  KEY `batch_id_2` (`batch_id`),
  KEY `contact_id_2` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `date_2` (`date`),
  KEY `check_assignment_2` (`check_assignment`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `session_master_id_3` (`session_master_id`),
  KEY `batch_id_3` (`batch_id`),
  KEY `contact_id_3` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `date_3` (`date`),
  KEY `check_assignment_3` (`check_assignment`),
  KEY `park_3` (`park`),
  KEY `session_master_id_4` (`session_master_id`),
  KEY `batch_id_4` (`batch_id`),
  KEY `contact_id_4` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `date_4` (`date`),
  KEY `check_assignment_4` (`check_assignment`),
  KEY `park_4` (`park`),
  KEY `idx_session_ledger_posting` (`park`,`date`,`batch_id`,`session_master_id`),
  KEY `idx_session_batch_date_time` (`park`,`batch_id`,`date`,`start_time`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.session_activity_log

CREATE TABLE `session_activity_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `batch_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `class` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `level_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `otp` varchar(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `start` datetime NOT NULL,
  `end` datetime NOT NULL,
  `link` varchar(500) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `trainer` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `done` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `session_start` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `session_start_student` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `batch_id` (`batch_id`),
  KEY `class` (`class`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `level_id` (`level_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=202639 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.session_activity_log_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `session_activity_log_view` AS select `s`.`id` AS `id`,`s`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`s`.`class` AS `class`,`s`.`level_id` AS `level_id`,cast(`l`.`level` as char charset utf8mb3) AS `level`,`s`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,cast(`s`.`otp` as char charset utf8mb3) AS `otp`,`s`.`date` AS `date`,`s`.`start` AS `start`,`s`.`end` AS `end`,cast(`s`.`link` as char charset utf8mb3) AS `link`,`s`.`done` AS `done`,`s`.`session_start` AS `session_start`,`s`.`trainer` AS `trainer`,`s`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`s`.`updated_at` AS `updated_at`,`s`.`session_start_student` AS `session_start_student`,cast(`c`.`fname` as char charset utf8mb3) AS `fname`,cast(`c`.`lname` as char charset utf8mb3) AS `lname`,cast(`c`.`email` as char charset utf8mb3) AS `email`,cast(`b`.`batch` as char charset utf8mb3) AS `batch`,cast((case when (`m`.`id` is not null) then `m`.`code` when (`e`.`id` is not null) then `e`.`ecode` else '' end) as char charset utf8mb3) AS `code`,cast(`branch`.`branch` as char charset utf8mb3) AS `branch`,concat(convert((case when (`s`.`trainer` = 0) then 'https://tickleright.in/session/activity.php?id=' else 'https://tickleright.in/session/activity_trainer.php?id=' end) using utf8mb3),cast(`s`.`id` as char charset utf8mb3)) AS `link_sent`,`branch`.`id` AS `bid`,`b`.`park` AS `park` from ((((((`session_activity_log` `s` join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `s`.`contact_id`))) join `batch` `b` on(((`b`.`id` = `s`.`batch_id`) and (`s`.`class` = (`b`.`completed_sessions` + 1))))) join `branch` on((`branch`.`id` = `b`.`bid`))) left join `member` `m` on((`m`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join `employee` `e` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join `level` `l` on((`l`.`id` = `s`.`level_id`))) where (0 <> 1) order by `s`.`id` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,

  `position` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=2181 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.session_activity_url_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `session_activity_url_view` AS select `s`.`id` AS `id`,`s`.`level_id` AS `level_id`,`l`.`level` AS `level`,`s`.`class_no` AS `class_no`,`s`.`activity_url` AS `activity_url`,`s`.`position` AS `position`,`s`.`park` AS `park` from (`session_activity_url` `s` join `level` `l` on((`l`.`id` = `s`.`level_id`))) order by `s`.`id`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.session_batch_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `session_batch_view` AS select distinct `s`.`id` AS `id`,`b`.`id` AS `batch_id`,`s`.`session_master_id` AS `session_master_id`,`s`.`session` AS `session`,`s`.`check_assignment` AS `check_assignment`,`s`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`s`.`date` AS `date`,date_format(`s`.`date`,'%d %b %y') AS `date_string`,`s`.`start_time` AS `start_time`,`s`.`end_time` AS `end_time`,concat(time_format(`s`.`start_time`,'%h:%i %p'),' - ',time_format(`s`.`end_time`,'%h:%i %p')) AS `time`,`s`.`event_id` AS `event_id`,`s`.`park` AS `park`,`b`.`bid` AS `bid`,`branch`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`b`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`b`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`b`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,`b`.`inactive` AS `inactive`,`b`.`limit` AS `limit`,`b`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`b`.`type` AS `type`,`b`.`level_id` AS `level_id`,`b`.`completed_sessions` AS `completed_sessions`,`smv`.`module_id` AS `module_id`,`smv`.`module_id` AS `mod_id`,`smv`.`module` AS `module`,`smv`.`category` AS `category`,`smv`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,`smv`.`master_category` AS `master_category`,`smv`.`title` AS `title`,`smv`.`exam_id` AS `exam_id`,`smv`.`exam_trigger` AS `exam_trigger`,`smv`.`assignment_id` AS `assignment_id`,`smv`.`assignment_trigger` AS `assignment_trigger`,`smv`.`ref_material` AS `ref_material`,`smv`.`ref_material_trigger` AS `ref_material_trigger`,(case when (`e`.`id` is null) then '' else `e`.`id` end) AS `employee_id`,(case when (`e`.`type` is null) then '' else `e`.`type` end) AS `employee_type`,(case when (`e`.`ecode` is null) then '' else `e`.`ecode` end) AS `ecode`,(case when (`e`.`fname` is null) then '' else `e`.`fname` end) AS `fname`,(case when (`e`.`lname` is null) then '' else `e`.`lname` end) AS `lname`,(case when (`e`.`mname` is null) then '' else `e`.`mname` end) AS `mname`,(case when (`e`.`fullname` is null) then '' else `e`.`fullname` end) AS `fullname`,(case when (`e`.`mobile` is null) then '' else `e`.`mobile` end) AS `mobile`,(case when (`e`.`email` is null) then '' else `e`.`email` end) AS `email` from ((((`session` `s` join `batch` `b` on((`s`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `emp_cont_view` `e` on(((`e`.`contact_id` = `s`.`contact_id`) and (`e`.`bid` = `b`.`bid`)))) join `session_master_view` `smv` on((`smv`.`id` = `s`.`session_master_id`))) join `branch` on((`branch`.`id` = `b`.`bid`))) where (`b`.`park` = 0) order by `s`.`date`;

  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `session_log_id` (`session_log_id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=105301 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.session_log_attendee_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `session_log_attendee_view` AS select `sla`.`id` AS `id`,`sla`.`session_log_id` AS `session_log_id`,`sla`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`sla`.`code` AS `code`,`sla`.`join_url` AS `join_url`,`sla`.`service_id` AS `service_id`,`sla`.`invoice_item_id` AS `invoice_item_id`,`sla`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,`sla`.`email` AS `email`,`sla`.`park` AS `park`,`sl`.`meeting_id` AS `meeting_id`,`sl`.`date` AS `date`,`sl`.`start_time` AS `start_time`,date_format(`sl`.`start_time`,'%h:%i %p') AS `start_time_str`,`sl`.`end_time` AS `end_time`,`b`.`id` AS `batch_id`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`sl`.`bid` AS `bid` from (((`session_log_attendee` `sla` join `session_log` `sl` on((`sl`.`id` = `sla`.`session_log_id`))) join `batch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `sl`.`batch_id`))) join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `sla`.`contact_id`))) where (0 <> 1);

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.sms_log_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.states

CREATE TABLE `states` (
  `id` mediumint unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `country_id` mediumint unsigned NOT NULL,
  `country_code` char(2) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `fips_code` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `iso2` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `type` varchar(191) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `level` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `parent_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `latitude` decimal(10,8) DEFAULT NULL,
  `longitude` decimal(11,8) DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `flag` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `wikiDataId` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Rapid API GeoDB Cities',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `country_region` (`country_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `country_region_final` FOREIGN KEY (`country_id`) REFERENCES `countries` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=5342 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci ROW_FORMAT=COMPACT;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.structured_column

CREATE TABLE `structured_column` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `r_id` int NOT NULL,
  `header` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `display_keys` json NOT NULL,
  `column_condition` json NOT NULL,

  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.student_login_data_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `student_login_data_view` AS select `m`.`code` AS `id`,`i`.`id` AS `invoice_id`,`i`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`u`.`id` AS `user_id`,concat(`con`.`fname`,' ',`con`.`lname`,' ',`con`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,(case when (`ud`.`user_id` is null) then 'Not Yet' else 'Yes' end) AS `Is_loggged_In`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`ii`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,`ii`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,count(`ii`.`invoice_id`) AS `invoice_count`,`ii`.`sessions` AS `sessions`,`i`.`bid` AS `bid`,`i`.`park` AS `park`,(case when (`m`.`c_employee_id` > 0) then concat(`c_cont`.`fname`,' ',`c_cont`.`lname`) else '-' end) AS `counsellor_name`,(case when (`c_cont`.`email` is null) then '-' else `c_cont`.`email` end) AS `counsellor_email` from (((((((((((`invoice` `i` join `invoice_item` `ii`) join `category` `c`) join `service` `s`) join `contact` `con`) join `member` `m`) left join `employee` `e` on((`e`.`id` = `m`.`c_employee_id`))) left join `contact` `c_cont` on((`c_cont`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) left join `batch` `b` on((`ii`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `batch_employee` `be` on((`be`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `pf_central`.`user` `u` on((`u`.`contact_id` = `con`.`id`))) left join `pf_central`.`user_device` `ud` on((`ud`.`user_id` = `u`.`id`))) where ((`i`.`id` = `ii`.`invoice_id`) and (`ii`.`service_id` = `s`.`id`) and (`ii`.`category_id` = `c`.`id`) and (`i`.`contact_id` = `con`.`id`) and (`m`.`code` = `i`.`code`) and (`i`.`contact_id` = `m`.`contact_id`) and (`m`.`park` = 0) and (`con`.`park` = 0) and (`b`.`park` = 0) and (`i`.`park` = 0)) group by concat(`con`.`fname`,' ',`con`.`lname`,' ',`con`.`mname`) order by `ii`.`start_date` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.student_tutorial
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `student_tutorial` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `title` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `url` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `park` tinyint NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=2 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

CREATE TABLE `studio_contact` (

  `head_counsellor` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - No, 1 - Yes, 3 - Handle blogger',
  `filtered_dor_email` int NOT NULL,
  `batches_pending_to_punch_att` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - no, 1 - yes',
  `dor_email` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - No , 1 - Yes',
  `dor_expiry_email` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - No , 1 - Yes',
  `makeup_turn` int NOT NULL,
  `email_seats_left` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - No , 1 - Yes',
  `support_pending` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - No, 1 - All,  2 -  Hourly, 3 - Both',
  `combined_red_flag` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - No , 1 - Yes',
  `inquiry_informaition` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` int NOT NULL,
  `create_by` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),

  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `contact_id_2` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `studio_id_3` (`studio_id`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `contact_id_3` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `studio_id_4` (`studio_id`),

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.studio_contact_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `studio_contact_view` AS select `sc`.`id` AS `id`,`sc`.`studio_id` AS `studio_id`,`sc`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`park` AS `park`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`c`.`address` AS `address`,`sc`.`bid` AS `bid`,`sc`.`sms_dnd` AS `sms_dnd`,`sc`.`email_dnd` AS `email_dnd`,`sc`.`support_pending` AS `support_pending` from (`studio_contact` `sc` join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `sc`.`contact_id`))) where (`sc`.`park` = 0);

  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,

  `member_start_code` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Start New Member Code from',
  `just_dial` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag for deactivating Just Dial based inquiry Service',
  `iot_implement` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `old_db` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'name of old db for inquiry form blank if not present',
  `bid_check` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag(1 - Check / 0 - Dont Check) For bid in inquiry and member',
  `member_app_and` varchar(500) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `member_app_ios` varchar(500) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `mem_app_link` varchar(500) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `product_buffer` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Sets the buffer days for product Check',
  `inter_branch_invoice` set('0','1') NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0 - Invoice No increase independent of branch, 1 - Invoice no increases based on branches) Works for both invoice and receipt no.',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

  `calendar_refresh_token` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Refresh Token of admin for calendar',
  `calendar_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'primary' COMMENT 'Calendar ID for batch sync',
  `session_based` enum('1','0') NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag ( 0 - System is batch based, 1 - System is session based)',
  `pushapp_dashboard` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT 'Dashboard screen to be visible',
  `pursue_vid` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `dor` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag(0 - Dont Send, 1 - Send)',
  `dor_time` time NOT NULL COMMENT 'Will send DOR of -1 Day on provided time',

) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=2 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.summercamp_payment_email_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `summercamp_payment_email_view` AS select `p`.`id` AS `id`,max(`p`.`id`) AS `payment_id`,max(`p`.`invoice_id`) AS `invoice_id`,max(`i`.`contact_id`) AS `contact_id`,trim(concat_ws(' ',max(`c`.`fname`),max(`c`.`mname`),max(`c`.`lname`))) AS `fullname`,max(`c`.`email`) AS `email`,max(`c`.`mobile`) AS `mobile`,group_concat(distinct `s`.`service` order by `s`.`id` ASC separator ' + ') AS `service`,max(ifnull(nullif(`v`.`display_name`,''),`v`.`venue`)) AS `venue_display_name`,replace(max(`v`.`address`),' ','+') AS `link_search`,max(`v`.`address_link`) AS `venue_address_link`,(case when (coalesce(nullif(max(`v`.`address_link`),''),'') <> '') then concat('<a href="',max(`v`.`address_link`),'" target="_blank">',ifnull(max(`v`.`address`),''),'</a>') when (coalesce(nullif(max(`v`.`address`),''),'') <> '') then concat('<a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=',replace(max(`v`.`address`),' ','+'),'" target="_blank">',max(`v`.`address`),'</a>') else '' end) AS `venue_address`,group_concat(distinct `bet`.`batch_day` order by `bet`.`day_code` ASC separator ', ') AS `sc_days`,(case when (min(`bet`.`start_time`) is null) then '' else concat(date_format(min(`bet`.`start_time`),'%h:%i %p'),' - ',date_format(max(`bet`.`end_time`),'%h:%i %p')) end) AS `sc_time`,group_concat(distinct `b`.`batch` order by `b`.`id` ASC separator ', ') AS `batch_name`,max(`p`.`date`) AS `pay_date` from (((((((`payment` `p` join `invoice` `i` on(((`i`.`id` = `p`.`invoice_id`) and (`i`.`park` = 0)))) join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `i`.`contact_id`))) join `invoice_item` `ii` on(((`ii`.`invoice_id` = `i`.`id`) and (`ii`.`park` = 0)))) left join `service` `s` on((`s`.`id` = `ii`.`service_id`))) left join `batch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `ii`.`batch_id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`v`.`id` = `b`.`venue_id`))) left join `batch_employee_time_view` `bet` on(((`bet`.`id` = `b`.`id`) and (`bet`.`park` = 0) and (`bet`.`parent_id` = 0)))) where (`p`.`park` = 0) group by `p`.`id`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.summercamp_registration_formdata
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `summercamp_registration_formdata` (
  `id` bigint unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `child_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `is_member` enum('yes','no') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `contact_id` bigint unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `country_code` varchar(10) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `dob` date NOT NULL,
  `contact_number` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `city` varchar(120) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `venue` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `age_group` enum('1,4','4,8') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `timing` varchar(128) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `price` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `gm_link` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `request_json` json NOT NULL,
  `submitted_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `conversion` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `status` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0=pending,1=processing,2=processed,3=error',
  `inquiry_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `error_comment` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `source` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '6',
  `hf` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_summercamp_contact` (`country_code`,`contact_number`),
  KEY `idx_summercamp_city_venue` (`city`,`venue`),
  KEY `idx_summercamp_submitted_at` (`submitted_at`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=284 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.support_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `support_view` AS select `s`.`id` AS `id`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,concat(`u`.`fname`,' ',`u`.`lname`) AS `requested_by`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `concern_person_name`,`s`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`sm`.`category` AS `category`,`s`.`comment` AS `comment`,`s`.`user_comment` AS `user_comment`,`s`.`priority` AS `priority`,`s`.`relation_id` AS `relation_id`,`s`.`material_delivery_date` AS `material_delivery_date`,(case when (`s`.`material_delivery_date` <> '0000-00-00') then date_format(`s`.`material_delivery_date`,'%d %b %y') else ' ' end) AS `material_delivery_date_format`,`s`.`status` AS `status`,(case when (`s`.`status` = 0) then 'Pending' when (`s`.`status` = 1) then 'Request' when (`s`.`status` = 2) then 'Completed' when (`s`.`status` = 3) then 'Re-open' when (`s`.`status` = 5) then 'Illegal' else 'Unknown' end) AS `status_str`,`s`.`status` AS `status_value`,`sm`.`emp_id` AS `concern_emp_id`,`c`.`email` AS `emp_email`,`s`.`park` AS `park`,`s`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`s`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`s`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`s`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from ((((((`support` `s` join `support_master` `sm` on((`s`.`category_id` = `sm`.`id`))) left join `pf_central`.`user` `u` on((`s`.`created_by` = `u`.`id`))) left join `employee` `e` on(((`sm`.`emp_id` = `e`.`id`) and (`e`.`park` = 0)))) left join `contact` `c` on(((`e`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`) and (`c`.`park` = 0)))) left join `branch` `b` on((`s`.`bid` = `b`.`id`))) left join `venue` `v` on((`s`.`venue_id` = `v`.`id`))) order by `s`.`id` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.target
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `target` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `target` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Target Label',
  `type` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Type (0-Batch/1-Sale)',
  `category_id` int NOT NULL,
  `inactive` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `category_id` (`category_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `category_id_2` (`category_id`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `category_id_3` (`category_id`),
  KEY `bid_3` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_3` (`park`),
  KEY `category_id_4` (`category_id`),
  KEY `bid_4` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_4` (`park`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.target_category_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `target_category_view` AS select `t`.`id` AS `id`,`t`.`target` AS `target`,`t`.`type` AS `type`,`t`.`bid` AS `bid`,`t`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`t`.`park` AS `park`,(select count(`target_slot`.`id`) from `target_slot` where (`target_slot`.`target_id` = `t`.`id`)) AS `slots`,`c`.`category` AS `category` from (`target` `t` left join `category` `c` on((`t`.`category_id` = `c`.`id`)));

CREATE TABLE `target_slot` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `target_id` int NOT NULL,
  `target_from` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Target from (number / amount)',
  `target_to` int NOT NULL,
  `type` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Flag ( 0 - Fixed / 1- Percentage)',
  `value` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Incentive',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `target_id` (`target_id`),
  KEY `target_id_2` (`target_id`),
  KEY `target_id_3` (`target_id`),
  KEY `target_id_4` (`target_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `task_list` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `assigned_by` int NOT NULL,
  `assigned_to` int NOT NULL,
  `validator` int NOT NULL,
  `task_code` varchar(111) NOT NULL,
  `task_level` int NOT NULL,
  `parent_task_id` int NOT NULL,
  `task_title` text NOT NULL,
  `task_description` text NOT NULL,
  `priority` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `assigned_date` date NOT NULL,
  `due_date` date NOT NULL,
  `root_due_hours` int NOT NULL,
  `assigned_due_hours` int NOT NULL,
  `due_hours` int NOT NULL,
  `completion_date` date NOT NULL,
  `is_completed` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-not completed,1-completed	',
  `is_approved` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-not approved,1-approved',
  `approval_date` date NOT NULL,
  `is_validate` int NOT NULL,
  `validate_date` date NOT NULL,
  `company_id` varchar(500) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `clients_id` int NOT NULL,
  `file` varchar(111) NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=7 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.task_list_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `task_list_view` AS select `tl`.`id` AS `id`,`tl`.`task_code` AS `task_code`,`tl`.`assigned_by` AS `assigned_by`,`tl`.`assigned_to` AS `assigned_to`,`tl`.`company_id` AS `company_id`,`tl`.`clients_id` AS `clients_id`,`c`.`client_name` AS `client_name`,`cm`.`name` AS `company_name`,`tl`.`validator` AS `validator`,`ce`.`fullname` AS `assigned_by_name`,`cv`.`fullname` AS `validator_name`,`cee`.`fullname` AS `assigned_to_name`,`ce`.`email` AS `assigned_by_email`,`tl`.`task_level` AS `task_level`,`tl`.`task_title` AS `task_title`,`tl`.`task_description` AS `task_description`,`tl`.`priority` AS `priority`,`tl`.`assigned_date` AS `assigned_date`,`tl`.`validate_date` AS `validate_date`,`tl`.`due_date` AS `due_date`,`tl`.`due_hours` AS `due_hours`,`tl`.`root_due_hours` AS `root_due_hours`,`tl`.`assigned_due_hours` AS `assigned_due_hours`,`tl`.`completion_date` AS `completion_date`,`tl`.`is_completed` AS `is_completed`,`tl`.`is_validate` AS `is_validate`,`tl`.`is_approved` AS `is_approved`,`tl`.`parent_task_id` AS `parent_task_id`,`tl`.`file` AS `file`,(case when ((to_days(`tl`.`assigned_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`due_date`)) = 0) then '1 Points' else concat((to_days(`tl`.`due_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`assigned_date`)),' ','Points') end) AS `value`,(case when (((to_days(`tl`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`due_date`)) > 0) and (`tl`.`is_completed` = '1') and (`tl`.`is_approved` = '1')) then concat((to_days(`tl`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`due_date`)),' ','days delay') when (((to_days(`tl`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`due_date`)) = 1) and (`tl`.`is_completed` = '1') and (`tl`.`is_approved` = '1')) then concat((to_days(`tl`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`due_date`)),' ','day delay') when (((to_days(`tl`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`due_date`)) < 0) and (`tl`.`is_completed` = '1') and (`tl`.`is_approved` = '1')) then concat((to_days(`tl`.`due_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`completion_date`)),' ','days earlier') when (((to_days(`tl`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`due_date`)) = -(1)) and (`tl`.`is_completed` = '1') and (`tl`.`is_approved` = '1')) then concat((to_days(`tl`.`due_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`completion_date`)),' ','day earlier') when (((to_days(`tl`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`due_date`)) = 0) and (`tl`.`is_completed` = '1') and (`tl`.`is_approved` = '1')) then 'On time' else '-' end) AS `consumed_days`,(case when (`tl`.`is_approved` = 0) then '-' else (case when (((to_days(`tl`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`due_date`)) > 0) and (`tl`.`is_completed` = '1') and (`tl`.`is_approved` = '1')) then concat(((to_days(`tl`.`due_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`assigned_date`)) - (to_days(`tl`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`due_date`))),' ','Points') when (((to_days(`tl`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`due_date`)) < 0) and (`tl`.`is_completed` = '1') and (`tl`.`is_approved` = '1')) then concat((to_days(`tl`.`due_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`assigned_date`)),' ','Points') when (((to_days(`tl`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`due_date`)) = 0) and (`tl`.`is_completed` = '1') and (`tl`.`is_approved` = '1')) then (case when (((to_days(`tl`.`assigned_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`due_date`)) = 0) and (`tl`.`is_completed` = '1') and (`tl`.`is_approved` = '1')) then '1 Point' else concat((to_days(`tl`.`due_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`assigned_date`)),' ','Points') end) else '-' end) end) AS `final_value`,(case when (`tl`.`is_approved` = 0) then 0 else (case when (((to_days(`tl`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`due_date`)) > 0) and (`tl`.`is_completed` = '1') and (`tl`.`is_approved` = '1')) then concat(((to_days(`tl`.`due_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`assigned_date`)) - (to_days(`tl`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`due_date`)))) when (((to_days(`tl`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`due_date`)) < 0) and (`tl`.`is_completed` = '1') and (`tl`.`is_approved` = '1')) then concat((to_days(`tl`.`due_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`assigned_date`))) when (((to_days(`tl`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`due_date`)) = 0) and (`tl`.`is_completed` = '1') and (`tl`.`is_approved` = '1')) then (case when (((to_days(`tl`.`assigned_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`due_date`)) = 0) and (`tl`.`is_completed` = '1') and (`tl`.`is_approved` = '1')) then 1 else (to_days(`tl`.`due_date`) - to_days(`tl`.`assigned_date`)) end) else 0 end) end) AS `final_points_no`,concat((select concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`) from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = (select `task_remark`.`emp_contact_id` from `task_remark` where (`task_remark`.`task_id` = `tl`.`id`) order by `task_remark`.`id` desc limit 1))),' : ',(select `task_remark`.`comment` from `task_remark` where (`task_remark`.`task_id` = `tl`.`id`) order by `task_remark`.`id` desc limit 1)) AS `comment`,cast((case when (`tl`.`is_completed` = 0) then 'Task Pending' else 'Task Completed' end) as char charset utf8mb3) AS `is_completed_val`,cast((case when (`tl`.`is_approved` = 0) then 'Not Approved' when (`tl`.`is_approved` = 2) then 'Rejected' else 'Approved' end) as char charset utf8mb3) AS `is_approved_val`,cast((case when (`tl`.`is_validate` = 0) then 'Not Validate' when (`tl`.`is_validate` = 2) then ' Not Validate' else 'Validate' end) as char charset utf8mb3) AS `is_validate_val`,`tl`.`approval_date` AS `approval_date`,`tl`.`park` AS `park`,`tl`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`tl`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from (((((`task_list` `tl` left join (select `e`.`id` AS `id`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname` from (`employee` `e` left join `contact` `c` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`)))) `ce` on((`tl`.`assigned_by` = `ce`.`id`))) left join (select `ee`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`cc`.`fname`,' ',`cc`.`mname`,' ',`cc`.`lname`) AS `fullname` from (`employee` `ee` left join `contact` `cc` on((`ee`.`contact_id` = `cc`.`id`)))) `cee` on((`tl`.`assigned_to` = `cee`.`id`))) left join (select `ev`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`cv`.`fname`,' ',`cv`.`mname`,' ',`cv`.`lname`) AS `fullname` from (`employee` `ev` left join `contact` `cv` on((`ev`.`contact_id` = `cv`.`id`)))) `cv` on((`tl`.`validator` = `cv`.`id`))) left join `client` `c` on((`tl`.`clients_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join `company_master` `cm` on((`tl`.`company_id` = `cm`.`id`))) order by `tl`.`id` desc;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.teacher_anomaly_report_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `teacher_anomaly_report_view` AS select `a`.`id` AS `id`,`a`.`date` AS `latest`,`a`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`a`.`type` AS `type`,`be`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`a`.`date` AS `date`,`a`.`park` AS `park`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `employee_name`,sum((case when (`a`.`status` = '2') then 1 else 0 end)) AS `cancelled`,sum((case when (`a`.`status` = '3') then 1 else 0 end)) AS `resheduled`,count(`a`.`status`) AS `total` from ((`attendance` `a` join `batch_employee` `be` on((`a`.`batch_id` = `be`.`batch_id`))) join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `be`.`contact_id`))) where ((`a`.`type` = 'B') and (`a`.`park` = 0)) group by `be`.`contact_id` order by `employee_name`;

  `venue_ids` varchar(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'venue_ids for batch viewing',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `rating1` varchar(11) NOT NULL,
  `rating2` varchar(11) NOT NULL,
  `rating3` varchar(11) NOT NULL,
  `rating4` varchar(11) NOT NULL,
  `rating5` varchar(11) NOT NULL,
  `observation` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '(0-Not, 1-Done,2-Approved,3-Interview Observation)',
  `observation_txt` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `waiting_list` int NOT NULL,
  `waiting_list_mail` int NOT NULL,
  `teacher_observation_txt` mediumtext NOT NULL,
  `comments` mediumtext NOT NULL,
  `rejection_comment` varchar(500) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `assistant` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `ed_log_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'email document log id',
  `question1` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `converted` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0 - Applicant, 1 - Trainee, 2 - Teacher,3 -Associate Applicant , 4- Associate Trainee, 5 - Associate Trainer )',
  `position` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `source` varchar(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Source URL',
  `inq_source` varchar(250) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `training_no` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',

  `video5` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `video6` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `video7` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `ratings_id` int NOT NULL,
  `interview` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `signed_doc` varchar(250) NOT NULL,
  `pancard` varchar(250) NOT NULL,
  `pan_number` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `aadhar_card` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `aadhar_number` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `signed_doc_status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - Pending, 1 - Send , 2 - Approve',
  `status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - Active, 1 - Inactive',
  `doj` date NOT NULL,
  `file_url` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `submit_date` timestamp NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `contact_park` (`contact_id`,`park`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_park` (`park`,`id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_t_clo_emp_id` (`clo_emp_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_t_employee_id` (`employee_id`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=2898 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.teacher_applicant_contact_followup_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `teacher_applicant_contact_followup_view` AS select `tf`.`id` AS `id`,`tf`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`tf`.`type` AS `type`,`tf`.`status` AS `status`,(case when (`ta`.`assistant` = '1') then 'Associate' else 'Teacher' end) AS `applicant_Type`,`ta`.`assistant` AS `applicant_flag`,`tf`.`interest` AS `interest`,`tf`.`interest_string` AS `interest_string`,`tf`.`salary_offer` AS `salary_offer`,`tf`.`working_hours` AS `working_hours`,`tf`.`preferences` AS `preferences`,`tf`.`slot` AS `slot`,`tf`.`comment` AS `comment`,`tf`.`address` AS `address`,`tf`.`center_location` AS `center_location`,`tf`.`nda_year` AS `nda_year`,`tf`.`area` AS `area`,`tf`.`city` AS `city`,`tf`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`tf`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`tf2`.`comment` AS `old_comment`,`tf`.`followup` AS `followup`,concat(`ce`.`fname`,' ',`ce`.`lname`) AS `employee`,cast(`tf`.`followup` as date) AS `date`,`tf`.`reminder` AS `reminder`,date_format(`tf`.`reminder`,'%M %e, %Y %h:%i:%s %p') AS `reminder_string`,`tf`.`master_id` AS `master_id`,`tf`.`unfollow` AS `unfollow`,`tf`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`tf`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`tf`.`bid` AS `bid`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,concat(`c`.`country_code`,`c`.`mobile`) AS `mobile_string`,(case when (`c`.`dob` <> '0000-00-00') then convert(date_format(`c`.`dob`,'%d %b %y') using utf8mb3) else ' - ' end) AS `dob_string`,(case when (`c`.`dob` <> '0000-00-00') then concat(floor((timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) / 12)),'y',(timestampdiff(MONTH,`c`.`dob`,curdate()) % 12),'m') else '0' end) AS `age`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`,' ',`c`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,`tf`.`park` AS `park`,`ta`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`ta`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from (((((`teacher_applicant_followup` `tf` join `contact` `c` on((`tf`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) join `employee` `e` on((`tf`.`employee_id` = `e`.`id`))) join `contact` `ce` on((`ce`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`))) left join `teacher_applicant_followup` `tf2` on((`tf`.`parent_id` = `tf2`.`id`))) left join `teacher_applicant` `ta` on((`tf`.`master_id` = `ta`.`id`))) group by `tf`.`id` order by `tf`.`reminder` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.teacher_applicant_followup
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `teacher_applicant_followup` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `type` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Follow Up Type (0-Visit, 1-Call, 2-SMS, 3-Email)',
  `master` int NOT NULL COMMENT '	Follow Up master type (0-Inquiry, 1-Balance, 2-Expiry, 3-Attendance,4-Birthday,5-Free Trial)',
  `comment` text NOT NULL COMMENT 'Narration',
  `followup` datetime NOT NULL COMMENT 'When followup is done',
  `reminder` datetime NOT NULL COMMENT 'When followup should be done',
  `master_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Follow Up Master Id (teacher_applicant = id)',
  `status` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Status (0-Lead, 1-Prospect, 2-Pending, 3-Closed, 4-Trash, 5-Reopen, 6-Dropout)',
  `interest` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-Warm, 1-Hot, 2-Cold, 3-Dead',
  `salary_offer` text NOT NULL,
  `working_hours` text NOT NULL,
  `interest_string` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `sub_interest_string` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `source` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `heard_from` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `preferences` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `slot` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `address` text NOT NULL,
  `center_location` text NOT NULL,
  `nda_year` text NOT NULL,
  `area` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `city` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `venue_id` int NOT NULL,
  `pincode` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `call_rec` text NOT NULL,
  `call_duration` varchar(250) NOT NULL,
  `unfollow` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-No, 1-Yes',
  `employee_id` int NOT NULL,
  `parent_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `inq_noti_id` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `master_id` (`master_id`),
  KEY `employee_id` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `parent_id` (`parent_id`),
  KEY `inq_noti_id` (`inq_noti_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `reminder` (`reminder`),
  KEY `unfollow` (`unfollow`),
  KEY `contact_id_2` (`contact_id`),
  KEY `master_id_2` (`master_id`),
  KEY `employee_id_2` (`employee_id`),
  KEY `parent_id_2` (`parent_id`),
  KEY `inq_noti_id_2` (`inq_noti_id`),
  KEY `bid_2` (`bid`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `teacher_followup_subquery` (`id`,`master`,`contact_id`,`master_id`,`park`),
  KEY `idx_followup_composite` (`master`,`park`,`contact_id`,`master_id`,`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=6156 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.teacher_applicant_meeting_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `teacher_applicant_meeting_view` AS select `tam`.`id` AS `id`,`tam`.`applicant_id` AS `applicant_id`,`ta`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`ta`.`fname` AS `fname`,`ta`.`lname` AS `lname`,concat(`ta`.`fname`,' ',`ta`.`lname`,' ',`ta`.`mname`) AS `fullname`,`ecv`.`fname` AS `clo_name`,`ta`.`clo_emp_id` AS `clo_emp_id`,`ta`.`interviewer_emp_id` AS `interviewer_emp_id`,`ta`.`interviewer_emp_email` AS `interviewer_emp_email`,`ta`.`interview_type` AS `interview_type`,`tam`.`date` AS `date`,`tam`.`time` AS `start_time`,concat(date_format(`tam`.`date`,'%W %M %e %Y'),' ',time_format(`tam`.`time`,'%r')) AS `date_time`,`tam`.`park` AS `park`,`ta`.`email` AS `applicant_email`,`ta`.`clo_email` AS `clo_email`,`ta`.`bid` AS `bid`,`ecv`.`zoom_user_id` AS `zoom_user_id`,`zu`.`zoom_id` AS `zoom_id`,`zu`.`email_id` AS `zoom_email_id`,`tal`.`join_url` AS `teacher_join_link`,`sla`.`join_url` AS `applicant_join_link` from (((((`teacher_applicant_meeting` `tam` join `teacher_applicant_view` `ta` on((`tam`.`applicant_id` = `ta`.`id`))) left join `teacher_applicant_session_log` `tal` on((`tal`.`applicant_id` = `ta`.`id`))) left join `session_log_applicant` `sla` on((`sla`.`session_log_id` = `tal`.`id`))) left join `emp_cont_view` `ecv` on(((`ta`.`interviewer_emp_id` = `ecv`.`id`) and (`ta`.`bid` = `ecv`.`bid`)))) left join `zoom_user` `zu` on((`ecv`.`zoom_user_id` = `zu`.`id`))) where (`tam`.`park` = 0);

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.teacher_applicant_stage
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `teacher_applicant_stage` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `stage` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=2324 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.teacher_applicant_stage_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `teacher_applicant_stage_view` AS with `latest_stage` as (select `sub`.`id` AS `id`,`sub`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`sub`.`stage` AS `stage`,`sub`.`created_at` AS `created_at` from (select `t`.`id` AS `id`,`t`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`t`.`stage` AS `stage`,`t`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY `t`.`contact_id` ORDER BY `t`.`created_at` desc )  AS `rn` from `teacher_applicant_stage` `t`) `sub` where (`sub`.`rn` = 1)) select `ta`.`id` AS `id`,`ta`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,(case when ((trim(coalesce(`c`.`fname`,'')) = '') and (trim(coalesce(`c`.`lname`,'')) = '')) then 'Unknown' when (trim(coalesce(`c`.`fname`,'')) = '') then trim(`c`.`lname`) when (trim(coalesce(`c`.`lname`,'')) = '') then trim(`c`.`fname`) else concat(trim(`c`.`fname`),' ',trim(`c`.`lname`)) end) AS `name`,`ls`.`stage` AS `stage`,`ls`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`ta`.`park` AS `park` from ((`teacher_applicant` `ta` join `latest_stage` `ls` on((`ta`.`contact_id` = `ls`.`contact_id`))) join `contact` `c` on((`ta`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) where ((`ta`.`park` = 0) and (`ta`.`status` = 0) and (`c`.`park` = 0) and ((trim(coalesce(`c`.`fname`,'')) <> '') or (trim(coalesce(`c`.`lname`,'')) <> ''))) order by `ls`.`id` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.teacher_applicant_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `teacher_applicant_view` AS select `t`.`id` AS `id`,`t`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`t`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`t`.`branch_type` AS `branch_type`,`t`.`clo_emp_id` AS `clo_emp_id`,`t`.`salary_type` AS `salary_type`,`t`.`ctc` AS `ctc`,`t`.`interview_type` AS `interview_type`,`t`.`lip_num` AS `lip_num`,`t`.`lip_string` AS `lip_string`,`t`.`location` AS `location`,`t`.`venue_ids` AS `venue_ids`,`t`.`position` AS `position`,`t`.`inq_source` AS `inq_source`,`t`.`submit_date` AS `submit_date`,`t`.`file_url` AS `file_url`,`tas`.`source_name` AS `inq_source_string`,`t`.`interviewer_emp_id` AS `interviewer_emp_id`,`interviewer_c`.`email` AS `interviewer_emp_email`,concat_ws(' ',`interviewer_c`.`fname`,`interviewer_c`.`mname`,`interviewer_c`.`lname`) AS `interviewer_emp_name`,`taf`.`id` AS `f_id`,`taf`.`reminder` AS `f_reminder`,`taf`.`old_comment` AS `f_comment`,`interviewer_eb`.`branches` AS `branches`,`emp2_eb`.`branches` AS `applicant_branches`,concat(`clo_c`.`fname`,' ',`clo_c`.`lname`) AS `clo_emp_name`,`clo_c`.`email` AS `clo_email`,`c`.`contact_group_id` AS `contact_group_id`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`mname` AS `mname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,concat_ws(' ',`c`.`fname`,`c`.`mname`,`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`t`.`allocation_date` AS `allocation_date`,if((`t`.`allocation_date` = '0000-00-00 00:00:00'),' - ',date_format(`t`.`allocation_date`,'%d %b %y')) AS `allocation_date_string`,`t`.`doi` AS `doi`,date_format(`t`.`doi`,'%d %b %y') AS `doi_string`,date_format(`c`.`dob`,'%d %b %y') AS `dob_string`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,concat(`c`.`country_code`,' ',`c`.`mobile`) AS `contact_string`,`c`.`country_code_2` AS `country_code_2`,`c`.`mobile2` AS `mobile2`,concat(`c`.`country_code_2`,' ',`c`.`mobile2`) AS `contact_string_2`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`c`.`gender` AS `gender`,`c`.`dob` AS `dob`,`c`.`marital_status` AS `marital_status`,`c`.`formal_title` AS `formal_title`,`c`.`father_name` AS `father_name`,`c`.`spouse_name` AS `spouse_name`,`c`.`address` AS `address`,`c`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`c`.`city` AS `city`,`c`.`state` AS `state`,`t`.`rating1` AS `rating1`,`t`.`rating2` AS `rating2`,`t`.`rating3` AS `rating3`,`t`.`rating4` AS `rating4`,`t`.`rating5` AS `rating5`,concat(((((`t`.`rating1` + `t`.`rating2`) + `t`.`rating3`) + `t`.`rating4`) + `t`.`rating5`),'/','25') AS `totalrating`,`t`.`observation` AS `observation`,`t`.`observation_txt` AS `observation_txt`,`t`.`waiting_list` AS `waiting_list`,`t`.`waiting_list_mail` AS `waiting_list_mail`,`t`.`teacher_observation_txt` AS `teacher_observation_txt`,`t`.`comments` AS `comments`,`t`.`rejection_comment` AS `rejection_comment`,`t`.`assistant` AS `assistant`,`t`.`ed_log_id` AS `ed_log_id`,`t`.`bid` AS `bid`,`t`.`training_no` AS `training_no`,(case when ((`t`.`converted` = 4) and (`t`.`training_no` = 2)) then 'Completed' when ((`t`.`converted` = 1) and (`t`.`training_no` = 6)) then 'Completed' else `t`.`training_no` end) AS `training_no_string`,`t`.`converted` AS `converted`,`t`.`question1` AS `question1`,`t`.`photo` AS `photo`,`t`.`attachment` AS `attachment`,`t`.`interview` AS `interview`,`t`.`video1` AS `video1`,`t`.`video2` AS `video2`,`t`.`video3` AS `video3`,`t`.`video4` AS `video4`,`t`.`video5` AS `video5`,`t`.`video6` AS `video6`,`t`.`video7` AS `video7`,`t`.`ratings_id` AS `ratings_id`,`t`.`signed_doc_status` AS `signed_doc_status`,`tasl`.`join_url` AS `teacher_join_url`,concat(date_format(`tasl`.`date`,'%d %b %y'),' ',date_format(`tasl`.`start_time`,'%h:%i:%s')) AS `interview_date`,`t`.`park` AS `park`,`t`.`status` AS `status`,`t`.`doj` AS `doj`,`t`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`t`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,date_format(`t`.`modified_at`,'%d %b %y') AS `modified_at_string` from ((((((((((((`teacher_applicant` `t` join `contact` `c` on(((`t`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`) and (`c`.`park` = '0')))) left join `teacher_applicant_session_log` `tasl` on(((`t`.`id` = `tasl`.`applicant_id`) and (`tasl`.`park` = '0')))) left join `employee` `interviewer_e` on((`t`.`interviewer_emp_id` = `interviewer_e`.`id`))) left join `contact` `interviewer_c` on((`interviewer_e`.`contact_id` = `interviewer_c`.`id`))) left join (select `eb`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,group_concat(distinct `b`.`branch` separator ',') AS `branches` from (`employee_bid` `eb` left join `branch` `b` on((`eb`.`bid` = `b`.`id`))) group by `eb`.`employee_id`) `interviewer_eb` on((`interviewer_e`.`id` = `interviewer_eb`.`employee_id`))) left join `employee` `emp2` on((`t`.`employee_id` = `emp2`.`id`))) left join `contact` `emp2_c` on((`emp2`.`contact_id` = `emp2_c`.`id`))) left join (select `eb`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,group_concat(distinct `b`.`branch` separator ',') AS `branches` from (`employee_bid` `eb` left join `branch` `b` on((`eb`.`bid` = `b`.`id`))) group by `eb`.`employee_id`) `emp2_eb` on((`emp2`.`id` = `emp2_eb`.`employee_id`))) left join `employee` `clo_e` on((`t`.`clo_emp_id` = `clo_e`.`id`))) left join `contact` `clo_c` on((`clo_e`.`contact_id` = `clo_c`.`id`))) left join `teacher_applicant_source` `tas` on(((`tas`.`id` = `t`.`inq_source`) and (`tas`.`park` = '0')))) left join (select `taf`.`id` AS `id`,`taf`.`master_id` AS `master_id`,`taf`.`reminder` AS `reminder`,`taf2`.`comment` AS `old_comment` from (`teacher_applicant_followup` `taf` left join `teacher_applicant_followup` `taf2` on((`taf`.`parent_id` = `taf2`.`id`))) where ((`taf`.`master` = '0') and (`taf`.`park` = '0') and `taf`.`id` in (select max(`teacher_applicant_followup`.`id`) from `teacher_applicant_followup` where ((`teacher_applicant_followup`.`master` = '0') and (`teacher_applicant_followup`.`park` = '0')) group by `teacher_applicant_followup`.`contact_id`,`teacher_applicant_followup`.`master`,`teacher_applicant_followup`.`master_id`))) `taf` on((`taf`.`master_id` = `t`.`id`))) group by `t`.`id`;
