--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.teacher_batch_attendance_app_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `teacher_batch_attendance_app_view` AS select `a`.`id` AS `id`,`a`.`date` AS `attendance_date`,`a`.`comment` AS `batch_comment`,(case when (`a`.`cancel_status` = 2) then 'Approved' else 'Not Approved' end) AS `cancel_status_string`,(case when (`a`.`status` = 1) then 'Present' when (`a`.`status` = 2) then 'Cancelled' when (`a`.`status` = 3) then 'Reschedule' else 'Pending' end) AS `batch_request_type`,`a`.`cancel_status` AS `cancel_status`,`ea`.`status` AS `request_status`,(case when (`ea`.`status` = 1) then 'Approved' when (`ea`.`status` = 2) then 'Rejected' when (`ea`.`status` = 3) then 'Hold' else 'Pending' end) AS `request_status_string`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch_name`,`ea`.`emp_id` AS `emp_id`,`be`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`e`.`park` AS `emp_park`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,(case when (`ea`.`request_type` = 0) then 'none' when (`ea`.`request_type` = 1) then 'leave' when (`ea`.`request_type` = 2) then 'WFH' when (`ea`.`request_type` = 3) then 'half day' when (`ea`.`request_type` = 4) then 'Late' when (`ea`.`request_type` = 5) then 'punch-in/out' when (`ea`.`request_type` = 7) then 'O.T' when (`ea`.`request_type` = 8) then 'Break' else '' end) AS `request_type_string`,`ea`.`request_type` AS `request_type`,`ea`.`no_of_days` AS `no_of_days`,`ea`.`start_date` AS `start_date`,date_format(`ea`.`start_date`,'%D %b, %Y') AS `start_date_string`,`ea`.`in_time` AS `in_time`,date_format(`ea`.`in_time`,'%h:%i %p') AS `in_time_string`,`ea`.`end_date` AS `end_date`,date_format(`ea`.`end_date`,'%D %b, %Y') AS `end_date_string`,`ea`.`out_time` AS `out_time`,date_format(`ea`.`out_time`,'%h:%i %p') AS `out_time_string`,(case when (`ea`.`out_time` > 0) then concat(hour(timediff(`ea`.`out_time`,`ea`.`in_time`)),':',minute(timediff(`ea`.`out_time`,`ea`.`in_time`))) else '0' end) AS `total_hours`,`ea`.`id` AS `requested_id`,`cp`.`fname` AS `request_parent_name`,`ea`.`request_comment` AS `request_comment`,`ea`.`parent_comment` AS `parent_comment`,`ea`.`bid` AS `bid`,`a`.`park` AS `park` from ((((((((`attendance` `a` left join `batch` `b` on((`a`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join `batch_employee` `be` on((`be`.`batch_id` = `a`.`batch_id`))) left join `employee` `ae` on((`be`.`contact_id` = `ae`.`contact_id`))) left join `emp_att_request` `ea` on(((`ea`.`emp_id` = `ae`.`id`) and (`a`.`date` in (`ea`.`start_date`,`ea`.`end_date`))))) left join `employee` `e` on((`ea`.`emp_id` = `e`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) left join `employee` `parent_emp` on((`ea`.`parent_id` = `parent_emp`.`id`))) left join `contact` `cp` on((`parent_emp`.`contact_id` = `cp`.`id`))) where ((`a`.`status` <> 1) and (`a`.`type` = 'B') and (`a`.`cancel_status` = 1)) group by `a`.`date`,`a`.`batch_id` order by `a`.`id` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.teacher_capacity_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `teacher_capacity_view` AS with `workshift_weekly_hours` as (select `wd`.`workshift_id` AS `workshift_id`,round(sum((time_to_sec(timediff(`wd`.`end_time`,`wd`.`start_time`)) / 3600)),2) AS `max_weekly_hours` from `workshift_day` `wd` group by `wd`.`workshift_id`), `batch_time_hours` as (select `bt`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,round(sum((time_to_sec(timediff(`bt`.`end_time`,`bt`.`start_time`)) / 3600)),2) AS `batch_weekly_hours` from `batch_time` `bt` group by `bt`.`batch_id`), `teacher_batch_stats` as (select `be`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,count(distinct `b`.`id`) AS `active_batch_count`,round(sum(coalesce(`bth`.`batch_weekly_hours`,0)),2) AS `weekly_used_hours`,sum(`b`.`enrolled`) AS `total_active_members`,sum((case when (`b`.`completed_sessions` <= 30) then (`b`.`limit` - `b`.`enrolled`) else 0 end)) AS `seats_in_existing`,sum((case when (`b`.`completed_sessions` > 30) then (`b`.`limit` - `b`.`enrolled`) else 0 end)) AS `lost_seats_mature_batches`,group_concat(distinct `br`.`branch` order by `br`.`branch` ASC separator ', ') AS `branches` from (((`batch_employee` `be` join `batch` `b` on(((`b`.`id` = `be`.`batch_id`) and (`b`.`park` = 0) and (`b`.`offline` = 1) and (`b`.`inactive` = 0) and (`b`.`demo_class` = 0) and (`b`.`training_assign` = 0) and (`b`.`parent_id` = 0) and (`b`.`start_date` <= curdate()) and (`b`.`end_date` >= curdate())))) left join `batch_time_hours` `bth` on((`bth`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) join `branch` `br` on(((`br`.`id` = `b`.`bid`) and (`br`.`park` = 0) and (`br`.`type` in ('COCO','Franchisee','OM_Franchisee','OI_Franchisee'))))) group by `be`.`contact_id`) select `e`.`id` AS `id`,`e`.`id` AS `employee_id`,`e`.`ecode` AS `ecode`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `teacher_name`,`ep`.`position` AS `position`,`w`.`workshift` AS `workshift_name`,`e`.`park` AS `park`,`tbs`.`branches` AS `branches`,coalesce(`wwh`.`max_weekly_hours`,0) AS `max_weekly_hours`,coalesce(`tbs`.`weekly_used_hours`,0) AS `weekly_used_hours`,round(greatest((coalesce(`wwh`.`max_weekly_hours`,0) - coalesce(`tbs`.`weekly_used_hours`,0)),0),2) AS `weekly_unused_hours`,coalesce(`tbs`.`active_batch_count`,0) AS `active_batches`,coalesce(`tbs`.`total_active_members`,0) AS `active_members`,coalesce(`tbs`.`seats_in_existing`,0) AS `seats_in_existing_batches`,coalesce(`tbs`.`lost_seats_mature_batches`,0) AS `lost_seats_mature_batches`,round(((coalesce(`tbs`.`total_active_members`,0) / nullif((((coalesce(`tbs`.`total_active_members`,0) + coalesce(`tbs`.`seats_in_existing`,0)) + coalesce(`tbs`.`lost_seats_mature_batches`,0)) + (floor((greatest((coalesce(`wwh`.`max_weekly_hours`,0) - coalesce(`tbs`.`weekly_used_hours`,0)),0) / nullif((`tbs`.`weekly_used_hours` / nullif(`tbs`.`active_batch_count`,0)),0))) * 6)),0)) * 100),2) AS `total_occupancy_percent`,round(((coalesce(`tbs`.`total_active_members`,0) / nullif(((coalesce(`tbs`.`total_active_members`,0) + coalesce(`tbs`.`seats_in_existing`,0)) + (floor((greatest((coalesce(`wwh`.`max_weekly_hours`,0) - coalesce(`tbs`.`weekly_used_hours`,0)),0) / nullif((`tbs`.`weekly_used_hours` / nullif(`tbs`.`active_batch_count`,0)),0))) * 6)),0)) * 100),2) AS `current_occupancy_percent`,round(((coalesce(`tbs`.`weekly_used_hours`,0) / nullif(coalesce(`wwh`.`max_weekly_hours`,0),0)) * 100),2) AS `time_utilization_percent`,round((coalesce(`tbs`.`total_active_members`,0) / nullif(`tbs`.`active_batch_count`,0)),2) AS `avg_kids_per_batch`,round((`tbs`.`weekly_used_hours` / `tbs`.`active_batch_count`),2) AS `avg_batch_duration_hours`,(floor((greatest((coalesce(`wwh`.`max_weekly_hours`,0) - coalesce(`tbs`.`weekly_used_hours`,0)),0) / (`tbs`.`weekly_used_hours` / `tbs`.`active_batch_count`))) * 6) AS `max_kids_in_new_batches`,(coalesce(`tbs`.`seats_in_existing`,0) + (floor((greatest((coalesce(`wwh`.`max_weekly_hours`,0) - coalesce(`tbs`.`weekly_used_hours`,0)),0) / (`tbs`.`weekly_used_hours` / `tbs`.`active_batch_count`))) * 6)) AS `total_additional_kids_possible`,`e`.`master_trainer_contact_id` AS `master_trainer_contact_id`,concat(`mc`.`fname`,' ',`mc`.`lname`) AS `master_trainer_name` from ((((((`teacher_batch_stats` `tbs` join `employee` `e` on(((`e`.`contact_id` = `tbs`.`contact_id`) and (`e`.`park` = 0) and (`e`.`status` = 1)))) join `contact` `c` on(((`c`.`id` = `e`.`contact_id`) and (`c`.`park` = 0)))) join `pf_central`.`employee_position` `ep` on((`ep`.`id` = `e`.`position_id`))) join `workshift` `w` on(((`w`.`id` = `e`.`workshift_id`) and (`w`.`park` = 0)))) left join `workshift_weekly_hours` `wwh` on((`wwh`.`workshift_id` = `e`.`workshift_id`))) left join `contact` `mc` on(((`mc`.`id` = `e`.`master_trainer_contact_id`) and (`mc`.`park` = 0)))) group by `e`.`id` order by `tbs`.`branches`,`teacher_name`;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.teacher_gradation_table
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `teacher_gradation_table` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `total_pointer` float(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `observations_pointer` float(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `assignment_pointer` float(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `renewal_pointer` float(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `cancellation_pointer` float(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `earned_pointer` float(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `yearmonth` int NOT NULL,
  `total_cancelled_batches` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `renewal_rate` varchar(225) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `numerator_renewal` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `denominator_renewal` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=1149 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.teacher_gradation_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `teacher_gradation_view` AS select `tgt`.`id` AS `id`,`tgt`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`tgt`.`total_pointer` AS `total_pointer`,`tgt`.`observations_pointer` AS `observations_pointer`,`tgt`.`assignment_pointer` AS `assignment_pointer`,round(((`tgt`.`assignment_pointer` / 15) * 10),0) AS `assignment_percentage`,round(((`tgt`.`observations_pointer` / (case when (`tgt`.`assignment_pointer` = 0) then `tgt`.`total_pointer` else (`tgt`.`total_pointer` - 15) end)) * 10),0) AS `observations_percentage`,`tgt`.`renewal_pointer` AS `renewal_pointer`,`tgt`.`cancellation_pointer` AS `cancellation_pointer`,round(((`tgt`.`cancellation_pointer` / `tgt`.`total_cancelled_batches`) * 10),0) AS `cancellation_percentage`,`tgt`.`earned_pointer` AS `earned_pointer`,concat(`tgt`.`earned_pointer`,' / ',`tgt`.`total_pointer`) AS `final_pointer`,`tgt`.`yearmonth` AS `yearmonth`,date_format(str_to_date(`tgt`.`yearmonth`,'%Y%m'),'%M %Y') AS `date_string`,`tgt`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`tgt`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`tgt`.`park` AS `park` from (`teacher_gradation_table` `tgt` left join `contact` `c` on((`tgt`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`)));

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.teacher_student_coco_view

CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `teacher_student_coco_view` AS select `m`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `student_name`,`iv`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`inv`.`id` AS `invoice_id`,`br`.`id` AS `bid`,(case when (`iv`.`end_date` >= curdate()) then 1 else 0 end) AS `is_active`,(select `employee`.`id` from `employee` where ((`employee`.`contact_id` = `be`.`contact_id`) and (`employee`.`park` = 0))) AS `teacher_emp_id`,(select concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`mname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`) from `contact` where ((`contact`.`id` = `be`.`contact_id`) and (`contact`.`park` = 0))) AS `teacher`,`inv`.`dropout` AS `dropout` from ((((((`member` `m` join `invoice` `inv` on(((`inv`.`contact_id` = `m`.`contact_id`) and (`inv`.`date` = (select max(`invoice`.`date`) from `invoice` where ((`invoice`.`contact_id` = `m`.`contact_id`) and (`invoice`.`park` = 0))))))) join `invoice_item` `iv` on((`iv`.`invoice_id` = `inv`.`id`))) join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `m`.`contact_id`))) join `batch_employee` `be` on((`be`.`batch_id` = `iv`.`batch_id`))) join `batch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `be`.`batch_id`))) join `branch` `br` on((`br`.`id` = `b`.`bid`))) where ((`inv`.`date` > '2021-04-01') and (`inv`.`park` = 0) and (`b`.`park` = 0) and (`m`.`park` = 0) and `br`.`id` in (select `branch`.`id` from `branch` where ((`branch`.`type` = 'COCO') and (`branch`.`park` = 0)))) group by `m`.`contact_id` order by `m`.`contact_id`;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.teacher_training_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `teacher_training_view` AS select `t`.`id` AS `id`,`t`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,concat(`c`.`country_code`,' ',`c`.`mobile`) AS `contact_string`,`t`.`branch_type` AS `branch_type`,`taf`.`id` AS `f_id`,`t`.`interview` AS `interview`,`t`.`location` AS `location`,`t`.`status` AS `status`,`t`.`bid` AS `bid`,`t`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`t`.`clo_emp_id` AS `clo_emp_id`,`t`.`comments` AS `comments`,`t`.`converted` AS `converted`,`t`.`park` AS `park`,`t`.`training_no` AS `training_no`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`t`.`observation` AS `observation`,`t`.`observation_txt` AS `observation_txt`,`t`.`waiting_list` AS `waiting_list`,`t`.`waiting_list_mail` AS `waiting_list_mail`,`t`.`teacher_observation_txt` AS `teacher_observation_txt`,`t`.`rejection_comment` AS `rejection_comment`,`t`.`assistant` AS `assistant`,`t`.`ed_log_id` AS `ed_log_id`,`t`.`attachment` AS `attachment`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`t`.`ctc` AS `ctc`,`t`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`tas`.`source_name` AS `inq_source_string`,`t`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`t`.`doi` AS `doi`,`t`.`submit_date` AS `submit_date`,`tasl`.`join_url` AS `teacher_join_url`,concat(date_format(`tasl`.`date`,'%d %b %y'),' ',date_format(`tasl`.`start_time`,'%h:%i:%s')) AS `interview_date`,date_format(`t`.`doi`,'%d %b %y') AS `doi_string`,date_format(`t`.`modified_at`,'%d %b %y') AS `modified_at_string`,group_concat(distinct `b2`.`branch` separator ',') AS `applicant_branches`,concat(((((cast(`t`.`rating1` as signed) + cast(`t`.`rating2` as signed)) + cast(`t`.`rating3` as signed)) + cast(`t`.`rating4` as signed)) + cast(`t`.`rating5` as signed)),'/','25') AS `totalrating`,(case when (`t`.`allocation_date` = '0000-00-00 00:00:00') then ' - ' else convert(date_format(`t`.`allocation_date`,'%d %b %y') using utf8mb3) end) AS `allocation_date_string`,(case when ((`t`.`converted` = 4) and (`t`.`training_no` = 2)) then 'Completed' when ((`t`.`converted` = 1) and (`t`.`training_no` = 6)) then 'Completed' else `t`.`training_no` end) AS `training_no_string`,concat_ws(' ',`clo_c`.`fname`,`clo_c`.`mname`,`clo_c`.`lname`) AS `clo_emp_name` from ((((((((`teacher_applicant` `t` join `contact` `c` on(((`t`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`) and (`c`.`park` = '0')))) left join `teacher_applicant_session_log` `tasl` on(((`t`.`id` = `tasl`.`applicant_id`) and (`tasl`.`park` = '0')))) left join `employee_bid` `eb` on((`t`.`employee_id` = `eb`.`employee_id`))) left join `teacher_applicant_source` `tas` on(((`tas`.`id` = `t`.`inq_source`) and (`tas`.`park` = '0')))) left join `branch` `b2` on((`eb`.`bid` = `b2`.`id`))) left join `employee` `clo_e` on((`t`.`clo_emp_id` = `clo_e`.`id`))) left join `contact` `clo_c` on((`clo_e`.`contact_id` = `clo_c`.`id`))) left join `teacher_applicant_followup` `taf` on(((`taf`.`master_id` = `t`.`id`) and (`taf`.`master` = '0') and (`taf`.`park` = '0') and (`taf`.`id` = (select max(`taf_sub`.`id`) from `teacher_applicant_followup` `taf_sub` where ((`taf_sub`.`master_id` = `taf`.`master_id`) and (`taf_sub`.`master` = '0') and (`taf_sub`.`park` = '0')) group by `taf_sub`.`master_id`))))) group by `t`.`id`;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.teacher_venue_monthly_report
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `teacher_venue_monthly_report` (
  `report_month` date NOT NULL,
  `t_contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `venue_id` int NOT NULL,
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `unique_batch_count` int NOT NULL,
  `teacher_attendance` int NOT NULL,
  `member_attendance` int NOT NULL,
  `active_member_count_month_end` int NOT NULL,
  `fname` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `lname` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `salary_type` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  `salary` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`report_month`,`t_contact_id`,`venue_id`),
  KEY `idx_teacher` (`t_contact_id`),
  KEY `idx_venue` (`venue_id`),
  KEY `idx_bid` (`bid`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=403 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.teachers_efficiency_report
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `teachers_efficiency_report` AS select `t1`.`id` AS `id`,`t1`.`teacher_emp_id` AS `teacher_emp_id`,`t1`.`teacher1` AS `teacher1`,`t1`.`total` AS `total`,`t2`.`inacive` AS `inactive`,`t2`.`teacher2` AS `teacher2`,'0' AS `park`,((100 * `t2`.`inacive`) / `t1`.`total`) AS `dropout`,(100 - ((100 * `t2`.`inacive`) / `t1`.`total`)) AS `efficiency` from ((select `teacher_student_view`.`contact_id` AS `id`,`teacher_student_view`.`teacher_emp_id` AS `teacher_emp_id`,`teacher_student_view`.`teacher` AS `teacher1`,count(`teacher_student_view`.`contact_id`) AS `total` from `teacher_student_view` group by `teacher_student_view`.`teacher`) `t1` join (select `teacher_student_view`.`teacher` AS `teacher2`,count(`teacher_student_view`.`contact_id`) AS `inacive` from `teacher_student_view` where (`teacher_student_view`.`is_active` = 0) group by `teacher_student_view`.`teacher`) `t2` on((`t1`.`teacher1` = `t2`.`teacher2`)));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.teachers_efficiency_report_coco
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `teachers_efficiency_report_coco` AS select `t1`.`id` AS `id`,`t1`.`teacher_emp_id` AS `teacher_emp_id`,(select `emp`.`contact_id` from `employee` `emp` where ((`emp`.`id` = `t1`.`teacher_emp_id`) and (`emp`.`park` = 0) and (`emp`.`park` = 0))) AS `teacher_cont_id`,`t1`.`teacher1` AS `teacher1`,`t1`.`total` AS `total`,`t2`.`inacive` AS `inactive`,`t2`.`teacher2` AS `teacher2`,convert('0' using utf8mb3) AS `park`,((100 * `t2`.`inacive`) / `t1`.`total`) AS `dropout`,(100 - ((100 * `t2`.`inacive`) / `t1`.`total`)) AS `efficiency` from ((select `teacher_student_coco_view`.`contact_id` AS `id`,`teacher_student_coco_view`.`teacher_emp_id` AS `teacher_emp_id`,`teacher_student_coco_view`.`teacher` AS `teacher1`,count(`teacher_student_coco_view`.`contact_id`) AS `total` from `teacher_student_coco_view` group by `teacher_student_coco_view`.`teacher`) `t1` join (select `teacher_student_coco_view`.`teacher` AS `teacher2`,count(`teacher_student_coco_view`.`contact_id`) AS `inacive` from `teacher_student_coco_view` where (`teacher_student_coco_view`.`is_active` = 0) group by `teacher_student_coco_view`.`teacher`) `t2` on((`t1`.`teacher1` = `t2`.`teacher2`))) order by ((100 * `t2`.`inacive`) / `t1`.`total`);

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.teachers_efficiency_report_myanmar

CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `teachers_efficiency_report_myanmar` AS select `t1`.`id` AS `id`,`t1`.`teacher_emp_id` AS `teacher_emp_id`,`t1`.`teacher1` AS `teacher1`,`t1`.`total` AS `total`,`t2`.`inacive` AS `inactive`,`t2`.`teacher2` AS `teacher2`,convert('0' using utf8mb3) AS `park`,((100 * `t2`.`inacive`) / `t1`.`total`) AS `dropout`,(100 - ((100 * `t2`.`inacive`) / `t1`.`total`)) AS `efficiency` from ((select `teacher_student_myanmar_view`.`contact_id` AS `id`,`teacher_student_myanmar_view`.`teacher_emp_id` AS `teacher_emp_id`,`teacher_student_myanmar_view`.`teacher` AS `teacher1`,count(`teacher_student_myanmar_view`.`contact_id`) AS `total` from `teacher_student_myanmar_view` group by `teacher_student_myanmar_view`.`teacher`) `t1` join (select `teacher_student_myanmar_view`.`teacher` AS `teacher2`,count(`teacher_student_myanmar_view`.`contact_id`) AS `inacive` from `teacher_student_myanmar_view` where (`teacher_student_myanmar_view`.`is_active` = 0) group by `teacher_student_myanmar_view`.`teacher`) `t2` on((`t1`.`teacher1` = `t2`.`teacher2`))) order by ((100 * `t2`.`inacive`) / `t1`.`total`);

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.teachers_training_one_on_one_training_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `teachers_training_one_on_one_training_view` AS select `slt`.`id` AS `id`,`zr`.`id` AS `zoom_id`,`slt`.`training_id` AS `training_id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`zr`.`meeting_id` AS `meeting_id`,`zr`.`topic` AS `topic`,(case when ((`zr`.`drive_file_id` is null) or (`zr`.`drive_file_id` = '')) then `zr`.`s3_key` else `zr`.`drive_file_id` end) AS `drive_file_id`,`zr`.`date` AS `date`,`zr`.`park` AS `park` from (((`session_log_tt` `slt` join (select `zr`.`id` AS `id`,`zr`.`meeting_id` AS `meeting_id`,`zr`.`topic` AS `topic`,`zr`.`drive_file_id` AS `drive_file_id`,`zr`.`s3_key` AS `s3_key`,`zr`.`date` AS `date`,`zr`.`park` AS `park` from `zoom_recording` `zr` where `zr`.`id` in (select max(`zoom_recording`.`id`) from `zoom_recording` where (`zoom_recording`.`park` = 0) group by `zoom_recording`.`meeting_id`)) `zr` on((`zr`.`meeting_id` = `slt`.`meeting_id`))) left join `trainee_training_time` `tt` on((`tt`.`id` = `slt`.`training_id`))) left join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `tt`.`contact_id`))) where (`slt`.`park` = '0');

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.temp_myanmar_user_view

CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `temp_myanmar_user_view` AS select concat(`u`.`fname`,' ',`u`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`u`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`ud`.`last_time` AS `last_time`,`ud`.`user_id` AS `user_id` from ((`pf_central`.`user_device` `ud` left join `pf_central`.`user` `u` on((`ud`.`user_id` = `u`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c` on((`u`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`))) where ((`u`.`type` = 'E') and (`c`.`bid` = '31') and (`ud`.`last_time` = (select max(`ud2`.`last_time`) from `pf_central`.`user_device` `ud2` where (`ud2`.`user_id` = `ud`.`user_id`)))) order by `ud`.`last_time` desc;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.todo
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `todo` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `title` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `comment` varchar(1000) NOT NULL,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `time` time NOT NULL,
  `repeat` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Flag (0-No / 1-Yes)',
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Remind to User',
  `status` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Flag (0 - Dismissed / 1 - On / 2 - Completed / 3 - Snooze)',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.todo_points_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `todo_points_view` AS select `et`.`id` AS `id`,`et`.`assigned_by` AS `assigned_by`,`et`.`assigned_to` AS `assigned_to`,concat(`ce`.`ce_fname`,' ',`ce`.`ce_mname`,' ',`ce`.`ce_lname`) AS `assigned_by_name`,concat(`cee`.`cee_fname`,' ',`cee`.`cee_mname`,' ',`cee`.`cee_lname`) AS `assigned_to_name`,`et`.`assigned_date` AS `assigned_date`,`et`.`due_date` AS `due_date`,`et`.`completion_date` AS `completion_date`,`et`.`is_completed` AS `is_completed`,`et`.`is_approved` AS `is_approved`,(case when ((to_days(`et`.`assigned_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) = 0) then '1 Points' else concat((to_days(`et`.`due_date`) - to_days(`et`.`assigned_date`)),' ','Points') end) AS `value`,(case when ((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) > 0) then concat((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)),' ','days delay') when ((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) = 1) then concat((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)),' ','day delay') when ((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) < 0) then concat((to_days(`et`.`due_date`) - to_days(`et`.`completion_date`)),' ','days earlier') when ((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) = -(1)) then concat((to_days(`et`.`due_date`) - to_days(`et`.`completion_date`)),' ','day earlier') when ((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) = 0) then 'On time' else '-' end) AS `consumed_days`,(case when (`et`.`is_approved` = 0) then '-' else (case when ((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) > 0) then concat(((to_days(`et`.`due_date`) - to_days(`et`.`assigned_date`)) - (to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`))),' ','Points') when ((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) < 0) then concat((to_days(`et`.`due_date`) - to_days(`et`.`assigned_date`)),' ','Points') when ((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) = 0) then (case when ((to_days(`et`.`assigned_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) = 0) then '1 Point' else concat((to_days(`et`.`due_date`) - to_days(`et`.`assigned_date`)),' ','Points') end) else '-' end) end) AS `final_value`,sum((case when (`et`.`is_approved` = 0) then 0 else (case when ((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) > 0) then concat(((to_days(`et`.`due_date`) - to_days(`et`.`assigned_date`)) - (to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)))) when ((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) < 0) then concat((to_days(`et`.`due_date`) - to_days(`et`.`assigned_date`))) when ((to_days(`et`.`completion_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) = 0) then (case when ((to_days(`et`.`assigned_date`) - to_days(`et`.`due_date`)) = 0) then 1 else (to_days(`et`.`due_date`) - to_days(`et`.`assigned_date`)) end) else 0 end) end)) AS `final_points_no`,concat((select concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`) from `contact` where (`contact`.`id` = (select `todo_remarks`.`emp_contact_id` from `todo_remarks` where (`todo_remarks`.`task_id` = `et`.`id`) order by `todo_remarks`.`id` desc limit 1))),' : ',(select `todo_remarks`.`comment` from `todo_remarks` where (`todo_remarks`.`task_id` = `et`.`id`) order by `todo_remarks`.`id` desc limit 1)) AS `comment`,cast((case when (`et`.`is_completed` = 0) then 'Task Pending' else 'Task Completed' end) as char charset utf8mb4) AS `is_completed_val`,cast((case when (`et`.`is_approved` = 0) then 'Not Approved' when (`et`.`is_approved` = 2) then 'Rejected' else 'Approved' end) as char charset utf8mb4) AS `is_approved_val`,`et`.`approval_date` AS `approval_date`,`et`.`park` AS `park`,`et`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`et`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from ((`employee_task` `et` left join (select `e`.`id` AS `id`,`c`.`fname` AS `ce_fname`,`c`.`mname` AS `ce_mname`,`c`.`lname` AS `ce_lname` from (`employee` `e` left join `contact` `c` on((`e`.`contact_id` = `c`.`id`)))) `ce` on((`et`.`assigned_by` = `ce`.`id`))) left join (select `ee`.`id` AS `id`,`cc`.`fname` AS `cee_fname`,`cc`.`mname` AS `cee_mname`,`cc`.`lname` AS `cee_lname` from (`employee` `ee` left join `contact` `cc` on((`ee`.`contact_id` = `cc`.`id`)))) `cee` on((`et`.`assigned_to` = `cee`.`id`))) group by `et`.`assigned_to`;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.topic
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `topic` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `topic` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `category_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `category_id` (`category_id`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `category_id_2` (`category_id`),
  KEY `park_2` (`park`),
  KEY `category_id_3` (`category_id`),
  KEY `park_3` (`park`),
  KEY `category_id_4` (`category_id`),
  KEY `park_4` (`park`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.topic_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `topic_view` AS select `t`.`id` AS `id`,`t`.`topic` AS `topic`,`c`.`category` AS `category`,`c`.`type` AS `category_type`,`c`.`bid` AS `bid`,`c`.`id` AS `category_id`,`t`.`park` AS `park` from (`topic` `t` join `category` `c` on((`t`.`category_id` = `c`.`id`))) where (`c`.`park` = 0);

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.total_profit_loss_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `total_profit_loss_view` AS select `p1`.`id` AS `id`,`p1`.`pay_amount` AS `income`,cast(`p1`.`actual_amount` as decimal(10,2)) AS `final_income`,`p1`.`date` AS `date`,`e1`.`expense_amount` AS `expense`,`e1`.`date` AS `e_date`,cast((case when ((`p1`.`actual_amount` is not null) and (`e1`.`expense_amount` is not null)) then (`p1`.`actual_amount` - `e1`.`expense_amount`) when ((`p1`.`actual_amount` is not null) and (`e1`.`expense_amount` is null)) then `p1`.`actual_amount` when ((`p1`.`actual_amount` is null) and (`e1`.`expense_amount` is not null)) then -(`e1`.`expense_amount`) else 0 end) as decimal(10,2)) AS `total`,(case when ((`p1`.`actual_amount` is not null) and (`e1`.`expense_amount` is not null)) then (case when ((`p1`.`actual_amount` - `e1`.`expense_amount`) > 0) then 'Profit' when ((`p1`.`actual_amount` - `e1`.`expense_amount`) < 0) then 'Loss' else 'No Profit No Loss' end) when ((`p1`.`actual_amount` is not null) and (`e1`.`expense_amount` is null)) then 'Profit' when ((`p1`.`pay_amount` is null) and (`e1`.`expense_amount` is not null)) then 'Loss' else 'No Profit No Loss' end) AS `profit_Loss`,`p1`.`park` AS `park` from ((select `p`.`id` AS `id`,sum(`p`.`actual_amount`) AS `pay_amount`,sum((case when ((`b1`.`type` = 'COCO') and (`p`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'Points')) then `p`.`actual_amount` when ((`b1`.`type` = 'Franchisee') or ((`b1`.`type` = 'OM_Franchisee') and (`p`.`pay_mode_text` <> 'Points'))) then (case when ((select `invoice_payment_view`.`category` from `invoice_payment_view` where (`invoice_payment_view`.`id` = `p`.`id`)) = 'Right Brain Education') then ((`p`.`actual_amount` * (select `branch`.`royalty` from `branch` where (`branch`.`id` = `b1`.`id`))) / 100) when ((select `invoice_payment_view`.`category` from `invoice_payment_view` where (`invoice_payment_view`.`id` = `p`.`id`)) = 'Offline Right Brain Development') then ((`p`.`actual_amount` * (select `branch`.`offline_royalty` from `branch` where (`branch`.`id` = `b1`.`id`))) / 100) else `p`.`actual_amount` end) else 0 end)) AS `actual_amount`,`p`.`date` AS `date`,`p`.`park` AS `park` from (`payment` `p` left join `branch` `b1` on((`p`.`bid` = `b1`.`id`))) where ((`p`.`park` = 0) and (`b1`.`type` <> 'TEMP') and (`b1`.`type` <> 'OI_Franchisee')) group by `p`.`date`) `p1` left join (select sum(`e`.`amount`) AS `expense_amount`,`e`.`date` AS `date` from `expense` `e` where (`e`.`park` = 0) group by `e`.`date`) `e1` on((`p1`.`date` = `e1`.`date`))) order by `p1`.`date` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.tr_passbook_daily_log
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `tr_passbook_daily_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `bank_account_id` int NOT NULL,
  `ledger_date` date NOT NULL,
  `opening_balance` decimal(14,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `total_credit` decimal(14,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `total_debit` decimal(14,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `closing_balance` decimal(14,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `entry_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `sync_run_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_bank_ledger_date` (`bank_account_id`,`ledger_date`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=4 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.tr_passbook_entry
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `tr_passbook_entry` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `bank_account_id` int NOT NULL,
  `entry_date` date NOT NULL,
  `entry_datetime` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `direction` varchar(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'credit',
  `transaction_id` varchar(150) DEFAULT NULL,
  `narration` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `credit_amount` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `debit_amount` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `running_balance` decimal(14,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `source_type` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `source_row_id` int NOT NULL,
  `source_ref_id` varchar(150) DEFAULT NULL,
  `invoice_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `invoice_payment_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `gateway_name` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  `payout_ref_id` varchar(150) DEFAULT NULL,
  `bid` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `branch_name` varchar(150) DEFAULT NULL,
  `raw_payload` longtext,
  `sync_run_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_source_row` (`source_type`,`source_row_id`),
  KEY `idx_bank_entry_date` (`bank_account_id`,`entry_date`),
  KEY `idx_transaction_id` (`transaction_id`),
  KEY `idx_payout_ref_id` (`payout_ref_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=4 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;

  `affected_bank_account_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `rebuilt_daily_log_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `rebuilt_entry_balance_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',

  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',

  `que2` varchar(11) NOT NULL COMMENT 'rating question  2',

  `que4` varchar(11) NOT NULL,
  `que5` varchar(11) NOT NULL,
  `que6` varchar(11) NOT NULL,
  `que7` varchar(11) NOT NULL,
  `que8` varchar(11) NOT NULL,
  `que9` varchar(11) NOT NULL,
  `que10` varchar(11) NOT NULL,
  `park` int DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `created_by` varchar(150) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=660 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.trainee_form_feedback_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `trainee_form_feedback_view` AS select `tf`.`id` AS `id`,`tf`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`tf`.`batchsche_id` AS `batchsche_id`,(case when (`tf`.`training_no` > 0) then concat('Training',' ',`tf`.`training_no`) else 'Class Viewing' end) AS `title`,`tf`.`training_no` AS `training_no`,`ta`.`converted` AS `converted`,`tf`.`form_id` AS `form_id`,`tff`.`que1` AS `que1`,`tff`.`que2` AS `que2`,`tff`.`que3` AS `que3`,`tff`.`que4` AS `que4`,`tff`.`que5` AS `que5`,`tff`.`que6` AS `que6`,`tff`.`que7` AS `que7`,`tff`.`que8` AS `que8`,`tff`.`que9` AS `que9`,`tff`.`que10` AS `que10`,concat(sum((((((((((ifnull(`tff`.`que1`,0) + ifnull(`tff`.`que2`,0)) + ifnull(`tff`.`que3`,0)) + ifnull(`tff`.`que4`,0)) + ifnull(`tff`.`que5`,0)) + ifnull(`tff`.`que6`,0)) + ifnull(`tff`.`que7`,0)) + ifnull(`tff`.`que8`,0)) + ifnull(`tff`.`que9`,0)) + ifnull(`tff`.`que10`,0))),'/',sum((((((((((if((`tff`.`que1` <> ''),5,0) + if((`tff`.`que2` <> ''),5,0)) + if((`tff`.`que3` <> ''),5,0)) + if((`tff`.`que4` <> ''),5,0)) + if((`tff`.`que5` <> ''),5,0)) + if((`tff`.`que6` <> ''),5,0)) + if((`tff`.`que7` <> ''),5,0)) + if((`tff`.`que8` <> ''),5,0)) + if((`tff`.`que9` <> ''),5,0)) + if((`tff`.`que10` <> ''),5,0)))) AS `totalrating`,`tff`.`feedback_txt` AS `feedback_txt`,`tf`.`form_data` AS `form_data`,`tf`.`form_type` AS `form_type`,`tf`.`date_time` AS `date_time`,`tf`.`park` AS `park` from ((`trainee_form` `tf` left join `trainee_form_feedback` `tff` on(((`tf`.`id` = `tff`.`trainee_form_id`) and (`tff`.`park` = 0)))) left join `teacher_applicant` `ta` on((`ta`.`contact_id` = `tf`.`contact_id`))) where (`tf`.`park` = 0) group by `tf`.`id`;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.trainee_training_time_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `trainee_training_time_view` AS select `ttt`.`id` AS `id`,`ttt`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`ta`.`fname` AS `fname`,`ta`.`lname` AS `lname`,`ta`.`email` AS `email`,(case when (`ttt`.`m_emp_id` = '') then 'One on One Training' else 'Mock Test' end) AS `type`,dayname(`ttt`.`date`) AS `day`,`ttt`.`date` AS `date`,`ttt`.`start_time` AS `start_time`,`ttt`.`end_time` AS `end_time`,`ttt`.`trainer_emp_id` AS `trainer_emp_id`,`ttt`.`m_emp_id` AS `m_emp_id`,`ttt`.`mode` AS `mode`,`ttt`.`group_id` AS `group_id`,`ttt`.`trainer_emp_id` AS `employee_id`,`ta`.`bid` AS `bid`,`zu`.`email_id` AS `zoom_email_id`,`zu`.`zoom_id` AS `zoom_id`,`ta`.`assistant` AS `assistant`,(case when ((`zr`.`drive_file_id` is null) or (`zr`.`drive_file_id` = '')) then `zr`.`s3_key` else `zr`.`drive_file_id` end) AS `drive_file_id`,`zr`.`meeting_id` AS `meeting_id`,`ttt`.`park` AS `park`,`ttt`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`ttt`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`ttt`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from (((((`trainee_training_time` `ttt` join `teacher_applicant_view` `ta` on(((`ttt`.`contact_id` = `ta`.`contact_id`) and (`ta`.`park` = 0)))) left join `employee_bid` `eb` on(((`eb`.`employee_id` = `ttt`.`trainer_emp_id`) and (`eb`.`bid` = `ta`.`bid`)))) left join `zoom_user` `zu` on((`zu`.`id` = `eb`.`zoom_user_id`))) left join `session_log_tt` `slt` on((`slt`.`training_id` = `ttt`.`id`))) left join (select `zr`.`id` AS `id`,`zr`.`meeting_id` AS `meeting_id`,`zr`.`topic` AS `topic`,`zr`.`drive_file_id` AS `drive_file_id`,`zr`.`s3_key` AS `s3_key`,`zr`.`date` AS `date`,`zr`.`park` AS `park` from `zoom_recording` `zr` where `zr`.`id` in (select max(`zr_inner`.`id`) from `zoom_recording` `zr_inner` where (`zr_inner`.`park` = 0) group by `zr_inner`.`meeting_id`)) `zr` on((`zr`.`meeting_id` = `slt`.`meeting_id`)));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.trainee_training_time_view_optimised
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `trainee_training_time_view_optimised` AS select `ttt`.`id` AS `id`,`ttt`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,(case when (`ttt`.`m_emp_id` = '') then 'One on One Training' else 'Mock Test' end) AS `type`,dayname(`ttt`.`date`) AS `day`,`ttt`.`date` AS `date`,`ttt`.`start_time` AS `start_time`,`ttt`.`end_time` AS `end_time`,`ttt`.`trainer_emp_id` AS `trainer_emp_id`,`ttt`.`m_emp_id` AS `m_emp_id`,`ttt`.`mode` AS `mode`,`ttt`.`group_id` AS `group_id`,`ttt`.`trainer_emp_id` AS `employee_id`,`ta`.`bid` AS `bid`,`zu`.`email_id` AS `zoom_email_id`,`zu`.`zoom_id` AS `zoom_id`,`ta`.`assistant` AS `assistant`,(case when ((`zr`.`drive_file_id` is null) or (`zr`.`drive_file_id` = '')) then `zr`.`s3_key` else `zr`.`drive_file_id` end) AS `drive_file_id`,`zr`.`meeting_id` AS `meeting_id`,`ttt`.`park` AS `park`,`ttt`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`ttt`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`ttt`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from ((((((`trainee_training_time` `ttt` join `teacher_applicant` `ta` on(((`ttt`.`contact_id` = `ta`.`contact_id`) and (`ta`.`park` = 0)))) left join `employee_bid` `eb` on(((`eb`.`employee_id` = `ttt`.`trainer_emp_id`) and (`eb`.`bid` = `ta`.`bid`)))) left join `zoom_user` `zu` on((`zu`.`id` = `eb`.`zoom_user_id`))) left join `session_log_tt` `slt` on((`slt`.`training_id` = `ttt`.`id`))) left join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `ta`.`contact_id`))) left join (select `zr`.`id` AS `id`,`zr`.`meeting_id` AS `meeting_id`,`zr`.`topic` AS `topic`,`zr`.`drive_file_id` AS `drive_file_id`,`zr`.`s3_key` AS `s3_key`,`zr`.`date` AS `date`,`zr`.`park` AS `park` from `zoom_recording` `zr` where `zr`.`id` in (select max(`zr_inner`.`id`) from `zoom_recording` `zr_inner` where (`zr_inner`.`park` = 0) group by `zr_inner`.`meeting_id`)) `zr` on((`zr`.`meeting_id` = `slt`.`meeting_id`))) where (`ttt`.`park` = 0);

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.transaction_credit
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `transaction_credit` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `voucher_date` date NOT NULL DEFAULT '1000-01-01',
  `voucher_type_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '1-Sales Invoice, 2-Purchase Bill, 3-Journal Entry, 4-Expense Voucher, 5-Asset Purchase Bill',
  `voucher_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `date` varchar(250) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `type_id` varchar(150) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `pay_mode` varchar(150) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `currency` varchar(150) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `reason` varchar(250) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `relation_id` varchar(250) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `credit_org_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `credit` varchar(300) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `amount` decimal(11,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `sgst` decimal(11,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `cgst` decimal(11,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `igst` decimal(11,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `total_amount` double(11,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `type_head_code` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `type_head1_code` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `type_head2_code` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `type_head3_code` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `debit_transaction_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bank_transaction_id` varchar(300) NOT NULL,
  `deleted` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=6034 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.transaction_debit
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `transaction_debit` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `voucher_date` date NOT NULL DEFAULT '1000-01-01',
  `voucher_type_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '1-Sales Invoice, 2-Purchase Bill, 3-Journal Entry, 4-Expense Voucher, 5-Asset Purchase Bill',
  `voucher_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `date` varchar(250) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `type_id` varchar(150) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `pay_mode` varchar(150) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `currency` varchar(150) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `reason` varchar(250) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `relation_id` varchar(250) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `debit_org_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `debit` varchar(300) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `amount` decimal(11,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `sgst` decimal(11,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `cgst` decimal(11,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `igst` decimal(11,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `total_amount` double(11,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `type_head_code` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `type_head1_code` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `type_head2_code` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `type_head3_code` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bank_transaction_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `deleted` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=6034 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.transactions
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `transactions` AS select `transactions`.`transaction_id` AS `id`,`transactions`.`transaction_id` AS `transaction_id`,`transactions`.`ledger_code` AS `ledger_code`,`transactions`.`voucher_date` AS `voucher_date`,`transactions`.`voucher_type_id` AS `voucher_type_id`,`transactions`.`voucher_id` AS `voucher_id`,`transactions`.`date` AS `date`,`transactions`.`type_id` AS `type_id`,`transactions`.`type` AS `type`,`transactions`.`pay_mode` AS `pay_mode`,`transactions`.`pay_mode_string` AS `pay_mode_string`,`transactions`.`currency` AS `currency`,`transactions`.`reason` AS `reason`,`transactions`.`relation_id` AS `relation_id`,`transactions`.`name` AS `name`,`transactions`.`debit_org_id` AS `debit_org_id`,`transactions`.`debit` AS `debit`,`transactions`.`credit` AS `credit`,`transactions`.`amount` AS `amount`,`transactions`.`sgst` AS `sgst`,`transactions`.`cgst` AS `cgst`,`transactions`.`igst` AS `igst`,`transactions`.`total_amount` AS `total_amount`,`transactions`.`type_head_code` AS `type_head_code`,`transactions`.`type_head1_code` AS `type_head1_code`,`transactions`.`type_head2_code` AS `type_head2_code`,`transactions`.`type_head3_code` AS `type_head3_code`,`transactions`.`bank_transaction_id` AS `bank_transaction_id`,`transactions`.`transaction_type` AS `transaction_type`,`transactions`.`deleted` AS `deleted`,`transactions`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`transactions`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`transactions`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`transactions`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from (select `transaction_debit`.`id` AS `transaction_id`,`transaction_debit`.`type_head3_code` AS `ledger_code`,`transaction_debit`.`voucher_date` AS `voucher_date`,`transaction_debit`.`voucher_type_id` AS `voucher_type_id`,`transaction_debit`.`voucher_id` AS `voucher_id`,`transaction_debit`.`date` AS `date`,`transaction_debit`.`type_id` AS `type_id`,`pf_central`.`expense_category`.`category` AS `type`,`transaction_debit`.`pay_mode` AS `pay_mode`,`pf_central`.`pay_mode`.`mode` AS `pay_mode_string`,`transaction_debit`.`currency` AS `currency`,`transaction_debit`.`reason` AS `reason`,`transaction_debit`.`relation_id` AS `relation_id`,(case when (`transaction_debit`.`type_id` = '30') then `branch_owner_master`.`owner_name` when (`transaction_debit`.`type_id` = '9') then `venue`.`venue` else concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`mname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`) end) AS `name`,`transaction_debit`.`debit_org_id` AS `debit_org_id`,`transaction_debit`.`debit` AS `debit`,'' AS `credit`,`transaction_debit`.`amount` AS `amount`,`transaction_debit`.`sgst` AS `sgst`,`transaction_debit`.`cgst` AS `cgst`,`transaction_debit`.`igst` AS `igst`,`transaction_debit`.`total_amount` AS `total_amount`,`transaction_debit`.`type_head_code` AS `type_head_code`,`transaction_debit`.`type_head1_code` AS `type_head1_code`,`transaction_debit`.`type_head2_code` AS `type_head2_code`,`transaction_debit`.`type_head3_code` AS `type_head3_code`,`transaction_debit`.`bank_transaction_id` AS `bank_transaction_id`,'1' AS `transaction_type`,`transaction_debit`.`deleted` AS `deleted`,`transaction_debit`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`transaction_debit`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`transaction_debit`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`transaction_debit`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from (((((`transaction_debit` left join `contact` on(((`transaction_debit`.`relation_id` = `contact`.`id`) and ((`transaction_debit`.`type_id` = '28') or (`transaction_debit`.`type_id` = '16'))))) left join `branch_owner_master` on(((`transaction_debit`.`relation_id` = `branch_owner_master`.`id`) and (`transaction_debit`.`type_id` = '30')))) left join `venue` on(((`transaction_debit`.`relation_id` = `venue`.`id`) and (`transaction_debit`.`type_id` = '9')))) left join `pf_central`.`expense_category` on((`transaction_debit`.`type_id` = `pf_central`.`expense_category`.`id`))) left join `pf_central`.`pay_mode` on((`transaction_debit`.`type_id` = `pf_central`.`pay_mode`.`id`))) where (`transaction_debit`.`deleted` = 0) union all select `transaction_credit`.`debit_transaction_id` AS `transaction_id`,`transaction_credit`.`type_head3_code` AS `ledger_code`,`transaction_credit`.`voucher_date` AS `voucher_date`,`transaction_credit`.`voucher_type_id` AS `voucher_type_id`,`transaction_credit`.`voucher_id` AS `voucher_id`,`transaction_credit`.`date` AS `date`,`transaction_credit`.`type_id` AS `type_id`,`pf_central`.`expense_category`.`category` AS `type`,`transaction_credit`.`pay_mode` AS `pay_mode`,`pf_central`.`pay_mode`.`mode` AS `pay_mode_string`,`transaction_credit`.`currency` AS `currency`,`transaction_credit`.`reason` AS `reason`,`transaction_credit`.`relation_id` AS `relation_id`,(case when (`transaction_credit`.`type_id` = '30') then `branch_owner_master`.`owner_name` when (`transaction_credit`.`type_id` = '9') then `venue`.`venue` else concat(`contact`.`fname`,' ',`contact`.`mname`,' ',`contact`.`lname`) end) AS `name`,`transaction_credit`.`credit_org_id` AS `credit_org_id`,'' AS `debit`,`transaction_credit`.`credit` AS `credit`,`transaction_credit`.`amount` AS `amount`,`transaction_credit`.`sgst` AS `sgst`,`transaction_credit`.`cgst` AS `cgst`,`transaction_credit`.`igst` AS `igst`,`transaction_credit`.`total_amount` AS `total_amount`,`transaction_credit`.`type_head_code` AS `type_head_code`,`transaction_credit`.`type_head1_code` AS `type_head1_code`,`transaction_credit`.`type_head2_code` AS `type_head2_code`,`transaction_credit`.`type_head3_code` AS `type_head3_code`,`transaction_credit`.`bank_transaction_id` AS `bank_transaction_id`,'0' AS `transaction_type`,`transaction_credit`.`deleted` AS `deleted`,`transaction_credit`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`transaction_credit`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`transaction_credit`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`transaction_credit`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from (((((`transaction_credit` left join `contact` on(((`transaction_credit`.`relation_id` = `contact`.`id`) and ((`transaction_credit`.`type_id` = '28') or (`transaction_credit`.`type_id` = '16'))))) left join `branch_owner_master` on(((`transaction_credit`.`relation_id` = `branch_owner_master`.`id`) and (`transaction_credit`.`type_id` = '30')))) left join `venue` on(((`transaction_credit`.`relation_id` = `venue`.`id`) and (`transaction_credit`.`type_id` = '9')))) left join `pf_central`.`expense_category` on((`transaction_credit`.`type_id` = `pf_central`.`expense_category`.`id`))) left join `pf_central`.`pay_mode` on((`transaction_credit`.`type_id` = `pf_central`.`pay_mode`.`id`))) where (`transaction_credit`.`deleted` = 0)) `transactions` order by `transactions`.`transaction_id`;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `tt_followup` (
  `id` int NOT NULL,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `type` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Follow Up Type (0-Visit, 1-Call, 2-SMS, 3-Email)',
  `comment` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Narration',
  `followup` datetime NOT NULL COMMENT 'When followup is done',
  `reminder` datetime NOT NULL COMMENT 'When followup should be done',
  `master` int NOT NULL COMMENT ' Follow Up master type (0-Inquiry, 1-Balance, 2-Expiry, 3-Attendance,4-Birthday,5-Free Trial)',
  `master_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Follow Up Master Id (inquiry_id / payment_id / order_item_id / attendance_id)',
  `status` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Status (0-Lead, 1-Prospect, 2-Pending, 3-Closed, 4-Trash, 5-Reopen, 6-Dropout)',
  `interest` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-Warm, 1-Hot, 2-Cold, 3-Dead',
  `interest_string` varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `sub_interest_string` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `heard_from` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `preferences` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `slot` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `area` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `city` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `venue_id` int NOT NULL,
  `pincode` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `call_rec` text NOT NULL,
  `call_duration` varchar(250) NOT NULL,
  `unfollow` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-No, 1-Yes',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.upcoming_birthdays_report
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`loclhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `upcoming_birthdays_report` AS select distinct `batch_member_view`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,'1' AS `id`,`batch_member_view`.`code` AS `code`,concat(`batch_member_view`.`code`,' - ',`batch_member_view`.`fullname`) AS `fullname`,`batch_member_view`.`fullname` AS `name`,`batch_member_view`.`dob_string` AS `date_string`,`batch_member_view`.`image` AS `image`,`batch_member_view`.`batch_emp_contact_id` AS `batch_emp_contact_id`,floor(((to_days(cast(now() as date)) - to_days(`batch_member_view`.`dob`)) / 365.25)) AS `age_now`,floor(((to_days((cast(now() as date) + interval 30 day)) - to_days(`batch_member_view`.`dob`)) / 365.25)) AS `age_future`,`batch_member_view`.`park` AS `park`,`batch_member_view`.`bid` AS `bid` from `batch_member_view` where ((1 = (floor(((to_days((cast(now() as date) + interval 30 day)) - to_days(`batch_member_view`.`dob`)) / 365.25)) - floor(((to_days(cast(now() as date)) - to_days(`batch_member_view`.`dob`)) / 365.25)))) and (`batch_member_view`.`park` = '0')) order by month(`batch_member_view`.`dob`),dayofmonth(`batch_member_view`.`dob`);

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.vendor_list_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `vendor_list_view` AS select `v`.`id` AS `id`,`v`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`c`.`contact_group_id` AS `contact_group_id`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`mname` AS `mname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `fullname`,`c`.`address` AS `address`,`c`.`email` AS `email`,`c`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`c`.`city` AS `city`,`c`.`country_code` AS `cc`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`c`.`country_code_2` AS `cc2`,`c`.`mobile2` AS `mobile2`,`v`.`company_name` AS `company_name`,`v`.`display_name` AS `display_name`,`v`.`gst_treatment_id` AS `gst_treatment_id`,`v`.`place_of_supply_id` AS `place_of_supply_id`,`v`.`currency` AS `currency_id`,`v`.`payment_term` AS `payment_term_id`,`v`.`tds` AS `tds_id`,`v`.`gst_no` AS `gst_no`,`v`.`cin_no` AS `cin_no`,`gst`.`type` AS `type`,`s`.`state_name` AS `state_name`,`cur`.`code` AS `currency`,`v`.`opening_balance` AS `opening_balance`,`pt`.`name` AS `payment_terms`,`tds`.`percentage` AS `percentage`,`v`.`designation` AS `designation`,`v`.`department` AS `department`,`v`.`website` AS `website`,`v`.`contact_person_fname` AS `contact_person_fname`,`v`.`contact_person_lname` AS `contact_person_lname`,`v`.`contact_person_cc` AS `contact_person_cc`,`v`.`contact_person_mobile` AS `contact_person_mobile`,`v`.`contact_person_email` AS `contact_person_email`,`v`.`comment` AS `comment`,`v`.`park` AS `park` from ((((((`vendor` `v` left join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `v`.`contact_id`))) left join `gst_treatment` `gst` on((`gst`.`id` = `v`.`gst_treatment_id`))) left join `payment_terms` `pt` on((`pt`.`id` = `v`.`payment_term`))) left join `india_states` `s` on((`s`.`id` = `v`.`place_of_supply_id`))) left join `currency` `cur` on((`cur`.`id` = `v`.`currency`))) left join `tax_deduction_source` `tds` on((`tds`.`id` = `v`.`tds`)));

  `demo_information` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',

  `paid_demo` varchar(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',

  `venue_logo` varchar(50) NOT NULL,

  `signatory_name` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Signature of Authorized Signatory Name',
  `activity` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Highlights of the activity run by the 1st party',

  `show_on_website` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - no, 1 - yes',
  `status` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-active , 1-inactive',
  `currency` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `accounts` int NOT NULL,
  `category_flag` int NOT NULL COMMENT '1 - online , 0 - offline',
  `venue_seats_available_in_batches` int NOT NULL,
  `seats_enrolled` int NOT NULL,
  `seats_limit` int NOT NULL,
  `royalty` int NOT NULL,
  `include_gst` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `is_summercamp` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `apply_tds` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `double_tick` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_by` varchar(20) NOT NULL,

`show_on_website`,`v`.`capacity` AS `capacity`,`v`.`status` AS `status`,`v`.`venue_seats_available_in_batches` AS `venue_seats_available_in_batches`,`v`.`seats_limit` AS `seats_limit`,`v`.`seats_enrolled` AS `seats_enrolled`,`v`.`include_gst` AS `include_gst`,`v`.`is_summercamp` AS `is_summercamp`,`v`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`v`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`v`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`v`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from ((((`venue_bid` `vb` join `venue` `v` on((`v`.`id` = `vb`.`venue_id`))) join `branch` `b` on((`vb`.`bid` = `b`.`id`))) left join `zone_master` `zm` on((`v`.`zone` = `zm`.`id`))) left join `timezones` `tz` on((`tz`.`id` = `v`.`timezone_id`)));

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.venue_mou

CREATE TABLE `venue_mou` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `venue` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `display_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `zone` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `mobile` varchar(15) NOT NULL,
  `address` text NOT NULL,
  `owner_name_id` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `contact_person` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `short_address` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `addr_for_post` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `storage_space` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `timing` varchar(225) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `city` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `commercial` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `comment` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `open_hours` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `title` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `slug` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `legal_binding` longtext NOT NULL,
  `signatory_name` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Signature of Authorized Signatory Name',
  `venueApprove` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `discussed_with` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `title_discussed_with` varchar(225) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `discussed_from` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `latitude` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `longitude` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `issue_date` date NOT NULL,
  `country` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `currency` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `timezone_id` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `address_link` varchar(500) DEFAULT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `activity` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Highlights of the activity run by the 1st party',
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `modified_by` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=59 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.venue_package_amt_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `venue_package_amt_view` AS select row_number() OVER (ORDER BY `v`.`id` )  AS `id`,`v`.`id` AS `venue_id`,group_concat(distinct `v`.`venue` separator ',') AS `venue`,group_concat(distinct `v`.`address` separator ',') AS `address`,max((case when (`s`.`duration` = 3) then concat(`s`.`duration`,' ',`s`.`duration_type`) end)) AS `full_duration_1`,max((case when (`s`.`duration` = 3) then `s`.`amount` end)) AS `amount_1`,max((case when (`s`.`duration` = 3) then `s`.`total` end)) AS `Total_1`,max((case when (`s`.`duration` = 3) then `s`.`hpd_discount_total` end)) AS `hpd_discount_total_1`,max((case when (`s`.`duration` = 6) then concat(`s`.`duration`,' ',`s`.`duration_type`) end)) AS `full_duration_2`,max((case when (`s`.`duration` = 6) then `s`.`amount` end)) AS `amount_2`,max((case when (`s`.`duration` = 6) then `s`.`total` end)) AS `Total_2`,max((case when (`s`.`duration` = 6) then `s`.`hpd_discount_total` end)) AS `hpd_discount_total_2`,max((case when (`s`.`duration` in (12,1)) then concat(`s`.`duration`,' ',`s`.`duration_type`) end)) AS `full_duration_3`,max((case when (`s`.`duration` in (12,1)) then `s`.`amount` end)) AS `amount_3`,max((case when (`s`.`duration` in (12,1)) then `s`.`total` end)) AS `Total_3`,max((case when (`s`.`duration` in (12,1)) then `s`.`hpd_discount_total` end)) AS `hpd_discount_total_3`,group_concat(distinct `b`.`branch_name_actual` separator ',') AS `branch_name_actual`,group_concat(distinct `b`.`branch` separator ',') AS `branch`,group_concat(distinct `v`.`park` separator ',') AS `park` from (((`venue` `v` left join `venue_bid` `vb` on(((`v`.`id` = `vb`.`venue_id`) and (`vb`.`park` = '0')))) left join `branch` `b` on((`vb`.`bid` = `b`.`id`))) left join `service` `s` on(((`vb`.`bid` = `s`.`bid`) and (`s`.`park` = '0') and (`s`.`amount` <> '0') and (`s`.`festive_offer` <> '1') and (`s`.`show_website` <> '0')))) where ((`s`.`venues` like concat('%',`v`.`id`,'%')) and (`v`.`park` = '0')) group by `v`.`id`;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.venue_problem_current_month
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `venue_problem_current_month` AS select `v`.`venue_id` AS `id`,`v`.`venue` AS `center`,count(`b`.`id`) AS `no_of_classes`,`v`.`amount` AS `amount`,(`v`.`amount` * count(`b`.`id`)) AS `total_amount`,`v`.`bid` AS `bid`,`v`.`branch_name` AS `branch_name`,(case when (`b`.`id` is null) then 'Center is not assigned' else `b`.`id` end) AS `batch_id`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`a`.`date` AS `date`,`v`.`type` AS `type`,`v`.`park` AS `park` from ((`venue_branch_view` `v` left join `batch` `b` on(((`b`.`bid` = `v`.`bid`) and (`b`.`venue_id` = `v`.`venue_id`)))) left join (select `attendance`.`id` AS `id`,group_concat(`attendance`.`type` separator ',') AS `type_all`,length(group_concat(`attendance`.`type` separator ',')) AS `type_all_length`,`attendance`.`date` AS `date`,`attendance`.`in_time` AS `in_time`,`attendance`.`out_time` AS `out_time`,`attendance`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`attendance`.`code` AS `code`,`attendance`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`attendance`.`session_id` AS `session_id`,`attendance`.`new_batch_id` AS `new_batch_id`,`attendance`.`negative` AS `negative`,`attendance`.`session` AS `session`,`attendance`.`sessions_completed` AS `sessions_completed`,`attendance`.`user_id` AS `user_id`,`attendance`.`type` AS `type`,`attendance`.`status` AS `status`,`attendance`.`comment` AS `comment`,`attendance`.`attendance_count` AS `attendance_count`,`attendance`.`class_no` AS `class_no`,`attendance`.`park` AS `park`,`attendance`.`bid` AS `bid`,`attendance`.`source` AS `source`,`attendance`.`final_source` AS `final_source`,`attendance`.`row_color` AS `row_color`,`attendance`.`invalid` AS `invalid`,`attendance`.`pay_sal` AS `pay_sal`,`attendance`.`makeup` AS `makeup`,`attendance`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`attendance`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`attendance`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`attendance`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from `attendance` where ((`attendance`.`type` in ('E','M')) and (`attendance`.`park` = 0) and (`attendance`.`negative` = 0)) group by `attendance`.`date`,`attendance`.`batch_id` having (`type_all_length` > 1) order by `attendance`.`batch_id` desc) `a` on((`a`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) where ((`v`.`park` = 0) and (`v`.`type` = 'COCO') and (`v`.`bid_park` = 0) and (`b`.`offline` = 1) and (`a`.`status` = 1) and (`a`.`park` = 0) and (((0 <> month(`a`.`date`)) and (0 <> year(`a`.`date`))) in (((0 <> month((now() - interval 0 month))) and (year(`a`.`date`) = year((now() - interval 0 month)))),((0 <> month((now() - interval 1 month))) and (year(`a`.`date`) = year((now() - interval 0 month)))),((0 <> month((now() - interval 2 month))) and (year(`a`.`date`) = year((now() - interval 0 month)))),((0 <> month((now() - interval 3 month))) and (year(`a`.`date`) = year((now() - interval 0 month)))),((0 <> month((now() - interval 4 month))) and (year(`a`.`date`) = year((now() - interval 0 month)))),((0 <> month((now() - interval 5 month))) and (year(`a`.`date`) = year((now() - interval 0 month)))),((0 <> month((now() - interval 6 month))) and (year(`a`.`date`) = year((now() - interval 0 month))))))) group by `v`.`venue_id`,`v`.`bid`,((month(`a`.`date`) = month((now() - interval 0 month))) and (year(`a`.`date`) = year((now() - interval 0 month)))),((month(`a`.`date`) = month((now() - interval 1 month))) and (year(`a`.`date`) = year((now() - interval 0 month)))),((month(`a`.`date`) = month((now() - interval 2 month))) and (year(`a`.`date`) = year((now() - interval 0 month)))),((month(`a`.`date`) = month((now() - interval 3 month))) and (year(`a`.`date`) = year((now() - interval 0 month)))),((month(`a`.`date`) = month((now() - interval 4 month))) and (year(`a`.`date`) = year((now() - interval 0 month)))),((month(`a`.`date`) = month((now() - interval 5 month))) and (year(`a`.`date`) = year((now() - interval 0 month)))),((month(`a`.`date`) = month((now() - interval 6 month))) and (year(`a`.`date`) = year((now() - interval 0 month)))) order by `a`.`date` desc;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.venue_ratio_combine_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `venue_ratio_combine_view` AS select `v`.`id` AS `id`,`vi`.`id` AS `venue_ratio_invoice_log_id`,`vi`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `name`,`vi`.`item_id` AS `item_id`,`vi`.`date` AS `date`,`vi`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`vi`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`v`.`venue` AS `venue`,`v`.`zone` AS `venue_zone_id`,`zm`.`zone` AS `venue_zone`,`vi`.`bid` AS `bid`,`b`.`branch_name_actual` AS `branch_name_actual`,`b`.`branch` AS `branch`,`b`.`type` AS `branch_type`,`vi`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`ba`.`batch` AS `batch`,`vi`.`ratio` AS `ratio`,sum(`vi`.`total_amount`) AS `total_amount`,sum(((`vi`.`total_amount` * `vi`.`ratio`) / 100)) AS `total_pay_amount`,`vi`.`park` AS `park` from ((((((`venue_ratio_invoice_log` `vi` join `branch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `vi`.`bid`))) join `venue` `v` on((`v`.`id` = `vi`.`venue_id`))) join `batch` `ba` on((`ba`.`id` = `vi`.`batch_id`))) join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `vi`.`contact_id`))) join `invoice` `i` on(((`i`.`id` = `vi`.`invoice_id`) and (`i`.`park` = 0)))) left join `zone_master` `zm` on((`v`.`zone` = `zm`.`id`))) where (`vi`.`park` = 0) group by `v`.`id`;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.venue_ratio_invoice_log_view_table

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.venue_rent_attendace_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `venue_rent_attendace_view` AS select `v`.`venue_id` AS `id`,`v`.`venue` AS `center`,`v`.`venue_zone_id` AS `venue_zone_id`,`v`.`venue_zone` AS `venue_zone`,`v`.`rent_type` AS `rent_type`,`v`.`include_gst` AS `include_gst`,count(`b`.`id`) AS `no_of_classes`,`v`.`amount` AS `amount`,(case when (`v`.`rent_type` = 4) then `v`.`amount` else (`v`.`amount` * count(`b`.`id`)) end) AS `total_amount`,`v`.`bid` AS `bid`,`v`.`branch_name` AS `branch_name`,`v`.`type` AS `branch_type`,(case when (`b`.`id` is null) then 'Center is not assigned' else `b`.`id` end) AS `batch_id`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`a`.`date` AS `date`,`v`.`type` AS `type`,`v`.`park` AS `park`,concat(`c`.`fname`,' ',`c`.`mname`,' ',`c`.`lname`) AS `teacher_name` from ((((`venue_branch_view` `v` left join `batch` `b` on((`b`.`bid` = `v`.`bid`))) left join (select `attendance`.`id` AS `id`,group_concat(`attendance`.`type` separator ',') AS `type_all`,length(group_concat(`attendance`.`type` separator ',')) AS `type_all_length`,`attendance`.`date` AS `date`,`attendance`.`in_time` AS `in_time`,`attendance`.`out_time` AS `out_time`,`attendance`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`attendance`.`code` AS `code`,`attendance`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`attendance`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`attendance`.`session_id` AS `session_id`,`attendance`.`new_batch_id` AS `new_batch_id`,`attendance`.`negative` AS `negative`,`attendance`.`session` AS `session`,`attendance`.`sessions_completed` AS `sessions_completed`,`attendance`.`user_id` AS `user_id`,`attendance`.`type` AS `type`,`attendance`.`status` AS `status`,`attendance`.`comment` AS `comment`,`attendance`.`attendance_count` AS `attendance_count`,`attendance`.`class_no` AS `class_no`,`attendance`.`park` AS `park`,`attendance`.`bid` AS `bid`,`attendance`.`source` AS `source`,`attendance`.`final_source` AS `final_source`,`attendance`.`row_color` AS `row_color`,`attendance`.`invalid` AS `invalid`,`attendance`.`pay_sal` AS `pay_sal`,`attendance`.`makeup` AS `makeup`,`attendance`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`attendance`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`attendance`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`attendance`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from `attendance` where ((`attendance`.`type` in ('E','M')) and (`attendance`.`park` = 0) and (`attendance`.`negative` = 0)) group by `attendance`.`date`,`attendance`.`batch_id` having (`type_all_length` > 1) order by `attendance`.`batch_id` desc) `a` on(((`a`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`) and (`a`.`venue_id` = `v`.`venue_id`)))) left join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `a`.`contact_id`))) left join (select `session_log`.`id` AS `id`,`session_log`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`session_log`.`date` AS `date`,`session_log`.`bid` AS `bid` from `session_log` group by `session_log`.`batch_id`,`session_log`.`date`,`session_log`.`bid`) `sl` on(((`sl`.`bid` = `a`.`bid`) and (`a`.`batch_id` = `sl`.`batch_id`) and (`a`.`date` = `sl`.`date`)))) where ((`v`.`park` = 0) and (`v`.`bid_park` = 0) and (`b`.`offline` = 1) and (`a`.`status` = 1) and (`a`.`park` = 0) and (`sl`.`id` is null)) group by `v`.`venue_id`,`v`.`bid`,year(`a`.`date`),month(`a`.`date`) order by `a`.`date` desc;

',')) AS `type_all_length`,`attendance`.`date` AS `date`,`attendance`.`in_time` AS `in_time`,`attendance`.`out_time` AS `out_time`,`attendance`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`attendance`.`code` AS `status`,`attendance`.`comment` AS `comment`,`attendance`.`attendance_count` AS `attendance_count`,`attendance`.`class_no` AS `class_no`,`attendance`.`park` AS `park`,`attendance`.`bid` AS AS `modified_at` from `attendance` where ((`attendance`.`type` in ('E','M')) and (`attendance`.`park` = 0) and (`attendance`.`negative` = 0)) group by `attendance`.`date`,`attendance`.`batch_id` --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.venue_rent_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `venue_rent_view` AS select `v`.`venue_id` AS `id`,`v`.`venue` AS `center`,`v`.`venue_zone_id` AS `venue_zone_id`,`v`.`venue_zone` AS `venue_zone`,`v`.`rent_type` AS `rent_type`,count(`b`.`id`) AS `no_of_classes`,`v`.`amount` AS `amount`,(case when (`v`.`rent_type` = 4) then `v`.`amount` else (`v`.`amount` * count(`b`.`id`)) end) AS `total_amount`,`v`.`bid` AS `bid`,`v`.`branch_name` AS `branch_name`,`v`.`type` AS `branch_type`,(case when (`b`.`id` is null) then 'Center is not assigned' else `b`.`id` end) AS `batch_id`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`a`.`date` AS `date`,`v`.`type` AS `type`,`v`.`park` AS `park` from (((`venue_branch_view` `v` left join `batch` `b` on(((`b`.`bid` = `v`.`bid`) and (`b`.`venue_id` = `v`.`venue_id`)))) left join (select `attendance`.`id` AS `id`,group_concat(`attendance`.`type` separator ',') AS `type_all`,length(group_concat(`attendance`.`type` separator ',')) AS `type_all_length`,`attendance`.`date` AS `date`,`attendance`.`in_time` AS `in_time`,`attendance`.`out_time` AS `out_time`,`attendance`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`attendance`.`code` AS `code`,`attendance`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`attendance`.`session_id` AS `session_id`,`attendance`.`new_batch_id` AS `new_batch_id`,`attendance`.`negative` AS `negative`,`attendance`.`session` AS `session`,`attendance`.`sessions_completed` AS `sessions_completed`,`attendance`.`user_id` AS `user_id`,`attendance`.`type` AS `type`,`attendance`.`status` AS `status`,`attendance`.`comment` AS `comment`,`attendance`.`attendance_count` AS `attendance_count`,`attendance`.`class_no` AS `class_no`,`attendance`.`park` AS `park`,`attendance`.`bid` AS `bid`,`attendance`.`source` AS `source`,`attendance`.`final_source` AS `final_source`,`attendance`.`row_color` AS `row_color`,`attendance`.`invalid` AS `invalid`,`attendance`.`pay_sal` AS `pay_sal`,`attendance`.`makeup` AS `makeup`,`attendance`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`attendance`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`attendance`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`attendance`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from `attendance` where ((`attendance`.`type` in ('E','M')) and (`attendance`.`park` = 0) and (`attendance`.`negative` = 0)) group by `attendance`.`date`,`attendance`.`batch_id` having (`type_all_length` > 1) order by `attendance`.`batch_id` desc) `a` on((`a`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`))) left join (select `session_log`.`id` AS `id`,`session_log`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`session_log`.`date` AS `date`,`session_log`.`bid` AS `bid` from `session_log` group by `session_log`.`batch_id`,`session_log`.`date`,`session_log`.`bid`) `sl` on(((`sl`.`bid` = `a`.`bid`) and (`a`.`batch_id` = `sl`.`batch_id`) and (`a`.`date` = `sl`.`date`)))) where ((`v`.`park` = 0) and (`v`.`bid_park` = 0) and (`b`.`offline` = 1) and (`a`.`status` = 1) and (`a`.`park` = 0) and (`sl`.`id` is null)) group by `v`.`venue_id`,`v`.`bid`,year(`a`.`date`),month(`a`.`date`) order by `a`.`date` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.venue_rent_view_log_till_april_2023
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `venue_rent_view_log_till_april_2023` (
  `id` int NOT NULL,
  `center` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `venue_zone_id` int NOT NULL,
  `venue_zone` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  `rent_type` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-not set, 1-per hr, 2-ratio, 3-per day, 4 per month',
  `no_of_classes` bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `amount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `total_amount` bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `branch_name` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'name of branch',
  `branch_type` set('COCO','Franchisee','TEMP','OM_Franchisee','HQ','S_TEMP','OI_Franchisee') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'COCO',
  `batch_id` varchar(22) DEFAULT NULL,
  `batch` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'name of batch',
  `date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `type` set('COCO','Franchisee','TEMP','OM_Franchisee','HQ','S_TEMP','OI_Franchisee') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'COCO',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0'
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.venue_rent_view_temporary
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `venue_rent_view_temporary` AS select `attendance`.`id` AS `id`,concat(`ca`.`fname`,' ',`ca`.`mname`,' ',`ca`.`lname`) AS `teacher_name`,group_concat(`attendance`.`type` separator ',') AS `type_all`,length(group_concat(`attendance`.`type` separator ',')) AS `type_all_length`,`attendance`.`date` AS `date`,`attendance`.`in_time` AS `in_time`,`attendance`.`out_time` AS `out_time`,`attendance`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`attendance`.`code` AS `code`,`attendance`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`attendance`.`session_id` AS `session_id`,`attendance`.`new_batch_id` AS `new_batch_id`,`attendance`.`negative` AS `negative`,`attendance`.`session` AS `session`,`attendance`.`sessions_completed` AS `sessions_completed`,`attendance`.`user_id` AS `user_id`,`attendance`.`type` AS `type`,`attendance`.`status` AS `status`,`attendance`.`comment` AS `comment`,`attendance`.`attendance_count` AS `attendance_count`,`attendance`.`class_no` AS `class_no`,`attendance`.`park` AS `park`,`attendance`.`bid` AS `bid`,`attendance`.`source` AS `source`,`attendance`.`final_source` AS `final_source`,`attendance`.`row_color` AS `row_color`,`attendance`.`invalid` AS `invalid`,`attendance`.`pay_sal` AS `pay_sal`,`attendance`.`makeup` AS `makeup`,`attendance`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`attendance`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`attendance`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`attendance`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from ((`attendance` join `batch_employee` `be` on((`be`.`batch_id` = `attendance`.`batch_id`))) join `contact` `ca` on((`ca`.`id` = `be`.`contact_id`))) where ((`attendance`.`type` in ('E','M')) and (`attendance`.`park` = 0) and (`attendance`.`negative` = 0) and (`attendance`.`date` >= '2023-01-01') and `attendance`.`batch_id` in (select `batch`.`id` from `batch` where ((`batch`.`venue_id` = 4) and (`batch`.`park` = 0)))) group by `attendance`.`date`,`attendance`.`batch_id` having (`type_all_length` > 1) order by `attendance`.`batch_id` desc;
