VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.vw_batch_category_master
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `vw_batch_category_master` AS select `vw_lgr_batch_category_master`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`vw_lgr_batch_category_master`.`branch_id` AS `branch_id`,`vw_lgr_batch_category_master`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`vw_lgr_batch_category_master`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`vw_lgr_batch_category_master`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id` from `vw_lgr_batch_category_master`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.vw_lgr_attendance_item_resolved
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `vw_lgr_attendance_item_resolved` AS select `a`.`id` AS `attendance_id`,`a`.`type` AS `attendance_type`,`a`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`a`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`a`.`date` AS `attendance_date`,`a`.`item_id` AS `source_item_id`,(case when (`a`.`type` <> 'M') then NULL when (coalesce(`a`.`item_id`,0) > 0) then `a`.`item_id` else `nearest_item`.`item_id` end) AS `resolved_item_id`,(case when (`a`.`type` <> 'M') then 'not_applicable' when (coalesce(`a`.`item_id`,0) > 0) then 'attendance_item_id' when (`nearest_item`.`item_id` is not null) then 'invoice_window_nearest' else 'unresolved' end) AS `resolution_method`,(case when (`a`.`type` <> 'M') then 'none' when (coalesce(`a`.`item_id`,0) > 0) then 'high' when (`nearest_item`.`item_id` is not null) then 'medium' else 'none' end) AS `resolution_confidence` from (`attendance` `a` left join (select `ranked`.`attendance_id` AS `attendance_id`,`ranked`.`item_id` AS `item_id` from (select `a2`.`id` AS `attendance_id`,`iiv`.`item_id` AS `item_id`,row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY `a2`.`id` ORDER BY (case when (`iiv`.`batch_id` = `a2`.`batch_id`) then 0 else 1 end),abs((to_days(`a2`.`date`) - to_days(coalesce(`iiv`.`start_date`,`a2`.`date`)))),`iiv`.`start_date` desc,`iiv`.`item_id` desc )  AS `rn` from (`attendance` `a2` join `invoice_invoiceitem_view` `iiv` on(((`iiv`.`contact_id` = `a2`.`contact_id`) and (`iiv`.`park` = 0) and (`iiv`.`item_park` = 0) and (`iiv`.`start_date` <= `a2`.`date`) and (`iiv`.`end_date` >= `a2`.`date`)))) where ((`a2`.`park` = 0) and (`a2`.`type` = 'M') and (coalesce(`a2`.`item_id`,0) = 0))) `ranked` where (`ranked`.`rn` = 1)) `nearest_item` on((`nearest_item`.`attendance_id` = `a`.`id`))) where (`a`.`park` = 0);


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.vw_lgr_attendance_session_resolved
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `vw_lgr_attendance_session_resolved` AS select `a`.`id` AS `attendance_id`,`a`.`type` AS `attendance_type`,`a`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`a`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,coalesce(`a`.`bid`,`bcm`.`branch_id`) AS `branch_id`,`bcm`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`bcm`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,`a`.`date` AS `attendance_date`,`a`.`in_time` AS `in_time`,`a`.`out_time` AS `out_time`,`a`.`status` AS `status`,`a`.`negative` AS `negative`,`a`.`session_id` AS `source_session_id`,(case when (coalesce(`a`.`session_id`,0) > 0) then `a`.`session_id` else `nearest_session`.`session_id` end) AS `resolved_session_id`,(case when (coalesce(`a`.`session_id`,0) > 0) then 'attendance_session_id' when (`nearest_session`.`session_id` is not null) then 'batch_date_nearest_time' else 'unresolved' end) AS `resolution_method`,(case when (coalesce(`a`.`session_id`,0) > 0) then 'high' when (`nearest_session`.`session_id` is not null) then 'medium' else 'none' end) AS `resolution_confidence` from ((`attendance` `a` left join `vw_lgr_batch_category_master` `bcm` on((`bcm`.`batch_id` = `a`.`batch_id`))) left join (select `ranked`.`attendance_id` AS `attendance_id`,`ranked`.`session_id` AS `session_id` from (select `a2`.`id` AS `attendance_id`,`s`.`id` AS `session_id`,row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY `a2`.`id` ORDER BY abs(timestampdiff(SECOND,timestamp(`a2`.`date`,coalesce(nullif(`a2`.`in_time`,'00:00:00'),'00:00:00')),timestamp(`s`.`date`,coalesce(`s`.`start_time`,'00:00:00')))),`s`.`id` )  AS `rn` from (`attendance` `a2` join `session` `s` on(((`s`.`batch_id` = `a2`.`batch_id`) and (`s`.`date` = `a2`.`date`) and (coalesce(`s`.`park`,0) = 0)))) where ((`a2`.`park` = 0) and (coalesce(`a2`.`session_id`,0) = 0) and (`a2`.`batch_id` is not null) and (`a2`.`batch_id` <> 0))) `ranked` where (`ranked`.`rn` = 1)) `nearest_session` on((`nearest_session`.`attendance_id` = `a`.`id`))) where (`a`.`park` = 0);


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.vw_lgr_batch_category_master
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `vw_lgr_batch_category_master` AS select `b`.`id` AS `batch_id`,`b`.`bid` AS `branch_id`,`b`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`b`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`c`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id` from (`batch` `b` left join `category` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `b`.`category_id`)));

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.vw_lgr_teacher_delivery_events_from_attendance
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `vw_lgr_teacher_delivery_events_from_attendance` AS select `a`.`id` AS `attendance_id`,`a`.`session_id` AS `source_session_id`,`asr`.`resolved_session_id` AS `resolved_session_id`,`asr`.`resolution_method` AS `session_resolution_method`,`asr`.`resolution_confidence` AS `session_resolution_confidence`,`a`.`contact_id` AS `teacher_contact_id`,coalesce(`a`.`bid`,`bcm`.`branch_id`) AS `branch_id`,coalesce(`a`.`batch_id`,`bcm`.`batch_id`) AS `batch_id`,`bcm`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`bcm`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,`a`.`date` AS `delivery_date`,`a`.`in_time` AS `in_time`,`a`.`out_time` AS `out_time`,`a`.`status` AS `status`,`a`.`negative` AS `negative`,`a`.`pay_sal` AS `pay_sal`,`a`.`makeup` AS `makeup` from ((`attendance` `a` left join `vw_lgr_batch_category_master` `bcm` on((`bcm`.`batch_id` = `a`.`batch_id`))) left join `vw_lgr_attendance_session_resolved` `asr` on((`asr`.`attendance_id` = `a`.`id`))) where ((`a`.`park` = 0) and (`a`.`type` = 'E') and (`asr`.`resolved_session_id` is not null));

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.vw_teacher_delivery_events_from_attendance
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `vw_teacher_delivery_events_from_attendance` AS select `vw_lgr_teacher_delivery_events_from_attendance`.`attendance_id` AS `attendance_id`,`vw_lgr_teacher_delivery_events_from_attendance`.`source_session_id` AS `source_session_id`,`vw_lgr_teacher_delivery_events_from_attendance`.`resolved_session_id` AS `resolved_session_id`,`vw_lgr_teacher_delivery_events_from_attendance`.`session_resolution_method` AS `session_resolution_method`,`vw_lgr_teacher_delivery_events_from_attendance`.`session_resolution_confidence` AS `session_resolution_confidence`,`vw_lgr_teacher_delivery_events_from_attendance`.`teacher_contact_id` AS `teacher_contact_id`,`vw_lgr_teacher_delivery_events_from_attendance`.`branch_id` AS `branch_id`,`vw_lgr_teacher_delivery_events_from_attendance`.`batch_id` AS `batch_id`,`vw_lgr_teacher_delivery_events_from_attendance`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`vw_lgr_teacher_delivery_events_from_attendance`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,`vw_lgr_teacher_delivery_events_from_attendance`.`delivery_date` AS `delivery_date`,`vw_lgr_teacher_delivery_events_from_attendance`.`in_time` AS `in_time`,`vw_lgr_teacher_delivery_events_from_attendance`.`out_time` AS `out_time`,`vw_lgr_teacher_delivery_events_from_attendance`.`status` AS `status`,`vw_lgr_teacher_delivery_events_from_attendance`.`negative` AS `negative`,`vw_lgr_teacher_delivery_events_from_attendance`.`pay_sal` AS `pay_sal`,`vw_lgr_teacher_delivery_events_from_attendance`.`makeup` AS `makeup` from `vw_lgr_teacher_delivery_events_from_attendance`;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.waiting_list_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `waiting_list_view` AS select `f`.`id` AS `id`,`f`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`f`.`dob` AS `dob`,`b`.`type` AS `bid_type`,`f`.`type` AS `type`,`f`.`master` AS `master`,`f`.`status` AS `status`,`f`.`interest` AS `interest`,`f`.`interest_string` AS `interest_string`,`f`.`sub_interest_string` AS `sub_interest_string`,`f`.`lost_reason` AS `lost_reason`,`f`.`preferences` AS `preferences`,`f`.`recommended_batch` AS `recommended_batch`,`f`.`last_updated` AS `last_updated`,`f`.`slot` AS `slot`,`f`.`comment` AS `comment`,`f`.`city` AS `city`,`f`.`area` AS `area`,`f`.`venue` AS `venue`,`f`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`f`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`f`.`old_comment` AS `old_comment`,`f`.`old_comment_date` AS `old_comment_date`,`f`.`followup` AS `followup`,`f`.`employee` AS `employee`,`f`.`date` AS `date`,`f`.`reminder_string` AS `reminder_string`,`f`.`followup_string` AS `followup_string`,`f`.`reminder` AS `reminder`,`f`.`master_id` AS `master_id`,`f`.`unfollow` AS `unfollow`,`f`.`employee_id` AS `employee_id`,`f`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`f`.`park` AS `park`,`f`.`bid` AS `bid`,`f`.`fname` AS `fname`,`f`.`email` AS `email`,`f`.`lname` AS `lname`,`f`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`f`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`f`.`dob_string` AS `dob_string`,`f`.`age` AS `age`,`f`.`age_group` AS `age_group`,`f`.`fullname` AS `fullname`,`f`.`master_data` AS `master_data`,`pvt`.`fdate` AS `fdate`,`pvt`.`c_id` AS `c_id` from ((`latest_followup_table` `f` join (select max(`latest_followup_table`.`followup`) AS `fdate`,`latest_followup_table`.`contact_id` AS `c_id` from `latest_followup_table` group by `latest_followup_table`.`contact_id`) `pvt` on((`f`.`contact_id` = `pvt`.`c_id`))) left join `branch` `b` on((`f`.`bid` = `b`.`id`))) where (`f`.`followup` = `pvt`.`fdate`) group by `f`.`contact_id` order by `f`.`venue_id` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.waiting_list_view_table
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `waiting_list_view_table` (
  `id` int NOT NULL,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `dob` varchar(225) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `bid_type` varchar(225) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `type` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Follow Up Type (0-Visit, 1-Call, 2-SMS, 3-Email)',
  `master` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Follow Up master type (0-Inquiry, 1-Balance, 2-Expiry, 3-Attendance,4-Birthday,5-Free Trial)',
  `status` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Status (0-Lead, 1-Prospect, 2-Pending, 3-Closed, 4-Trash, 5-Reopen, 6-Dropout)',
  `interest` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-Warm, 1-Hot, 2-Cold, 3-Dead',
  `interest_string` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `sub_interest_string` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `preferences` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `recommended_batch` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `last_updated` date NOT NULL,
  `slot` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `comment` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Narration',
  `city` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `area` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `venue` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `venue_id` int NOT NULL,
  `pincode` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `old_comment` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Narration',
  `old_comment_date` datetime NOT NULL,
  `followup` datetime NOT NULL COMMENT 'When followup is done',
  `employee` varchar(61) NOT NULL,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `reminder_string` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `followup_string` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `reminder` datetime NOT NULL COMMENT 'When followup should be done',
  `master_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Follow Up Master Id (inquiry_id / payment_id / order_item_id / attendance_id)',
  `unfollow` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-No, 1-Yes',
  `employee_id` int NOT NULL,
  `parent_id` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL,
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `fname` varchar(30) NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `lname` int NOT NULL,
  `country_code` varchar(5) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '+91',
  `mobile` varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'primary mobile',
  `dob_string` varchar(38) NOT NULL,
  `age` varchar(45) NOT NULL,
  `age_group` varchar(8) NOT NULL,
  `fullname` varchar(112) NOT NULL,
  `master_data` varchar(9) NOT NULL,
  `fdate` datetime NOT NULL COMMENT 'When followup is done',
  `c_id` int NOT NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.warehouse_logged_data
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `warehouse_logged_data` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `venue_id` int NOT NULL,
  `is_folder` int NOT NULL,
  `is_ready` int NOT NULL,
  `barcode` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `checked` int NOT NULL,
  `not_found` int NOT NULL,
  `shelf_column` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `shelf_row` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `status` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-pending,1-scheduled /pending to prepare,2-ready,3-dispatched,4-repair/damaged',
  `checked_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `comment` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=144309 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.warehouse_logged_data_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `warehouse_logged_data_view` AS select `wld`.`id` AS `id`,`wld`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`wld`.`is_folder` AS `is_folder`,`wld`.`is_ready` AS `is_ready`,`wld`.`barcode` AS `code`,`wld`.`barcode` AS `barcode`,`wld`.`date` AS `date`,`wld`.`park` AS `park`,`wld`.`checked` AS `checked`,`wld`.`checked_at` AS `checked_at`,`wld`.`not_found` AS `not_found`,`wld`.`shelf_column` AS `shelf_column`,`wld`.`shelf_row` AS `shelf_row`,`wld`.`status` AS `status`,`iv`.`pdf_filename` AS `pdf_filename`,`iv`.`material_type` AS `material_type`,`iv`.`print_type` AS `print_type`,`iv`.`type` AS `print_type_string`,`wld`.`created_at` AS `logged_at`,`wld`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`wld`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`wld`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`,`wld`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`pv`.`folder_level` AS `folder_level`,`pv`.`venue` AS `venue`,`v`.`venue` AS `logged_venue`,(case when (`pv`.`venue` <> `v`.`venue`) then 'warning' when (`pv`.`venue` = NULL) then '' else '' end) AS `row_color` from (((`warehouse_logged_data` `wld` left join `products_level_view` `pv` on(((`wld`.`barcode` = `pv`.`barcode`) and (`wld`.`is_folder` = 1) and (`pv`.`park` = 0)))) left join `venue` `v` on((`wld`.`venue_id` = `v`.`id`))) left join `inventory_view` `iv` on(((`wld`.`barcode` = `iv`.`code`) and (`wld`.`is_folder` = 0)))) order by `wld`.`id` desc;

  `shelf_row` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `whole_folder` int NOT NULL,
  `is_ready_folder` int NOT NULL,
  `exist_count` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=7156 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

CREATE TABLE `warehouse_scheduled_log` (

  `venue_id` int NOT NULL,
  `is_folder` int NOT NULL,
  `barcode` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `checked` int NOT NULL,
  `lot_no` int NOT NULL,
  `shelf_column` varchar(500) NOT NULL,

  `whole_folder` int NOT NULL,
  `not_found` int NOT NULL,
  `checked_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `status` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0- available in WH, 1- scheduled for Lot, 2 - Ready and packed for Lot , 3 - Delivered to team, 4- Incomplete/damaged , 5 - Deleted',
  `park` int NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=116455 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.warehouse_scheduled_log_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `warehouse_scheduled_log_view` AS select `wsl`.`id` AS `id`,`wsl`.`warehouse_log_id` AS `warehouse_log_id`,`wsl`.`venue_id` AS `venue_id`,`wsl`.`is_folder` AS `is_folder`,`wsl`.`whole_folder` AS `whole_folder`,`wsl`.`barcode` AS `barcode`,`inv`.`pdf_filename` AS `pdf_filename`,`wsl`.`date` AS `date`,`wsl`.`checked` AS `checked`,`wsl`.`lot_no` AS `lot_no`,`wsl`.`shelf_column` AS `shelf_column`,`wsl`.`shelf_row` AS `shelf_row`,`wsl`.`not_found` AS `not_found`,`wsl`.`checked_at` AS `checked_at`,`wsl`.`status` AS `status`,`wsl`.`park` AS `park`,`wsl`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`wsl`.`created_by` AS `created_by`,`wsl`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`,`wsl`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at` from (((`warehouse_scheduled_log` `wsl` left join `products_level_view` `pv` on(((`wsl`.`barcode` = `pv`.`barcode`) and (`wsl`.`is_folder` = 1) and (`pv`.`park` = 0)))) left join `inventory` `inv` on((`wsl`.`barcode` = `inv`.`code`))) left join `inventory_view` `iv` on(((`wsl`.`barcode` = `iv`.`code`) and (`wsl`.`is_folder` = 0)))) where (0 <> 1);

BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.website_position
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `website_position` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,

  KEY `client_id` (`website_id`)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.workshift_days_break_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `workshift_days_break_view` AS select `w`.`id` AS `id`,`w`.`workshift` AS `workshift`,`w`.`first_last` AS `first_last`,`w`.`gracetime_early` AS `gracetime_early`,`w`.`gracetime_late` AS `gracetime_late`,`w`.`inactive` AS `inactive`,`w`.`bid` AS `bid`,`w`.`park` AS `park`,(select count(`workshift_break`.`id`) from `workshift_break` where (`workshift_break`.`workshift_id` = `w`.`id`)) AS `breaks`,(select count(`workshift_day`.`id`) from `workshift_day` where (`workshift_day`.`workshift_id` = `w`.`id`)) AS `days` from `workshift` `w`;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.zone_master_service_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `zone_master_service_view` AS select `zms`.`id` AS `id`,`zms`.`zone_master_id` AS `zone_master_id`,`zm`.`zone_abbr` AS `zone_abbr`,`cm`.`master_category` AS `master_category_name`,`zms`.`service_type` AS `service_type`,(case when (`zms`.`service_type` = 0) then 'Not Defined' when (`zms`.`service_type` = 1) then 'Standard' when (`zms`.`service_type` = 2) then 'Private at Premises' when (`zms`.`service_type` = 3) then 'Private at Home' when (`zms`.`service_type` = 4) then 'Infant' when (`zms`.`service_type` = 5) then 'International Online' when (`zms`.`service_type` = 6) then 'Myanmar' when (`zms`.`service_type` = 7) then 'Private International Online' else 'Unknown' end) AS `service_type_description`,`zms`.`master_service_id` AS `master_service_id`,`sm`.`master_service` AS `master_service_name`,`zms`.`duration_type` AS `duration_type`,concat(`zms`.`duration`,`zms`.`duration_type`) AS `durations`,`zms`.`duration` AS `duration`,`zms`.`sessions` AS `sessions`,`zms`.`batch` AS `batch`,`zms`.`makeup_turn` AS `makeup_turn`,`zm`.`master_category_id` AS `zone_master_category_id`,`zm`.`zone` AS `zone_name`,`zms`.`show_on_website` AS `show_on_website`,`zms`.`primary_currency` AS `primary_currency`,`zms`.`festive_offer` AS `festive_offer`,`zms`.`amount` AS `amount`,`zms`.`tax` AS `tax`,`zms`.`tax_type` AS `tax_type`,(case when ((`zms`.`tax_type` = 1) and (`zms`.`tax` = 6)) then 'GST - 6 % Inc' when ((`zms`.`tax_type` = 2) and (`zms`.`tax` = 6)) then 'GST - 6 % Exe' when ((`zms`.`tax_type` = 1) and (`zms`.`tax` = 18)) then 'GST - 18 % Inc' when ((`zms`.`tax_type` = 2) and (`zms`.`tax` = 18)) then 'GST - 18 % Exe' when (`zms`.`tax_type` = 0) then 'No Tax' else 'Unknown' end) AS `tax_description`,`zms`.`tax_amount` AS `tax_amount`,`zms`.`total` AS `total`,`zms`.`trial_discount` AS `trial_discount`,`zms`.`trial_discount_total` AS `trial_discount_total`,`zms`.`hpd_discount` AS `hpd_discount`,`zms`.`hpd_discount_total` AS `hpd_discount_total`,`zms`.`demo_discount` AS `demo_discount`,`zms`.`demo_discount_total` AS `demo_discount_total`,`zms`.`op_discount` AS `op_discount`,`zms`.`op_discount_total` AS `op_discount_total`,`zms`.`park` AS `park`,(case when (`zms`.`show_on_website` = 0) then 'No' when (`zms`.`show_on_website` = 1) then 'Yes' else 'No Defined' end) AS `show_on_website_des` from (((`zone_master_service` `zms` left join `service_master` `sm` on((`zms`.`master_service_id` = `sm`.`id`))) left join `zone_master` `zm` on((`zms`.`zone_master_id` = `zm`.`id`))) left join `category_master` `cm` on((`zm`.`master_category_id` = `cm`.`id`))) order by `zms`.`id` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.zone_master_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `zone_master_view` AS select `zm`.`id` AS `id`,`zm`.`zone` AS `zone`,`zm`.`zone_abbr` AS `zone_abbr`,`zm`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,`cm`.`master_category` AS `master_category_name`,group_concat(distinct `v`.`venue` order by `v`.`venue` ASC separator ', ') AS `venue_names`,group_concat(distinct `v`.`display_name` order by `v`.`venue` ASC separator ', ') AS `venue_display_name`,group_concat(distinct `v`.`id` order by `v`.`venue` ASC separator ', ') AS `venue_ids`,count(distinct `v`.`id`) AS `venue_count`,`zm`.`park` AS `park` from ((`zone_master` `zm` left join `category_master` `cm` on((`zm`.`master_category_id` = `cm`.`id`))) left join `venue` `v` on(((`zm`.`id` = `v`.`zone`) and (`v`.`park` = 0) and (`v`.`status` = 0)))) group by `zm`.`id`,`zm`.`zone`,`zm`.`zone_abbr`,`zm`.`master_category_id`,`cm`.`master_category`;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.zone_services_excel_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `zone_services_excel_view` AS select `service_category_view`.`id` AS `id`,`service_category_view`.`service` AS `service`,`service_category_view`.`zone_id` AS `zone_id`,`service_category_view`.`total_duration` AS `total_duration`,`service_category_view`.`currency` AS `currency`,`service_category_view`.`symbol` AS `symbol`,`service_category_view`.`amount` AS `amount`,`service_category_view`.`tax` AS `tax`,`service_category_view`.`tax_type` AS `tax_type`,`service_category_view`.`tax_amount` AS `tax_amount`,`service_category_view`.`total` AS `total`,(case when (`service_category_view`.`demo_discount` = 0) then (case when (`service_category_view`.`hpd_discount` = 0) then `service_category_view`.`total` else `service_category_view`.`hpd_discount_total` end) else `service_category_view`.`demo_discount_total` end) AS `demo_discount_total_in_cash`,(case when (`service_category_view`.`online_paylink_discount` = 0) then (case when (`service_category_view`.`demo_discount` = 0) then (case when (`service_category_view`.`hpd_discount` = 0) then `service_category_view`.`total` else `service_category_view`.`hpd_discount_total` end) else `service_category_view`.`demo_discount_total` end) else ((case when (`service_category_view`.`demo_discount` = 0) then (case when (`service_category_view`.`hpd_discount` = 0) then `service_category_view`.`total` else `service_category_view`.`hpd_discount_total` end) else `service_category_view`.`demo_discount_total` end) - `service_category_view`.`online_paylink_discount_amount`) end) AS `demo_discount_total_online`,(case when (`service_category_view`.`hpd_discount` = 0) then `service_category_view`.`total` else `service_category_view`.`hpd_discount_total` end) AS `hpd_discount_total_in_cash`,(case when (`service_category_view`.`online_paylink_discount` = 0) then (case when (`service_category_view`.`hpd_discount` = 0) then `service_category_view`.`total` else `service_category_view`.`hpd_discount_total` end) else ((case when (`service_category_view`.`hpd_discount` = 0) then `service_category_view`.`total` else `service_category_view`.`hpd_discount_total` end) - `service_category_view`.`online_paylink_discount_amount`) end) AS `hpd_discount_total_online`,`service_category_view`.`sessions` AS `sessions`,`service_category_view`.`park` AS `park`,`service_category_view`.`bid` AS `bid`,`service_category_view`.`branch` AS `branch`,`service_category_view`.`category` AS `category`,`service_category_view`.`master_category_id` AS `master_category_id`,`service_category_view`.`show_website` AS `show_website`,`service_category_view`.`display_name` AS `display_name`,`service_category_view`.`private_service` AS `private_service`,`service_category_view`.`international_service` AS `international_service`,`service_category_view`.`infant_service` AS `infant_service`,`service_category_view`.`festive_offer` AS `festive_offer`,`service_category_view`.`makeup_turn` AS `makeup_turn`,`service_category_view`.`online_paylink_discount` AS `online_paylink_discount`,`service_category_view`.`online_paylink_discount_amount` AS `online_paylink_discount_amount`,`service_category_view`.`venues` AS `venues`,`service_category_view`.`zone_venue_names` AS `zone_venue_names`,`service_category_view`.`zone_venue_display_names` AS `zone_venue_display_names` from `service_category_view` where ((`service_category_view`.`park` = 0) and (`service_category_view`.`inactive` = 0) and (`service_category_view`.`bid` not in (35,33,37,31,39,40,90,43,52))) group by `service_category_view`.`zone_id`,`service_category_view`.`display_name` order by `service_category_view`.`zone_id`,`service_category_view`.`infant_service`,`service_category_view`.`international_service`,`service_category_view`.`sessions`;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.zoom_private_meeting_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `zoom_private_meeting_view` AS select `zr`.`id` AS `id`,`zr`.`meeting_id` AS `meeting_id`,`zr`.`topic` AS `topic`,(case when ((`zr`.`drive_file_id` is not null) and (`zr`.`drive_file_id` <> '')) then `zr`.`drive_file_id` else `zr`.`s3_key` end) AS `drive_file_id`,`zr`.`zoom_file_size` AS `zoom_file_size`,`zr`.`date` AS `date`,`zr`.`storage_type` AS `storage_type`,(case when (`sm`.`type` is null) then '0' else `sm`.`type` end) AS `type`,`zr`.`park` AS `park` from (`zoom_recording` `zr` left join `session_meeting` `sm` on(((`zr`.`meeting_id` = `sm`.`meeting_id`) and (`sm`.`park` = '0')))) where ((`zr`.`park` = '0') and `zr`.`meeting_id` in (select `slt`.`meeting_id` from `session_log_tt` `slt` where (`slt`.`park` = '0')) is false and `zr`.`meeting_id` in (select `sl`.`meeting_id` from (`session_log` `sl` join `batch` `b` on(((`sl`.`batch_id` = `b`.`id`) and (`b`.`demo_class` = '0')))) where (`sl`.`park` = '0')) is false and `zr`.`meeting_id` in (select `tasl`.`meeting_id` from `teacher_applicant_session_log` `tasl` where (`tasl`.`park` = '0')) is false) group by `zr`.`zoom_file_size`,`zr`.`date` order by `type` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.zoom_recording
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `zoom_recording` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `meeting_id` text NOT NULL,
  `topic` varchar(250) NOT NULL,
  `download_url` longtext NOT NULL,
  `download_file` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `download_filesize` varchar(250) NOT NULL,
  `zoom_file_size` varchar(250) NOT NULL,
  `drive_file_id` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL,
  `s3_key` varchar(500) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'S3 object key path',
  `s3_bucket` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'S3 bucket name',
  `s3_region` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'S3 region',
  `s3_upload_id` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Multipart upload ID (during upload)',
  `storage_type` enum('google_drive','s3') DEFAULT 's3' COMMENT 'Storage backend used',
  `status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '(1 - Downloaded , 2 - Uploaded)',
  `json` json NOT NULL,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=18886 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.zoom_recording_hsi
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `zoom_recording_hsi` AS select `zr`.`id` AS `id`,`zr`.`meeting_id` AS `meeting_id`,`zr`.`topic` AS `topic`,(case when ((`zr`.`drive_file_id` is null) or (`zr`.`drive_file_id` = '')) then `zr`.`s3_key` else `zr`.`drive_file_id` end) AS `drive_file_id`,`zr`.`storage_type` AS `storage_type`,`zr`.`zoom_file_size` AS `zoom_file_size`,`zr`.`date` AS `date`,`zr`.`park` AS `park` from `zoom_recording` `zr` where ((`zr`.`park` = '0') and (`zr`.`json` like '%hsi.tickleright@gmail.com%')) group by `zr`.`zoom_file_size`,`zr`.`date` order by `zr`.`id` desc;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_TickleRight_9210.zoom_session_activity_link
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `zoom_session_activity_link` AS select `sla`.`id` AS `id`,`sla`.`session_log_id` AS `session_log_id`,`sla`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`sla`.`code` AS `code`,`sla`.`join_url` AS `join_url`,`sla`.`service_id` AS `service_id`,`sla`.`invoice_item_id` AS `invoice_item_id`,`sla`.`invoice_id` AS `invoice_id`,`sla`.`email` AS `email`,`sla`.`park` AS `park`,`sl`.`meeting_id` AS `meeting_id`,`sl`.`date` AS `date`,`sl`.`start_time` AS `start_time`,`sl`.`end_time` AS `end_time`,`b`.`id` AS `batch_id`,`b`.`batch` AS `batch`,`c`.`fname` AS `fname`,`c`.`lname` AS `lname`,`c`.`country_code` AS `country_code`,`c`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`sl`.`bid` AS `bid`,`sal`.`id` AS `sal_id`,`sal`.`otp` AS `otp`,`sal`.`level_id` AS `level_id`,concat(convert((case when (`sal`.`trainer` = 0) then 'https://tickleright.in/session/activity.php?id=' else 'https://tickleright.in/session/activity_trainer.php?id=' end) using utf8mb3),`sal`.`id`,'_',`sal`.`otp`) AS `link_sent`,`sal`.`class` AS `class` from ((((`session_log_attendee` `sla` join `session_log` `sl` on((`sl`.`id` = `sla`.`session_log_id`))) join `batch` `b` on((`b`.`id` = `sl`.`batch_id`))) join `contact` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `sla`.`contact_id`))) left join `session_activity_log` `sal` on(((`c`.`id` = `sal`.`contact_id`) and (`sal`.`date` = `sl`.`date`)))) where (`sla`.`park` = 0);


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_TickleRight_9210.zoom_user
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `zoom_user` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `email_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `first_name` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `last_name` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `dept` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `zoom_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `is_admin` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `api_key` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `api_secret` varchar(500) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `verification_token` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `account_id` varchar(250) NOT NULL,
  `client_id` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `client_secret` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `verificationtoken` varchar(225) NOT NULL,
  `meeting_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `count_date` date NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_by` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=37 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_central.auth_audit_event
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `auth_audit_event` (
  `id` bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `event_type` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `outcome` varchar(16) NOT NULL,
  `reason_code` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `country_code` varchar(8) DEFAULT NULL,
  `mobile` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  `contact_id` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `employee_id` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `user_id` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `ip` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `user_agent` text,
  `request_id` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `details_json` text,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `ix_auth_audit_event_user_id` (`user_id`),
  KEY `ix_auth_audit_event_event_type_created_at` (`event_type`,`created_at`),
  KEY `ix_auth_audit_event_mobile_created_at` (`mobile`,`created_at`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=2029 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_central.auth_identity
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `auth_identity` (
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `password_hash` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `refresh_token` text,
  `reset_token` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `reset_token_expires_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`user_id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `user_id` (`user_id`),
  KEY `ix_auth_identity_reset_token` (`reset_token`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_central.auth_lock_state
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `auth_lock_state` (
  `id` bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `key_type` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
  `country_code` varchar(8) NOT NULL,
  `mobile` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `employee_id` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `key_hash` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `fail_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `first_fail_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_fail_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `locked_until` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_auth_lock_state_type_hash` (`key_type`,`key_hash`),
  KEY `ix_auth_lock_state_locked_until` (`locked_until`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=10 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_central.auth_refresh_token
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `auth_refresh_token` (
  `id` bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` bigint NOT NULL,
  `contact_id` bigint NOT NULL,
  `employee_id` bigint NOT NULL,
  `token_jti` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `token_hash` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `issued_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `expires_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `used_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `revoked_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `rotated_from_id` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `revoke_reason` varchar(32) DEFAULT NULL,
  `issued_ip` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `issued_user_agent` text,
  `issued_device_fingerprint_hash` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_ip` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_user_agent` text,
  `last_used_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_auth_refresh_token_token_hash` (`token_hash`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_auth_refresh_token_token_jti` (`token_jti`),
  KEY `rotated_from_id` (`rotated_from_id`),
  KEY `ix_auth_refresh_token_user_employee_revoked` (`user_id`,`employee_id`,`revoked_at`),
  KEY `ix_auth_refresh_token_expires_at` (`expires_at`),
  CONSTRAINT `auth_refresh_token_ibfk_1` FOREIGN KEY (`rotated_from_id`) REFERENCES `auth_refresh_token` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=686 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_central.cam_recording
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `cam_recording` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `batch_id` int NOT NULL,
  `pi_id` varchar(225) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `duration` time DEFAULT NULL,
  `date_time` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `filename` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `file_id` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `recording` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `merge` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `merge_percentage` int DEFAULT '0',
  `upload` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `upload_percentage` int DEFAULT '0',
  `storage_type` varchar(10) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Storage type: gdrive or s3',
  `s3_key` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'S3 object key (e.g., tratom_recordings/pi_35/xxx.mp4)',
  `s3_bucket` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'S3 bucket name (e.g., tickerightvideos)',
  `status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - recording, 1 - Merging, 2 - Uploading, 3 and above copmleted',
  `sync` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `json` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `error` int DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_cam_recording_pi_filename` (`pi_id`,`filename`),
  KEY `idx_cam_recording_pi_status_updated` (`pi_id`,`status`,`updated_at`),
  KEY `idx_cam_recording_pi_date` (`pi_id`,`date`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=12523 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_central.client_group_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `client_group_view` AS select `cd`.`id` AS `id`,`cg`.`group_no` AS `group_no`,`cd`.`inst_name` AS `inst_name`,`cd`.`db_name` AS `db_name`,`cd`.`inst_type` AS `inst_type`,`cd`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`cd`.`logo` AS `logo`,`cd`.`pincode` AS `pincode`,`cd`.`inactive` AS `inactive` from (`client_group` `cg` join `client_db` `cd` on((`cd`.`id` = `cg`.`client_id`)));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_central.client_member
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `client_member` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Contact Id (from pf_admin database)',
  `client_id` int NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `client_id` (`client_id`),
  KEY `contact_id` (`contact_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `client_clientmember_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`client_id`) REFERENCES `client_db` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=306 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_central.client_module
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `client_module` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `client_id` int NOT NULL,
  `module_id` int NOT NULL,
  `active` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Flag for client''s config access',
  `module` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `abbreviation` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `client_id` (`client_id`),
  KEY `module_id` (`module_id`),
  KEY `active` (`active`),
  CONSTRAINT `client_db_module_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`client_id`) REFERENCES `client_db` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=7515 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_central.client_settings
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `client_settings` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `client_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `opg` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag for Online Payment Gateway - Default No',
  `oif` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag for Online Inquiry Form - Default No',
  `checklist` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag for Account Setup (Checklist) Completion - Default No',
  `biometric_flag` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag for Biometric Device Integration - Default No',
  `email_flag` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag for Email Integration - Default No',
  `sms_flag` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag for SMS Integration - Default No',
  `dummy_flag` int DEFAULT '0',
  `pan_no` varchar(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `pan_name` varchar(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `account_no` varchar(30) DEFAULT '0',
  `account_name` varchar(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `bank_ifsc` varchar(30) DEFAULT '',
  `fb_handle` varchar(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `twitter_handle` varchar(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `insta_handle` varchar(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `youtube_handle` varchar(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `website_flag` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `website_template` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `website_sections` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1234',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `user_id` (`user_id`),
  KEY `client_id` (`client_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `user_client_settings_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `user` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=579 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_central.dataset
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `dataset` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `type` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-Analytics, 1-Dashboard',
  `dataset` varchar(30) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Inquiry, Expiry,Invoice ...',
  `module_id` int NOT NULL,
  `description` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Narration',
  `dataview` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'View name for data request',
  `color` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'color in rgb format',
  `fill` varchar(5) NOT NULL,
  `date_filter` varchar(30) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Column to apply date filter on',
  `default_column` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `default_fetch` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-Count, 1-Sum',
  `check_bid` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `type` (`type`),
  KEY `module_id` (`module_id`),
  KEY `date_filter` (`date_filter`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=14 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  KEY `dataset_id` (`dataset_id`)

BASE TABLE: pf_central.element
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `module_id` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT ' Name on UI',
  `type` int NOT NULL COMMENT '0-List / 1-Entity',
  `parent_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Id of earlier record (for tree structure on UI)',

  `hide` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Flag for screen visibility 0:Visible, 1:Hide, 2:Hide Web, 3:Hide Mob',
  `icon` varchar(20) NOT NULL COMMENT ' Icon on menu and screen',
  `position` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Position of menu item',
  `url` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Destination URL',
  `target` varchar(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `report_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Web Destination URL Id',
  `mobile_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Mobile Destination URL Id',
  `mobile_icon` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `user_type` varchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'E',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `module_id` (`module_id`),
  KEY `parent_id` (`parent_id`),
  KEY `report_id` (`report_id`),
  KEY `mobile_id` (`mobile_id`),
  KEY `park` (`park`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=1963 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_central.element_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `element_view` AS select `e`.`id` AS `id`,(case when (`ce`.`title` is null) then `e`.`name` else `ce`.`title` end) AS `name`,`e`.`module_id` AS `module_id`,`e`.`concat_id` AS `concat_id`,`e`.`type` AS `type`,`e`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`e`.`hide` AS `hide`,`e`.`icon` AS `icon`,`e`.`position` AS `position`,`e`.`url` AS `url`,`e`.`target` AS `target`,`e`.`report_id` AS `report_id`,`e`.`mobile_id` AS `mobile_id`,`e`.`mobile_icon` AS `mobile_icon`,`e`.`user_type` AS `user_type`,`e`.`park` AS `park`,`ce`.`client_id` AS `client_id` from (`element` `e` left join `client_element` `ce` on((`e`.`id` = `ce`.`element_id`)));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_central.element_view_developer
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`developer`@`%` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `element_view_developer` AS select `e`.`id` AS `id`,(case when (`ce`.`title` is null) then `e`.`name` else `ce`.`title` end) AS `name`,`e`.`module_id` AS `module_id`,`e`.`concat_id` AS `concat_id`,`e`.`type` AS `type`,`e`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`e`.`hide` AS `hide`,`e`.`icon` AS `icon`,`e`.`position` AS `position`,`e`.`url` AS `url`,`e`.`target` AS `target`,`e`.`report_id` AS `report_id`,`e`.`mobile_id` AS `mobile_id`,`e`.`mobile_icon` AS `mobile_icon`,`e`.`user_type` AS `user_type`,`e`.`park` AS `park`,`ce`.`client_id` AS `client_id` from (`element_developer` `e` left join `client_element` `ce` on((`e`.`id` = `ce`.`element_id`)));

  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `subject` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'email subject',

  `client_id` int NOT NULL,
  `date_value` date NOT NULL,
  `status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0-Pending / 1-Delivered / 2-Invalid / 3-NCPR / 4-Undeliverd / 5- Expired',
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `datetime` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

BASE TABLE: pf_central.exercise
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `exercise` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `exercise` varchar(500) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `equipment_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `vid` varchar(500) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `image` varchar(500) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `thumbnail` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `muscle_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `description` varchar(1000) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `met` int NOT NULL,
  `time` time NOT NULL DEFAULT '00:00:01' COMMENT 'Time for each rep for exercise with reps, ignore for exercise without reps',
  `para_comb_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `weight` int NOT NULL,
  `distance` int NOT NULL,
  `rest` time NOT NULL,
  `level` int NOT NULL,
  `sec_equip_id` int NOT NULL,
  `old_data` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=5867 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_central.exercise_equipment_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `exercise_equipment_view` AS select `ex`.`id` AS `id`,`ex`.`exercise` AS `exercise`,`ex`.`equipment_id` AS `equipment_id`,`ex`.`vid` AS `vid`,`ex`.`image` AS `image`,`ex`.`thumbnail` AS `thumbnail`,`ex`.`description` AS `description`,`eq`.`equipment` AS `equipment`,`eq`.`description` AS `equipment_description`,`eq`.`image` AS `equipment_image` from (`exercise` `ex` join `equipment` `eq` on((`ex`.`equipment_id` = `eq`.`id`)));

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_central.member_app_offers_subscription_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `member_app_offers_subscription_view` AS select `o`.`id` AS `id`,`o`.`code` AS `code`,`o`.`offer_type` AS `offer_type`,`o`.`value` AS `value`,`o`.`start` AS `start`,`o`.`end` AS `end`,`o`.`package_id` AS `package_id`,`o`.`client_id` AS `client_id`,(case when (`s`.`contact_id` is null) then '0' else `s`.`contact_id` end) AS `contact_id`,(case when (`s`.`client_id` is null) then '0' else `s`.`client_id` end) AS `subscription_client_id` from (`member_app_offers` `o` left join `member_app_subscription` `s` on((`s`.`offer_id` = `o`.`id`)));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_central.member_app_package
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `member_app_package` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `package` varchar(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `duration` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `duration_type` set('Day','Week','Month','Year') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Day',
  `amount` float(7,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `tax` float(7,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `tax_amount` float(7,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `total` float(7,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `client_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=9 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_central.member_app_subscription
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `member_app_subscription` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `receipt` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `client_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `start` date NOT NULL,
  `end` date NOT NULL,
  `package_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `package_amount` float(7,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `package` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `offer_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `offer_code` varchar(15) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `offer_amount` float(7,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `offer_percent` float(7,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `discounted_amount` float(7,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `tax` float(7,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `tax_amount` float(7,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `total_amount` float(7,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `tx_id` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `status` set('-1','0','1') NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (-1 Failed, 0 - Pending, 1 - Completed)',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=63 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

BASE TABLE: pf_central.notify_user
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `notify_user` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `module_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'module id from module table',
  `user_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'user id from user(central db) table',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `user_id` (`user_id`),
  KEY `module_id` (`module_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `user_notify_user_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `user` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=79513 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_central.online_inquiry
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `online_inquiry` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `url` varchar(150) NOT NULL COMMENT 'URL of site',
  `client_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Client id from client table',
  `bid` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Flag / Data( 0 - For whole institute / >0 - for Specific Branch)',
  `form_token` varchar(12) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '12Digit Unique code for online form.',
  `is_active` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT 'Flag(0 - Inactive / 1-Active)',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `form_token` (`form_token`),
  KEY `client_id` (`client_id`),
  KEY `bid` (`bid`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=6 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

  `ifsc_code` varchar(30) NOT NULL,

  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=14 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_central.prism_access_logs
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `prism_access_logs` (
  `id` bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` bigint NOT NULL,
  `action` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `resource_type` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `resource_id` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `decision` enum('Allow','Deny') NOT NULL,
  `matched_policy_id` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `matched_statement_id` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `deny_reason` varchar(256) DEFAULT NULL,
  `request_context_json` text,
  `evaluated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `ix_prism_access_logs_decision` (`decision`),
  KEY `ix_prism_access_logs_user_id_evaluated_at` (`user_id`,`evaluated_at`),
  KEY `ix_prism_access_logs_action_resource` (`action`,`resource_type`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=319 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  `id` bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `version` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `type` enum('identity','resource','permission_boundary','scp') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'identity',
  `created_by` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `name` (`name`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=10 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_central.prism_policy_statements
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `prism_policy_statements` (
  `id` bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `policy_id` bigint NOT NULL,
  `sid` varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
  `effect` enum('Allow','Deny') NOT NULL,
  `actions_json` text NOT NULL,
  `resources_json` text NOT NULL,
  `conditions_json` text,
  `not_actions_json` text,
  `not_resources_json` text,
  `priority` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `ix_prism_policy_statements_effect` (`effect`),
  KEY `ix_prism_policy_statements_policy_id` (`policy_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `prism_policy_statements_ibfk_1` FOREIGN KEY (`policy_id`) REFERENCES `prism_policies` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=22 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_central.prism_policy_versions

  `id` bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,

  `version` int NOT NULL,
  `document_json` text NOT NULL,
  `changed_by` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `changed_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `change_reason` varchar(512) DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_prism_policy_versions_policy_ver` (`policy_id`,`version`),
  KEY `ix_prism_policy_versions_policy_id` (`policy_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `prism_policy_versions_ibfk_1` FOREIGN KEY (`policy_id`) REFERENCES `prism_policies` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=23 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;

BASE TABLE: pf_central.prism_role_policies
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `prism_role_policies` (
  `id` bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `role_id` bigint NOT NULL,
  `policy_id` bigint NOT NULL,
  `attached_by` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `attached_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_prism_role_policies_role_policy` (`role_id`,`policy_id`),
  KEY `ix_prism_role_policies_policy_id` (`policy_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `prism_role_policies_ibfk_1` FOREIGN KEY (`role_id`) REFERENCES `prism_roles` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `prism_role_policies_ibfk_2` FOREIGN KEY (`policy_id`) REFERENCES `prism_policies` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_central.production_cam_recording
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `production_cam_recording` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `relation_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `system_id` varchar(225) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `date_time` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `filename` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `file_id` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 COLLATE utf8mb3_general_ci,
  `recording` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `merge` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `upload` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `status` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - recording, 1 - Merging, 2 - Uploading, 3 and above copmleted',
  `sync` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `json` json NOT NULL,
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=3706 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

BASE TABLE: pf_central.pulse_aggregates
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `pulse_aggregates` (
  `id` bigint unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `bucket` int unsigned NOT NULL,
  `period` mediumint unsigned NOT NULL,
  `type` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `key` mediumtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `key_hash` binary(16) GENERATED ALWAYS AS (unhex(md5(`key`))) VIRTUAL,
  `aggregate` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `value` decimal(20,2) NOT NULL,
  `count` int unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `pulse_aggregates_bucket_period_type_aggregate_key_hash_unique` (`bucket`,`period`,`type`,`aggregate`,`key_hash`),
  KEY `pulse_aggregates_period_bucket_index` (`period`,`bucket`),
  KEY `pulse_aggregates_type_index` (`type`),
  KEY `pulse_aggregates_period_type_aggregate_bucket_index` (`period`,`type`,`aggregate`,`bucket`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=203706202 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_central.request
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `request` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `request_no` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Request / Reference No',
  `action_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'action table id',
  `sms_ready_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'SMS Ready Template Id',
  `email_ready_id` int NOT NULL,
  `exetime` varchar(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '<Minute> <Hour> <Day_of_the_Month> <Month_of_the_Year> <Day_of_the_Week> <Year>Datetime logic of cronjob',
  `date` date NOT NULL,
  `time` time NOT NULL,
  `table_name` varchar(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Name of table to access data from particular db',
  `row_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Row Id of table to access data',
  `client_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Client Id (0 in case for all)',
  `group_no` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `under_development` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0 - In Production, 1 - Under Development)',
  `status` set('0','1','2','3') NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Flag (0 - Not Initiated, 1 - Under Process, 2 - Success, 3 - Failed)',
  `tries` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'flag for delete request',
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `client_id` (`client_id`),
  KEY `action_id` (`action_id`),
  KEY `sms_ready_id` (`sms_ready_id`),
  KEY `email_ready_id` (`email_ready_id`),
  KEY `date` (`date`),
  KEY `time` (`time`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  KEY `under_development` (`under_development`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=2595798 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

  PRIMARY KEY (`entry_uuid`,`tag`),
  KEY `telescope_entries_tags_tag_index` (`tag`),
  CONSTRAINT `telescope_entries_tags_entry_uuid_foreign` FOREIGN KEY (`entry_uuid`) REFERENCES `telescope_entries` (`uuid`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_central.telescope_monitoring
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `telescope_monitoring` (
  `tag` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`tag`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

  `data` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `icon` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=19 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,

  `imp_value` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=23 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_central.user
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `user` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `fname` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `lname` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  `admin` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `mpin` varchar(10) DEFAULT '',
  `password` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `client_id` int NOT NULL,
  `position_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'From employee_position table',
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'contact id from the client_id''s database',
  `chat_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `country_code` varchar(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT '+91',
  `mobile` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `type` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `is_first_login` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT 'Marks for the first login',
  `inactive` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `signup` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `incomplete_alert` int DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0 - incomplete alert has not shoot, 1 - incomplete alert has shoot, 2 member has been created in admin',
  `otp` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'OTP for the registration purpose',
  `system_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `last_changed_mpin` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_changed_password` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `password_hash` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `password_hash_algo` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'bcrypt',
  `password_hash_updated_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `mobile` (`mobile`),
  KEY `password` (`password`),
  KEY `mpin` (`mpin`),
  KEY `client_id` (`client_id`),
  KEY `type` (`type`),
  KEY `park` (`park`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=59741 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_central.user_bid
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `user_bid` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `bid` int NOT NULL,
  `modified_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `user_id` (`user_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `user_userbid_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `user` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=131709 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_central.user_client_permission_module_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `user_client_permission_module_view` AS select `u`.`id` AS `id`,`u`.`fname` AS `fname`,`u`.`lname` AS `lname`,`u`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`m`.`module` AS `module`,`m`.`parent_id` AS `parent_id`,`cm`.`client_id` AS `client_id`,`cm`.`module_id` AS `module_id`,`up`.`permission` AS `permission`,`up`.`cm_id` AS `cm_id`,`up`.`bid` AS `bid` from (((`user` `u` join `user_permission` `up` on((`u`.`id` = `up`.`user_id`))) join `client_module` `cm` on((`up`.`cm_id` = `cm`.`id`))) join `module` `m` on((`cm`.`module_id` = `m`.`id`))) where (`m`.`park` = 0);


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VIEW: pf_central.user_client_social_view
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE ALGORITHM=UNDEFINED DEFINER=`root`@`localhost` SQL SECURITY DEFINER VIEW `user_client_social_view` AS select `u`.`id` AS `id`,`c`.`inst_name` AS `inst_name`,`c`.`db_name` AS `db_name`,`u`.`fname` AS `fname`,`u`.`lname` AS `lname`,`u`.`admin` AS `admin`,`u`.`mpin` AS `mpin`,`u`.`password` AS `password`,`u`.`client_id` AS `client_id`,`u`.`position_id` AS `position_id`,`u`.`contact_id` AS `contact_id`,`u`.`chat_id` AS `chat_id`,`u`.`mobile` AS `mobile`,`u`.`type` AS `type`,`u`.`is_first_login` AS `is_first_login`,`u`.`inactive` AS `inactive`,`u`.`park` AS `park`,`us`.`email` AS `email`,`us`.`gender` AS `gender`,`us`.`social_type` AS `social_type` from ((`user` `u` left join `user_social` `us` on((`u`.`id` = `us`.`user_id`))) join `client_db` `c` on((`c`.`id` = `u`.`client_id`)));


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_central.user_device
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `user_device` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `device_id` varchar(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `device` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `access_token` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `fcm_token` varchar(500) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `last_time` datetime NOT NULL,
  `last_ip` varchar(30) NOT NULL,
  `current_log` datetime NOT NULL,
  `current_ip` varchar(30) NOT NULL,
  `active` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `logout` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` int NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `user_id` (`user_id`),
  KEY `device_id` (`device_id`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  CONSTRAINT `user_userdevice_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `user` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=86464 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

BASE TABLE: pf_central.user_device_app

  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `device_id` varchar(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `device` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `fcm_token` varchar(500) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `last_time` datetime NOT NULL,
  `last_ip` varchar(30) NOT NULL,
  `current_log` datetime NOT NULL,
  `current_ip` varchar(30) NOT NULL,
  `active` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `logout` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `park` int NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `user_id` (`user_id`),
  KEY `device_id` (`device_id`),
  KEY `park` (`park`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=206 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

  `permission` int NOT NULL,
  `bid` int NOT NULL,

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_central.user_sessions
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `user_sessions` (
  `id` bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` bigint NOT NULL,
  `session_token_hash` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `issued_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `expires_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `last_used_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `issued_ip` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `issued_user_agent` text,
  `revoked_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `revoke_reason` varchar(32) DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_user_sessions_token` (`session_token_hash`),
  KEY `ix_user_sessions_expires_at` (`expires_at`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;

BASE TABLE: pf_central.user_social

  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `email` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `gender` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `social_type` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `token` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `image_url` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `social_id` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Social ID ',
  `park` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `email` (`email`),
  KEY `user_id` (`user_id`),
  KEY `park` (`park`),
  CONSTRAINT `user_social_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `user` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=26786 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3;

BASE TABLE: pf_central.users
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `users` (
  `id` bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `username` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `display_name` varchar(120) DEFAULT NULL,
  `password_hash` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `notes` text,
  `created_by` bigint NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `modified_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_users_username` (`username`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_users_email` (`email`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_messenger._bak_facebook_messages
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `_bak_facebook_messages` (
  `id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'UUID primary key',
  `message_id` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Facebook message ID',
  `page_id` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Facebook page ID',
  `psid` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Sender PSID',
  `text` longtext COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT 'Message text content',
  `media_type` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Media type (image, video, etc.)',
  `media_url` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT 'Media URL if applicable',
  `is_from_customer` tinyint(1) NOT NULL COMMENT 'True if from customer, False if from agent',
  `is_lead_form_message` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `sent_at_utc` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Message sent timestamp in UTC',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `ts` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `timestamp_utc` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `timestamp_ist` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `message_id` (`message_id`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_messages_message_id` (`message_id`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_messages_page_id` (`page_id`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_messages_psid` (`psid`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_messages_is_from_customer` (`is_from_customer`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_messages_is_lead_form_message` (`is_lead_form_message`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_messages_created_at` (`created_at`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_messages_sent_at_utc` (`sent_at_utc`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_messages_meta_ts` (`ts`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_messages_timestamp_utc` (`timestamp_utc`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_facebook_messages_page_id_facebook_pages` FOREIGN KEY (`page_id`) REFERENCES `facebook_pages` (`page_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_facebook_messages_psid_facebook_users` FOREIGN KEY (`psid`) REFERENCES `_bak_facebook_users` (`psid`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='Facebook direct messages';

BASE TABLE: pf_messenger._bak_facebook_page_status_logs

  `id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'UUID primary key',
  `page_id` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Facebook page ID',
  `status` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Page status (connected, error, etc.)',
  `error_message` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT 'Error details if applicable',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_page_status_logs_page_id` (`page_id`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_page_status_logs_status` (`status`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_facebook_page_status_logs_page_id_facebook_pages` FOREIGN KEY (`page_id`) REFERENCES `facebook_pages` (`page_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='Facebook page status and health tracking';

BASE TABLE: pf_messenger._bak_instagram_accounts

  `id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'UUID primary key',
  `ig_business_account_id` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Instagram business account ID',
  `ig_business_username` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Instagram business username',

  `access_token_expires_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Token expiration timestamp',

  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `ig_business_account_id` (`ig_business_account_id`),

) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='Instagram business accounts linked to organization';

  `igsid` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Commenter IGSID',
  `text` longtext COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Comment text',

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_messenger._bak_instagram_message_logs
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `_bak_instagram_message_logs` (
  `id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'UUID primary key',
  `message_id` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Reference to instagram_messages.message_id',
  `status` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Message status (sent, delivered, failed, etc.)',
  `error_message` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT 'Error details if status is failed',
  `ts` datetime(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) COMMENT 'Timestamp with microseconds',
  `message_at_utc` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `message_at_ist` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `ix_instagram_message_logs_message_id` (`message_id`),
  KEY `ix_instagram_message_logs_status` (`status`),
  KEY `ix_instagram_message_logs_ts` (`ts`),
  KEY `ix_instagram_message_logs_message_at_utc` (`message_at_utc`),
  KEY `ix_instagram_message_logs_message_at_ist` (`message_at_ist`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='Message delivery and error logs';


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_messenger._bak_instagram_messages
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `_bak_instagram_messages` (
  `id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'UUID primary key',
  `conversation_id` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Instagram conversation ID',
  `igsid` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Sender IGSID',
  `text` longtext COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT 'Message text content',
  `media_type` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Media type (image, video, etc.)',
  `media_url` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT 'Media URL if applicable',
  `is_from_customer` tinyint(1) NOT NULL COMMENT 'True if from customer, False if from agent',
  `is_lead_form_message` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `sent_at_utc` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `ts` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `timestamp_utc` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `timestamp_ist` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `message_id` varchar(512) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `raw_payload_json` longtext COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `metadata_json` longtext COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `is_gif` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `is_ticklegram` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_instagram_messages_message_id` (`message_id`),
  KEY `ix_instagram_messages_conversation_id` (`conversation_id`),
  KEY `ix_instagram_messages_igsid` (`igsid`),
  KEY `ix_instagram_messages_is_from_customer` (`is_from_customer`),
  KEY `ix_instagram_messages_is_lead_form_message` (`is_lead_form_message`),
  KEY `ix_instagram_messages_created_at` (`created_at`),
  KEY `ix_instagram_messages_sent_at_utc` (`sent_at_utc`),
  KEY `ix_instagram_messages_meta_ts` (`ts`),
  KEY `ix_instagram_messages_timestamp_utc` (`timestamp_utc`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_instagram_messages_igsid_instagram_users` FOREIGN KEY (`igsid`) REFERENCES `instagram_users` (`igsid`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='Instagram direct messages';
