--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_messenger.assignment_cursors
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `assignment_cursors` (
  `name` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Cursor identifier (e.g., instagram_cursor)',
  `last_user_id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Last assigned user ID for round-robin',
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`name`),
  UNIQUE KEY `name` (`name`),
  KEY `fk_assignment_cursors_last_user_id_users` (`last_user_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_assignment_cursors_last_user_id_users` FOREIGN KEY (`last_user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='Track round-robin assignment state per platform';


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_messenger.chats
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `chats` (
  `id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'UUID primary key',
  `username` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Customer username/handle',
  `profile_pic_url` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `last_message` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT 'Preview of last message',
  `status` enum('ASSIGNED','UNASSIGNED') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'UNASSIGNED',
  `assigned_to` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Agent ID assigned to this chat',
  `unread_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Unread message counter',
  `platform` enum('INSTAGRAM','FACEBOOK') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INSTAGRAM',
  `instagram_user_id` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `facebook_user_id` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Facebook user ID',
  `facebook_page_id` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Facebook page ID',
  `last_incoming_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Last incoming message timestamp',
  `last_outgoing_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Last outgoing message timestamp',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `ix_chats_platform` (`platform`),
  KEY `ix_chats_status` (`status`),
  KEY `ix_chats_assigned_to` (`assigned_to`),
  KEY `ix_chats_instagram_user_id` (`instagram_user_id`),
  KEY `ix_chats_facebook_user_id` (`facebook_user_id`),
  KEY `ix_chats_created_at` (`created_at`),
  KEY `ix_chats_updated_at` (`updated_at`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_chats_assigned_to_users` FOREIGN KEY (`assigned_to`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='Unified chat table for Instagram and Facebook messages';


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_messenger.db_schema_changes
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `db_schema_changes` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT 'Auto-increment ID',
  `snapshot_id` int NOT NULL COMMENT 'Reference to db_schema_snapshots',
  `change_type` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Type of change (ADD, DROP, MODIFY, etc.)',
  `table_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Table name affected',
  `column_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Column name if applicable',
  `details_json` longtext COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT 'Detailed change information as JSON',
  `created_at` datetime(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) COMMENT 'Change timestamp',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `ix_db_schema_changes_snapshot_id` (`snapshot_id`),
  KEY `ix_db_schema_changes_change_type` (`change_type`),
  KEY `ix_db_schema_changes_table_name` (`table_name`),
  KEY `ix_db_schema_changes_created_at` (`created_at`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_db_schema_changes_snapshot_id_db_schema_snapshots` FOREIGN KEY (`snapshot_id`) REFERENCES `db_schema_snapshots` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=48 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='Granular schema change tracking';


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_messenger.db_schema_snapshots
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `db_schema_snapshots` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT 'Auto-increment ID',
  `created_at` datetime(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) COMMENT 'Snapshot timestamp',
  `snapshot_json` longtext COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Complete schema snapshot as JSON',
  `comment` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Optional snapshot comment',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `ix_db_schema_snapshots_created_at` (`created_at`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=6 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='Historical database schema snapshots for audit trail';


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_messenger.facebook_messages
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  `id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `chat_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `sender` enum('AGENT','INSTAGRAM_USER','FACEBOOK_USER','INSTAGRAM_PAGE') NOT NULL,
  `content` text NOT NULL,
  `message_type` enum('text','image') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'text',
  `timestamp` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `attachments_json` text,
  `metadata_json` text,
  `is_gif` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `is_ticklegram` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `is_lead_form_message` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `platform` enum('INSTAGRAM','FACEBOOK') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'FACEBOOK',
  `facebook_user_id` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `ts` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `timestamp_utc` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `timestamp_ist` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `sent_at_utc` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_messages_chat_id` (`chat_id`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_messages_facebook_user_id` (`facebook_user_id`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_messages_ts` (`ts`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_messages_timestamp_utc` (`timestamp_utc`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_messages_sent_at_utc` (`sent_at_utc`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_messages_meta_ts` (`ts`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_messenger.facebook_pages
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `facebook_pages` (
  `id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'UUID primary key',
  `page_id` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Facebook page ID',
  `page_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `access_token` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `access_token_expires_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Token expiration timestamp',
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `is_parked` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Soft delete flag: 0=visible, 1=parked/hidden',
  `user_id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `connected_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_pages_page_id` (`page_id`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_pages_is_active` (`is_active`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_pages_is_parked` (`is_parked`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_pages_page_id_active_parked` (`page_id`,`is_active`,`is_parked`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_pages_user_id` (`user_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_fbpages_user` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='Facebook business pages linked to organization';

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_messenger.facebook_webhook_events
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `facebook_webhook_events` (
  `id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'UUID primary key',
  `event_id` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `page_id` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Facebook page ID',
  `object` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Webhook object type',
  `payload` json NOT NULL COMMENT 'Complete event payload',
  `processed` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'Whether event has been processed',
  `received_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `processed_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Processing completion timestamp',
  `idempotency_key` varchar(128) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `status` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'QUEUED',
  `attempts` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `last_error` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `updated_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `error_log` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `event_id` (`event_id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `ux_facebook_webhook_events_idempotency_key` (`idempotency_key`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_webhook_events_event_id` (`event_id`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_webhook_events_page_id` (`page_id`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_webhook_events_processed` (`processed`),
  KEY `ix_facebook_webhook_events_status_updated_at` (`status`,`updated_at`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='Raw Facebook webhook events for async processing';

BASE TABLE: pf_messenger.message_templates
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `message_templates` (
  `id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'UUID primary key',
  `name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Template name',
  `content` longtext COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Template content with placeholders',
  `category` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Template category for organization',
  `variables` json DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Supported template variables',
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT 'Template active status',
  `created_by` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Creator user ID',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `platform` enum('INSTAGRAM','FACEBOOK') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `meta_template_id` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `meta_submission_id` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,

  `is_meta_approved` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `ix_message_templates_name` (`name`),
  KEY `ix_message_templates_category` (`category`),
  KEY `ix_message_templates_is_active` (`is_active`),
  KEY `ix_message_templates_created_by` (`created_by`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_message_templates_created_by_users` FOREIGN KEY (`created_by`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='Reusable message templates for agents';

BASE TABLE: pf_messenger.password_reset_tokens
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `password_reset_tokens` (
  `id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'UUID primary key',
  `user_id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Reference to users.id',
  `token` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Unique reset token',
  `expires_at` datetime NOT NULL COMMENT 'Token expiration timestamp',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `token_hash` varchar(128) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `used_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `token` (`token`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_prt_token_hash` (`token_hash`),
  UNIQUE KEY `ux_password_reset_tokens_hash` (`token_hash`),
  KEY `ix_password_reset_tokens_token` (`token`),
  KEY `ix_password_reset_tokens_user_id` (`user_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_password_reset_tokens_user_id_users` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='Password reset token management';

  `id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'UUID primary key',
  `user_id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Reference to users.id',

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASE TABLE: pf_messenger.users
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE `users` (
  `id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'UUID primary key',
  `name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `username` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `email` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `contact_number` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `country` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `emp_id` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `password_hash` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Bcrypt hashed password',
  `first_name` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'User first name',
  `last_name` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'User last name',
  `avatar_url` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT 'Profile picture URL',
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT 'Account active status',
  `role` enum('ADMIN','AGENT') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'AGENT',
  `position_id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `can_receive_new_chats` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `email` (`email`),
  UNIQUE KEY `username` (`username`),
  UNIQUE KEY `ix_users_contact_number` (`contact_number`),
  UNIQUE KEY `ix_users_emp_id` (`emp_id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_users_contact_number` (`contact_number`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_users_emp_id` (`emp_id`),
  KEY `ix_users_email` (`email`),
  KEY `ix_users_username` (`username`),
  KEY `ix_users_is_active` (`is_active`),
  KEY `ix_users_position_id` (`position_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='Core user table for authentication and profile management';
